Umkhandlu weSifundazwe unamukele izinkinga lezi ngokuphuma isitatimende esibeka ukuthi kuzoqaliswa uhlelo olusha lokusabalalisa izinsiza emphakathini ngesikhathi esizayo. Lolu hlelo, olubizwa ngokuthi iNhlangano Yezinsiza Zomphakathi, luzohlanganisa imikhandlu yezifunda, amahhovisi kahulumeni wezwe, kanye nezinhlangano ezingezinhle zokuziphilisa ukuze zisebenzisane ngezidingo zabantu abahluphekayo. Umphathiswa weMicwaningomabhuku utshele abezindaba ukuthi uhulumeni uzimisele ukuguqula lesi simo ngaphambi kokuphela kwesikhathi samazalo ami. Uhulumeni uyaqinisekisa ukuthi zonke izinhlelo lezo zizobe ziqhutshwa ngokucophelela, zibikwa emphakathini, futhi zihlolwe njalo ukukhiqiza imiphumela encomekayo.

Uhlelo lweNdlela Entsha Yezolimo neLwimi Lomhlaba selwethula izinguquko ezibalulekile ezikhetheke ikakhulukazi ukusekela labo abahlala emakubo nabahlwempu. Ngaphansi kohlelo, abalimi bathola imbewu ekhethiwe, izingcebo zomhlaba ezihlolwe izingcweti, kanye noqeqesho lokusebenzisa izindlela zokulima ezintsha nezinokunakekela imvelo. Inkampani kaHulumeni ebhekelele izindlela zolimo ikhiphe imali engaphezulu kwamashumi amahlanu ezigidi zamarandi ukwelekelela izindawo zasemaphandleni ngqo. Lesi sinyathelo silandela imibiko eyethula ukuthi izindawo eziningi zasemakhaya zisahlupheka ngosizi lwendlala ngenxa yokungathuthukiswa kwemifula yokuphuzwa kanye nokungabi khona kwezindlela eziholela emakethe. Ngalokhu, uHulumeni ubeka isisekelo esidinga ukucindezeleka kwezomnotho namasiko emiphakathi yasemakhaya eNingizimu Afrika.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukuletha izinsiza zezempilo maqondana nabantu abahlala kude nezibhedlela nezikole zezempilo. Emaphandleni asezifundazweni ezifana noKwaZulu-Natali naseNtshonalanga Kapa, abasebenzi bezempilo bahambela imizi nemizi ngenhloso yokuvakashela abantu abasemakhaya. Kuphinde kwaqhutshwa nemikhankaso yokuxwayisa abantu ngezigameko zezokugula okufana negciwane lengculazi, isifo sofuba, kanye nesifo sikashukela. Abasebenzi bendawo bebehlangene nabanukeli bezempilo ukwethula izinhlelo zokuhlunga nezokubheka isimo sezempilo sabantu ngokwenani eliphezulu. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi owawubanjelwe eHolweni laseNdwedwe, uMphathi Wesifunda Sezempilo uMnuz Sibusiso Mthethwa uthe lolu hlelo luyingxenye yohlelo olukhulu lukahulumeni lokuletha usizo kwabahluphekayo. Izinhlelo ezinjalo ziyasisiza isizwe ukuthi sihlangabezane nezidingo zezempilo ngendlela enobuqotho nobuzimele. Kuyathokozisa ukubona ukuthi imiphakathi iyakwamukela le mikhankaso ngezinhliziyo ezibanzi, ngoba abantu abaningi bayabona ukubaluleka kwezempilo ezinhle. Ngokomklamo walo hlelo, kuzonikezwa abantu amakiti okuhlola igazi, amaphilisi abalulekile, kanye neziluleko ngokuqhenya kwezempilo nomzimba owomelele. Uhlelo luzophinde ludlondlobalise umkhakha wezempilo ngokuqeqesha osizo-lwakho bezempilo abavela emphakathini ukuze belekelele osonhlalakahle abasebenza emikhakheni emikhulu. Kuyacaca ukuthi uhulumeni ubeke eqhulwini elikhulu impilo yomphakathi njengentsika yenqubekelaphambili yezenhlalo neyezomnotho.

Lezi zinzuzo zihlanganisa isibonelelo sabantwana, isabelo samakhehla nabesifazane abadala, kanye nesibonelelo sokungenzi. Imindeni eminingi yasezindaweni zasemakhaya incike kulezi zinzuzo njengomthombo wayo wokuphila nsuku zonke, ikakhulukazi lapho izinga lokusweleka kwemisebenzi liphezulu kakhulu. Umnyango Wentuthuko Yezenhlalo uzibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi izimali zifinyelela kulabo abazidingayo ngendlela enesithunzi nengakhethi muntu. Ngaphezu kwalokho, uhlelo lokuhlala lwabahlala emigwaqweni luyaqhubeka ukuphakwa, njengoba ohulumeni bendawo bekhulumisana nezinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni ukuze bathole izindawo zokuhlala eziphephile. Abahlali abaningi bakwinqundankulu laseSoweto baxoxe ngendlela izibonelelo zabo ezibasizile ngayo ekuhlinzekeni izingane zabo ngokudla nokufunda. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi owawubanjwe eThekwini, umphathi wesifunda wathi uhlelo lokuhlala olutsha luzovula amathuba amaningi ezindaweni ezishisiwe. Izindlu ezingama-500 ezizoshaywa itshe kulo nyaka zizosiza imindeni engaphansi kwemigomo kahulumeni yokufaneleka. Kulindeke ukuthi izicelo zokuhlala zivulwe ngaphela kuNhlolanja wezi-2025, nazo zonke izicelo zizofakwa nge-inthanethi nokusiza kwabasebenzi bezindlu. Uhulumeni uyaxwayisa abantu ukuba bangazibeki engozini yokukhohliswa ngabathengisi bezindlu abangagunyaziwe, njengoba kukhona izinqubo zokuvikelwa kohlelo lokusemthethweni.

Lezi zimali zinikwa abantu abadala, abantwana, nabantu abakhubazekile, futhi ziyisisekelo esibalulekile sokuphila kwabantu abaningi emiphakathini esindelelekile. Umnyango Wezentuthuko Yomphakathi uqinisekisa ukuthi izinhlelo lezi zifinyelela kubo bonke abantu abahlonzwa njengabadinga usizo lwezimali. Abahlali basemalokishini nasemakhaya baveza ukuthi lezi zimali zisiza kakhulu ekukhipheni izindleko zansuku zonke, njengokudla, uyithi, kanye nezimpahla zesikole. Ngaphezu kwalokho, uhulumeni ube esekele nabanikazi bezindlu ngezinhlelo zokuqhubeka kokwakhiwa kwezindlu zabikelwa ngoHlelo LwesiNgisi olubizwa ngoRDP ukuze kuncishiswe inani labantu abahlala emakhaya angazange aqedwe. Izindlu lezi nikezwa imindeni engenalo njalo igugu elingaphezulu kwemiqathango ebekiwe, futhi inqubo yokukhethwa kwezinzuzo ihlolwa zikhathi zonke ukuvikela ukusetshenziswa okungafanele kwezinhlelo. Iphephelo lezimali nomphakathi lisekela kakhulu abesifazane abaqhuba imizi yabantwana nabantu abadala abangakwazi ukuzixhasa ngokwabo. Ngokwemininingwane yomnyango, amafemu amasha aqashe ngokuthembekile abantu bendawo ukwakha izindlu lezi, okunikeza nemisebenzi emiphakathini lapho ukuntuleka kwemisebenzi kuwumkhuba oqhubekayo. Izisebenzi zikahulumeni zikhuthaza abantu bonke ababhalisiwe ukuthi bahlole ukuthi bayahlangabezana yini nezimfuneko zezinhlelo zokusekela, futhi bazise amasotsha omphakathi uma behlangabezana nezinqinamba zokufinyelela lezi zinzuzo. Uhulumeni uqinisile ukuthi uyaqhubeka nokuthuthukisa lezi zinhlelo ukuze azuze ngokuphelele abantu abaswele kakhulu.

UMnyango Wezokuhlaliswa Kwabantu useqinise izikhwama zesivumelwano sokwakha izindlu ezintsha ezigwaqeni ezahlukene, kuhlanganise nezindawo zasemakhaya lapho isidingo sikhulu khona kakhulu. Izinhlelo zokwesekwa komphakathi, njengamasiniki ezenhlalo kanye nezibonelelo zezingane, zinikeza isandla esisimeme kulabo abaphila ezimweni ezinzima zokuswela. Abahlali abangene kulolu hlelo basebenike ubufakazi bokuthi izimpilo zabo zashintsha kakhulukazi ngemuva kokuthola usizo olufanele. Izibonelelo zezenhlalo zikhokhelwa ngqo emikhondweni yezemali yabantu ngayekhaya, okwenza ukuthi imali ifike ngesikhathi esilungile. Kusukela ngonyaka wezi-2020, uHulumeni weNingizimu Afrika uchithe imali efinyelela ezigidigidini zamarandi ukuze aqinise izinhlelo zokusekela izingane nezalukazi kanye nabantu abakhubazekile. Ukusebenzisana phakathi kwamazwe esifundazwe namasipala kuyiqiniso elibalulekile ukuze izinhlelo zifike kulabo abaswele impela. Ngemuva kwezifundo ezibonakalisiwe emhlangeni wamazwe esifundazwe, izinhlelo zokulungisa izakhiwo zangasese zezindlu asezikhona manje nezintsha zizophinde zandiswe ngaphesheya kweMkhanyakude kanye neNkosi kule nyanga ezayo. Isifundazwe saKwaZulu-Natal sibonakalisa ukukhula okukhulu ekulethweni kwezindlu, okwandise ithemba kubahlali abande bekhohlwa isikhathi eside. Ngokuqinisekile, isizwe siphela sinethemba lokuthi izinhlelo zikahulumeni zizoshintsha izimpilo zabantu abahlupheka emijondolo nasezindaweni zasemakhaya kuleli zwe elikhulu.

Izinhlelo zokusekela umphakathi, ezifana nesibonelelo somdala, isibonelelo sezingane, kanye nesibonelelo esikhethekile kwabakhubazekile, ziqhubeka nokusiza izimindeni eziningi ezisebuhlungwini obukhulu. Uhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal uqinisekise ukuthi izindawo zokukhokha izibonelelo ziyatholakala nakwezindawo ezikude nasemakhaya, ukuze bonke abantu abaswelayo bakwazi ukuthola usizo ngaphandle kwezinkinga. Imizi eminingi yasemaphandleni incike kakhulu kulezi zibonelelo njengoba amathuba emisebenzi eseyanciphe kakhulu eNingizimu Afrika. Abahlali abasezikhungweni zezempilo kanye nasezikolo baxwayiswa ukuthi baqinisekise imininingwane yabo isibhalisiwe ngokusemthethweni ukuze bangabikho esikhundleni sokushiywa ngaphandle. Ngemuva kwezinhlelo zokuhlola okwenziwa nguMnyango Wezenhlalakahle, kutholakale ukuthi abantu abaningi abafanele ukuthola izibonelelo basazidinga ngokuqondile. Lolu hlolo luveze nokuthi izindlu eziningi ezisemakhaya azinayo imibhalo elungile yokufaka izicelo, okuwukuba yinkinga enkulu ekufinyelela usizo. Izinhlelo zezindlu zikahulumeni nazo ziyaqhubeka ukusekela izimindeni eziswelayo ngokwakha izindlu ezinamanzi namagesi, ukuze impilo yabantu iphucuke ngokweqiniso. Uhulumeni uyacela bonke abantu abafanele ukuthola usizo ukuba bavakatshele izikhungo zezenhlalakahle eziseduze nabo nezisemizini ukuze bathole imininingwane eyiyo ngezicelo. Kuyiqiniso elingephikiswa ukuthi izinhlelo zokusekela umphakathi ziyinsika yokuphila kwabantu abaningi eNingizimu Afrika, futhi kumelwe zivikelwe futhi ziqiniswe njalo nguHulumeni.

Ngonyaka wezi-2024, izibalo ezivela eMnyangweni Wezemfundo zibonise ukuthi izingane ezingaphezu kwezigidi ezimbili zisafunda emigwaqweni ebheke izikole zaseNingizimu Afrika, zihlangabezana nezingqinamba ezimandla emphakathini. Izindaba ezikhathazayo zibika ukuthi izikole eziningi ezisemakhaya azina izinsizakusebenza ezanele, njengamabhuku, amakhompyutha, kanye neziteshi zamanzi ahlanzekile. Othisha abaningi bakhala ngokuthi abanikwa ukuqeqeshwa okuqhubekayo okufanele ngenhloso yokuqinisa ikhono labo lokukhulisa ulwazi lwabantwana. Izifundazwe ezifana naKwaZulu-Natal, iMpumalanga, kanye neLimpopo zilandwa njengezindawo lapho ukufunda khona kusaxazuluka kakhulu ngenxa yezinkinga ezinzulu. Umphakathi ubizele uhulumeni ukuthi asukume ngamandla ukuze axazulule izinkinga lezi ngesikhathi esingesiphi ngoshevu. Inyunyana yothisha ibuye yaxwayisa ukuthi uma ingxabano yemali yemfundo ingasonjululwa maduze, izinga lemfundo liyehla ngokwesabekayo. Izikole ezisemadolobheni nalezo ezisemakhaya zibhekana nezinselelo ezahlukene, kepha zombili zidinga ukunakekelwa ngokulinganayo nguhulumeni wakwaZulu-Natal kanye nokazwelonke. Amakholeji kanye namanyuvesi nawo asebizele abafundi abasafika ngemali yezibonelelo eziyonele ukuze bakwazi ukuqeda izifundo zabo ngokuphumelelayo. Isikhathi esiyinhloko manje ukuthi izinhlaka zikahulumeni zisebenzisane nezikole, izinhlangano zomphakathi, kanye nabazali ekwakheni ikusasa lemfundo eliqinile futhi elinokusimama ngawo wonke amazinga omphakathi waseNingizimu Afrika.

Emiphakathini eminingi yaseNingizimu Afrika, abantu abasemhlabeni bayaqhubeka nokubhekana nezingqinamba ezinzima zokuphila, ikakhulukazi labo abangasebenzi noma abakhubazekile. Uhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal uqinisekise ukuthi izinhlelo zosizo lwezimali, okubizwa ngezibonelelo zikahulumeni, ziyaqhubeka ukusebenza ngempumelelo ezindaweni zasemakhaya nasezindaweni zasemadolobheni. Ngaphezulu kwabantu abayi-500 000 abathola izibonelelo zezingane kuzifunda ezahlukahlukene, lapho imindeni eminingi incike kulezi zimali ukuze ikhiphe izidingo zansuku zonke. Umnyango Wezentuthuko Yabantu Nezokuphepha Kwentuthuko Yabantu uyaqhubeka nokuxhumana nemiphakathi ukuze kutholakale ukuthi ziziphi izindawo lapho osizo lwezindlu ludinga ukwandiswa khona ngokushesha. Abahlali abaningi eNkandla nasezindaweni eziseduzane bakhala ngokuthi izindlu zabo zingahlali abantu kahle, ikakhulukazi ngesikhathi semvula emandla, okuholela ekutheni babheke izingozi zempilo. Inhlangano yabantu basekhaya ithe izifundo zokuqeqesha abahlali ngamalungelo abo kuhlelo lwezindlu zikahulumeni zisize kakhulu ukuveza izinkinga. Osomabhizinisi bendawo nabo bahlanganyele ekwakhiweni kwezakhiwo ezizosetshenziswa njengezikhungo zokulekelelana, lapho abantu bendawana bebonelana ngolwazi kanye nangezinsizakusebenza. Ohulumeni bezifunda baqinisekisa ukuthi imali eyabelwe izinhlelo zosizo izofika ngesikhathi efanele, futhi izinhlangano ezizimele zizolandela ukusetshenziswa kwayo ngokucophelela. Lezi zinyathelo zibonakalisa ukuzibophezela kukahulumeni ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi bonke abantu bathola usizo olufanele nokuthi akekho umuntu ozishiya nhlangothi ngesikhathi sokuhlinzekwa kwezidingo eziyisisekelo zokuphila okufanele.

Emizini eminingi yasemakhaya, abantu baseNingizimu Afrika baqhubeka nokubhekana nezinselelo ezinkulu eziphathelene nezempilo yomphakathi, ikakhulukazi lezo eziphathelene nezokwelashwa kwabantwana abancane. Ngakho-ke, uMnyango Wezempilo ufake uhlelo olusha lokuhambela imijondolo nemiphakathi emijondolo ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukufinyelela kwezinsizakalo zempilo. Lolu hlelo, olwaziwa ngokuthi iNational Health Outreach Programme, luhlose ukukhulisa ulwazi ngezindlela zokuvikela izifo ezinjengesigulazwe, isifuba, kanye namalaria ezifundazweni ezithintekile kakhulu. Izinhlelo zokugoma zisetshenziswa njengesithupha esibalulekile kulo msebenzi, njengoba abasebenzi bezempilo behambela izindawo ezahlukene ngamalanga onke amasonto. Kulezo zindawo lapho izibhedlela zikude khona, amaSpaza ezempilo asiza njengamabhuloho phakathi komphakathi nalezo zinsizakalo ezidingekayo. Abahlali basatshelwa ngokuqondile ngamalungelo abo ezempilo kanye nangezindlela zokubika izinkinga abahlangabezana nazo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, uhulumeni wasimamisa uhlelo lokufundisa omama abazithwele ngokunakekela impilo ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa nangesikhathi emuva kokuzala. Lezi zikhwama zempilo zihlelwa ngabaphathi bezempilo basekhaya ngokubambisana nezinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni ukuze zifike kubantu abadinga usizo olwengeziwe. Umthwalo omkhulu wokwelashwa kwabantu abagula ngezifo ezivinjezelwa ngomgomo usanda kukhula kakhulu ezinhospitalini zomphakathi, okungenxa yokwehla kohlelo lokugoma eMzansi Afrika. Abaphathi bezempilo bahleze bekhuthaza amalunga omphakathi ukuba avakashele izikhungo zezempilo ngaphandle kokulinda ukugula kakhulu, ukuze izinkinga zitholakale kusezimbanjelwane. UMnyango Wezempilo uyaqiniseka ukuthi yonke imikhankaso yempilo izoqhutshezelwa phambili ngesibindi nangezinsiza ezanele ukuze impilo yomphakathi ithuthuke ngokuphila okuhle nangokuqinisekile.

UMasipala weTheku uzakazeke ngethemba lokuthi ihlelo elisha lokunikezwa kwezinsizakalo lizosombulula lezi zinkinga ezikhathaza umphakathi iminyaka eminingi. Ngokwezibalo ezikhishwe yiNhlangano Yokulawulwa Kwezindlela Zamanzi, ngaphezulu kwabantu abangamashumi amane nezinhlanu izigidi baseNingizimu Afrika basathola amanzi angahlanzeki noma abawatholanga nhlobo emakhaya abo. Umkhandlu weTheku uzibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi zonke izindawo zasemakhaya nakwezomnotho zinikezwa izinsizakalo ezifanele ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali wezi-2026. Ekhuluma esikhungweni sohlelo lokuhlangana komphakathi, iSikhulumi soMkhandlu sathi iHhovisi LikaThimbulani Ntanzi lizosebenza ngokukhulu ukuzikhandla ukuqinisekisa ukuthi imishini yokuhlinzeka ngamanzi ilungiswa ngokushesha. Izindlela ezifile, amagodi amanzi aphukile, kanye nezikhumulo zemfucuza ezigeleza phandle ziseyinselelo enkulu kubahlali abaningi abakhala iminyaka. Ukuze lezi zinkinga zixazululwe ngokugcwele, iNduna yeNhlangano Yezindlela Zomphakathi ibikhumbuza iziphathimandla ukuthi izimali zikahulumeni kufanele zisetshenziswe ngendlela ecacile nephumelelayo. Kuyacaca ukuthi ukufeza izifiso zabantu ababuyela emakhaya noma abahlala emadolobheni amancane kudingelana nokuzinikela okukhulu kohulumeni basifundazwe nezindawo. Uhlelo lweNkinga Yezinsizakalo luzoba nezigaba ezintathu zokuqala ukusebenza ngenyanga kaMbasa wangonyaka ozayo, uma izimali ziqinisekiswa yiNhlangano Yokuxhaswa Kwezimali yoMzansi Afrika. Umphakathi uceliwe ukuba ubike zonke izinkinga zekheli lakhe elifanele kuleli hhovisi lasendaweni.

Lolu hlelo, olwaqalwa eminyakeni emibili eyedlule, luhlose ukwelapha izinkinga zamanzi ezikhona phakathi kwemizi yasemakhaya kanye nalemindeni eyahlukene ezintabeni. Izikhulu zikamasipala zichaze ukuthi izimali ezisetshenziswayo zivela emukelwa kahle nguhulumeni kazwelonke kanye nezinkampani zabucala ezitholakalayo kuzwe lonke. Umhlahlandlela kaMasipala ubuye waveza ukuthi kunezinhlelo ezengeziwe zokwakha imigwaqo nenqubo yokuphatha imfucuza ezizokwethulwa ngaphakathi kwezinyanga eziyisithupha ezizayo. Abahlali abebekhathazekile ngokushoda kwamanzi baphendule ngokuthokoza, bebonga izikhulu zimiso zikamasipala ngomzamo wokufeza izidingo eziyisisekelo zabantu. Iziphathimandla zikamasipala ziyaxwayisa nokho ukuthi, noma izimpumelelo zisivela, kusadingeka ukuqhubeka ngawo wonke umphakathi ukufeza izinhloso zikahulumeni. Uhlelo lokuqeqesha olwenzelwe abasebenzi bezindawo bayancomwa kakhulu, njengoba lusiza ekufundiseni abantu indlela yokulondoloza izinsiza zomphakathi. Umphakathi wakhuthazwa ukuba ubike zonke izinkinga ezikhona mayelana nezinsiza zomphakathi kuhhovisi lomasipala elisondele nawe. Izingqungquthela zomphakathi ezimisiwe ezizobanjwa ngenyanga yoMfumfu zizonikeza abahlali ithuba lokubuza imibuzo kanye nokuveza izimvo zabo ngezinhlelo ezizayo. Ukusebenzisana phakathi kukahulumeni nabahlali kuyiqhaza elibalulekile ekwakhiweni komphakathi oqine futhi onamandla.

Izinkinga zihlanganisa ukungabi nezinsiza ezifanelekile, ukuntuleka kwamanzi okuwela kahle emhlabathini, kanye nokusweleka kofuzo lwezinhlanzi ezithwala izithelo eziningi. UMnyango Wezolimo, Ukuthuthukiswa Kwemhlabathi Wezindawo Zasemakhaya kanye Nezokukhiqizwa Kwezokudla usebenzise uhlelo olusha oluhlose ukuxhasa labo abalimi abathinteka kakhulu yilezi zinqinamba. Ngaphansi kwalolu hlelo, abalimi abahlanganyeli banikwa imbewu ekhethiwe, izinsiza zokukhiqiza, kanye nezifundo zokuqeqeshwa eziqhutshelwa emasimini abo. Umgomo walo msebenzi ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abalimi bakhiqiza izithelo namasimba amaningi ngaphandle kokunamathelela izindleko eziphezulu. Esikhathini esedlule, uhlelo olufanayo lwalusebenzelana nabalimi abayi-12 000 ezifundazweni ezine, lapho imiphumela yakhombisa ukwenyuka okubonakalayo ekukhiqizweni kwezitshalo ngesikhathi somqomiso. Manje uhlelo lwalwandiswa lwafinyelela ezifundazweni eziyisikhombisa ezikhethiwe, kuhlanganisa iKwaZulu-Natal, iMpumalanga, kanye namaLimpopo. Abahlali bendawo bamukela lolu hlelo ngenhliziyo yonke, befaka nezicelo zokungena kuwo ngokushesha ngemuva kokumenyezelwa. Izinkampani zokuthengisa imikhiqizo yabalimi nazo zimenyelwe ukuba zihlanganyele ekuxhaseni abanikazi bamafama amancane ukuze imkhiqizo ibo ifike emigwaqweni yezimakethe ezikhona. Izifundazwe ezithintekayo ziqinisekisa ukuthi zonke izinqubo zenziwa ngokusobala, ukuze amalungelo abalimi angcwatshwa.

UMkhandlu weTheku uqinisekise ukuthi izinhlelo zokulungiswa kwezingxabo zamanzi zisaqhubeka, kepha abaningi bathi basahlezi izinsuku ezintathu noma nezone bengenawo amanzi. Inhlangano ebhekelele izindaba zomphakathi yaleli dolobha isikhipha isinqumo sokuthi izoqhakambisa udaba lolu kuMnyango Wezamanzi kanye neZinhlanzeko ukuze kutholakale usizo olushesha. Izisebenzi zoMkhandlu zibike ukuthi izimoto ezilungisayo sezithumwa ezindaweni ezahlukene ukuze kuphenywe ukuthi zikhona yini izingxabo ezinofa noma ezijiyile. Kuyinhlalayenza eqinisekisiwe ukuthi abantu abaphila ezindaweni lapho izingxabo zikhona iminyaka eminingi ngaphandle kokulungiswa bathola ubunzima obukhulu ngesikhathi sasehlobo uma ukusebenziseka kwamanzi kukhula ngesivinini. UMkhandlu uyanxusa ukuthi wonke umuntu owazisela ikheli lakhe afike komasipala ngqo ukuze abhalise inkinga yakhe ngokusemthethweni, okuzovumela izisebenzi ukuthi zikhawuleze ngemisebenzi yazo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, kunezinhlelo ezintsha zokufaka izitsha zamanzi ezinkulu ezindaweni ezithize, okuyinhlelo ezoqala ukusebenza ngphambi kokugcina konyaka wezimali wangalonyaka. UMnyango Wezamanzi uqinisekise ukuthi imali eyanele ibekiwe, futhi izinkontileka zokulungisa izingxabo sesithintwa ngokusemthethweni. Labo abahitshelelwa inkinga yamanzi banxuswa ukuxhumana nomkhandlu ngomzila wezocingo noma ngokuvakashela amahhovisi omphakathi aseduze nabo ngesikhathi semisebenzi esemthethweni.

Uhlelo lukahulumeni lokusekelwa kwabalimi abancane seluyizithelo ezinhle kule minyaka emibili edlule, njengoba izinhlangano ezahlukene zikhipha imali enkulu ukuze kufakwe ngokuphelele imishini yokulima kanye nezinhlobo zezicelo zezitshalo ezintsha. Ngaphezu kwalokho, izindawo eziningi zasemakhaya sezikwazile ukufuqa phambili ngenxa yenhlelo yokuthuthukiswa kwamasimi amancane anezikhali zobuchwepheshe bezesimanje. Abalimi abawu-5 200 abebethinteka kulolu hlelo baqinisekisa ukuthi izitshalo zabo zithele izithelo ezenele ukuze zondla imindeni kanye nezimakethe zasekhaya. Isikhungo sikahulumeni esikuSikhawini sesinike abalimi ukwaziswa okunzulu ngokusebenzisa umhlaba ngendlela efanele nezimiso zomthetho wezolimo wezwe. Izinhlelo ezifana neNational Development Plan zisuselwa phezu kwemibono ethi abalimi abasemakhaya kumele basizwe ngokushesha ukuze kuncisguliswe indlala yasezindaweni ezisemaphandleni. Umnyango omele izolimo usebenzisana nabanikazi bemvelo ukuze kutholakale amathuba amasha okusebenzisa umhlaba ongasebenzi kahle. Izinhlelo zohulumeni nazo zikuqinisekile ukuthi abesifazane kanye nabasebasha bangathola isabelo esilinganayo emaphrojektini ezolimo asemaphandleni. Kuhloswe ukuthi phakathi nonyaka wezimali omusha, uxhasomali lwezemvelo luyofinyelela kubalimi abaningi njengoba izinsizakalo zezolimo zithuthukiswa nezimali zokusekelwa izitshalo ziyakhishwa ngesikhathi esifanele. Ukuze inhlalakahle yomphakathi wezolimo ithuthuke kakhulu, kudingeka ukubambisana okuqinile phakathi kuhulumeni, izinkampani zomkhakha ozimele, nabalimi babo siqu.

Izinsiza-mali ezifana nesibonelelo sabantwana, isibonelelo sobuguga, kanye nesibonelelo esikhethekile sokunakekela abantu abakhubazekile zisiza izigidi zabantu abaswele emakhaya nasemaphandleni ahlukene kuleli. Umnyango Wezentuthuko Yomphakathi uqinisekise ukuthi zonke izicelo ezifike ngendlela efanele zizoxazululwa ngesikhathi esifanele, njengoba ubandlululo lwezenhlalakahle lungeke lubekezelelwe. Kulo nyaka wezemali, uHulumeni ukhiphe imali eningi kakhulu ukuze uhlinzeke izidingo zezakhamizi eziphila ezimweni ezinzima, okuyinto ekhombisa ukuzibophezela kwakhe ekuphilisaneni kobulungiswa bezenhlalo.

Emaphandleni nasezindaweni zasemadolobheni, abahlali abaningi babhekana nezingqinamba ezinkulu ekufinyelela izinsiza-mali ngenxa yokungabi namazisi afanele noma ukusweleka kwamakheli asemthethweni. Ukuze kulungiswe lezindaba ezibalulekile, uMnyango usungule izinhlelo zokuthunyelwa kwabasebenzi abazinikele emiphakathini ukuze balekelele izakhamizi ngezicelo kanye namazini ayadingeka. Ngokusebenzisana nezinhlaka zikahulumeni wasekhaya nezinhlangano zomphakathi ezizimele, uMnyango uzobheka izidingo zomphakathi ngqo, ngaphandle kwabantu ukuhamba ibanga elide. Izikhungo zezinsiza-mali eziphathekayo nezinhlelo zokusebenza ngomakhalekhukhwini nazo zisungulwe ukuze kulukhuni kuncishiswe kwabantu abadala nabantu abakhubazekile. UHulumeni ukhuthaza wonke umuntu ofanelekile ukuthi angagcini ebukele kodwa aqhubeke nokufaka izicelo zazo zonke izinsiza-mali asefaneleke ukuzithola, ngoba izinhlelo zokusekela umphakathi zakhiwe ukulwa nendlala nokuletha ithemba kuzo zonke izakhamizi zelizwe laseNingizimu Afrika.

Izimo zezulu eziguquguqukayo nezinkinga zengqalasizinda sezibe nomthelela omubi ekukhiqizweni kokudla okuningi kulezi zindawo zasemakhaya. Uhlelo olusha lukahulumeni lwamazwe wonke lokusekelwa kwabalimi abasezingeni eliphansi luqonde ukuxazulula lezi zinkinga ngokunikezela ngezimbewu ezikhethiwe, izinzalo zokufuya, namathuluzi olimo abalimi abangawasizi. Ngokwemibiko ekhishwe yiSigungu Sokuthuthukiswa Kwezolimo neziNdlela Zasemakhaya, inani labalimi abancane abaphumelela ukuhambisana nalolu hlelo lenyuke ngamaphesenti angamashumi amabili nesikhombisa ngonyaka odlule. Izinhlelo zokufunzwa ezixhunywe nokusetshenziswa komhlaba ngendlela efanele ziye zanikwa abalimi emiphakathini eyehlukene, kuhlanganise nabesifazane kanye nabasha. Kuhloswe ukuthi ukulimazwa komhlaba nakho kuphele ngokuningi uma lezi zinhlelo zilandelwa kahle ngabantu bendawo. Amagosa ahambayo, abe yingxenye yehlelo, asebeke avakashele imizi yezolimo engaphezu kwamakhulu amane kuleli zwe kulolu nyaka wodwa. Indlela yokuphatha izinsiza zezolimo ngobunhlakahle nayo ibaluleke kakhulu ekwakhiweni kwezimpilo ezingcono emakhaya. Kuhulumeni, uhlelo lokuqhubeka nokusekela abalimi emaphandleni luyikhiyana enkulu ekuxazululeni ubuphuya kanye nokungenzi ngcono komnotho wezindawo zasemakhaya eNingizimu Afrika yonkana.

UMkhandlu weThekwini uzimisele ukubhekana nale nkinga ngokuqala uhlelo olusha lokuvuselela izingqalasizinda zamanzi oluzothatha iminyaka emibili ukuze luqedwe. Lolu hlelo luzohlanganisa ukusetshenzwa kwamaphayipi amasha abanzi, ukwakhiwa kwamathange amanzi amaningi, kanye nokubuyekezwa kwezinqubo zokuphatha amanzi ezindaweni ezishaywe kakhulu yile nkinga. Izindawo ezifana neKwaMashu, uMlazi, kanye naseNtuzuma zizongenela kuqala kulolu hlelo, njengoba zinezibalo eziphezulu zabahlali abangenayo imisebenzi yamanzi efanelekile. Isikhulumi soMkhandlu, sithe imali eyaba yizigidi ezingama-R450 isinikezwe kulolu hlelo nguHulumeni weZifundazwe, futhi imisebenzi izoqala ngasekupheleni kwekota yokuqala yonyaka omusha wezimali. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni omkhulu owabanjwa eSibayeni sezeNdlalifa ngesonto eledlule, uNgqongqoshe woMnyango waManzi noNamathambo wazwakalisa ukukhathazeka ngokukhubazeka kwezinqubo zezikhungo zezindawo zasemakhaya, ebeka ukuthi uHulumeni uzogxila ekuqeqesheni abasebenzi abasha ukuze babe ngabanikazi bemisebenzi yamanzi ezindaweni. Wabuye wagcizelela ukubaluleka kokuhlanganyela komphakathi ekuqapheni izingqalasizinda zamanzi, esho ukuthi abahlali mabike izinkinga ngokushesha emkhandlwini wabo ngoba ukubika okusheshayo kugcina imali yomphakathi. UMnyango ucela wonke umuntu onendaba nale nkinga ukuba avakashele izihhovisi zoMkhandlu noma asebenzise inombolo yezinsiza zoMkhandlu ukuze athole ulwazi oluthe vetshe ngalolu hlelo olubalulekile.

Izinhlelo ezifana nesibonelelo sabantwana, isibonelelo sabadala, kanye nesibonelelo sokunakekela ziyingxenye ebalulekile yohlelo lukahulumeni lokuqinisa imiphakathi ebhekene nobumpofu. Emiphakathini yasemakhaya, lezi zinhlelo zisiza ukuqeda indlala kanye nokunikeza abantwana amathuba okufunda ngezinga elifanele. Abahlali abaningi sebeqale ukuzwa umehluko omkhulu ekuphileni kwabo ngenxa yalezi zinhlelo, ikakhulukazi abantu abadala nabakhubazekile. Ngokusho kwezinhlaka zikahulumeni, imali yesibonelelo sabantwana ikhulisiwe ukuze igcine ukulandela izimo zomnotho eziguquguqukayo kanye nezidingo zabantu abampofu. Izinhlangano ezisebenza emalokishini nasemaphandleni ziyasizana ne-South African Social Security Agency ukuqinisekisa ukuthi labo abasemathenjeni abahlali bathola usizo ngesikhathi esifanele. Ngaphezu kwalokhu, uhlelo lokunikeza izindlu emphakathini luyaqhubeka ukusiza amakhaya amaningi athola indawo yokuhlala efanele ngaphandle kobunzima obukhulu. Uhulumeni ubeke phambili indaba yokwakha izindlu ezifinyelela kumakhaya ansundu nalawo azithola ekungeneni kwemali ephansi, ngenjongo yokwenza amazwe alinganayo kubo bonke abantu. Omasipala abaningi manje basebehlele izinhlelo ezikhethekile zokunikeza amanzi kanye nogesi kumakhaya athola izibonelelo zikahulumeni, ukuze kusetshenziswe imali kahle futhi abantu bahlale ngokukhululeka. Kubalulekile ukuthi imiphakathi yazi ngamalungelo ayo futhi ithole ulwazi ngezindlela zokufaka izicelo zosizo lwasemphakathini, ngoba abantu abaningi abakazi ukuthi bangathola usizo luni.

Umkhandlu wesifunda ubike ukuthi uhlelo olusha lokufakwa kwezingxibo zamanzi luzosimamisa isimo kulezi zindawo ezihluphekayo, uhlelo olubiza izigidi eziyisikhombisa zamarandi. Emhlanganweni owawubanjwe ngesonto eledlule eHhovisi Lesigungu SaseNdlunkulu, iziphathimandla zisho ukuthi umsebenzi wokulungiswa kwezingxibo uzoqala ngenyanga ezayo nokulindeleke ukuqedwa phakathi kwezinyanga eziyisithupha. Ngokomthetho kaHulumeni, wonke umuntu unelungelo lokuthola amanzi ahlanzekile ngaphandle kokukhokha ngaphezulu kwamandla akhe, ikakhulukazi amalunga omphakathi ahlala ezindaweni zasezifundazweni zasemakhaya. Izindlela ezifile zibe yinkinga enkulu nakakhulu emizini eseduze nomgwaqo omkhulu webhishi wesifunda, lapho izimoto zibalelwa ku-5 000 ngosuku zidlula khona. Umlawuli wezokuthutha wethula isinqumo sokuthi izimoto ezikhulu zokulungisa imigwaqo seziqalile ukusebenza kule ndawo kusukela ngolwesibili. Ngaphezu kwalokhu, izikole nezinhlangano zezempilo zomphakathi nazo zizuza kulolu hlelo, njengoba izinsizakusebenza ezidingekayo zizofakwa endaweni yokusetshenziswa komphakathi. Abaholi bomphakathi bameme wonke umuntu ukuba abe yingxenye yemihlangano yokuhlela eyenziwa njalo ngenyanga, ukuze izwi labantu lizwakale kahle ekwakhiweni kwezinqubomgomo zomsebenzi. Isinqumo esibalulekile esithathelwe emhlanganweni omkhulu sibonisa ukuthi uHulumeni uzimisele ukufeza izethembiso zomphakathi ngendlela esobala nenengqondo.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angagelezi kade kuyizinkinga ezishaye umphakathi nzima, ikakhulukazi ezindaweni zasemakhaya lapho abantu bengatholi usizo olwanele. Umkhandlu wezifundazwe usukumele, wamemezela uhlelo olusha lokuletha izidingo zomphakathi ngendlela engcono nakho konke ukufeza izidingo zabantu. Ngokwemibiko eshicilelwe yikomiti elibhekelele izindaba zomphakathi, imali elingana namabhiliyoni amabili amarandi izosetshenziswa ukwakha imigwaqo entsha kanye nokufaka amapaiphi amanzi ezindaweni ezidingayo. Kulindeleke ukuthi lo hlelo luzokuqala ngokusemthethweni ngoZibandlela walo nyaka, kuze kuphele isikhathi seminyaka emithathu yokwakha nokuhlela kabusha. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni omkhulu owawubandakanya izikhulu zikahulumeni kanye namalungu omphakathi, iMeya yalesi sifunda yagcizelela ukuthi akekho umuntu ozosalela emuva kulolu hlelo. Abahlali base-Nqutu nase-Msinga baxoxe ngemihlangano ethize ehlelwa yikomidi elizimele, belindele izimpendulo ngothando lwesifundo kanye nokufinyelela kwemfundo yezingane zabo. Izikhulu zikahulumeni zithe ukwakhiwa kwezikole ezintsha nezibhedlela kuzoqhubeka ngokuheha kwabasebenzi abanolwazi olwanele neziqu. Onke amasonto emiphakathi, amabandla nezinhlangano ezizimele ziyacelwa ukuba zizibandakanye nalobu hlelo ukuze izidingo zabantu ziphathwe ngendlela efanele nangobuqotho obulinganayo. Umphakathi uyacelwa ukuba ubike izinkinga noma izikhalo kuhlelo lwamakheli ashicilelwe ngokusemthethweni ngumasipala wezifunda.

UMnyango Wezokuhlaliswa Kwabantu noKuthuthukiswa Kwemiphakathi uzokwethula uhlelo olusha lokuqinisa izinsizakalo kuwo wonke amasipala izwe lonke. Lolu hlelo luzoquketha ukwakhiwa kabusha kwemigwaqo esemakhaya, ukuxhunywa kwamanzi emizini engenamkhumbi, kanye nokusungulwa kwamahhovisi omphakathi azonikeza usizo lwangokomthetho ngokuqondile. Imali ebalelwa emabhiliyonini amane amarandi ibekiwe ukuze lezo zinsizakalo zifinyelele izakhamuzi ezifanelekile ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali. Izifundazwe ezinhlanu, okuhlanganisa iGauteng, iKwaZulu-Natali, neNtshonalanga Kapa, zizoba yizifundazwe zokuqala ukuhlola lolu hlelo, phambi kokunwetshwa kwalo ezifundazweni ezisele. Oyikomishana wamasipala, eSikhulumela Umphakathi, uthe lolu hlelo luzosiza ukuqeda ubukhewu phakathi kwamasipala asezindaweni ezisezingeni eliphezulu kanye nawo asezindaweni zasemakhaya. Umphakathi uzokwaziswa ngemihlangano yomphakathi evuliwe, lapho izakhamuzi zizokwazi khona ukubuza imibuzo futhi zinikeze izimvo zazo ngokuqondile emnqubweni wokwenziwa kwezinqumo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, ohulumeni bendawo becelwa ukuthumela imibiko yendlela izinsizakalo ezihamba ngayo, ukuze inkambiso ibe sobala futhi iqondakale kubantu bonke. UMnyango uqinisekise ukuthi abasebenzi abazoqeqeshwa bazoqashwa emiphakathini yendawo, okuyinto ezoqinisa umnotho wasekhaya ngesikhathi esifanayo. Izakhamuzi zikhuthazwa ukubhalisa ezindaweni zikahulumeni wendawo ukuze zithole ulwazi olusha ngezikhathi zonke izinhlelo zikhishwa.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angagelezi kube yinkinga enkulu emiphakathini eminingi yasemakhaya ngonyaka odlule, kodwa uHulumeni manje ukhombisa izimpawu zokuguquka. UMnyango Wezokuthuthukiswa Kwamaphakathi ubhengeze uhlelo olusha lokusetshenziswa kwemali yokuthuthukisa izingqalasizinda zomphakathi kuzo zonke izifundazwe zezwe. Lolu hlelo luzobandakanya ukwakhiwa kabusha kwemigwaqo, ukuhlolwa kwezinhlelo zamanzi, kanye nokwakhiwa kwezindlu zangasese ezihlanzekile ezikoleni nasezindaweni zezempilo. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni omkhulu owawubanjwe eGauteng, iSekela Lingqongqoshe libalule ukuthi imali ephakela lolu hlelo ifinyelela ezigidini ezingamashumi amabili ezamarandi. Imiphakathi ethintekayo izosizakala ngokuqashwa kwabantu bakuleo ndawo ukwenza lezi zinto, okuyinto ezonikeza abantu abasha amathuba emisebenzi. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuba babike izinkinga zezingqalasizinda ezikhona kulelo muzi ngokwenza izicelo ezifanele. IMasipala iyaqhubeka nokusebenzisana noHulumeni wezifundazwe ukuqinisekisa ukuthi imali iye khona lapho idingeka khona ngempela. Izikhulu zikahulumeni ziqinisekise ukuthi ukuqapha nokulawulwa kwezimali kuzokwenziwa ngobuqotho obuphelele ukuvikela ukuphanga. Kubalulekile ukuthi wonke umuntu othamele imiphakathi yakubo abe nesandla ekubikeni izenzo zobugwelegwele okungazuzisi izakhamuzi. Lezizifundazwe ezizoqala ukuthola usizo zihlanganisa iLimpopo, iMpumalanga, kanye neKwaZulu-Natali, kanti uhlelo luzobe selucijile ekupheleni kuka-Decemba walo nyaka. UHulumeni uyabeka ngokusobala ukuthi intuthuko yabantu bonke bangaphandle nangaphakathi kwemizi ekhulayo iyabaluleka ngokulingana.

UMkhandlu weSifunda wase-OR Tambo ukhiphe isimemezelo sokuthi uzothatha amanyathelo asheshayo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izidingo zabantu ziyahlangabezwa ngendlela efanele. Isimemezelo leso siveze ukuthi imali elinganiselwa ezi-R45 million izosetshenziselwa ukuhlaziywa kwezingqalasizinda zamanzi kanye nezindlela ezidinga ukulungiswa emiphakathini ehlukene yesifunda. Uhlelo lokusetshenziswa kwemali luzobandakanya ukufakwa kwezitsha zamanzi ezintsha, ukuqedwa kwemipompi eyephukile, kanye nokwakhiwa kwezindlela ezintsha zemisele. Imikhandlu yezindawo inikwe isikhathi esiphawulekile samasonto amane ukuqalisa le misebenzi, futhi izinhlaka zikahulumeni zizobheka ukuqhubeka kwayo ngesijwayelekile. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni owawubandakanya izinhlaka zomphakathi, iSikhulu Esiphezulu soMkhandlu sikhombise ukuzibophezela ukuqinisekisa ukuthi akukho mphakathi ozoshiywa ngemuva ekufikaneni kwezidingo eziyisisekelo. Ngapha kwalokho, iKomidi Lezindaba Zomphakathi lishaye isandla emizamweni yokuqinisekisa ukubuyekezwa kwezinhlelo zokukhokha amabhildi amanzi kubantu abangabantu abangenamali. Lawo maqinga azosetshenziswa ukwelekelela imindeni eswele, ikakhulukazi leyo ephila ngaphansi komugqa wobuphofu. Umphakathi uyanxuswa ukuba uzibike emahhovisi kamasipala noma ufonele inombolo yohlu lwezinkinga ukuze zonke izikhalazo zilandelwe ngendlela efanele. Izinhlaka zikazwelonke nazo zizosebenzisana nomkhandlu ukuqinisekisa ukuphumelela kwalolu hlelo olubalulekile kubantu base-OR Tambo.

Ngonyaka wezi-2024, izibalo ezakhishwa nguMnyango Wezemfundo ziveza ukuthi ngaphezulu kwabafundi abayizigidi ezintathu baseNingizimu Afrika ababhekana nezinkinga ezinzima zokufunda ngenxa yokuntuleka kwezincwadi zesikole nezinsiza zokunakekela imfundo. Lesi simo sikhathaza kakhulu izikhungo zemfundo kanye nabazali abafuna ikusasa eliqhakazile labantwana babo. Emaphandleni asezifundazweni ezisemaphethelweni ezifana naKwaZulu-Natal neLimpopo, izikole eziningi zisalwisana nezingqinamba ezifana nokungabi namagumbi okufundela anele kanye nokweswela othisha abanolwazi olwanele lwezifundo zezimsomi. Uhulumeni wezwe uzimisele ukulungisa lezi zinkinga ngokushesha ngokukhipha izimali ezikhethekile ezizosiza izikole ezidinga usizo olukhulukazi. Kuyethembekisa ukuba iNhlangano Yomphakathi Wemfundo ibike ukuthi izinhlelo ezintsha zokuxhasa abafundi abahluphekayo seziqalile ukuba nomphumela omuhle ezikoleni eziningi eNingizimu Afrika. Ngaphezu kwalokho, amanyuvesi azimisele ukwandisa amathuba afundela ngaphakathi kanye nezinhlelo zokunciphisa inani lemali yokukhokha kwabafundi abaswelekayo. Abasebenzi bezomphakathi nabazali bafuna ukuba uhulumeni uqinise imizamo yokwakhela izikole ezintsha kanye nokwenaba amathuba afundo ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Kuyacaca ukuthi impumelelo yeqembu labantwana base-Afrika iyathembeka uma imali kahulumeni isetshenziswa ngendlela efanele nobulungiswa bukhona ezikhungweni zezemfundo. Izikhungo zemfundo ziyaqhubeka ukufundisa abafundi ngemibono emisha ukuze bazilungiselele izinselelo zomhlaba ongasimami. Uhulumeni uyalandelela ukuthi izimali ezikhishiwe zifinyelela izikole ngaphandle kokubandlululwa.

Lezihlelo zimayelana nokugqugquzela abahlali ukuba bahlole impilo yabo njalo, ikakhulukazi mayelana nezigulane ezifana nogciwane lwesandulela-ngculazi, isifo seshukela, kanye nesifo sentliziyo. Izindawo zezempilo zezifunda seziqalelwe ukwandiswa ukuze zikwazi ukusebenzela abantu abaningi abahlala kude nemizi emidala yezibhedlela nemikhakha yezempilo. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni wabahlali owawubanjelwe eGoli, usihlalo womphakathi waseKatlehong wabeka obala ukuthi abantu abaningi badinga usizo lwezempilo oluseduze nabo, hhayi olungamakhilomitha amaningi. Uhulumeni wezifundazwe uphendule lesi simo ngokusungula izimoto zezikhungo zezempilo ezizungeza imijondolo namaphandleni inikeza abantu ukuhlolwa kwegazi, amakhambi nemithi yamahhala, kanye nemfundo yezempilo. Imiphakathi esixhumene nabalethiwa loluhlelo luveza ukuthi inani labantu abaya ezibhedlela ngezimo eziphuthumayo sehlile ngokuyithinta, okubonisa ukusebenza kwalezihlelo. Izinhlangano ezingekho ngaphansi kukahulumeni nazo zihlanganyele kulomzamo, ziletha abagcini-mpilo nabanike-mpilo bezimfihlo emiphakathini. Umnyango wezempilo ukhuthaza wonke umuntu oneminyaka ephakathi kwamashumi amabili nanhlanu nangamashumi amahlanu ukuba azihlole njalo kaningi ngonyaka, ngisho noma engezwa ukufa kwesifo. Ikusasa lezimpilo zomphakathi lisehleni labantu abazimisele ukusebenzisana nohulumeni ukwakha izwe elinezakhamuzi eziphilile nazinobuqotho ekukhetheni impilo enhle.

Ucwaningo olumusha olukhishwe nguMnyango Wezemfundo lukhombisa ukuthi ngaphezulu kwamashule angamashumi amane pesenti awanazo izinsiza ezanele zokufundisa, njengezincwadi zesikole, izithombe, namatekisi afundisayo. Lesi simo sikhathaza othisha kanye nabazali, abathi izingane zabo ziyahluleka ukufunda ngendlela efanele ngenxa yokuntuleka kwezinto ezibalulekile. Uhulumeni wezifundazwe usekhiphe isitatimende esikhuza le nkinga, ethi imali eyengeziwe izosetshenziswa ukuletha izinsiza ezisha emashuleni asezindaweni ezidla izandla. Ngaphezu kwalokho, izifundazwe ezintathu sezihlela ukwakha izakhiwo zesikole ezintsha, njengezindlu zezincwadi kanye nezindawo zokusebenza ngekhompiyutha, ukuze izingane zithole ithuba elihle lokuhlomula ngokugcwele. Ongoti bezemfundo baxwayise ukuthi ukungabi nazo izinsiza akuwona kuphela umdabu wezinkinga emfundweni, kodwa ukuntuleka kothisha abaqeqeshiwe nabo kuyingxenye enkulu yalenkinga. Ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme, imibuso yezikhungo isigunyaze amaphrojekthi amaningi okuxhasa izitshudeni ezidinga usizo lwezemali nokuhlala. Isigungu Sikazwelonke Sokuphathwa Kwemfundo sihlele ukuhlangana nabaholisi bemiphakathi ngenyanga ezayo, lapho imibuzo mayelana nenqubomgomo yemfundo izobhekwa ngqo. Izitshudeni zomazisi bezakwabo zikhuthazwa ukuba zizinikele ekufundeni noma ngabe zibhekana nezinselelo ezinzima, ngoba imfundo iyikhiye yokuguqula ikusasa laleli zwe.

Lezi zinsiza, ezihlanganisa imali yokondla izingane, imali yabantu abakhubazekile, kanye nemali yabadala, zinikeza abantu abadinga usizo ithuba lokwakha impilo engcono. UMnyango Wezentuthuko Yomphakathi ubike ukuthi izindleko zalezi zinsiza ziyaqhubeka ukukhula njalo ngonyaka, okukhombisa ukuthi isidingo somphakathi sikhona futhi sikhula ngendlela emangalisayo. Abahlali abaningi emaphandleni nasemadolobheni amancane baxhomeke kulezi zinsiza njengemthombo wokuphila wabo wansuku zonke, ngakho-ke kubalulekile ukuthi uhlelo luzosebenza ngendlela efanele. Kubuye kwatholakala ukuthi abantu abaningi abafanelekile ukuthola usizo abakunyatheleli ngenxa yokuntuleka kolwazi noma izinkinga zokufika ezikhungweni zikahulumeni. Ngalesi sizathu, uhulumeni uqale izinhlelo zokufinyelela emphakathini, lapho abasebenzi beziya kubantu ezindlini zabo ukuze balekelele ekufakweni kwezicelo. Izindlu ezintsha nezakhiwe ngaphansi kohlelo lukahulumeni lwabezikhundla zokufunda nokuhlala nazo ziyingxenye yohlelo olukhulu lokunikeza umphakathi izinto ezidingekayo. UMkhandlu woMasipala uqinisekise ukuthi imindeni ehlala ezindaweni ezingenalo ugesi namanzi izonikwa usizo olwengeziwe ukuze impilo yabo ithuthukiswe ngempela. Kuyethembisa ukuthi izinhlelo zokusekela umphakathi ziyaqhubeka ukwanda ngoba izakhamuzi eziningi zisazidinga kakhulu, futhi uhulumeni ubeka phambili intuthuko yazo zonke izakhamuzi zaseMzansi Afrika ngaphandle kokukhethana.

UMasipala weTheku umemezele ukuthi uzokwandisa izinhlelo zokusiza umphakathi ngokubhaliswa kwezimpahla, ikakhulukazi emalokishini lapho abantu abaningi behlala khona ngaphandle kwamaphepha asemthethweni. Lesi sinyathelo sizoqala ngenyanga ezayo, futhi sizofaka ukuvulwa kwamahhovisi amasha ezindaweni ezimbili ezikhethiwe, okungumkhakha iNanda kanye neNdwedwe. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni wamakhansela namalungu omphakathi, iPhini likaMeya uNkosazana Thobile Mthembu libalule ukuthi uHulumeni uzimisele ukunqanda ubandlululo lwamandla okuthola izinsizakalo. Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angagelezi ziseyizinkinga ezinkulu ezikhungethe izindawo eziningi, kodwa uMasipala uqinisekisa ukuthi imibhalo yazo izoba inkulumo enkulu eholideni eli phambili. Ngaphezulu kwabantu abayi-45 000 baseThekwini abanikwanga amandla okuthola amanzi ahlanzekiwe ngokwanele, ngokwezibalo eziphuma eMnyangweni Wezimpilo. Izinhlelo zokuphatha izindawo zezikhungo zemfundo nazo zizonakekela ngesikhathi salokhu kuhlolwa kokuqhubeka kwezidingo zowohlwayo. Iziphathimandla zifuna ukuthi abahlali babhalisele izinhlelo zosizo lwezindlu ngaphambi kuka-30 Septhemba, njengoba uhlelo luzoba valiwe kamuva kwalelo suku. Umphakathi ukhuthazwa ukuthi uwasilele emahhovisi kamasipala emizini yakubo ukuze uthole ulwazi oluthe vetshe ngezinsizakalo ezikhona kanye namalungelo awo asemthethweni njengoba umthetho ufuna.

UMkhandlu waseThekwini wemukele izicelo ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezintathu zokuxhunywa kwamanzi ekhaya, kodwa izimpendulo zisabhekiwe ngenxa yokuntuleka kwezimali nemisebenzi eyenele. Uhulumeni wezifunda uthumele ithimba labezocwaningo ukuhlola izingqalasizinda ezidalulwa njengezigula, ikakhulukazi eMlazi naseSiyanda lapho amapaiphi emadala eshuba khona njalo. Abaphathi bokuhlela izinkonzo zasemakhaya baxwayise ukuthi uhlelo lokuqiniswa kwamapaiphi luzongenela izigodi ezibalwa ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali wezi-2025. Abahlali base-KwaMashu nabaseMagwaveni bakhale ngokuthi imithombo yamanzi iphakama njalo, ikakhulukazi ngesizini yokushisa, ngakho-ke kufanele ukuthi umkhandlu ushesha ukwenza okungenani isinyathelo esinye esibalulekile. Izincwadi zokulayela zikhishiwe, futhi ikomiti lobulungiswa ngezenhlalo liyahlolisisa ukuthi imali yomphakathi isetshenziswe kahle yini ngaphambi kokuqokwa kwezinkontileka ezintsha. Abezindaba bebekhona emhlanganweni, futhi izimemezelo ezengeziwe kulindeleke ukuthi zifike ngaphakathi kwezinsuku eziyishumi nane. UMnyango Wezindaba Zomphakathi uyinxusa ingqalabutho yamaphephandaba ukuthi ihlale ilandelela ezinye izinkomba zamanzi futhi ibike uma kukhona ukuphazamiseka okusha ezindaweni zasemakhaya.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angagelezi kuseyizinkinga ezinkulu ezikhathaza abahlali baseThekwini, ikakhulukazi labo abahlala ezindaweni zasemaphandleni. UMkhandlu weTheku uzibophezele ukuthi uzolungisa zonke izingqalasizinda ezidinga ukulungiswa ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali wama-2025. Lesi sinqumo sashiwo yiSikhulu Esiphezulu somkhandlu ngesikhathi sikhuluma emhlanganweni wezisebenzi nababusi bendawo. Emhlanganweni lowo, kwashiwo ukuthi imali elinganiselwa ku-R450 million izosetshenziswa ukuqala kabusha imisebenzi yokulungiswa kwezindlela kanye nezinhlelo zamanzi ahlanzekile. Abahlali abaningi bakuhalalisele lesi sinqumo, bekhala ngokuthi sebekhathele ukulinda izimfanelo eziyisisekelo zempilo enhle. Ukwethulwa kwezinhlelo zokuthuthukiswa kwemiphakathi kuzokwenziwa ngezigaba, kuqala ezindaweni ezibhekene nezinkinga eziphuthumayo kunazo zonke. UMnyango Wezindlela Nezokuthutha uzosebenzisana noMkhandlu ukuqinisekisa ukuthi imisebenzi iqhutshekiswa ngendlela efanele futhi iphethwe ngokucophelela. Ngaphezu kwalokho, iKomidi Lokubhekwa Kwezimali lizoqapha ukusetshenziswa kwemali ukugwema nokwenganyelwa kwemali kahle. Abahlali bayacelwa ukuba bazibandakanye nezinhlaka zomphakathi ezizobe zikhona ukuqoqa izikhalo neziphakamiso zomphakathi ngokuqhubekayo. UMkhandlu uqinisekisa ukuthi zonke izingane, abantu abadala, kanye nabantu abakhubazekile bazoba nokufinyelela izidingo zabo ngaphandle kwanezingqinamba. Lolu hlelo lokuqala kabusha izingqalasizinda luhlose ukuletha uzinzo nokuhlomula okuqikelelekile kubo bonke abahlali basendaweni.

Umkhandlu weTheku ukhiphe isimemezelo esisemthethweni lapho uqinisekisa ukuthi izinhlelo zokubuyisela amanzi ezindaweni ezithintekile zizophelela ngoMfumfu walo nyaka. Emuva kwezikhukhula ezahlasela izifunda eziningi, imigwaqo eminingi yasezindaweni eziphakathi komkhaya isisiphosiwe futhi ayikwazi ukusetshenziswa ngokuphepha. Lolu daba lwaphakanyiswa yiNhlangano Yabahlali baseNingizimu eyabika ukuthi abantu abaningi bayahlupheka ngenxa yokushoda kwezidingo eziyisisekelo. UNgqongqoshe wezokuHlaliswa Kwabantu noZwelonke, ekhuluma emhlanganweni owawubanjwe eGoli, waqinisekisa ukuthi uhulumeni uzimisele ukuqeda lezo zinkinga ngaphambi kokuba unyaka uphele. Izinhlelo zokukhokha izindlu zabahlali abanekhono eliphansi sezixoxiswene namalungu emiphakathi ethintekile, futhi imibiko yokuqala ibonisa ukuthi abakhokhi bazo baningi. Amalungu ePhalamende aphinde aqinisekisa ukuthi izimali ezibekwe eceleni zokuqeda izindawo ezingcolile zizosebenza ngendlela eqondile futhi ngaphandle kokwehlulelana kwezepolitiki. Inqubo yomthetho yokubhaliswa kwamabhizinisi amancane ezifundazweni seqalile ukufaka izicelo, okwenza abantu abaningi bakwazi ukuthola izimvume ngokushesha. Umphakathi ukhuthazwa ukuba uzibandakanye ezikhungweni zomphakathi ukuze izidingo zakhe zaziwe ngqo uhulumeni wasekhaya ngaphambi kokuqedwa kwezikhathi zokufaka izicelo.

UMkhandlu weTheku ukhiphe isitatimende ngaleli sonto, usho ukuthi izinhlelo zokuqalisa kabusha ukusilela kwezinsizakalo zizobe sezisetshenzwa ngokukhulu ukushesha. Isitatimende leso saveza ukuthi izinhlelo ezintsha zokuphatha imali yomasipala zizolekelela ukunciphisa ukusebenzisa imali ngendlela engeyiyo. Iziphathimandla zomasipala ziqinisekise ukuthi izisebenzi ezingochwepheshe eziyi-500 zizoqashwa ukuze zisize ekubhekaneni nezinkinga zemizi-mveliso yamanzi. Abahlali bangase bathole usizo olukhulu ngemuva kwezinyanga ezimbalwa uma lezi zinhlelo zilandela njengoba kuhlongozwile ngamagosa kahulumeni. Ngaphezu kwalokho, uMkhandlu uzimisele ukwakha izakhiwo ezintsha zokuphatha udoti ezizolekelela izindawo ezingaphandle kwedolobha, okuyizindawo ezihlala zingakhathalelwe kahle. Umphathimandla wamasipala uthe inhlangano izohlangana nabaholi bomphakathi njalo ngenyanga ukuze bahlole ukuqhubeka kohlelo. Lesi sinqumo sikhombisa ukuzinikela kukahulumeni ekwakheni ubuhlobo obuhle phakathi komasipala nabantu abawukhonzayo. Amalungu omphakathi anxusiwe ukuthi abike izinkinga zezinsizakalo ngqo emahhovisi omasipala noma ngenombolo yocingo yasimahla enikezwa yiwo wonke umuntu. Uhulumeni uqinisekise ukuthi imibiko yonke izoxazululwa ngesikhathi esibekiwe somasipala ngaphambi kokupela kwekota yonyaka.

Emadolobheni asezifundazweni ezahlukene, izingane eziningi zisabhekana nezinselelo ezinkulu zokufunda nokufika esikoleni nsuku zonke. Imibiko evela emiphakathini yaseNdwedwe, eMlaza naseNqutu ibonisa ukuthi izikole eziningi zisaswela izinsiza ezibalulekiwe, njengezincwadi, amakhompyutha kanye nezindlu zangasese ezihlanzekile. Uhulumeni wezifundazwe uthe uyazibophezela ekuxazululeni le nkinga, kodwa abahlali bathi izethembiso aziwafezeki ngesikhathi. Abazali baseNqutu bakhala ngokuthi izingane zabo zihamba amakhilomitha amane nsuku zonke ukuze zifinyelele isikole esiseduzane nakhona, okuholela ekutheni izingane eziningi zikhathale ngaphambi kokufika kugumbi lokufundela. UMnyango Wezemfundo KwaZulu-Natal ukuqinisekisile ukuthi izinhlelo zokwakha izikole ezintsha ziyaqhubeka, futhi izisombululo zezindlela zokuhamba zazo zizoxazululwa ngonyaka wezimali ozayo. Ongoti bezemfundo baxwayisa ukuthi uma izinkinga lezi zingatholwa izisombululo ngokushesha, amazinga ekufunda kwabafundi azokwehla kakhulu emitatsheni yonyaka. Ezikoleni zamazinga aphezulu, izitshudeni nazo zihlangabezana nezingqinamba zokuthola izintuthuko zocwaningo nokuxhasa kwezezimali. Izinhlelo zezikweletu zabafundi, ezaziwa ngokuthi i-NSFAS, zibe yingxabano enkulu phakathi kwabafundi neziphathimandla zezikhungo zemfundo ephakeme kulo nyaka. Izitshudeni zeNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal zikhala ngokuthi izinkokhelo zabo zeNSFAS zifikile ngemuva kwesikhathi, okuholele ekutheni abanye baswela ukudla nokuthola izindawo zokuhlala. Izikhungo zemfundo ephakeme zifuna ukuthi uhulumeni wombuso ubheke kabusha indlela le nhlangano esebenza ngayo ukuze izitshudeni zingaphazamiseki ekufundeni kwazo.

Umkhandlu wasendaweni ushicilele izinhlelo ezintsha zokubhekana nalezi zinkinga ngokuphuthuma, ufuna ukufeza izithembiso ezenziwa ngaphambi kwezama-lo. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi owawubanjelwe eHolividi ngesonto eledlule, uSomlomo wasekhansela wachaza ukuthi imali elinganiselwa kumaphakathi kwe-R45 million izosetshenziswa ekwakhiweni kwamapayipi amanzi kanye nasekuqedeni kwezindlela ezingasetshenziseki kahle. Lezi zindaba ziheha ukunaka okukhulu phakathi kwamalungu omphakathi, ikakhulukazi labo abasebenzela kude nekhaya. Abahlali abaphila ezindaweni ezisezintabeni bakhala ngokuphila ngaphandle kwamanzi agelezayo izinyanga eziningana, into ebuhlungu nengelula ukubekezela. Umphakathi waleli lokishi wamukele le mibiko ngokuthokoza kodwa nabanye bayaqhubeka nokubeka ukukhathazeka ngokuphathelene nokubambezeleka kwezinhlelo kule minyaka edlule. UMnyango Wezengqalasizinda kanye Namasiko uyaqinisekisa ukuthi zonke izinhlelo zokulungisa ingqalasizinda ziqale ngonyaka wezimali ozayo. Phezu kwalokho, uhulumeni wezifunda ufuna ukusebenzisana nabaphathi bomkhandlu ukuze kutholakale izisombululo ezihlala isikhathi eside, hhayi ezethula nje phakathi kwezinkathi zanty. Zonke iziphathimandla zikhuthaza abahlali ukuba baqhubeke nokubika izinkinga nangayiphi indlela efanelekile ukuze izinsiza zikwazi ukufikela ngendlela efanele labo abakudingayo kakhulu emphakathini.

Isimo lesi sikhathaza kakhulu iziphathimandla zezempilo, ezizimisele ukushintsha indlela yokunikeza usizo lwezempilo kuzo zonke izindawo zasemakhaya nasemadolobheni. Uhlelo olusha luhlose ukwakha amasu aqinile okuzisa amathuba ezempilo kubantu abaningi, ikakhulukazi labo abahlala kude nezifunda ezithuthukisiwe. Emiphakathini emincane eyakhiwe ngezindlela ezingagesi nezingenamanzi agelezayo, ingozi yokuphila imbi ikhona njalo, futhi idinga ukuxazululwa ngokushesha nangokucophelela. Umasipala nazo zonke izinhlaka zikahulumeni kufanele basebenzisane ngokuhlangana ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abahlali bathola imfundo yempilo efanele ngawo wonke amahlandla. Izigcawu zempilo ezibanjwa emiphakathini ziwusizo oluphelele, ngoba zidala ithuba lokufundisa abantu ngezinto ezikhathaza impilo yabo nsuku zonke. Izikhala ezikhona phakathi kwezinsiza nezidingo zabantu zingavalwa uma uhulumeni esebenza ngokuzimisela kanye nomphakathi usebenzisana ngendlela ehlelekile. Izisebenzi zezempilo zezohlangano nazo zidlala indima enkulu ekufundiseni abantu indlela yokugcina impilo yabantu ngabanye kanye neyemiphakathi. Kubalulekile ukuthi wonke umuntu, ikakhulukazi abasakhulayo nabesilisa abasebasha, bamukele ulwazi lokuhlola kwangaphambi kokugula ukuze izigulo zitholakale ziphele zisencane. UMnyango wezeMpilo uyaqhubeka nokugqugquzela wonke amakhosi, izinduna kanye nabaholi bomphakathi ukuba babe ngabaxhumanisi abathembekile phakathi kukahulumeni nabantu ukuze izinhlelo zempilo zifike kubo bonke ngokulinganayo nangokuhloniphekile.

Lezizibonelelo, ezihlanganisa isibonelelo somntwana, isibonelelo sabadala, kanye nesibonelelo sokukhubazeka, zisebenza njengensika yomnotho wemindeni eminingi yasemakhaya nasezindaweni zasemadolobheni. Emaphandleni asezifundazweni ezifana noMzinyathi naseNdlovini, abantu abaningi bathembele kuphela kulezizinhlelo ukuze bathenga ukudla, izingubo, kanye nezinto zesikole zabantwana. Uhulumeni wezwe ubeke izigqozi zokuthuthukisa lezizinhlelo ukuze kufinyelele abantu abaningi nakakhulu abaswele usizo. INhlangano Yezenhlalakahle Yomphakathi ixwayisa ukuthi noma ngabe lezizibonelelo zibalulekile, kumele zihambisane nezinhlelo zokudala amathuba emisebenzi ukuze abantu banganciki kuzo kuphela. Njalo ngonyaka, umbuso uphinda ubuke imibandela yokwamukela izibonelelo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi usizo luya kubantu abalufanele ngempela. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, uhulumeni useqale uhlelo olusha lokwakha izindlu zabantu abahluphekayo ezifundazweni ezahlukene, okuhloswe ngalo ukwelekelela imindeni ehlala ezindaweni ezingaphephile. Loluhlelo luzonikezela izindlu ezilinganiselwa ezingama-50 000 phakathi nonyaka wezimali wezi-2024 kuya ku-2025, okuzolekelela amakhaya amaningi athwele kanzima. Izikhulu zikahulumeni zixwayise ukuthi abantu abafake izicelo zabo ngokusemthethweni emahovisi kahulumeni asezindaweni zabo ukuze bagweme ukukhohliswa yilabo abafuna ukuzuza ngenkohliso. Umphakathi ukhuthazwa ukubika noma yikuphi ukucwasa noma ukungabi nabulungiswa ekusabalaleni kwezibonelelo nakuhlelo lokwakhiwa kwezindlu kumasosha kahulumeni ahloniphekile.

Ingxenye enkulu yabalimi laba incike ekutshaleni ummbila kanye nezitshalo ezifana namazambane notshanibhisikidi, kodwa baye babhekane nezingqinamba ezinzima njengokushorteka kwembolea kanye nokungabibikho kwezinhlelo zokuxhasa. UMnyango Wezokulima, Ukuthuthukiswa Kwezindawo Zasemakhaya Nezindaba Zomhlaba usebenza ngokuzikisa ukuqinisa izinhlelo ezinikeza abalimi abancane amathuluzi adingekayo ukuze bathole imveliso ephezulu nangokulondeka. Lezi zinhlelo zihlanganisa ukuphiwa kwabantu amasidi asezingeni eliphezulu, imbolea ekhethiwe, kanye nokuqeqeshwa ngezindlela zolimo olunohlonze olugcina inhlabathi isempilweni. Ngokwalolu hlobo lokuxhasa, kuhloswe ukunciphisa ukwencika kwabalimi abancane emantengweni amanani aphezulu okuthengisa imbolea kanye nezinye izinsiza. Kuyiqiniso elibalulekile ukuthi uhlelo lokuthuthukiswa komhlaba alukwazi ukuphumelela uma abalimi bengaxhaswe ngobuchwepheshe obuphezulu kanye nomthetho ohlelekile wezomhlaba. Izikhulu zomnyango ziqinisekisa ukuthi amaphrojekthi asemasimini azoqhutshekiselwa phambili ngokuzibophezela nokuzinikela kokukhulu, kuphinde kuqinisekiswe nokuthi abalimi bama ngqo emphakathini wokuthi bazifamalele zona. Ngaphezu kwalokho, umnyango ufuna ukuqinisa ubuhlobo phakathi kwabalimi namasuphamakethe amakhulu ukuze izitshalo ezikhiqizwa emaphandleni zithole indlela enamandla yokuya ezimakethe ezizinzile. Izintshisekelo zabahlali emakhaya ziyalandela izifundo ezikhishwa ngamasiko amdala okulima, futhi lezi zifundo ziyasetshenziswa ngokuhlotshaniswa nezindlela zanamuhla. Umbiko wokugcina othunyelwe ngumnyango uveza ukuthi izindawo ezingamashumi amane nanhlanu zemiphakathi sezizuze ngqo kulolu hlelo lokuqala.

Umkhandlu waseMsunduzi ukhiphe isimemezelo esithi uzokwethula uhlelo olusha lokuhlaziya izingqalasizinda zomphakathi ngonyaka wezimali wezi-2025/2026, oluhlose ukwelekelela izindawo ezifuna ukunakwa ngokushesha kakhulu. Lolu hlelo luzobandakanya ukuhlaziywa kwemipompi yamanzi, ukuhlinzekwa kukagesi okuqhubekayo, kanye nokuqinisekiswa kokuthi izimpahla zomphakathi zisebenza kahle. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni owawubanjelwe eHhovisi likasiThela waseMsunduzi, iMeya yathi uhulumeni wendawo uzimisele ukusebenza ngokucophelela ukuze izidingo zabantu zihlangabezanwe nazo ngendlela efanele. Ngaphezulu kwamaphrojekthi angamashumi amabili nesikhombisa azovalwa ekupheleni konyaka wezimali, iningi lawo libhekene nokuhlinzekwa kwamanzi nakasilinda ngokweqile. Kuyimanje, izakhamizi ziyacelwa ukuba ziqhubeke nokuxhumana namaziko kahulumeni endawo ukuze zibike izinkinga aziphazamisa izindawo zazo, njengoba umkhandlu uzimisele ukubhekana nezindaba ngokuphazima kweso. Ikomiti elibhekelele izindaba zezingqalasizinda likhiphe umbiko ochaza ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ngokushesha sezikhona, futhi izisebenzi zizoqalisa umsebenzi masonto amabili azayo. Umphakathi uyakhuthazwa ukuba uhlanganyele ngokugcwele emitathanweni yabahlali ukuze izwi lawo lizwakale ngesikhathi uhulumeni ulungiselela uhlelo lokuphatha izingqalasizinda ngendlela enobuchwepheshe nefanele impilo yabantu bonke.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angagelezi ziseyinkinga enkulu emiphakathini eminingi yasemakhaya eNingizimu Afrika, ikakhulukazi kulezo zindawo ezikude nezindawo zasedolobheni. UMnyango Wezokubusa Ngokubambisana Nezindaba Zendlu uzibophezele ukulungisa lezi zinkinga ngokukhulisa ingeniso yezimali eya emikhandlwini emikhulu nemincane kuleli. Kule nyanga, umphakathi waseMsinga eNyakatho neKwaZulu-Natal uzwile izethembiso ezintsha zikahulumeni mayelana nokwakhiwa kwezingqalasizinda ezintsha ezifaka phakathi izingcingo zamanzi, iziteshi zikagesi, kanye nezindlela ezizokwakhiwa kabusha. Izikhulu zikamkhandlu zixoxe nabantu bendawo emhlanganweni owawubanjelwe eHholo lomphakathi waseMsinga, lapho abahlali bakhona babeka izikhalo zabo ngobulungisa nobungako bemisebenzi ekhona. Abaningi kulaba bahlali bakhala ngokuthi ukufinyelela kwamanzi ahlanzekiyo kuseyinkinga enkulu, noma izithembiso ezazenziwa ngonyaka odlule zisasilindwe ukugcwaliseka. UNgqongqoshe Wezindaba Zomphakathi uthe uhulumeni uzimisele ngokuqinisekisa ukuthi imali ebiyelwe imikhandlu isetyenziswa ngendlela efanele ngaphandle kwenkohlakalo noma ukuphazamiseka kwezinhlelo. Kuyilapho iKhomishini Yokuhlola Ukusebenza Kwezikhandlu yesifundazwe ikhiphe umbiko okhombisa ukuthi izikhandlu ezingaphezu kwamashumi amathathu azifeze imigomo yemisebenzi yazo eyimpoqo ngonyaka wezimali odlule. Uhulumeni wemkhandlu uyacushwa njengoqondile ekwenziweni kwezinhlelo ezifana nokukha udoti, ukuphakwa kwamanzi, kanye nokugcinwa kwezindlela. Ihlelo elisha likahulumeni lizobandakanya ukuqashelwa kosonkontileka abasebenza emiphakathini ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi imali kaHulumeni iyathela izithelo eziyimpoqo.

Lolu hlelo, olwethulwa nguNgqongqoshe Wezempilo wezifundazwe, luhlose ukwehlisa inani labantu abagulayo ngenxa yezinhlelo ezingalingani zokudlela nokuswela ulwazi mayelana namalungelo abo ezempilo. Abahlali baseNanda nase-Umlazi babike ukuthi izinhlelo zokuxilongwa ngezifo ezinjengesifo sikashukela nengculazi seziye zabasiza ukuthola usizo ngesikhathi esifanele, ingakho inani labantu abangenisiwe ezibhedlela sehlile ngezinga elihlabahlosile. Izinhlangano zomphakathi nazo zizohlanganyela kulolu hlelo, zizokweseka amaqembu ezigodi ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi imiyalezo yezempilo iyafinyelela kuma-ward wonke angabeki abantu abancane nasemalokishini asemakhoneni. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni omkhulu wezinhlaka zemiphakathi eThekwini, uMqondisi Wezempilo Wendawo ushiye umyalezo ocacile wokuthi ukwelashwa kwangaphambi kokugula kubalulekile ukwehlisa umthwalo ezibhedlela zikahulumeni ezisebenza ngaphansi kwengcindezi enkulu. Izivumelwano zoMkhandlu Wezifunda nazo zizonikeza imali eyanele yokusekela izindlu zezempilo ezincane ezisakha izinsiza zokwelapha ezifanele, ikakhulukazi ezikhundleni ezikude nezindawo ezinkulu. Kuhloselwe ukuthi ngo-Bhisemuzi wangonyaka ozayo, wonke amakhaya aseNingizimu Afrika athola kusukela ezinhlalweni ezishoda ngezinto ayokwazi ukufinyelela kulolu lulwelo lwezempilo locwaningo lokulawula izifo ezixhaphakile. Uhulumeni ukhuthaza abahlali ukuthi bafike ezindaweni zezempilo eziseduzane baphinde bazikhulumele uma bethola ukuthi imisebenzi yezempilo ayinikwa ngendlela efanele nabacabanga ukuthi ngeyabo ilungelo ngokwemvelo.

Iziphathimandla zikamasipala ziphawule ukuthi kuzosungulwa uhlelo olusha lokuphendula izikhalo zabantu ngesikhathi esifanele, njengoba izinkinga ziphinde zibonakale njalo kakhulu. Ngaphandle kwalokho, umkhandlu uzozisa isizwe ngezinhlelo zokuhlinzeka ngezidingo eziyisisekelo kuwo wonke amakhosi ezindaweni zasemakhaya nakuzo izikhungo zemizi-mvelele. Ekhuluma esigunwini esiphezulu somphakathi, uSomlomo waKomiti lezeMpilo nokuHlinzekwa kwezidingo uXolani Dlamini uthe ukuphatha kahle kwezinsiza kuyimfuneko engephikiswe, futhi uhulumeni wakuleli uzibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi bonke abantu bathole izidingo ezifanele.

Ngokwemibiko ekhishwe nguMnyango Wezindaba Zomphakathi, sekuqokwe abasebenzi abayisikhombisa abasha abasebenzela ezindaweni eziyishumi nambili, ukuze baqinisekise ukuthi izinseva ziyasebenza ngendlela efanele futhi izimangalo zabantu ziphendulwa ngokuphuthuma. Izinsizakusebenza ezintsha zizothengwa ngokukhulu ukuqapha, zihlolwe ngaphambi kokuba zinikezwe emphakathini, ukuze kugwenywe ukuphela kwemali kaHulumeni ngaphandle kwenzuzo eqondile. Umphakathi uyanxuswa ukuba ubike izinkinga zikamasipala ngqo ezabeni eziqokiwe zomphakathi, noma usebenzise inombolo yasimahla eyakhiwe ngokukhethekile walolu hlelo. Iziphathimandla ziqinisekise ukuthi imibiko yonke izophenywa ngobungcweti, izinkampani ezingagcini izibopho zazo zizohlawuliswa ngokwemithetho elawula imisebenzi karhulumeni enikeziwe. Lolu hlelo luzoqala ngomhla wokuqala wenyanga ezayo, futhi imiphumela yokuqala izohlolwa emva kwezinyanga ezintathu ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi izinhloso zikahulumeni ziyafezekiswa ngendlela efanele.

Emabangeni aphansi nasemabangeni aphakeme ezikoleni zomphakathi, izingane eziningi zisabhekane nezinselelo ezinkulu ekufundeni nokuqonda izifundo. Ucwaningo olumuva nje lubonisa ukuthi abafundi abangaphezu kwamaphesenti angamashumi ayisithupha nesihlanu abaseziklasini zesikhombisa kuze kuyofika esikhombisa nasesishiyagalombili abafinyeleli ezingeni elifanele lokufunda isiZulu nasiMathematics. Lezi zinombolo zimangaza kakhulu izifundiswa nezinhlaka ezibhekele imfundo ezweni lonke laseNingizimu Afrika. Izifundazwe ezisezindaweni zasemakhaya zibikwa njengezichazwa kakhulu yilo mkhakha wokuhluleka kwabafundi, njengoba izikole eziningi zisaswele izincwadi zezikolwa, othisha abanele, kanye nezakhiwo ezifanele ukufundela ngaphakathi kuzo. Uhulumeni weqembu elibusayo uvumile ukuthi kukhona isisombululo esidingekayo ngokushesha ukuze kuxazululwe lezi zinkinga ngaphambi kokuba zibe nzima kakhulu. INgqongqoshe Yemfundo Kazwelonke, ngemuva kokubamba imihlangano nemibutho efundisayo ethile, imemezele uhlelo olusha lokusiza izikole ezisezindaweni ezidinga usizo olukhethekile. Uhlelo lolu luhlose ukuletha othisha ababekelwe ukuqeqeshelwa ukusiza abafundi abahlulekayo, kanye nokunikezela ngezinto zokufunda njengamathabhulethi nezincwadi ezintsha. Emanyuvesi, nakhona izinhlangano zabafundi seziqale ukukhala ngezindleko zemfundo ezikhulayo kanye nezinselelo zokuthola izindawo zokuhlala ezifanele. Abafundi abaningi, ikakhulukazi labo abavela emindenini engenamali, bathola ubunzima obukhulu ekuqedeni imfundo yabo yobuchwepheshe neyokolishi. Iziphathimandla ziyacela abantu bomphakathi ukuba bathike izingane zabo njalo ukuze zihlale zinemibono emihle ngekusasa lemfundo.

Le ngxaki iyabonakala ngakumbi kwizithili ezikude nezidolophu ezinkulu, apho izitsha zokufundisa azanelanga kwaye izakhiwo zifuna ukulungiswa ngesisheshane. Oogqirha bemfundo bathi eli nqanaba lokuwa lubonisa isidingo sokusebenza ngamandla ngokulungisa iziseko zezikolo ngokukhawuleza. Amagosa kahulumeni asezifundazweni athi inkqubo entsha yokuxhasa ootitshala iza kusebenza ukusukela ekuqaleni kwenyanga ezayo, ize isize ukuqeqesha ootitshala abangena ngokutsha emasebenzi. Lo msebenzi wobambiswano uphakathi koMasipala namaziko emfundo uyinxalenye yomnqophiso omkhulu wokuphucula imfundo yabantwana base-ekhaya. Ootitshala abakhulu bamaziko amaninzi baxelele amajelo eendaba ukuba abafundi abaninzi bafika esikolweni bengadlanga, oku okuchaphazela amandla abo okufunda. Ngoko ke, iinkqubo zokondla abafundi ezikhona ziyandileka, zifinyelele izikolo ezingaphezulu kwamashumi amabini nakwimeko enzima. Abo basebenza kwezempilo bemfundo bathi olu xhaso lokuondla lubalulekile kakhulu ekuqiniseni ukuba abafundi banako ukugxila ekufundeni. UMphathiswa wezeMfundo wathe ulawulo lweli phondo lunyanzelekile ukuba lusebenzise imali ngobulumko ukuze yonke inkalo yobomi besikolo iphuculwe. Ezi zinguqulelo ziya kuba nemiphumela emihle ngalo nyaka wesikolo, kwaye uluntu luceliwe ukuba luthatha inxaxheba kulwakhiwo lwemfundo yabantwana balo.

Izindlu ezinengi kule dolophu zingaphantsi kwemeko yehlekisa ngenxa yokungabikho kobuchwepheshe bezinto zegesi nonotekelo. IRhulumente wesifunda i-Eastern Cape uxelele uluntu ukuba umbutho wesebe loLawulo lweeNkonzo zoMasipala uzakuhlola zonke izithili ezichaphazelekayo ukususela ngoJanuwari owe-2025. Iindlela ezaphukileyo kunye nezisele zingasalungiswa emva kwemvula mazikhathaza abantu beenkoliso zona iinqwelo. Amaqumrhu kaRhulumente azixelele ukuba imali eyi-R45 yezigidi yabelwe ukuze ilungise ingxaki yezindlu zankomfa. Ukuvulwa kweentshukumo zokulungisa ezi ngxaki kufanele kwenziwe ngabemi ngokuzimeleyo kunye namagosa kamasipala aza kusebenzisana. Amalungu oMkhandlu woMasipala axelele abahlali ukuba abo bazibandakanya kwinkqubo yokuhlolwa kwezidingo zoluntu baya kufumana inkxaso ngqo. Onke amasebe kaRhulumente afuna ukuba abantu bahlale bexelela amagosa ngezinto ezibangela ubandezeleko. Umasipala uzakuqinisekisa ukuba amakwantri aphatha imisebenzi yokulungisa iindlela aqalise phakathi kweveki ezimbini ezizayo. Abahlali banqweneliswa ukuba bathumele izikhalo kwi-ofisi yomasipala nje ukuze amaqumrhu agcine iilisti ezilungelelanisiweyo. Ngaphandle kweentlangano ezibalulekiyo zomphakathi, akukho nto ibonakalayo engafikelelwa ngabemi kunye namagosa ukuze babumbe isisombululo esinzima.

Izikhululo zempilo zikarhulumente zisebenza ngenkuthalo ukwandisa ulwazi lwabantu malunga nolondolozo lwempilo, kuquka ukutyiwa kokutya okusempilweni nokucwangciswa komntwana. Abasebenzi bempilo basebenza imini nobusuku ukufundisa abahlali ngezinto ezibalulekileyo, njengokugcina izandla zicocekile nokuhluza amanzi phambi kokuwasela. Amaqumrhu oluntu asehlangene nombutho wezoLwimi lweNgqondo kaZwelonke asebeqalise iinkqubo zokufundisa ezisebenza ngqo kubantu abadala nabantwana. Ezi nkqubo ziquka ukuvavanywa kwezempilo simahla, ukuphiwa kweziyobisi ezibalulekileyo, kunye nenkxaso yengqondo yalabo abaxhalabile. Imigaqo-nkqubo yezempilo ihleli iguquguqulwa ukuze ifanelane neemfuno zabantu abahlukeneyo kwilali nasemalokishini. Amagosa alawulayo amemezele ukuba izitishi zempilo ezintsha ziya kuvulwa kwiidolophu ezilishumi elinantathu ngenyanga ezayo, nto leyo eya kungenisa uncedo oluninzi kubantu abahlalayo kude nezixeko ezikhulu. Ukwakhiwa kwezi zitishi zintsha kuzakwenziwa ngemali evela kwicandelo lolawulo lwezempilo, kusetyenziswa namalinge okusongezelela imali evela koorhulumente bamazwe aphesheya. Bonke abahlali baxhentsiselwa ukuba basebenzise iinkonzo ezitholakala kwezo zitishi ngaphandle kwesithintelo, kuba ukwelashwa kwangoko kubalulekile ukugcina imiphakathi isempilweni. Kucetyiswa ukuba abantu abaneminyaka engama-40 nangaphezulu baye kuvavanywa izinga lengca egazini, uxinzelelo lwegazi, kunye nentliziyo ubuncinane kanye ngonyaka. Ukugcina impilo yomphakathi kusisiza sonke kwaye makusivulele inzala yethu ilizwe elithe gabalala.

Ezi zibonelelo zibandakanya inkxaso yabantwana, imali yabadala, inkxaso yabantu abakhubazekileyo, kunye nezibonelelo ezininzi ezinegalelo elibalulekileyo ekuphileni kwabantu abahluphekileyo. UMasipala weNdawo kunye namaziko karhulumente asebenza ngokuzimisela ukuqinisekisa ukuba abo banelungelo lokufumana ezi zibonelelo bayifumana ngexesha elifanelekileyo. Ezemilimo yolawulo sezikhuthaza abantu ukuba bazibhalise ngokusemthethweni kwi-ofisi yasekuhlaleni ukuze inkqubo ibe lula kwaye iqhubekeke ngokuthe ngqo. Iingxaki ezifana nokusweleka kwempepha-mvume, ukungabi nazo iidilesi zokuhlala, nokusweleka kolwazi malunga nemiqathango yezikhalazo zisahleli iimingxuma ezikhulu ekuphuhliseni inkqubo. Amagosa omphakathi ayakhuthazwa ukuba asondele kubantu abangakwaziyo ukuzifikela kwi-ofisi ngokwabo, nangakumbi abo bahlala kude namaziko. Uhlelo lwekhaya lokunikezela ngezibonelelo lwenziwa lwaziwa njengenye yeendlela ezibonakalayo zokukhulisa ufikelelo. Ngaphezu koko, inkxaso yezindlu ngohlelo lwe-RDP lusaqhubeka nokubonelela iintsapho ezihlala kwizindawo ezirhoxisiwe okanye kwizakhiwo ezingaphephanga. Abantu abanemiyaka engamashumi amathathu namanye okanye ngaphezulu abanazo izindlu ngokwasemthethweni bayanxuswa ukuba bafake izicelo kumasipala wabo ngokukhawuleza. Uluntu luxelelwa ukuba lungashiyi ixesha lokufaka izicelo liphelelwe, kuba izibonelelo zixhomekeke kwimida yoqoqosho neyeminyaka. Karhulumente uqinisekisa ukuba iinkqubo ziya kuqhubeka ukuphuculwa ukuze ziphumeze iimfuno zabantu balelizwe ngokulinganayo.

Ezi zibonelelo zibaluleke kakhulu kubantu abaninzi abangenawo amandla okuziphilisa ngokwabo, ingakumbi abo bahlala kumaphandle naloo ndawo zinentlupheko ephezulu. Umbutho iSouth African Social Security Agency, owaziwa njenge-SASSA, uqhuba umsebenzi wokubonelela ngale nkxaso inyanga nganye, esebenzela ukunqanda indlala ebantwini. Abahlali abaninzi bexela ukuba izibonelelo zabo zifika ngexesha, kodwa abanye basachaza imiceli mngeni ebaqubisana nayo xa befika kwiofisi ze-SASSA ukuze bayifumane. Izindlu zokuhlala nazo zisiwa phambili njengenye yemiceli mngeni esemandla kakhulu kubahlali abangathathi ntweni, kuquka abo bahlala kwiindawo ezingekho mthethweni. URhulumente wephondo ubeke bucala imali eninzi ukuze ancede abo bangenazindlu ezifanelekileyo, ngokujikeleza kwiinkqubo zokulungisa izindlu kunye nokwakha iindlu ezintsha. Iinkqubo zokulungiselela abahlali abantswakazi, izintlanga, nabahlali abadala zikwathi qelele kwizidingo ezizodwa zezi maqela. Umphakathi uyacelwa ukuba wazise iimeko zemiceli mngeni kwiindawo ze-SASSA ezisondeleyo ukuze iqumrhu likhawuleze lisabele. Amajelo olutsha nawo achazwa njengesixhobo esibalulekileyo sokufundisa abahlali ngeelungelo zabo kunye neendlela zokufumana inkxaso ekufuneka babe nayo. Kubalulekile ukuba wonke umntu ofanelekileyo azibhalise kwezi nkqubo ukuze ingabi khona ilungelo elilahlekiloyo.

Iingxaki ezinjalo zibangela ukuba abantu bagqibe ixesha elide bengazifumani iinkonzo zokulinda ezisemthethweni, nto leyo eyenza izibhedlele zichokhe ngendlela engafanelekanga. Ukuze kuphendulwe le meko enzima, iinzame zikarhulumente ziye zagxiliswa ekuqinisekiseni ukuba iindawo zasemaphandleni nalezo zasezidolophini ziyakwazi ukufikelela iinkonzo zempilo ngokulinganayo. Abasebenzi bezempilo basebenza ubusuku nemini ukufundisa uluntu ngokubaluleka kokugcinwa kwamanani abantu abahlaziywayo rhoqo, kuba ukuhlolwa ngokufanelekileyo kusindisa ubomi. Emazwini abahlali baseMonti, bambalwa abantu abaziqondayo iimfuno zabo zempilo kuba amahlelo ophando asafikanga kubo wonke umzi. Imibutho yoluntu ekweli phondo ibambisene noMasipala ukuqinisekisa ukuba amahlelo okulwa izifo ezifana nobhubhane wentsholongwane aqhubeka ngempumelelo kuzo zonke izithili. Kubalulekile ukuba abantu bazinikele ekufikeni ezikhempini zempilo ezisekiwe kwiindawo zoluntu, ngenxa yokuba ukuhlolwa kwangethuba kusikhusela sonke. Oosomashishini nabahlali abakhulu bayaceliwa ukuba bathathele inxaxheba kumaqonga ezempilo oluntu, kuba inxaxheba yabo iyancedisa ekusasazeni ulwazi oluchanekileyo. Ukuqinisekisa impilo yawo wonke umntu yindlela yokwakha uluntu olunamandla, olunesidima, noluphilayo ngamandla kulo lonke eli.

Izikolo ezininzi zisaxhomekeke kwizakhiwo ezindala kunye nezixhobo zokufunda ezingapheleleyo, nto leyo ethobelisa amandla abafundi ekufumaneni iziphumo ezifanelekileyo kwizimviwo zabo. Oogxa-mfundo kunye namajoni omphakathi baxelele iinqununu zezikolo ukuba oku kusenokutshintsha ukuba kusetyenziswa ngobuchule imali enikwa ngamasebe emfundo. Amasebe emfundo asemazweni athile asekhuphe izicwangciso ezintsha zokuqinisekisa ukuba bonke abafundi bafumana izixhobo zokufunda ezaneleyo, kuquka iincwadi nezixhobo zobuchwepheshe. Kwiiyunivesiti zaseMzantsi Afrika, amawaka amaninzi abafundi asebenza nzima ukuze afumane inkxaso-mali yezifundo ngenxa yokwanda kweendleko zokufunda iminyaka ngeminyaka. Iinzame zorhulumente zokuxhasa abafundi abasweleyo ngenkxaso-mali ziye zanceda abantu abaninzi, kodwa izidingo zisandile ngendlela eyoyikisayo. Iingcali zezeMfundo bacebisa ukuba kubekho inkqubo eyenziwe ngobuchule yokusombulula lo mba ukuze akukho mntwana oshiyekayo ngasemva ngenxa yeemeko zemali. Ootitshala nabo baxelela amajelo eendaba ukuba baswele inkxaso enganeleyo yokwenza umsebenzi wabo ngempumelelo, ngenxa yokungabikho kwezinto eziyimfuneko emagumbini okufundela. Urhulumente wethembise ukwandisa isibonelelo semfundo ukuze kuncedwe inani elikhulu labafundi abangakwazi ukuhlawula iimfuno zokufunda, nento leyo ithemba lokuguqula impilo yemfundo kweli.

UMasipala weCape Winelands uzibophelele ekuqinisekiseni ukuba abasebenzi babo bezokulungisa izingxabo zezindlu zemanzi bafike kuzo zonke iindawo ezichaphazelekileyo ngaphambi kokuphela kuka-Julayi walo nyaka. Ikomiti yomphakathi yaseDrakenstein ibiphakamise le ngxaki ngokuthe ngqo kwiNdibano yeMikhosi yeNtshona Koloni, ifuna izixhobo ezithe kratya ukuze kugcinwe impilo nokuhlaziywa koluntu. Amagosa ezempilo aphefumle ngolwazi olukhathazayo, esithi abantwana abahlala kule ngingqi baxhaphakele zizifo ezinokugwenywa ukuba amanzi acocekileyo afumaneka rhoqo. Ngokwengxelo ekhutshiweyo nguMphathiswa wezeMisebenzi yoLuntu, izicwangciso zokwakha iziseko ezintsha zobudlelwane bamanzi zisebhajethini yeminyaka emithathu ezayo. Iindleko zalo msebenzi zinqwenelelwa ukuba zifinyelele kwizigidi ezingamashumi amabini eerandi, nezinxalenye zazo zizakufunyanwa kurhulumente wephondo kunye namaziko amaninzi wokuqesha imali. Abameli boluntu bathi lemingeni ayingowokuqala kumashishini okulawulwa ngurhulumente, bebebona imigaqo emininzi ingagcinwa ngokuthe ngcembe kwiminyaka edlulileyo. Urhulumente kazwelonke ukwaxhasa olu hlelo ngokunikezela izigidi ezilishumi rerandi ngaphantsi koMgaqo-siseko weNkqubo yeenkonzo zoLuntu, okusenza iqela elalimana ngengxaki yemali ukuba linethemba. Amaqela olutsha alapho aseCeres naseWorcester azibandakanye ngokukhululekileyo, efuna amathuba emisebenzi kumashishini alungiswa ngalo msebenzi omkhulu.

Ngonyaka ka-2024, ingxelo yombuso ibonise ukuba abantwana abangaphezu kwezigidi ezimbini baseNtshona Koloni, iMpuma Koloni, nakwezinye iindawo zeli lizwe abafumani imfundo efanelekileyo ngenxa yeengxaki ezahlukeneyo. Ezikolweni zasemakhaya, inkqubo yokufunda isadla ngoludala, kuba izixhobo zemfundo azikho ngokwaneleyo, yaye ootitshala abaninzi abaqeqeshwanga ngokufanelekileyo ukufundisa izifundo zesayensi nezibalo. Amaziko emfundo ephakamileyo nawo ajongene nemiceli mingeni enkulu, njengokuswela inkxaso-mali eyineleyo ukuze abafundi basekhaya bakwazi ukuqhubeka nezifundo zabo ngaphandle kokubandezeleka yimali. Urhulumente wephondo ukwabhengeze umgaqo-nkqubo omtsha wokuphucula izinga lemfundo kuzo zonke izikolo, kuqala kwizikolo zasezilalini apho imfundo isebenza gadalala khona. Lo mgaqo-nkqubo uquka ukwakhiwa kweekhompyutha mazantsi ezikolweni ezikhethiweyo ukuze abafundi bafumane ulwazi ngolwimi lwekhompyutha oluyimfuneko kumhlaba wanamhlanje. Ongumphathiswa wesebe lemfundo, ethetha kwinkomfa eyayibanjwe ePitoli, wathi amaqela aphonononga imeko yezikholo zasemaphandleni azise ingxelo yakhe kuphambi kwekota yokuqala yonyaka ozayo. Abazali abaninzi basekhaya bavakalise ixhala labo malunga nenqanaba lemfundo yabantwana babo, besithi izikolo azinazo izixhobo ezaneleyo zokubaxhasa. Ngokwengxelo ka-Sebe leMfundo, imali engaphezulu kwezigidi ezilishumi imiselwe ukuphucula izakhiwo zezikolo ngalo nyaka wesibhozo, ukuze abantwana bonke bafumane imfundo efanelekileyo.

Imeko le ibangelwa kukungabikho kweeziko zempilo ezaneleyo kumazwe amakhulu asezilalini, apho abemi basoloko behamba imigama emide ukuze bafumane uncedo. Ukuphendula le ngxaki, iSebe lezeMpilo likhuphe uhlelo olutsha lokusondeza iinkonzo zempilo kwabantu abahlala kude nezixeko, kusetyenziswa iiyunithi zempilo ezihambayo. Ezi yunithi zihamba iikhilomitha ezingamakhulu amaninzi ngeveki, zifika kwimizi yasezilalini, zinika abantu isixa sezithambiso, ziqeqesha nokuyalela ngeendlela zempilo entle. Abasebezi bezempilo abaqeqeshwe ngokupheleleyo bakhona kule msebenzi, benika unikelo lwamachiza ngenani eliphantsi ukuze wonke ubani akwazi ukufikelela kulo. Ngaphezu koko, iinkampani ezizimeleyo kunye namasebe karhulumente asebenza ndawonye ukuqinisekisa ukuba izixhobo zempilo ziyafika ngexesha nazo zonke iindawo ezidingayo. Umphakathi uyacelwa ukuba uzibhalise kule hlelo ngokuya kweRhulumente zasekuhlaleni okanye ngoqhagamshelwano lwezindlu zempilo ezisondeleyo. Ukusondela kwabantu basekhaya kule msebenzi wempilo kubalulekile kakhulu, kuba ukulungiswa kwezempilo emiphakathini kusuka ekuzibandakanyeni kwabantu ngokuzenzekelayo, hayi kuphela ngokulindela uncedo ngaphandle. Ukukhuthazwa kwemfundo yezempilo, uhlolo lwamanani egazi, nokunikwa kweekonseli malunga nempilo yengqondo kuyinxalenye esemandla yale hlelo. Iinjongo zilukwenze uluntu oluphilayo, olunamandla, noluzimeleyo ngezo nkonzo zempilo ekudala zifunekayo.

UMasipala ukhuphe isibhengezo esithi izixhobo ezintsha zohlupheko lwamanzi ziza kufakwa kwiilokishi ezahlukeneyo ukuqala kwikota yesibini yonyaka wezimali. Ngokwengxelo yomthombo wasemthethweni, iinkqubo zokubuyisela izisombululo kwezi ndawo zinqongophele amanzi zizongezelela ukuyenzeka kwezinto eziluncedo kuluntu. Urhulumente wesifundazwe ugxininise ukubaluleka kokusebenzisana nomasipala ukuqinisekisa ukuba imali yoluntu isetyenziselwa izinto eziyiyo. Amaqumrhu amalungelo oluntu ayacelwa ukuba ahambisane neenjongo zomasipala ukuze abahlali bazi ngaphandle ukuba zithethwa ntoni na. Ngaphandle koko, ikomiti yezamanzi yepalamente yesifundazwe ibhengeze umhla wenzululwazi yokujonga inkqubo yokunikezela ngamanzi kwiindawo zasemaphandleni. Iinzame zokukhupha amanzi acocekileyo kwiilali ezikude zebonakala njengento ebalulekileyo kakhulu kwimigaqo-nkqubo kamasipala. Ukuqhawuka kwemipompo yamanzi kubangelwe kukuphelelwa kwexesha kwezixhobo ezindala, nazo ke abasebenzisi bemali yoluntu baxelelwa ukuba zizakutshintshwa. Abasebenzi bobuchwephesha bebhunga babekhona ukuqinisekisa ukuba imisebenzi iza kuqhubeka ngokukhawuleza. Amaxwebhu aphuma kwiofisi yomphathiswa wamanzi abonisa ukuba ishedyuli yomsebenzi iza kubhengezwa ngaphambili kuze abahlali baxelelwe ngexesha. Wonke umntu onezikhalazo makabuye axhumane nomasipala ngezithuba ezikhethiweyo zokwazisa umphakathi.

Urhulumente weli lizwe uye waseka iinkqubo ezahlukeneyo ezijoliswe ekuncedeni abantu abadala, abantwana, nabantu abakhubazekileyo, ukuze bafumane inkxaso abayidingayo ukuphila ubomi obufanelekileyo. Kule minyaka idlulileyo, umzamo omkhulu wenziwa ngurhulumente ukuqinisekisa ukuba iimali zenkxaso zifikelela kubo bonke abafanelekileyo, ingakumbi abo bahlala ezilalini nabanqongopheleyo izixhobo. Iziko lezentlekele nezinye iinkqubo zikarhulumente ziye zaqhuba iinkqubo zokufundisa uluntu malunga namalungelo abo nendlela yokufaka izicelo zenkxaso-mali. Umphakathi waseMonti, ngokomzekelo, ucace gca ekuxhomekekeni kwezibonelelo zikarhulumente njengoko abasebenzi abaninzi bachaphazeleke bubuhlwempu obuthe kratya emva kobhubhane. Ukongeza kwinkxaso-mali, urhulumente uqhuba iinkqubo zokunikezela ngezindlu zabahlali abahluphekileyo, nto leyo eyenza umahluko omkhulu ebomini babantu abaninzi. Iinkqubo zezindlu zinikeza amathuba entsha kuluntu olunzima imeko, kwaye zisebenza ngokubambisana nemibutho engagxininisi nzuzo.
