Umasipala kunye neephondo zinawo amaxanduva okuqinisekisa ukuba iinkonzo zifikelela kubantu abadinga inkxaso ngokukhawuleza nakwimo ephumeleleyo. Ingxaki enkulu ejamelene norhulumente kukuqinisekisa ukuba akukho buqhophololo obuphazamisa ukufika kwezibonelelo kubantu abafanelekileyo. Ikomiti yezentlalo nephuhliso lifuna ukuba uluntu luxele naziphi na iziganeko zokukhwabanisa ukuze inkqubo isebenze ngobulungisa.

Ezi zibonelelo ziquka inkxaso yabadala, abantwana, nabantu abakhubazekileyo, kwaye zisebenza njengenxalenye yegxalaba lomzamo omkhulu wokuphelisa ubuhlwempu. Amakhaya amaninzi asezilalini axhomekeke ngokuphangaleleyo kule mali njengendlela yokuqinisekisa ukuba izidingo zasendlini zifezwa. ISebe leMicimbi yeNtlalo likuqinisekisile ukuba amakhaya angaphezu kwezigidi ezintathu kweli lizwe lonke asanda kufumana inkxaso yeqonga lezibonelelo elitsha, elichukunyiswayo. Lo mzamo wokujonga kwakhona uluhlu lwabafumana inkxaso wenzelwe ukuqinisekisa ukuba amaxabiso afanelekileyo kuphela axhamlayo. Urhulumente wephondo uphinda wabhengeza ukwandiswa kweenkqubo zezindlu zoluntu kwiidolophu ezibonakala zinezidingo eziphambili, okuquka izithili zaseKapa, iDrakenstein, naseGeorge. Iindawo zemizi-mveliso ekuqala nje zakhiwa ngamashumi amabini anesihlanu edolophu nganye, kwaye umsebenzi ukhokelwa ziingcali zezakhiwo eziqeshwa ngqo ngabasemagunyeni bendawo. Abahlali abangena kwezi zindlu kufuneka bagedle uxwebhu lobukho bazo zonke izinto ezidingekayo, kubandakanya nezinkcukacha zeenkonzo zikamasipala. Amacandelo ahlukeneyo karhulumente abandakanyekayo kwezi zicwangciso axelele ingxelo ukuba inkqubo yokubhaliswa kwezindlu ithathe amanyathelo amatsha okusebenza ngempumelelo, ukunceda nokukhawulezisa inkxaso yabantu abaxhamla kwezi nkqubo zoluntu. Abahlali abanamibuzo mabanxibelelane neofisi yomasipala wabo okanye bakhe balobele inombolo yasimahla yeNational Development Agency ukufumana uncedo.

Esi siganeko senzeka emva kweminyaka eliqela apho iintsapho ezininzi zaziphila ngaphandle kwamanzi ahlambulukileyo, nto leyo eyabangela iingxaki ezinzulu kwezempilo. Umasipala ucacise ukuba uhlelo olutsha luya kuthi luqale ngokomyinge phakathi kwenyanga kaTshazimpuzi noMarch wonyaka ozayo, kusetyenziswa imali engangoR45 yezigidi. Iingcinga zabahlali zazivakalisiwe kwiintlanganiso zomphakathi ezazibanjelwe kwizithili ezahlukeneyo, nalapho abantu babonisa ukukhathazeka ngokuphazamiseka kwenkonzo. Phakathi kwezigqibo ezibalulekileyo ezenziwa ngumasipala, kukho nokunikezelwa kwezixhobo zokuphekela izikolo zaselungelweni, eziza kusetyenziswa ngokuba iinqwelo zihambe ngokwexesha elibekiweyo. Amagosa karhulumente axelele abahlali ukuba bayakwaziswa malunga nenkqubela phambili yezo njongo ngoncwadi olusiwa ekhaya ngqo. Urhulumente wephondo nakanjalo wathetha ngesidingo sokuba amasipala awo wonke avule amacawa okufakwa kwezicelo zezibonelelo zomthetho nakwabantu abadala. Zonke izicelo ezingenayo ziya kuphuculwa ngaphandle kolibaziseko, ngokwesiqinisekiso esenziwe ngamagosa aphezulu. Kubalulekile ukuba abahlali baqaphele ukuba amacandelo karhulumente avulekile ukwamkela izikhalazo ngayo nayiphi na inkxalabo ephathelele iinkonzo. Inkxalabo ezithe zabiwa nazo ziziindleko zokuthutha, impilo yabantwana, nezakhiwo zangasese ezingekho mgangathweni kumaphandle. Umasipala ucebisile ukuba ngamnye wabahlali abe nokulungiselela imibuzo yakhe ngaphambi kweentlanganiso ezilandelayo ukuze uxoxo lubenomthombo.

Izifunda ezinjenge-OR Tambo kunye nase-Joe Gqabi zibonakala zisingathe inani elikhulu labalimi abancinci abangenawo umhlaba omangalisayo, kodwa abanakho ukufikelela kwiindlela zokutyala ezisebenzayo. INkqubo yoPhuhlisp loLimo eMpuma Koloni ithe yaqhuba amaphulo okwenza izinto ngokungathandabuzekiyo, nangona iingxaki zomhlaba zisaqhubeka nokwenza izinto nzima kubantu abahlalayo emakhaya. Abahlali baseKomani baxelele abezindaba ukuba amaplasi amaninzi aye eswela amanzi ekuseni nasemalanga, nto leyo ebangela ukonakala kwezityalo ngexesha lobushushu. URhulumente wephondo ubhengeze ukuba ubeke bucala imali engange-R450 yezigidi ukuze kuxhaswe urhwebelwano lolimo kuzo zonke izifunda, nto leyo abalimi abaninzi abathi wayalela inkululeko entsha. Oobambisane kwiNkqubo yoPhando loLimo boqinisekisa ukuba ukusetyenziswa komhlaba ngobuchule yenye yezona ndawo ezibalulekileyo ekuxhaseni inkqubela phambili yolimo. Iinkonzo zokukhuthaza nokuqeqesha abalimi nazo zifanele ukuhanjiswa ngendlela eqhelekileyo, ukuze ulwazi olusha lufike kumalungu omphakathi asezilalini. Ukongeza apho, iingcali zomhlaba nezezolimo zixelela ukuba ukusetyenziswa kwezixhobo zolimo zamandla amafutshane kunokuba negalelo elikhulu ekwandiseni isivuno. Isigqibo esitsha sorhulumente sokubonelela abalimi ngembewu namatye omhlaba ngexabiso elithekelelelekayo livelise ithemba lokuba utshintsho lwenene luza kufikela kwabo bahlala emaphandleni kwaye baxhomekeke kulimo ukuze baphile.

Izibonelelo ezifana nentsusa yobudala, inkxaso-mali yabantwana, kunye nemali yabakhubazekileyo ziyimfuneko enkulu kubantu abaninzi abahlala kwiimeko ezinzima kakhulu. IRhulumente yesizwe iqhubeka nokwandisa ubalo lwabantu abamkelayo ezi zibonelelo ukuze akho umntu oshiyekele emva. Iinkonzo zika-SASSA, ezinika abemi amaxabiso okuphila, ziyasebenza kwizixeko nakuzo zonke iindawo zasemaphandleni. Abasemagunyeni baxelele ukuba amakhaya amaninzi asezifundazweni zasemaphandleni asafumana ubunzima ekufumaneni unxibelelwano neziko lokuhlawulwa kwezibonelelo. Ukuze kuxazululwe le ngxaki, amaziko entolongo zezimali avulwe kwimizi-mveliso emitsha ukuqinisikisa ukuba abantu abadlelane nobuqhetseba bafikelele ngokukhawuleza kwimali yabo. Ngaphezu koko, uRhulumente usebenza ngamandla onke ukuphumeza inkqubo yezindlu ezintsha kumakhaya aphantsi komgaqo-siqu wengeniso. Umsebenzi wokwakha izindlu ezinzima nezinempilo uyaqhuba kuzo zonke iiphondo, nangona amaxesha okugqibela amashishini okwakha esaphinda ahlaselwa ziimeko ezibangelwa ngumozulu kunye nezinye iingxaki. Iingxelo zikaRhulumente zibonisa ukuba izindlu ezingaphezu kwama-400 000 zakiwa ngexesha leminyaka emihlanu edlulileyo, ezinike amakhaya amaninzi ithemba nomhlaba wokuhlala. Ulutsha nabantu abadala bayakhuthazwa ukuba bafake izicelo zenkxaso kusini na ukuze naliphi na eli lizwe lifezekise umxholo wenkululeko yezomnotho yeentsapho. Abakwi-ofisi zikarhulumente baseParlamente baqinisekisa ukuba onke amashishini aqhutywa ngokwemithetho engqongqo ukuze ingeniso yabaxhasi ifikelele kubahlali ngokuchanekileyo.

Urhulumente wePhondo, ngokusebenza ngokuthe ngqo nemiphakathi esemaphandleni, uqhube amaqela okusebenza aye kohlola iimeko zokuhlala kwabahlali abahlelelekileyo ukuze ancede abo abasweleyo kakhulu. Abahlali baseMonti, ikakhulu abo bahlala kwizindlu ezigungxulwayo nezingenaziseko ezifanelekileyo, bayavuma ukuba le nkqubo iye yabanceda ngokubavulela ithemba ebebelihleli kumnyama. Iinkqubo zikaSebe lezokuHlaliswa kwabantu zizimisele ukuqinisekisa ukuba wonke umntu unelungelo lendawo yokuhlala ekhuselekileyo, ecocekileyo neneempawu ezifanele abantu. Ngokutsho kwezikhululo zeendaba zasekuhlaleni, iimali ezikhutshwa ngurhulumente ukuxhasa lemikhosi yezindlu ziye zandiswa ngokulingana neenqanaba zokuphila ezibuhlungu zabahlali abangathathi ntweni. Amagosa kaSebe, xa ethetha nabahlali ngexesha leentlanganiso zakowabo, axelele uluntu ukuba imvume yesicelo senkxaso-mali mayenziwe ngokukuko, ize kunikezwe amaxwebhu afanelekileyo ukuphepha ukulibaziseka kweenkonzo. Abahlali abafumana izibonelelo zokuhlala baxelelwa ukuba mabavele ngexesha elibhengezwa ngurhulumente wase-Ofisini kamaspala wendawo ukuze amaxabiso abo aqinisekiswe ngokuthe ngqo. Oku kuqhubeka ngoxa urhulumente esaqhuba uphando olunzulu lokubona ukuba ngawaphi amakhaya amawodwa asafanele ukufakwa kwezi nkqubo zenkxaso ukuze akhe ubomi obuphucukileyo nezizukulwana ezithe xaxe.

Izifunda ezifana naseQumbu naseBizana zibonakalisa imeko ekhathazayo, apho abalimi abancinane bengakwazi ukuvelisa ukutya okunaneleyo ngenxa yokusweleka kweenkqubo zenkxaso ezifanelekileyo. URhulumente weMpuma Koloni, ngokusebenzisana nomNyango wezeMveliso yoMhlaba, uqalise inkqubo entsha yokuxhasa abalimi basemaphandleni ngezixhobo zolimo kunye noncedo lwemali ukuze bakhulise imveliso yabo. Le nkqubo iquka ukufikelela kwemfundo ngezindlela ezintsha zokulima, inkxaso yezityalo, kunye noncedo lokufumana iimakethe ezintsha zokuthengisa imveliso. Abalimi abangabantu abafazi baqatshelwe njengoqoqosho olukhulu kweli candelo, ngenxa yoko ke umzamo ufakwe ukuba bafumane inkxaso enkulu kwezi nkqubo. Kuyacaca ukuba ubutyebi boMhlaba waseMpuma Koloni bunokuphuhliswa ngokuchanekileyo ukuba abalimi benjelwa ngezakhono ezifanelekileyo kunye nezixhobo eziyimfuneko. Iinkqubo zokuphuhlisa umhlaba zisebenza nzima ukuqinisekisa ukuba ulimo oluqhubekayo lufezekiswa ngendlela ehloniphekileyo namanzi afanelekileyo. Uninzi lwabahlali basemaphandleni luyavumelana nokuba izinguqulelo ezinkulu ziyanyanzeleka ukuze impilo yabo iphuculwe ngendlela esisigxina. Ithemba liqaqambile phakathi kwabalimi abaninzi njengoko izifundazwe zinika ingqalelo ekhethekileyo kuphuhliso lwezolimo njengomgogombela wenkqubela phambili yabantu bonke.

Usodolophu wenhloko-dolophu uqinisekisile ukuba lo msebenzi wokufaka imijelo emisha uya kuqalwa ngexesha eliphezulu eloNtlasa kulo nyaka, kwaye uya kuqhuba de abe ugqityiwe ngaphakathi kweminyaka emibini. Umasipala uxelele uluntu ukuba iinkampani eziya kuqashwa kule projekthi kumele zilandele imigaqo ethile yokuqesha abasebenzi abasuka kwaLo mmandla, ukuze uluntu lwangaphakathi lufumane inzuzo yezomnotho kwaye ingagaywa ngaphandle. Ngaphezulu koko, uMphathiswa weZekhaya nomPhakathi ephondweni wabhengeza ukuba imibutho yoluntu iya kunikiwa amathuba okubonakalisa izimvo zabo ngokusemthethweni kwingxelo yeenkonzo zomasipala ngaphambi kokuba igqityiwe yenziwe umthetho opheleleyo. Uhlahlo-lwabiwo-mali olwahlulwe njengezigidi ezingamashumi amahlanu eerandi lumiselwe ukuxhasa le projekthi, nalapho ingxenye yalo mali iya kusetyenziswa ngqo ekuqeqesheni abatsha abasuka kumizi efumanela ingxowa-mali. Umasipala ucengile ukuba wonke umntu osemthethweni obhaliswe njengomhlali kummandla ofanelekileyo azise igosa lasekuhlaleni ukuze alandelwe ngokufanelekileyo kwaye angalahlekelwa leli thuba lokunikezwa kwenkonzo ebalulekileyo kangako.

Ezi nkqubo, eziquka imali yenkxaso yabantwana, imali yamaxhoba omhlaba, kunye nenkxaso yabadala, zisebenza njengentsika yobomi kwabaninzi abahleli ngaphandle kwemisebenzi esisigxina. Umba wezindlu ezintsha uyaqhubeka ukuba ngunobangela wokukhathazeka okukhulu kubahlali abahlala kwiindawo ezingenamakhaya afanelekileyo. UMasipala waseMdantsane ubhengeze ngokusesikweni ukuba amakhaya angaphezu kwekhulu azakwakhiwa ngalo nyaka ukuze kuphunyezwe amalungelo abahlali afanelekileyo. Olu lwakhiwo luzakuba nenxaxheba enkulu ekunciphiseni ubunzima obujongene nabantu abangenazo izindlu ezifanelekileyo kule ndawo. Amakhosikazi nabantwana abangaphandle kwenkxaso yasemzini bafumana ingqalelo eyodwa kwezi nkqubo zorhulumente zokunceda abahluphekileyo. Umphathiswa wesebe lezentlalontle wachaza ukuba isebe liza kukhupha imali engaphezulu kwezigidigidi ezimbalwa zeerandi ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba iinkonzo zifika kubo bonke abafanelekileyo. Abasebenzikazi boluntu bebezama nzima ukuya ngokwenyanga kumalaphu asemaphandleni ukuqinisekisa ukuba abadala nabakhubazekileyo bayafumana imali yenkxaso ngaphandle kwezithintelo. Ukuqeqeshwa kwabasebenzi bemibutho yentlalontle kuyindlela ebalulekileyo yokwandisa ukufikeleleka kweenkonzo kubantu abahluphekileyo kumaphondo onke. Iinkqubo zokuxhasa iintsapho ezihluphekayo zifuna ukuqiniswa ngakumbi ukuze zonke izidingo zabantu zifezekiswe ngendlela efanelekileyo neyiyo.

Urhulumente weli lizwe uyaqhubeka nokuzama ukuqinisekisa ukuba wonke umntu onelungelo loncedo lwezindlu uyalufumana ngexesha elifanelekileyo, ngaphandle kokuba afumane imiqathango enzima engasenakufikelela kuyo. Iinkqubo zoncedo loluntu, eziquka imali yenkxaso yabantu abadala, abantwana, nabantu abakhubazekileyo, ziye zabaluleka kakhulu ekuncedeni iintsapho ezisebenzayo eziphila phantsi komda wentlupheko. Ukuze kufezekiswe injongo yokunceda abantu ngempumelelo, amagosa aphondo ahambele imizi emine eyahlukeneyo kule nyanga ukuze anikeze ulwazi oluchanekileyo ngeendlela zokufaka izicelo. Ikomiti yolondolozo lwentlalontle iphinde yaxelela abahlali ukuba abanakho ukuhlawula imali yokuqesha ngenxa yeemeko ezinzima bafanele bafake izicelo zemali yenkxaso ngokukhawuleza. Kubalulekile ukuba abantu bangalindi ixesha elide bengafaki izicelo, kuba urhulumente ufuna ukuqinisekisa ukuba umntu wonke ufumana uncedo ngendlela efanelekileyo. Iindawo zolondolozo loluntu zivuliwe yonke imihla ukuze zincede abantu abafuna ukwazi ngezicelo zabo nokuba zikwasiphi isigaba. Icandelo lezindlu liphinde labongoza abahlali ukuba bangenise yonke imiqathango efunekayo ukuze iinkqubo zohlolo ziqhubeke ngokukhawuleza kwaye ngaphandle komqobo. Uluntu lweli lizwe lunetyala elikhulu elifuneka lizaliswe ngurhulumente ngokubonelela ngezindlu ezilungileyo ezikhuselekileyo, kwaye oku kuqhubeka nokuba yinxalenye ebalulekileyo yenkqubo yokwakha ubutyebi obuqhubelekayo kumazwe onke.

IRhulumente yePhondo ixelele uluntu ukuba isigqeba esiphezulu sezisombululo zeenkonzo siza kuqalisa umsebenzi walo kwizithili ezine phakathi kweli nyanga. Ezi zithili zibandakanya iMasipala yaseKing Sabata Dalindyebo, iMasipala yaseMalahleni, nakwezinye iindawo apho abantu bendile bejongana nobunzima bokungafikeleli ngokufanelekileyo kwamanzi. Ngokutsho kweenkcukacha ezikhutshiweyo nguSekela-Mongameli woMkhandlu, abahlali abangaphezu kwamashumi amane amawaka baya kuzuza kwezi zicwangciso zokuphuhlisa ukufikelela kwamanzi ngexesha lonyaka ozayo. Urhulumente ukwabalule nokuba imali efikelele kwizigidi ezimashumi mathathu zerandi iye yabekwa bucala ukuze yenziwe le ngqesho yezisombululo. Uhlahlo-lwabiwo-mali olu luvela ngokutsha kwezigqibo zephalamende, apho amalungu amaninzi ephulaphula izicelo zabahlali malunga neenkonzo ezisilele. Izicwangciso zomsebenzi zibandakanya nokwakhiwa kweendlela ezintsha zomgaqo-siseko wokuphatha amanzi nasezidolophini ezifutshane. Isebe lemiSebenzi yaManzi noGutyulo leLahleko lixelele ababonisi belizwe ukuba inqununu zetekhnoloji entsha ziya kunceda ekuphulaphuleni izikhalazo zabahlali ngokukhawuleza nakangakumbi. Kutshanje, amaqela enkampani zikarhulumente azibophelele ekufundiseni abasebenzi basekhaya ukuze amashishini aqhube ngokuqhubekayo emva kokuba amaxesha oqeqesho aphele. Olu tshintshelo lweenkonzo lwethembisa ukuzisa utshintsho olubonakalayo kubomi babantu basezweni jikelele phakathi kweminyaka emibini ezayo.

Ibhunga lesithili sazisa ukuthi lihlwayele imali efikelela kwizigidi ezingama-R120 zokuzikhulula ezikhundleni ezibalulekileyo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba iinkonzo ezisisiseko zifika kubo bonke abahlali. Umphathiswa wezakhiwo noondoqo wephondo leMpuma Koloni uvakalise ngokucacileyo ukuba amathuba omsebenzi awanakudalwa ukuba ingqalelo ayinikiwa imisebenzi yezakhiwo ezibolileyo. Eziindaweni zasemaphandleni, abantu abahlala kude nezixeko baxela ukuba izinqwelo zamanzi zifika kangaphi kanye ngenyanga, okuthi kubenze bathathelele ngamanzi angenasiqinisekiso sokucoceka. Urhulumente wesifundazwe uphuhlise iqela elitsha eliza kuphanda le meko ngokukhawuleza ukuze lifike nezisombululo ezisebenzayo. Kubanjwe intlanganiso ebalulekileyo kwisakhiwo sika-masipala apho iindidi ngeendidi zabantu besithili babecelwe ukuba bazongenise izikhalazo zabo ngesantya. Abameli babantu abaninzi bavakalisa ukuba uluntu alunakuhlala lundwendwelwa zizikhululo zikagesi kodwa lungafumani ugesi gqibi. Kwiinkonzo zezempilo, izikliniki eziliqela zisazibhengeza ukuba akukho oogqirha baneleyo ngenxa yokusweleka kwezixhobo zokufunda kumakhondo ezonyango. Ukomishinala wezempilo wephondo waxelela iindaba ukuba iinqwelo zezempilo ezintsha zizakufikiswa kwinqanaba lesithili ngaphambi kwesiphelo sonyaka-mali wangoku. Injongo enkulu yalo lonke eli hlelo kukuqinisekisa ukuba amalungelo abo bonke abahlali asindisiwe futhi anikwe indawo efanelekileyo kwinkqubo yorhulumente.

Kwiindawo ezininzi, abantu baxhomekeke kumaqula amanzi aneziqwenga neenqwelo-mafutha, into edale imeko engabhangi empilweni yabantwana nabadala. Umgaqo wezolawulo karhulumente uyabuqinisekisa ilungelo lamanzi kubo bonke abantu, kodwa uguqulelo lwalomgaqo lusithe emgangathweni oyiminqweno kuphela. Iimeko ezifumaneka ezibelekweni zoMasipala wasesixekweni zibonakalisa ukuba isidingo sokulungiswa kwemithambo yamanzi sifuna ingqwalasela esheshayo nokwaneleyo. Ngokwengxelo eyaziwe nguMasipala, zikhona iinkqubo ezisisiseko ezilungiswa kwimizi engama-1 500 kummandla waseMitchells Plain, apho amapipi amanzi ebedala nokubonakalisa impazamo enkulu. Isebe lezolawulo lweziseko zoluntu lithe lizimisele ukugqiba umsebenzi wokuhlaziya lo mthambo nangaphambili kokuphela konyaka wesixhenxe. Ngaphezu koko, abasebenzi bomsebenzi weziseko bathe baqhuba uvavanyo lolwakhiwo lwezindlu entsha kwilali yaseMasiphumelele, apho isidingo sokulungiswa kwezindlu sibonakalisa isisindo esikhulu kubemi. Abafundi nezazi zezoqoqosho bebebalula ukuba ukufumaneka kweziseko ezifanelekileyo kuqondana nokulungelelaniswa kwemisebenzi, nokunyuswa kwamazinga entlalo yezolimo nomthetho. Ukuba iinkqubo nezicwangciso zikarhulumente ziyaphumelela, kubalulekile ukuba imiphakathi ithathele inxaxheba ngobunye njengabantu abanomdla weenguqu ezakhayo nezinzileyo. Amaqumrhu ezentlalo kwaneeakhawunti zolawulo lwekhaya angakwenza ngcono ukujongwa kokunikezwa kweenkonzo zikamasipala ngayo yonke imihla.

Ekhaya laseKhayelitsha, abahlali balo lonke iphondo liMpuma Koloni bathe gqolo ukuhlangana ukuze baxoxe ngeengxaki ezikhona kwakunye nendlela yokuziphucula iimeko zokuphila. Umbutho wolutsha waseMonti, owaziwa ngegama elithi Isizwe Esilungileyo, ubungise isigqibo sokwakha izakhiwo ezintsha zoqeqesho lwezorhwebo kuzo zonke iziphaluka. Ngaloo ntanjana, amawaka abantu asifumene ithuba lokufunda izakhono ezintsha zemisebenzi nokuqeqeshwa kwezoqoqosho. Iindibano eziqhutywa emaphandleni zibonakalise umdla omkhulu wabantu abangaphezulu kwamawaka amathathu abaye bakhona ngokuthe kratya. Amakhosikazi asixeko naasemaphandleni athe ntsho phambi kwamanye amaqumrhu kaRhulumente ukuze athethele amalungelo abo kwakunye neentsapho zabo. Iindibano ezizizo ziye zanceda kakhulu ekuphuculeni ubunye bomphakathi nokuqinisa ubudlelwane phakathi kwabantu abahlukeneyo. Abahlali baseMonti nabo bebevakalisa iimbono zabo malunga nokuphuculwa kweendlela nakwezinye izisombululo ezikhethekileyo zemicimbi yomphakathi. Ukugcinwa kwamasiko kwaye kuba sisontsomi esibalulekileyo kwiindibano ezinje, apho abantu abamdala befundisa ulutsha ngemidlalo nezinto zobuXhosa. Umphakathi waseDutywa nawo uzibeka phambili ekusebenzisaneni noorhulumente bezithili ukuze kuphuculwe imigaqo yolawulo. Ngokuthetha kwezithethi ezihloniphekileyo, uluntu luye lwangcatsha ukuphelelwa lithemba, luqhuba phambili ngeenjongo zokwakha uluntu olunokulondoloza uzuko lwalo.

Urhulumente wesifundazwe uzibophelele ekuqinisekiseni ukuba amafama amancinci enza inxaxheba enkulu ekuphuhliseni iindawo zasemaphandleni, kwaye inkxaso yezinto ezifana nembewu, izichumisi, nezixhobo zolimo iyafumaneka ngokubeka phambili iimfuno zabahlali. Ngaphezu kwaloo nto, amaphulo kaRhulumente ahlose ukunceda abalimi ukuba baphuhlise imihlaba yabo ngendlela esebenzayo nenenongo ukuze imveliso yezilimo ibe phezulu. Iingxelo ezivela kumasebe ezoLimo zibonisa ukuba amafama amaninzi asebenzisa iindlela ezintsha zokulima ekuqinisekiseni ukuba umhlaba uhlala unempilo kwaye uvundileyo unyaka wonke. Ukusetyenziswa komhlaba ngendlela efanelekileyo kuyinxalenye ebalulekileyo yomgaqo-nkqubo kaRhulumente wophuhliso lwezolimo, kuba umhlaba ngumthombo ophambili wokuphila kwabantu abasemaphandleni. Abafundi bezolimo abaninzi basekelelwa ngenkxaso yezemfundo ukuze bakwazi ukuzisebenzisa izakhono zabo ekuphuhliseni imihlaba yolimo kwizixeko nasemaphandleni. Iphulo lokunikezela ngokuqeqeshwa kwabalimi liqhubeke ngamandla kwiilali ngeelali, lizisa ulwazi olunzulu malunga nendlela yokulima ngokusebenzisa amanzi ngokulingeneyo. Ngokwengxelo yekomiti yophuhliso lwasemaphandleni, amafama aqala ukubona iziphumo ezinkulu emva kokuqeqeshwa kwabo, nto leyo ebonisa ukubaluleka kwemfundo kweli candelo. Uluntu lwemimandla yasemaphandleni luyakhuthazwa ukuba luthatha inxaxheba ngokupheleleyo kwiinkqubo zophuhliso ukuze luzuze ngokugcweleyo kuzo.

Abantu abaninzi phakathi kwabo bahlala kwizindlu eziwa phantsi, nezingenamandla okujolisa imozulu eqhaqhazelisayo yasebusika. Umbutho wabahlali wendawo uveze ukuba inkqubo yokufaka izicelo zeendlu akucocanga ngokwaneleyo, ibe ibanga ixinelaniso phakathi kwabahlali nabaphathi besixeko. Kuyamangalisa ukufumanisa ukuba abanye abantu bafaka izicelo zabo ngaphezu kweminyaka elishumi eyadlulayo, kodwa bona basalinde impendulo esemthethweni ukuza namhlanje. IRhulumente wephondo weBhunga leNtshona Koloni uqinisekile ukuba unikezela ngeendlu zamahlwempu ngokomgaqo-sikhelo wokuxhasa uluntu oluhluphekayo. Iinkonzo zentlalo-ntle, kuquka inkxaso-mali yeNkamnkam yabantwana kunye neMali yoMantyi, ziyaqhubeka zibanjelwa ngabantu abanelungelo lokuzifumana minyaka le. Ngokwengxelo eyaveliswa iBhunga leMicimbi yoLuntu, ngaphezulu kwamawaka amabini eentsapho ze-Mdantsane zifumana inkxaso-mali yenkonzo yezindlu ngoku ngoku. Nangona kunjalo, iingxaki ezingqongileyo iinkonzo zokulinda amaxesha amade aziyanyaniswa nokuswela kakuhle kwabasebenzi abaqeqeshiweyo kwiziko lolawulo lwezicelo. Kucaciselwe uluntu ukuba nayiphi na into ebonakala ingachanekanga malunga nokuqhutywa kwezicelo ingabikwa kwiSebe leMicimbi yentlalo-ntle ngaphandle kwesoyikiso. Loo nto ivelisa ithemba lokuba inkqubo iya kuconjululwa, ibenze belungele nabemi abangakalufumani ncedo olwaneleyo ukuze baphile ngobunono nasekhuselekile.

Olu dano lubonakalisa ubungakanani bendlela apho abantu baselula, abadala, nabanye abasemngciphekweni besalinda inkxaso efanelekileyo ngokuyimfuneko yabo yemihla ngemihla. Iinkqubo zenkxaso yoluntu, eziquka iinkxaso zemali zabantwana, abadala, nabantu abakhubazekileyo, ziyaqhubeka nokufika kwiinqanaba eziphantsi kunalokho okufunekayo ukuze zikhusele onke amalungu omphakathi. Abacuphi bezentlalo abangaphezulu kwama-200 baqhuba uphando olubanzi kulo nyaka, beveza ukuba iintsapho ezininzi azifumani iinkonzo njengoko kumiswe ngumthetho wakuleli. Iingxaki ezibangelwa kukungabikho kweendlela ezifanelekileyo nokushota kwabasebenzi ziyaqhubeka zithintela ukufikeleleka kwenkxaso kubantu abasweleyo. UMasipala weSithili, ngokubambisana neNdlu yoLawulo leMicimbi yoLuntu, uzimisele ukuvula amagumbi amabini angeneliso ukuphulaphula izikhalazo zabahlali ukususela ngenyanga ezayo. La magumbi azakunceda iintsapho ukufaka izicelo zenkxaso yeendlu, amavautsha okutya, nenxaso yempilo ngaphandle kwengxaki yokuhamba ibanga elide. Kuyinxalenye yeqhinga elibanzi lombuso wokulwa neziqu zentlupheko emadolophini nasemaphandleni. Abahlali bayacelwa ukuba bazise yonke imibhalo efanelekileyo xa bebeka izicelo, ukuze inkqubo iqhube ngokukhawuleza ngaphandle kweengxaki. Iinkonzo ezibethelelweyo zeentlangano nezoluntu zizakuqhubeka ukuze wonke ubani afumane ulwazi oluchanekileyo ngeenkqubo ezikhoyo.

IMasipala yeSithili waseMzantsi uMzimkhulu ixelele uluntu ukuba umsebenzi wokubeka iingxelo zomnatha wamanzi uya kuqalisa ngenyanga ezayo, emva kweenqubo zobugcisa ezazibambe umgaqo-nkqubo wokusebenza. Kule nyanga, iikomiti zeenkonzo zoluntu zihlanganile ukuxoxa ngamacebo okuphucula ukufikiswa kwamanzi kunye nophucuko lwezindlu zangasese kulo mmandla. Iinjongo ezibekiweyo zibonakala zilungiselelwe ukuhlangabezana neemfuno zabantu abangamatyotyombe abahlala kwiindawo ezikufutshane nezixeko. Ngokwenqaku lelo, amaqela aliqela asekelwe emiphakathini ayivumelanga indlela ekujanyaziswa ngayo imicimbi yabahlali abahluphekileyo, ebebalula ukuba izithembiso zeenkonzo zomasipala azifezeki ngexesha elifanelekileyo. Urhulumente wephondo ubonakalise inkxaso yawo kule projekthi, esithi imali eyabeliweyo izoqinisekiswa ukuze ifike kwizicwangciso ezifanelekileyo. Abacuphi bezekhono baxelele izindlu ezibalwa ngokuthe gatya ukuze baqonde ubungakanani bezidingo zongezelelekileyo ezifuna ukuphendulwa. Ngokwemigaqo ebekiweyo, imasipala inelungelo lokucela inkxaso yezezimali kuzwelonke xa ixabiso lomnatha liphuma ngaphandle kwemida yesabelo mali. Amalungu omphakathi atyunjwe ukuba azise izikhalazo zawo ngokuthe ngqo kwiofisi yomasipala, apho amagosa alungeleyo aya kuziphendula ngexesha elifanelekileyo. Lo msebenzi ubonwa njengonyathelo olubalulekileyo ekuphuculeni ubomi babantu abahlala kwezi ndawo zisemaphandleni.

IRhulumente yeMmandla yaMasipala ithe izakuqinisekisa ukuba iingxaki zokuhanjiswa kwamanzi zizakusombululwa ngokukhawuleza, ingakumbi kwilokishi iKhayelitsha nasezindaweni ezingqonge idolophu yaseBhayi. Amaxwebhu asemthethweni athunyelwe kwiziphathamandwa zamadolophu zibonisa ukuba ngaphezulu kwabantu abazikhululo ezingamashumi amathathu basengxakini ngenxa yokungabi namanzi acocekileyo. UMkomishinala weMicimbi yoLuntu uthe abasebenzi bezakusebenza imini nobusuku ukuze izinto ziphinde zihambe kakuhle kwimihla emibini. Amaqumrhu oluntu asebeke amangeno eSigungu soBulawu ukuze abe nethuba lokuthetha ngale ngxaki ebalulekileyo. Isigqibo sikarhulumente sivumile ukuba mali engaphezulu kwezigidi ezimashumi amathathu eerandi izotyalwa kwizakhiwo zorhwebelwano lwamanzi ukuze ingxaki ingabuyeli kwakhona. Ababoneleli-zinkonzo base matyaleni engxelo exela ukuba izixhobo ezidala nezaphukileyo zezi sizathu sokusilela kwalaa nkonzo. Amagosa anyanzelekile ukuba aqinisekise ukuba wonke umntu uyazi imigaqo entsha ethe yabhengezwa yiNdlu yoWiso-mthetho. Uhlahlo-lwabiwo-mali lwangaloo nyanga luxelele ukuba ezinye iidolophu zizakufumana imali eyongezelelekileyo yokulungisa ingundoqo yezakhiwo. Amalungu omphakathi abizelwe ukuba azimase intlanganiso ezakubanjwa ngokulandelelana kule nyanga ukuze inkcazelo ifinyelele kubantu bonke. Ukuphucula iimeko zokuhlala kule mmandla lusisabelo esiphambili kukarhulumente weli xesha lika-2025.

Umbutho weNgqongqoshe uhambele iindawo ezahlukeneyo kwiphondo leMpuma Koloni, apho amadam namathanga amanzi athetha khona ngezingxaki zamanzi amdaka awonzakalisayo impilo zabantu. Inyathelo elitsha likarhulumente liquka ukwakhiwa kweziseko ezibolekwa ngurhulumente kazwelonke, nalapho abahlali abamele ukusebenzisana namasebe ohlukeneyo ukuqinisekisa ukuba imali isetshenziswa ngendlela efanelekileyo. Ngaloo ndlela, amagosa esithili aya kufumana imfundo eyongezelelekileyo yokulawula amakhonkco amanzi namanzi acocekileyo ukunciphisa umonakalo owenziwa zizifo ezidalwa ngamanzi angcolileyo. Iinkqubo zokuqeqesha abasebenzikazi bezibhedlele nabasebenzi bezempilo nabo zikwaqukiwe kwesi sikhokelo, ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba abantu bayakwazi ukuchonga iimpawu zokufa kwamanzi ngokukhawuleza. Ngokunjalo, abahlali abakwimo yobumi obunzima ngakumbi baya kufumana inkxaso eyongezelelekileyo njengesondlo samahlwempu nosapho olukhulu. Amagosa asezilokishini asengxoweni yalo msebenzi kuba eza kuba nguqhagamshelo phakathi kukarhulumente nabantu. Inkqubo yokubika izingxaki zamanzi iya kuba lula, njengoko abahlali beya kukwazi ukusebenzisa iinkonzo zomxeba ukubika iinkqubo ezithe zaphuka okanye amanzi angagelezi ngokwaneleyo. Ukuphumelela kwezo zinto kuyathi chosi ngokunikezela ngethuba labasebenzi bethu ukuba basebenze ngempumelelo enkulu ezidolophini nasemaphandleni asetyhini kunalapho kwakunjalo ngaphambili.

Ngonyaka wezi-2024, ingxelo yemfundo ibonakalise ukuba ngaphezulu kwesigidi sabantwana abafunda ezikolweni zasemaphandleni baseNtshona Koloni babhekana nobunzima obukhulu ekufumaneni izixhobo zemfundo ezifanelekileyo. Ezi zikolo azinamagumbi okufunda aneleyo, kwaye amaxabiso ezincwadi ahlala ephakame ngendlela engabavumeli abazali abaninzi ukuzithenga. Iinkqubo zeNtlalo-ntle zixhasa abantwana abampofu ngokubaxhasa ngezixhobo, kodwa le nkxaso ayifiki ngaxesha elifanelekileyo kwizikolo ezikude nezixeko. Amagosa emfundo aphondo abike ukuba abasebenzi beendleko zikarhulumente badla ngokungafiki ngethuba, nawe umoya ophilileyo wohlulwe lilona qela lamfundo ekufuneka lincede kakhulu. Inkqubo yokufaka izicelo zonyaka wezi-2025 ezikolweni zamazwe iqaliwe, kwaye abazali bayacelwa ukuba baqiniseke ukuba bazalisekisa izicelo ngaphambi komhla womngcipheko. Iziko lezemfundo eliphambili leMzantsi Afrika likhuphe ingxelo echaza ukuba izikolo ezinobuchwephesha azenelanga ukufikelela kubo bonke abantwana, ngakumbi abahlala kwiindawo ezikude nezixeko. Oogqirha bezemfundo baxelele abezindaba ukuba ukuba isizwe sofuna ukukhulisa izinga lemfundo, kufuneka kuqale amanqanaba alungileyo okufundiswa kwezikolo zasekuhlaleni. Ngaphaya koko, izitishi zemfundo ephakamileyo, eziquka iyunivesithi kunye neziko lemfundo elinophando, zifuna ukuqinisekisa ukuba abafundi abavela kwiimeko ezinzima banekhefu elifanelekileyo nezezimali. Amalungu omphakathi asemaphandleni acela urhulumente ukuba awujonge ngqalelo umba wemfundo wabantwana, kuba eli lixesha lokuguqula ikamva loMzantsi Afrika wonke. Imfundo yeyona ndlela ilungileyo yokukhulisa iRiphabliki yethu yonke.

Lo masipala uhambise inkcazelo ejolise kumawadi amaninzi ukuba umsebenzi wokumbiwa kwezikhokelo zamanzi uza kuqala kwinyanga ezayo, uqinisekisa ukuba uluntu luzakubona umahluko omhle ngaphakathi kweminyaka emibini. Iziphathamandla zithethe ngokucacileyo ukuba imali ekumgangatho wezigidi ezingama-R120 yabelwe kwesi siteyitimenti sokuqala, ize imali eyongezelelweyo inikezelwe ngamazwe angaphandle ukuze inkqubo iphumelele ngokupheleleyo. Amagosa karhulumente aqinisekisile ukuba izincedisi zendawo zizakuqeqeshwa ukuze zihambelane nemithetho emitsha yamanzi ekhutshwe nguMnyango wezaManzi. Ekunikezeleni inkcazelo ethe vetshe kumaphephandaba, usihlalo womasipala uthethe ngokubaluleka kokuxhasa amakhaya angafikeleli kakuhle ezibonelelweni ezisisiseko zoluntu. Ngaphaya koko, ikomiti eliphezulu elizikhetheleyo lazimisela ukuba izingxelo zentlawulo zizakukhutshwa rhoqo ngeenyanga ezintathu ukuze umphakathi uhlale ulwazi malunga nenkqubela phambili yomsebenzi. Umphakathi wacenga ngakumbi ukuba uthumele izikhalazo zakhe kwi-ofisi zika masipala ngokuthe ngqo okanye usebenzise izinombolo zocingo ezikhutshwe ngokusesikweni ukuze uxilongo lwazo lukhawuleze. Abaphathi begalelo loluntu bangcamle ukuba intsebenziswano phakathi kukarhulumente nabantu iyingxam yokuphumelelisa le mikhakha yokuhlangabezana neemfuno zoluntu.

Ikomiti yolawulo lwasesixekweni saseNgqushwa ibambe intlanganiso eyayinabameli bokwenyani bemibutho yabahlali, apho kwaxoxwa khona ngezinto ezibalulekileyo eziphathelele ukuhanjiswa kwamanzi acocekileyo, ukuqokelelwa kwelindle, kunye nokumiswa kwezibane ezisebenza ngamandla elanga kwiindawo zasemaphandleni. Inkulumbuso yesixeko saxelela ukuba iqumrhu lolawulo luzimisele ngokupheleleyo ukuqhuba umsebenzi wokuphucula iinkonzo zikarhulumente ngaphakathi kweenyanga ezintandathu ezizayo, ngokuxhomekeka kwimali equkiweyo kwisabelo-mali seminyaka yoqoqosho. Kubikwa ukuba abantu abangaphezu kwamawaka amathathu kwisithili saseNgqushwa basafumana amanzi kuphela ngamanqwanqwa asesidlangalaleni, nalapho ezinye zawo azasebenzi kakuhle ngenxa yoqhekeko kunye nokuphelelwa kwamaqhosha axovulayo. Isikhululo sezempilo sase-Elliotdale sayo saziswa njengesinye seendawo ezifuna ukuqwalaselwa ngxamisekileyo, njengoko iinzame zokunikezela ngeenkonzo zezempilo ziye zaphazamiseka ngenxa yeengxaki zonxibelelwano nazo iindlela ezibubungozi. Amagosa ombutho weSASSA axelela ukuba izicelo zemadlela yomphakathi ziyaqhubeka ukujongwa ngokukhawuleza, nangona amaxesha olindelo axele ukuba aseyaqhuba kakhulu kunabantu abaninzi abafuna uncedo. Iinkokeli zomphakathi zicele karhulumente wakowabo nowe-ofisi yesithili ukuba athethe ngqo nabemi ukuze ezi zikhalazo ziphathwe ngokuzimisela nangobulungisa.

IRiphabhlikhi yoMzantsi Afrika iqhuba inkqubo yokwandisa inani lamaziko asedolophini nasemaphandleni ukuze abantu bafumane uncedo ngokukhawuleza nangokuthe ngqo. Izibonelelo ezifana nePension yeNdala, iNcediso-mali yabantwana, kunye neMpeshana yabaPhila nokuKhubazeka zisondele ngokwenene ekupheleni kwezidingo zoluntu oluphila ngomqolo. Abahlali abaninzi abakwaziyo ukuthetha ulwimi lwesiNgesi baye bafumana ubunzima bokuchankcatha izicelo zabo, ibe lento yayibangela ukulibaziseka nokungafikeleli kubonelelo. Ngokulandela esi simo, uMasipala wePlaaslike Rhulumende uzimisele ukuqeqesha abasebenzi ababalelwa kwizinkulungwane ezine ukuba bakhonze uluntu ngezilwimi zabo zeenkobe. Ngaphezu koko, iinkqubo zokukhusela uhlelo lokuhlala, ezibizwa ngokuba ziHousing Support Programmes, ziye zanceda imizi ebalelwa kwikhulu elinantathu ngenye inani ukwakha okanye ukuphucula izindlu zabo ngokusebenzisa inkxaso-mali yeqela elikhethekileyo. Aba bahlali basindwa ngezimvo ukuze bafumane ulwazi ngendlela yokufaka izicelo, kwaye abasebenzi bomphakathi balungiselela iintlanganiso zoluntu ngokungena kwiindawo ezahlukeneyo. Esi sisinyathelo esibalulekileyo esibonisa uzinikelo lukarhulumente ekuqinisekiseni ukuba akukho mntu useleyo ngaphandle kwesithuba sokufumana usahlumo nenkxaso-mali eyeleleyo. Amakhaya aphila ngobunzima bafumana ithemba ngezi nkqubo, kwaye urhulumente uyaqhubeka nokuphucula iinkonzo zakhe ukuze uluntu luphile ngobunono nobulungisa.

Isebe lezeNdlela namaZiko oLuntu lixelele amalungu omphakathi ukuba zizakuqhubeka iinkqubo zokwakha iziseko ezibalulekileyo kwizithili ezahlukeneyo zeli phondo. Amagosa karhulumente axelele abahlali ukuba iinkqubo zokuphucula iindlela ezaphukileyo nezisebe zamanzi ezindaweni zasemaphandleni ziza kuqala ngaphambi kokuphelela kuka-Epreli. Oku kuza emva kwemibonisano emininzi eyenziwa phakathi kweziko lolawulo lwedolophu nabantu abachaphazelekayo kule ngxaki. Umasipala wase-George ubhengeze ukuba ngaphezulu kweekhilomitha ezingama-45 zeendlela ziza kulungiswa ngeli xesha lohlahlo lwabiwo-mali olutsha. Iinkokheli zoluntu zikhuthaze abahlali ukuba bathathe inxaxheba kwiintlanganiso zohlahlo lwabiwo-mali ukuze izidingo zabo zivakale kakuhle kumagosa. Ngaphezu koko, abasemagunyeni bathi iingxaki ezifana nokungabikho kombane kwizikolo nakwiindawo ezijoliswe ekuphuhliseni ulutsha nazo ziza kuqwalaselwa. Icandelo lezempilo nexesha elide likhaliswa ngabahlali ngenxa yamanzi angcolileyo namanzi angageli ngokufanelekileyo, kwaye liyongezelela uxanduva olukhulu kumaziko empilo asekhaya. Inkqubo entsha karhulumente ijonge ukuphucula izinto eziphilileyo kwaye inqununu yengingqi ixelele umphakathi ukuba izixhobo zokusebenza sezilapha. Kuyathembekisa ukubona intsebenziswano phakathi kwamalungu omphakathi namagosa karhulumente ngeenjongo zokuphucula ubomi babantu beli phondo, imiba yenguqu iziswa phambi kwabo bonke abathathi-nxaxheba.

IRiphabliki yoMzantsi Afrika inezibophelelo zomgaqo-siseko wokunika bonke abantu abahlala kuyo inkonzo ezibalulekileyo, kuquka amanzi, umbane, kunye nezindlu. Izimvo zabahlali ziye zaqokelelwa nguMasipala weSithili ngexesha lophando olukhulu oluqhutyelwe kwizithili ezahlukeneyo phantsi kwephulo likazwelonke lokujonga iinkonzo zikarhulumente. Iziphumo zophando olo ziye zabonisa ukuba malunga neziphathamandla zisebenza nzima ukuze zifezekise izethembiso zenziwa ngexesha leenkampani zokhetho, kodwa imali engonelanga ihlala iyingxaki enkulu. INtloko yoMasipala, ekuthe ukuthetha kwayo kwabonakala kwiintlanganiso zomphakathi ezimbini ezazibanjwe ngala masonto, ithethe ngokukhululekileyo ngezingxaki ezijongene nabantu beenkalo zamasipala. Inkqubo entsha yokunikezelwa kwamanzi iyaququzelelwa ngamagosa karhulumente, kwaye imilinganiselo emitsha yokufikisa amanzi kwindawo ezikude imele ukubeka nzima ekupheleni konyaka ozayo. Abahlali baxhentsa le ndaba ngomdla omkhulu kuba amazwe amaninzi aphesheya kwamanxweme asele ephumelele ukuphumeza ezinjengalezi iinkqubo kwangemithombo ephantsi. Ilizwe lifumana inkxaso evela kwamazwe aphesheya ukuqinisekisa ukuba iinkqubo ezixhaswa ngumgaqo-siseko ziyafezekiswa, ukuze bonke abantu bathathele inxaxheba ngokulinganayo kwintlalo nobomi okulungileyo.

Ikomiti lolawulo lwasekuhlaleni liqaphele ukuba ingxaki yomelana phezulu ngethuba lembalela yokuqala kule nyanga. UMasipala weBuffalo City uqinisekisile ukuba uphando lwemisebenzi yengqalelo luze luqaliswe ngokukhawuleza ukuze kufunyanwe iindlela zokusonjululwa kwengxaki. Imisebenzi yokuhlaziywa kwamapayipi amanzi kulindeleke ukuba iqaliswe kwisithuba seeveki ezine ezizayo, ngokweenkcukacha ezikhutshwe ngabathetheli bolawulo. Kwakhona, ukusilela kwamanzi acocekileyo kuphumela ekuphulukanisweni nempilo entle yabantu abadala nabantwana abancinci. Iziphumo zophando lwezempilo zibonisa ukuba izifo ezibangelwa ngamanzi angahlanzekanga zanda ngamasimi kule mmandla ukusuka ngonyaka wamashumi amabini anamabini. Amaqumrhu ezempilo akhuthaze ukuba uluntu lusebenzise iimpahla zokucoceka zifana neziyela zamanzi zokujonga izinto ezingacocekanga. Izithembu zeentlanga ezahlukeneyo neenkampani ezizimeleyo zibambisene noMasipala ukuhlinzeka ngamanzi acocekileyo kwixesha elifutshane ngendlela yezithuthi zamanzi. Ooceba bommandla babizele umphakathi kumhlangano onqakraza ovuliweyo apho izikhalazo nazo zonke iimfuno zoluntu ziya kubhaliselwa. Iinjongo zikaMasipala kukuqinisekisa ukuba wonke umntu ohlala kule ndawo ufumana amanzi acocekileyo ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka wezimali. Ukubambisana phakathi kukarhulumente wephondo, umasipala, nabahlali kuyimfuneko ukuze le nkqubo isebenze ngempumelelo kubo bonke abantu. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba bahlale bethintana namagosa asemthethweni ukuze imikhosi yomsebenzi ihambele kakuhle ingabi naxhala.

Umasipala waseNxuba Kemntu uwaxelele amakhaya ukuba umsebenzi wokuvuselela izisombululo zamanzi uza kuqala ngoLwesihlanu wale veki, emva kwezinyanga eziliqela kokuxhumana noluntu ngale ngxaki inkulu. Iingxaki zokuxhaphaza kwezixhobo zomnatha wamanzi ezindlini zemizi-mveliso ezichaphazela unxibelelwano lomnatha wamanzi ziye zanqanda inkqubo yokufezekisa izidingo zowamanzi. Izimvo zenkonzo kamasipala ziye zaxela ukuba urhulumente wesifundazwe seMpuma Koloni ugqibe ekubeni wabelane ngexabiso lemali ukuze kuhlaziywe ezi zisombululo zamanzi eziphelelwe ngamandla. Ngokwengxelo yeSebe lezaManzi nezaHlanjululwa, izicwangciso ezintsha zokuphumeza umsebenzi wokubuyisela amanzi azakwenziwa ngamashishini achaseneyo ukuze kugwenywe ukoyisakala okwenzekayo ngexesha lama-tender. Abahlali abangama-4 500 abahlala kule dolophu baxelelwe ukuba indawo efanelekileyo yokuthatha amanzi iza kufumaneka kwangoko ngexesha lokwakhiwa kwezisombululo ezintsha. Isikhulu esiphezulu sikaMasipala sithe inkqubo yokuxhumana norhulumente wobuzwe ukuze kufumaneke inkxaso yezezimali iphela ngonyaka wezimali ozayo. Abemi bomphakathi baceliwe ukuba baqaphele ukusetyenziswa kwamanzi ngokuzolileyo de kuphele umsebenzi wokwakhiwa kwezisombululo ezintsha zokuhambisa amanzi. Amaqumrhu azimeleyo akukhangelo olukhethiweyo lwamanzi naselunxibelelwaneni nomphakathi yaye ezimisele ukuqhuba uphando olukhethiweyo kule ndaba ebalulekileyo.

Iinkqubo zoncedo-mali zikarhulumente, eziquka isibonelelo sabantwana, isibonelelo sokukhubazeka, kunye nesibonelelo sabadala, zibonakalisa uzinikelo lwalo rhulumente ekukhuseleleni abantu abasemngciphekweni. Emaphandleni asezifundazweni, uninzi lwabantu luyathemelela kwezi nkqubo njengendlela ebalulekileyo yokuxhasa iintsapho eziswele. Iinkqubo zokuhlaliswa kwabantu nazo zibonakalisa inkqubela ephambili, apho amawaka abantu afumana amakhaya ngonyaka ngamnye ngaphantsi kohlelo lweRDP. Nangona kunjalo, abahlali abaninzi basazibhenca ngobunzima bokufumana iinkonzo ezifunekayo kuba iindlela zokufaka izicelo ziyazibandakanya kwaye azikho ngqalelo. Izisombululo zifunwa ngokukhawuleza ukuze kuncedakale abo bangafumaniyo ezi nkxaso-mali nangona benemfuneko. INtloko yeSebe loPhuhliso loLuntu ichaze ukuba amaziko encedo ezenkonzi zikhula ngamandla ukuze zithi nkxu kubo bonke abemi. Ukuqinisekisa ukuba imali yoncedo-mali ifikelela abantu abayifaneleyo, kungqinelwa ngabasebezi bomphakathi abasebenza ngamandla kula maphondo. Aba basebezi bakhuthaza abahlali ukuba bafake izicelo zabo ngexesha, kwaye banikezele noncedo lokuzalisa amaxwebhu afunekayo. Ukufikeleleka kwezi nkqubo kubalulekile ekuphuculeni imeko yobomi kuluntu lonke, ingakumbi kwiindawo zasemaphandleni apho umthwalo weentswelo ubukhulu. Urhulumente uqhuba ngokuphucula ulwakhiwo lwezisombululo zokuhlaliswa kwabantu ukuze wonke umntu afumane indawo eyiyo yokuhlala ngobulungisa nangokulinganayo.

Inkqubo yezempilo yomphakathi ibonakala ngokwanda kwabantu abafika ezikhulwini ezahlukeneyo befuna iinkonzo ezingundoqo, nto leyo ebonisa ukuba amava abantu asiyahambelana neemfuno zabo. Amacandelo enkampani yezempilo karhulumente asetyenziswa ngamandla ukufezekisa ezilayikhense eziseBhisho nasezilalini, apho abantu abaninzi bebedla ngokuhamba imigama emide ukuze bafumane uncedo. Kunyaka ophelileyo, iinkqubo zempilo zafikela kummandla obanzi, zihlaba imijelo yokunyanga izifo ezinjengesifo sikagawulayo, uqaqacho, nentshukumo yokuphucula impilo ngokusetyenziswa kwezidlo ezinempilo. Abasebenzi bezempilo abaqeqeshiweyo bathi iziphumo zikhuthazayo, kodwa zisafuneka izicelo zovelwano nenkxaso kwezinye iindawo. Iingqungquthela zomphakathi eziqhutywa ngamagosa asezifundazweni zanika abahlali ithuba lokuthetha ngengxaki abajongene nazo imihla ngemihla. Kwakhona, amaqumrhu angenzi nzuzo asebenza ngokunxibelelana namaziko karhulumente ukuqhakamshela iinzame zokuphucula izakhono zabasebenzi basekhaya. Umba wezixhobo ezingagwalisekanga kunye nokusweleka kochwepheshe emazweni asemaphandleni usathatha ingqalelo enkulu kwisikhundla sikaNgcaciso wezeMpilo. Eli candelo libonakalisa ukuba izinto ziyadlulela phambili, nangona isehlo sezibhedlele esisezilalini sisakhomba imimandla emide yokuphucula. Kufuneka izicwangciso ezizinzileyo ezihlangabezana nokukhula kweemfuno, ziqinisekise ukuba amalungelo empilo afikelela kubo bonke abantu ngokulinganayo.

Aba bantu babandakanya abadala, abantu abakhubazekileyo, kunye noomama abaneentsapho ezinqongophele izixhobo zokuphila. Iinzame zokuphucula inkqubo yokunika iinkcukacha ezibhalisiweyo nezimfuneko zokuhlawulwa kwezi mali zenziwe ngokusebenzisa iindawo ezintsha zoluntu ezivulelekileyo. Amagosa asebenza ngaphakathi komphakathi aqinisekisa ukuba abantu abafanelekileyo bafumana uncedo ngokungagqaleli indawo abahlala kuyo. Abahlali baseMonti sebekhathele ukulinda ixesha elide phambi kokuba bafumane iinkcukacha zabo, ngakumbi abo bahlala kwiindawo ezikude nezixeko. Iinkqubo ezintsha zokubalisa abantu kwezezwe zenza lula ukufikelela kwezi nkxaso-mali ngokusetyenziswa kobuchwepheshe obutsha.

Ngokunjalo, inkxaso yezindlu namanzi ayipheli ngaphakathi kwezikhungo zikarhulumente. Umphakathi waseMonti uzuze kwinkqubo yokwakha izindlu ezintsha ezakhiwe ngokukhawuleza ukusabela kwizidingo zoluntu. Abahlali abasha bafumana amathuba okuhlala kwiindawo ezikhuselekileyo nezinezikhungo ezibalulekileyo njengamanzi acocekileyo kanye nezibane. Abathathi-nxaxheba kwinkqubo yezindlu bacelwa ukuba bazise impepha-mcimbi efanelekileyo ukuze inkqubo iqhube ngokukhawuleza. Amagosa karhulumente axelele abahlali ukuba iinkqubo zezindlu ziqhuba ngokulandela umgaqo omiselweyo wokuhlawulwa kwabantu abafanelekileyo. Inkxaso-mali yezempilo kunye neenjongo zenkxaso yemfundo iyaqhuba kwezi ndawo ukuqinisekisa ukuba iintsapho azishiyi mntu emva. Umphakathi wonke uyacelwa ukuba uxele amagosa asekuhlaleni ukuze afumane ulwazi oluthe vetshe ngezi nkqubo zoncedo.

Amaqela ezempilo asebenza ngokuthe ngcembe ukuqinisekisa ukuba wonke umntu, ingakumbi abo bahlala kude nezixeko, uyafumana unyango olufanelekileyo nangexesha elifanelekileyo. Ukubhekelelwa kwezempilo zokulawula izifo ezifana nesikrelemnqa, isifo seswekile, kanye nengqumba yegazi eliphezulu kusebenze njengesiseko salo lonke uhlelo lokugcina impilo yoluntu. Kwiindawo eziphambili neembali zasezilalini, abasebenzi bezempilo baye bangenela imizi ukuze babike, baxubushe, baze bafundise ngokugcina impilo ngokunyaniseka. Umphakathi wonke ucetyiselwa ukuba ufike kwizixeko zezempilo zasekuhlaleni ngaphandle kwenkcaso, kuba ukusinda nokudinga uncedo yimfuneko engenakukhanyiwa mntu. Rhoqo ngekota yonyaka, iinkonzo zezempilo zisasaza imiyalezo yokulumkisa ngokulandelelana, bezama ukuphuhlisa ulwazi nokwakha umsindo wokuzijonga ngamehlo abantu ngabanye. Ukwakhiwa kwale mikhankaso yoluntu akuxhomekeki kurhulumente wodwa, koko kufuna intsebenziswano nokuqinisana kwabahlali, amaqela engingqi, neziko lezonyango ngokuthe ngqo. Kusetyenziswa izibhedlele, iikhliniki, namaziko empilo aphambili ukubeka phambili impilo yabantu bonke, kungakhathaliseki isikhundla, ubudala, okanye umzekelo wentlalo. Lo msebenzi wabalulekileyo ubonakalisa ukuzinikela kokuqinisekisa ukuba impilo yoluntu igunyaziswa njengegunya elingenakuthathwa, ngakumbi kumashishini aseDolophini naseziindlwini zabasemaphandleni.

Izibonelelo zentlalontle, eziquka isibonelelo sobudala, isibonelelo seenkonzo zokholo, kunye nesibonelelo sokukhula komntwana, zisebenza njengesiseko esixhasa iintsapho ezininzi ezihlala phantsi komgca weendleko nentlalo. Iinzame zenziwa nguRhulumente wePhondo laseNtshona Koloni ukuqinisekisa ukuba abantu abanelungelo lezi zibonelelo bafumana ulwazi olufanelekileyo malunga nendlela yokufaka izicelo. Imizi emininzi esezilalini iye yabanengxaki enkulu yokufumana iinkonzo, njengoko imigaqo yezindawo zamakhaya yona ibibhekene nemiceli mngeni yesixeko. Ukwenzela ukusombulula le ngxaki, i-Ofisi yeNkqubo yoNgcebiso loLuntu isebenza ngokusebenzisana namasebe ahlukahlukeneyo ukuphumeza amaphulo okufundisa uluntu ngokufanelekileyo. Abahlali abaqhuba imveliso yezindlu ezifanelekileyo bayacelwa ukuba bafake izicelo kwi-ofisi yokuxhasa amakhaya kwikheli elisendleleni eyena ifanelekileyo kwindawo yabo yokuhlala. Ingxelo ibonisa ukuba amawaka angamashumi amabini anesixhenxe amakhaya asafumana inkxaso yeendlu ngaphantsi koHlelo lweSibonelelo seNdlu loLuntu, nangona imali engakumbi isadingeka ukuqinisekisa ukuba amakhaya amaninzi akhiwa ngokuzinzileyo. UMasipala weSixeko uyalela bonke abantu abathintekileyo ukuba beze kwiziko lemicimbi yoluntu ngexesha lasemini ukuze bafumane uncedo oluzeleyo. Ityala lenkonzo yezindlu kunye nokuxhasa abantu abasweleyo limele ukuchonywa ngabahlali bonke ngenxa yokuba eyona ndima ibalulekileyo isenziwa ngabemi abazibandakanyayo.

Isithili iEnoch Mgijima Local Municipality sikhuphe isaziso esisemthethweni sokuba umsebenzi wokuphucula iziseko zobudidiyele bamanzi uza kuqala ngenyanga ezayo, emva kweminyaka emithathu yokulibaziseka kweenkqubo zokucwangcisa. Amagosa omasipala axelele abameli bomphakathi ukuba imali elingana namashumi amahlanu anesihlanu ezigidi zeRandi yenikiwe ngurhulumente wesifundazwe weMpuma Koloni ukuze izindlu ezingaphezu kwezinkulungwane ezine zifumane amanzi ngqo. Inkqubo entsha iza kubandakanya ukwakhiwa kwezipeyipi ezintsha kunye nokulungiswa kwezitishi zamanzi ezindala ezazisilela rhoqo ngenxa yokonakala. Isikhulu esiphezulu somasipala, owaqinisekisa le ngxelo, sithethe ngokucacileyo ukuba abaqhubi beenkontrakthi baza kuqeshwa ngokwamalungiselelo abekiweyo ngenyanga ezayo. Ukongezwa koko, urhulumente wezizwe uxelele ukuba inkqubo yokukhangela abantu abaqeqeshiweyo kulo mmandla iza kuqhubeka ngokukhawuleza ukuze ingasebenzi nzima ngabasebenzi abavela kude. Ikomiti yolawulo lomphakathi ibongoze abahlali ukuba babhalise amagama abo kumagosa omasipala ukuze bafumane ulwazi olutsha malunga nenkqubela yomsebenzi. Aba bahlali baya kuxelelwa ngezikhuphelo ezixhomekeke kumakhadi abo abokuba ngabemi bommandla lowo. Oorhulumente beelokishi kunye namalungu ezindlu zolawulo lomasipala banxuswe ukuba bathathe inxaxheba kwiintlanganiso zokucwangcisa ezibekelwe oku kuqhuba usuku lokuqala lwenyanga ezayo ukuze yonke into ihambe ngobulungisa.

Iimeko ezinzima zokunqaba kweendlu ziqhubeka ukuphazamisa ubomi bemindeni emininzi, ngakumbi kwezithili zasemaphandleni apho iziseko zolwakhiwo azizange zifikelele khona ngendlela efanelekileyo. URhulumente wePhondo, ngokubambisana namasebe kazwelonke, uqale uhlelo olutsha lokuqinisekisa ukuba imindeni engenayo ingena kwizibonelelo zokuhlala ngokukhawuleza nangaphandle kweengxaki ezininzi zobureaukhrasi. Olu hlelo luquka ukubhalisa kwabahlali abangapheliswanga nokunikezwa kweendlu ezenziwe ngokwemigaqo yezempilo nezokhuseleko. Amakhaya amaninzi asezilalini asebehlala iminyaka emide ekulindele inkxaso esuka kuMasipala, kodwa inkqubo yokunikeza yayihamba kancinci ngenxa yokungabikho kweenkcukacha ezifanelekileyo. Ngoku, amagosa arhuqe imizi ngokuthe tyeli ukuqinisekisa ukuba bonke abafanelekileyo babhalisiwe kwinkqubo yeSixhaso soKhuselo loLuntu. Abahlali abakwimeko enzima, kuquka abo bahlala nezingxaki zezempilo okanye abangenamisebenzi, banikwa inkxaso eyongezelelekileyo ngaphakathi kohlelo lwezibonelelo ezahlukeneyo. Oomama abangenabalingane kunye nabantwana abakhuliswa ngumzali omnye bayinqolobane enkulu yabantu abaxhamla kwezi nkqubo. Amanani asemthethweni avela kuSebe loPhuhliso loLuntu abonisa ukuba isibalo sabantu abaxhomekeke kwizibonelelo sikhule ngamashumi amawaka kule minyaka mithathu idlulileyo. Isebe likhuthaza bonke abafanelekileyo ukuba beze kwiiofisi zikaMasipala okanye kwiziko loluntu elikufutshane ukuze bafumane iinkcukacha ezipheleleyo ngeenkonzo ezibhekiselele kwimo yabo.

Iindawo ezininzi zasemaphandleni zisafundisa kumagumbi angagqibelanga, apho izitulo nezincwadi zinqongophele ngoburhalarhume. Ukuntswela kwezona zixhobo zifanelekileyo kwenza abantwana bangakwazi ukufunda ngokupheleleyo, ibe imiphumo yabo kwiimviwo ibonakalisa loo nto ngokuthe ngqo. Oogqirha bemfundo bathi eli ngxaki alisoloko liqondwa ngokuthelekiswa namava abantwana abahlala emadolophini, apho iimfuno zemfundo zifezekiswa ngokulula. Urhulumente wephondo uxelele uluntu ukuba iinkqubo ezintsha zokunika izikolo inkxaso yezezimali sele ziqalile ukusebenza kumazwe amaninzi. Ootitshala abaninzi bathemba ukuba ezi nguqu ziya kuzisa utshintsho oluzinzileyo, kodwa bayacela ukuba zona zisebenze ngokukhawuleza nangempumelelo ukuze bangalindi ixesha elide. Amaziko emfundo ephakamileyo nawo ajongene nemiceli-mngeni enzima, apho abafundi bahlala bengakwazi ukuhlawula imirhumo yesikolo ngenxa yeemeko zekhaya ezibuhlungu. Izibonelelo zikarhulumente ukunceda abafundi abahluphekayo azifiki ngexesha elifanelekileyo, ibe loo nto yenza abanye babashiye amagumbi okuze kwafundwa bengakaphumeleli. Iinkokheli zoluntu zithe kufuneka kubekho umkhandlu oxhumeneyo phakathi kukarhulumente, iinstityu zemfundo, nabazali ukuze wonke ubani asebenzisane ngenjongo enye. Ukuqinisekisa ukuba sonke isizukulwana esitsha sifumana imfundo enomgangatho kufuneka kube lixabiso elingagungqiyo kuwo wonke umzuzu wexesha lethu.

Abahlali bamazinge asezilalini baxele ukuba imeko yabo iye yabhetele emva kokuba basebenze kunye neenkqubo zenkxaso yezindlu. Ezi zikhundla zinkxaso ziye zaveliswa zathi zasasazwa kwiindawo ezininzi ezikhethiweyo, kuquka iilali ezingakhathalelwanga ngaphambili kwindawo zasemaphandleni. Ulawulo lwephondo luqinisekisa ukuba wonke umntu oneemfuno ezikhethekileyo ufumana inkxaso efanelekileyo ngaphandle komkhawulo. Iinkonzo ezibandakanya ezezindlu, ezezemfundo, nezempilo zisebenza ndawonye ukwakha isiseko esiluqilima somphakathi. Amagosa aphondo athe asebenze ubusuku nemini ukuze izi nkonzo zifikelele ebantwini abangakwaziyo ukuhamba imigama emide. Izibonelelo zokukhathalela abantwana namalunga amakhulu ziye zanabiswa nanjengoko isidingo sibonakale sikhula kwiindawo ezitsha. Umbutho wabemi wendawo uwungqinile ukuba inkqubo yokubhalisa iyakhawuleza yaze yaluncedo kuluntu. Ngexesha apho ubunzima bezoqoqosho buvala amathuba amaninzi, ezi nkxaso zisebenza njengetshefu elimelweyo koluntu olufuna uncedo. Abantu abaninzi bathi imali yezibonelelo incede iintsapho zawo ukuba zithenga ukutya, izixhobo zesikolo, nezinto zonyango eziyimfuneko. Amaxwebhu afunekayo ngoku akufutshane nabantu, kuba iindawo zokukhonza zivulwe kwiindawo ezininzi ezikufutshane nabahlali. Iingxoxo zomphakathi ziya kuqhutyelwa kwizithili nganye ukuqinisekisa ukuba abantu bafumana ulwazi oluchanekileyo ngezi nkxaso.

Ehlathini laseMpuma Koloni, abahlali belali iNgqeleni bahlangane ngomqombothi nezinto zesiko ukuze bahloniphe amaQhawe omphakathi wabo. Le mbonambi yesithethe yabanjwa ngoMgqibelo ophelileyo, apho izakhono zomdaniso kanye nengoma yesiXhosa zahlatshwa umlomo ngabadala nabatsha. Izindlu zabantu bezigcwele abantu, neenkosi zezona ndawo ezixhaswe kakubi ezo zingaphandle kwesixeko zifikile ngezikhulu zikhathi ukuzokubona besibone. Umphakathi waleli lali usekunye kakhulu kwiindaba zemfundo, izempilo, nengeniso yomhlaba. Kumele sikhumbule ukuba amasiko ethu awayi kudlulwa ngokutshiswa njengamalangatye nje kuphela, koko afanele ukunyamelezwa ngezandla zabantu abakhulileyo baze bathumele izinto ezintle kwisizukulwana esitsha. Abantwana abaninzi bale ndawo bebefundiswa ukungqina, ukudlala isiXhosa esifanelekileyo, kunye nolwimi lwamasiko njengezaga nezifenqo. Izinduna ezazibambisene nabahlali beziceba iinkqubo ezithe chatha nezinokukhuthaza abasakhulayo ukwamkela isiXhosa njengelifa labo elingenakuthathwa. Iqumrhu labasetyhini lalizifake inxaxheba ngokutyhilwa kwento yokutyiwa esikitshi esikhulu, apho ukutya kwesiXhosa okunjengeumbhako, umngqusho, kunye nenyama yenkomo kwakhaba amabele oonxiba-mbelu. Abafundi abavela esikolweni samabanga aphantsi base-Ngqeleni nabantu abayizishiyagalolunye abafunda ezileyo bazibonakalisa ngomsebenzi wezandla nokucula, besiqinisekisa isithembiso sokuba isizwe esinentliziyo esiqinileyo siza kuhlala sixhomekeke ezimasikweni. Inkqubo epheleleyo yabonakala ingumzekelo ophilayo wokuthi uluntu lunoqoqosho lwenene xa luhlangene ndawonye njengomzi omnye.

Abantu abaninzi phakathi kwabo ngabahlolokazi, amadoda amadala, kunye nabantwana abakhokelwa ngabanye abazali abodwa, yaye imeko yabo yokuhlala yayingalunganga ngaphambi kokufumana le nkxaso. Umbutho kazwelonke oqhuba lolu hlelo uxelele uluntu ukuba iinkqubo zokufaka izicelo ziye zachukumiseka ukuze zisebenze ngokukhawuleza kwaye zifumaneke lula kunaxa kwakunjalo ngaphambili. Abasebezi bakarhulumente bangene kuqoqosho lwemimandla ukuze bafundise abantu ngendlela yokufaka izicelo, nto leyo eyanceda kakhulu abantu abahlala kude nezixeko. Ezilalini zaseMpuma Koloni, inkxaso yezindlu inikezwa ngendlela ehlanganise nokunikezwa kwezinto zokwakha nokuqeqeshwa kwendlela yokwakha ngokwabo. Le ndlela yokusebenza ibonise iziphumo ezakhayo, nanjengoko imizi emitsha yakhiwa ngexesha elifutshane kwaye yahlolwa ngamagosa ukuqinisekisa ukuba ihlangabezana namanqanaba afanelekileyo. Ukongeza kwezindlu, abahlali abaninzi babhalisa ngokutsha ukuze bafumane inkxaso yezezimali ngenyanga nenyanga, kubandakanya isibonelelo sabantwana nesixhaso sabantu abadala. IRhulumente yeli lizwe iyanyanzelisa ukuba wonke umntu okulungele ukufumana le nkxaso makangasileli ngasemva, yaye amagosa asebenza nzima ukubhekela ngqo abo banengxaki zokufumana izixhobo. Ukuqhuba kwala maqhinga kuzisa ithemba elitsha kuzo zonke iindawo ezisezantsi kweli, kwaye abahlali bayacelwa ukuqhagamshelana namasebe afanelekileyo ukuze bafumane ulwazi oluthe vetshe malunga nazo zonke iinkqubo ezikhona.

Umasipala webhantji we-Hhohho ushaye emacala ekutsi wonkhe umuntfu lohlala emaphandleni kufanele atfole lusito lolufanele ngekwemtsetfo welive. Loluhlelo lwemukelwa ngetikhathi tekucindezeleka kwemnotfo, lapho titulu tetindlu bekungafinyeleli khona abahlali labanyenti ngekudla kwemizamo. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni wabakhulumeli bomphakathi evikini leledlule, intfo lebalulekile lekhulunywako yayingetanyelwa nguMeluleki Lomkhulu walelo masipala, lapho aphawula khona ngetindlela tekugucula loluhlelo lube nelisho elifanele emphakathini. Kubikwe kutsi tindlu letintfaka-ntfaka letakiwa ngaphansi kwenhlelo lehlelwe kahle tawunikwa emindeni lehlala emacansini lacinene noma emagcekeni lanemangozi. Inhlangano lebhekelele tetemphilo emphakathini nayo itsatse indzima lebalulekile ngekukhuluma ngebungozi bemaphandle lasengenatsi tigodlo tekuphepha. Sitjentiswa setintfo tekufundza netemphilo sidzimate saniketwa njengendzawo lapho abahlali bengabuya khona batfole lusito. Umkhandlu webhantji wememetela kutsi tikhwama letitfatfata teta-R120 miljeni seticelwe kuHulumende Wemkhakha kusukela ngesonto ledlule, inhloso yato kuyelekelela ekwakheni emakhaya nasikhungo sekulapha emphakathini. Kutjelwa kutsi indzawo yemsebenti yesifundazweni iyawuchaza umhlahlandlela wemkhandlu ngekwesaga sekutsi "umhlaba watsi konke ngekuphana nabahlali." Inhlangano yebantfubatali nayo ibike kutsi itakusekela loluhlelo uma tindzawo tekugcina tincane titawuniketwa emacandvelo kanye nebantfwana labasengotini ngetiphatsimandla letifanele ngaphansi kwemtsetfo.

Hulumende unesifiso sekuqinisa umnotfo wasemaphandleni ngekwakhiwa kwemibhalo lemisha yekusetjentiswa kwemihlaba, leyetfulwa kulo nyaka wemali lova. Lenqubomgomo ikhombisa kutinikela kwahulumende ekuciniseni kutsi umhlaba webhekwa njengesidingo lesiphambili selive leSwaziland. Abalimi labayingcosana babika kutsi betfola lusito olubalulekile emkhakheni wekucija, lapho bafundziswa khona ngendlela yekulima lencono nangekusetjentiswa kwemitfombo yemanti ngekuhlakanipha. Ema-ofisi ehulumende asezindaweni tasemakhaya asebenta ngekushesha ekufikiseni tinhlelo tekusita tifike kulabalimi labaswele kakhulu, kuhlanganise labo labahlala emigceleni yetindzawo. Ngaphandle kwaloko, tikhungo tekucwaninga temikhiqizo yekulima tenta umsebenzi omkhulu ekuhlola tinhlelo letintfsha tekutsala nentfo yomhlaba, ikakhulukati emkhakheni wetjalo lwemphuphu kanye nobhontshisi wetinlobo letahlukene. Baphathi betinhlelo tasebukhosini bakhombise kutsi batinikele ekukhuliseni inombolo yabantu labasebenta emaphandleni ngekubanika emathuba ekutsengisela laphezulu lapho batawutfola khona intengo yokulingana nemishikashika yabo. Lutfo lolukhulu lolutfolakele kulo nyaka kuhlanganisa kwakhiwa kwemitselela lemisha lefikisa imiphakathi lasemaphandleni emisebentini yekutsengisela, lokwenta kutsi timphahla temikhiqizo tingasonakali endleleni. Sikhuluma nebaphatsimandla, balimisa ngekucacile kutsi tinhlanganisela temihlaba letinsha titawunikela ekufuyiseni imiphakathi ngekwekwakha emathuba emisebenzi lacinile nangekwekhulisa luphilo lwebantfu basemagcekeni.

Umkhandlu wasemadolobheni ukhiphe sitatimende lesichaza kahle kutsi bonkhe labo labafake tifomho ngaphambili bazokwaziswa ngesikhathi sekuhlolwa kwetincwadi tabo nekutsi bangaletsa tichazimazwi letidingekako. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi lowabanjwa ePrimary School yaseNhlangano, iNdvuna yeVele yeSifundazwe ibhekise emuva ngeminyaka lemine lebonakale kuba nokucindezelana kwezindlu kanye nekusweleka kwemisebenti ekwakha. Ihlelo leli elisha liniketa inhlangano yabahlali nethuba lokubamba inyange ekuhlolweni kwetifanelo kwabasolo abanikwa lusito. Kutsi tindlu letintsha takhiwe ngekugcwala kwemgomo wekuvikeleka ngekwakhiwa kwato, sikhatsi lesimisiwe kukutsi wonkhe umsebenzi uphele ngaphambi kweNyoni yemnyaka wekuphela. Tiphathimandla tikhuthate bonkhe labangakabhalisi kuze babuyele eMkhandlwini wabo wasendvaweni ngaphambi kwelusuku lwekucedzela lokumisiwe ngelitulu lilanga lenyanga. Lomkhandlu futsi umemetele kutsi tikhwama tenikelwe titfolakala emahhovisi emadolobheni ewonkhe, kwaphindza kwagcizelelwa kutsi kutfolwa kwemfundvo yesikolwa siyana nalokufanele akubavimbi ekulandzeleni. Tiphathimandla tikhuthata bonkhe labo labanemibuto kutsi basebentisane ngekhono nalabaphathi bemasipala babo ekutfoleni imininingwane lenelikhono futsi yetetsekele yonkhe. Tichazimazwi tekubhalisela tingafunyanwa nge-inthanethi noma ngemkhondvo wemphepho emahhovisi lalinganiselwe kulendawo, ngesizatfu sekutsi hulumende ufuna lehlelo litfolakale labaswele wonkhe.

Emuva kwemcimbi lomkhulu lowentiwa eGege, imiphakathi yetifundza letihlukene ibuthane ndawonye kuze ihloniphe intiambo yamasiko neziMswati. Umcimbi lona bewubanjelwe eHholo leNdlu yeMphakathi, nalapho bantfu labangaphezulu kwemakhulu lamabili babengenile kute bazobona imigido yamasiko kanye nezindzaba temagembu lamakhulu. Tinhlanganisela letitsite tebuchwepheshe, tifundvo, kanye nokukhuluma ngalokusha kwetikhatsi lamanje betikhona, tinika bonkhe labebakhona lithuba lekufundza ngamasiko abo nangabawo. Tikhulu tekhatsi lebephiwe labangu-mtfweli wemphakathi, labetfutfukisile umsebenzi wokusita ema-volunteer labasebenta ngenhlitiyo lehlobile, nato bese tikhambisa umoya wekubambisana. Bentiwa imicimbi lemikhulu yekudla kanye nekubukwa kwemacembu emigido, letikhombisa buchwepheshe bente ngalokuphelele. Bahlali bakhuluma ngelulwimi lwawo lwesiSwati kuze bonkhe batsintfwe yindzaba ngenhloso yekuvuselela tinsika tesiMswati. Tikhulu talesifundza naleso, kubandakanya netikhulu tasebukhosini, bakhuluma ngetindaba tekutfutsitelana kwemphakathi kanye nokusimama kwengcebo yamasiko, bekhutaza basha kutsi bakhumbule imivelaphi yabo. Tetemfundvo tasetindlini tesikole taphindze tanikela ngemikhakha yemigido netigcino letente ticimbi tibe nekukhanya kokukhulu. Kubona kumuntfu womphakathi, Gogo Phumzile Dlamini, lona loseminyakeni lengema-60 yebuhali, lokuhlangana kanye nekubonana kwemiphakathi bekusho kakhulu kuye, ngobe bekumkhumbuta ngensuku zakhe takukhula nalapho umphakathi bewumangalela ndawonye ngalokukhululeka. Wakhuluma ngelulwimi lwakhe lwesiSwati, watsela tonkhe tinhlitiyo wabo lababetfutfukisa imisebenzi yabo nemiphakathi yabo, wabeka kutsi kuyimfuneko kutsi bantfu bangakhohlwa lutge lasimele tiSiNtu. Leli cimbi laphindze labeka sigcawu sekukhuluma ngalokutsha emkhakheni webhizinisi labanjenani njengemkhakha wetekupheka kwesiSwati kanye nekwakhiwa kwetintfo temaSwati, tonkhe letikhombisa ingcebo yemphakathi.

Ngesikhathi semkhosi wemadlelo locheme nemvelo, imiphakathi yaseNgwane ibutsene ndvawonye kute kugujwe lusikompilo lwesive lekhule emaveni amaningi. Lomkhosi, lowawubanjelwe emadolobheni lamaningi kulo lonkhe live, wawukhombisa budvumisa bentsandvo yesive kanye nebuciko lobubalulekile ekuphileni kwemadlotfwana. Abantu labebeyingxenye yalomkhosi bafike ngekucamba kwetihlandla letahlukene, lapho batikhulula khona ngekucula, kwetana, nangekwenta imisebenzi yetandla leyayivusa tifiso takulo lonkhe lugwadule. Baholi bemiphakathi bakhuluma ngato tonkhe letintfo letifanele kwenteka kuze kutfutfukiswe lusikompilo lwetfu ngobe lolo lusikompilo lusinika similo nesisekelo sekuphila kwetfu njengesive. Lomkhosi wawuhlelwe ngemtfunti weminyaka lemikhulu, nalapho lomphakathi wakuphindza kwakhiwa butsene bakho ekuhlonipheni kwabo labadzala. Ekhuluma kulabahlali labetetemele ngekufuna kwabo kubona lomkhosi ungadzimuki, umholi wemphakathi utsite kufanele tizokhiwa kumtsetfo lotawuvikela lemibuthano yesive. Timphilo tetfu tihlangene ngalo lusikompilo, ngobe lona lukhombisa lapho sivela khona nendlela lesifuna kuhamba ngayo ekusihlengeni. Bantfwana labaningi bavela etikolweni tabo kute bazofundza ngemlando wabo, batsatsa indzima ngekutfokota ekulweni kwabo kwebukhosi. Tikhulu tave tingeni tinike imbubo yokutsi loluhlelo luyawube lubaluleke nangekwenta tingcindzetelo tekutsekela imisebenzi yebuciko leyakhiwa ngibo balandeli belolwimi lwesiSwati. Kulo lonkhe loluhlelo, kwabhekwa ngiso ekulingiseni imisiko yetikati neyemagundvwane, nalapho lamabhokisi etinkhondlo akhipha umsindo lowatfakwa emoyeni ngendlela lebukeka. Ngakho-ke, lomphakathi wetjele wahlangana nawo wonkhe umuntu lobewabangelwe yimizwa yekujabula nekubonga ngalesiphiwo sesive.

Hulumende wesifundza ubeke eceleni imali lenkhulu lekhetsiwe kucwalisa tihlelo tekusekelwa kwekulima, ikakhulukwa kuletikhalo lapho kukhiqitwa khona tinhlanyelo tentsango kanye nemabhoyisi. Leti tihlelo ticondziswe kubatsandzi bakulima labancane, lababuye babe ngibo labaphakamisa umnotfo wendawo ngekusebenta gadalala. Ngemuva kwemhlangano lowawubanjwe enyangeni leyengcile, tigcwegcwe tekusebentisa umhlaba tashiwo nguchwepheshe wetimbuzi tekubaluleka kwekuhlola inhlabathi ngaphambi kwekutsala tinhlanyelo letitsite. Kucedzelwa, kuvezwa kwatiwa kutsi umsebenti wekucwaninga inhlabathi sewusite abalimi labangaphezulu kwabangema-4 500 kulo mnyaka kuphela, labasele betfola lusito olufanele ngetinhlobo tetimbuzi letisheshisako. Lomkhankaso wetfutfukiso wasemagcekeni ubukeka ungasaseli emuva, njengoba tiphatsimandla temitsetfo yekutsetsisa imihlaba setikhiphe imitsetfo lemisha lesekelana nokusetjentiswa kahle kwemapulazi langenagciwane. Tigcwegcwe naletinye ticinisekisa kutsi abalimi labasha bayatsatfwa njengesitsa semphakathi, bangashiywa nyenti ngemuva kuletalandzela utsatfukiso. Kugcinelwa, tiphatsimandla tikhuthata bonkhe abalimi, ikakhulukwa labafati kanye netintfwana letatfola timphahla tesikhukhula, kutsi babhalise emahovisi esifundza kuleli nali ngelitselo lekutfola lusito lolucondzile. Lomshikashika wenhlalakahle kanye nekutfutfukiswa kwendawo ube sisisekelo sekuphila lokusha emaphandleni, futsi kubonwa kwemiphumela lemikhulu lonkhe evivinyane.

Loluhlelo lolusha lweHulumende luzakuqala kusebenta ngekuqala kwenyanga letikhona, njengobe tigciwane tekungcola kwemvelo tite ekupheleni kulamadolobha. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi lowawubanjwe eSibayeni seNdvuna, umNtungwa Simelane wachaza kutsi tindlela letingakahleleki kahle tikhuba inkhambiso yabantu lababuyela ekhaya ngemuva kwemisebenti. Hulumende wetifundza usamalele indzaba yetikhalo tabahlali ngekushesha nangekwetsembeka, njengobe kulandzela imitsetfo yemgomo wemphakatsi loyabekelwa ngulowo nyaka lowetfuliwe. Tiphrojekthi letisemkhatsini waloluhlelo letitsite tibalwa nekwakhiwa kwaletindlela tetitimela letintfwa kanye nekufakwa kwemibhobho lemikhulu yemanti lahlantekile emikhatshini lemidze. Bantfu labakhulumeli waletindzawo basekhale kakhulu ngekungalingani kwekufikelelana naletikhulumi tekuhlinzekwa kwetindzaba, njengobe kukhona imiphakathi leseneminyaka ikhala ngalalesisu. IMkhandlu weDolobha usite ngaloluvalo lwetikhalo, usho kutsi tifanele tiphothulwe ngaphambi kokutsi umnyaka uphele. Labaphisi bakhombise kutsi emali lebeke laketfula yehulumende ikwazile kuhlinzeka tindzawo letingaphezu kwelishumi nambili ngekuphelela kwalesigaba. Lomphakathi sewube nesiphiwo sekubamba iqhaza ngekugcwalisa ezikhala tekubhaliswa kwaletikhiwo temphakathi, njengobe lokucindzetela kwabahlali bekwehle kancane. Tigciwane letintfwa letisesimeni setikhalo tabantu tiyachukuluka emhlanganweni nyalo, tichaza kutsi tindlela letingakagcwaliseki tisaphindvuka njengenselelo lenkhulu. Hulumende ukhombise kutsi uzakubhekana naletikhalo ngeliphelelo kanye nentokozo yomphakathi kuyo yonkhe indzawo.

Lomcimbi, lowawubukwa ngubantu labengaphezulu kwema-500, wawuhlanganisa emadansi esiSwati, tingoma, netinkhundla lapho labandzini bafundisa tinsatfo ngemphi yamasiko esiSwati. Tifundze letimbalwa letisuka emadolobheni laseduze taletsa ematintsele etinkhundla letitsite temphakathi, kuhlanganisa nemibuto leyayihambisana nenhlalakahle yabantu. Baholi bemiphakathi bakhuluma ngelimi lolucacile mayelana nentsengo yekusita tinsatfo tekufunda esikolweni, baphindze bacosha tindlela tekuphakamisa umuntfu wonkhe emiphakathini lesele emuva. Kuhlanganiswa kwenhlalo nemikhosi yemvelo kwasita kutsi batali betikhona batekukhuleka netikhondlo tawo letenta kuphila kwemuntfu kube luhle. Bantfu labaningi babuyise tindlela tekusebentisana kanye nekusebenta ngekuhlangana kwabo emitsimbini, kuhlanganisa nekugcina umhlaba wabo wakhona uhlale uphephile. Inkhosi yaleligungu yayehlisa lesifiso sakhe lekutsi abahlali bahlale babambisana, bavikele inhlalonhle yabo, bakhulise tintfwalo tabo. Sekuneminyaka lesikhombisa labantu base-Nhlangano begubha umcimbi lowufana nalona, bakhombisa kwakha inhlalo lenhle ngekuvikela insha yamasiko netetimali temphakathi. Emuva kwemcimbi, labaholi bembuka ngeliphusheni lekwakha indzawo yekudlalela letintsatfo letincane, lesingasita kutsi noma muphi umuntfu wetintsatfo atewakhule nempilakahle ngengaphakathi kwemphakathi wawo.

Lomhlangana wentiwa khona lapho ekhaya emgwaqweni lophekeme, lapho bantfu labaningi behlangana khona bekhuluma ngemibuto lebalulekile emacondzana nemphilo yabo yemihlalaho. Emkhatsini wetikhalo letavetiwa ngulabahlali, sikhulume ngetintfo letifana nekungatfolakali kwamanzi lahlantekile kanye nalezo tindlela letidala ubumangalanga ekuphumeleleni kwetemfundvo etikolweni tase-ekhaya. Sikhuluma ngemibuto yemphakathi, loholi waseNgwempisi uMnumzane Sibusiso Dlamini ukhulume ngekutsi bahlanganyeleni njengemphakathi ukulungiselela lisasa leliphumelelako. Uthe kubalulekile kutsi abantwana babuyele esikolweni ngobe imfundvo yiwo umgogodla wekulingana nalomhlaba lohamba ngekushesha lamuhla. Bantfu labavelele emphakathini batfumele umbiko kulababusi bave etingeni letiphezulu kutsi bayafuna kutfola lusito lolufanele kulendzawo. Emkhatsini wetikhalo, abalimi babo basho kutsi bayafuna kutunyiswa ngemacebo labalulekile emacondzana nemathinya lamasha wekuhlanyela emacembe kanye nekondla imfuyo yabo ngendlela leyikhona. Ihlelo lokukhulekela ndawonye nalemihangala yesikompilo yeSwati nalo likhulunye lichunyulwe ngulabahlali njengento lengatsite ihlanganisa bantfu batfotfise tindlelo tabo. Tintfo letibalulekile kakhulu njengemhlaba wekuhlanyela nalendzawo yekudlalela bantfwana tona nawo tivetiwe kulomhlangana lowatiwa kutsi wetfula lonkhe lolusha ekukhuliseni sikompilo semaSwati. Ngakho-ke, wonkhe umuntfu lokhona lolobuhle belive lwetfu kufanele atekele indzima yakhe ekwakheni isizwe lesiphumelelako nebantfu lababutana ndawonye ngandlelantfwana.

Emuva kwemihlangano leyentiwa emiphakathini yonkhe lenkhulu ngesonto leledlulile, kuhlanyelwe tindlela tetintfo letintsha tekuphucuka kwaleyo micondvo yemiphakathi. Umsebenti wekuhlangana uye wabonisa kutsi bahlali labanyenti bayafuna kutsi tinsita talokal sebe tifike ngekushesha nekwetsembeka. Ngemuva kwaloko, iButhokwami leSifundza saseNhlangano selikhiphe sitatimende lesitsi kuzakhiwa timpheme tekuphilisa letintsha etindzaweni letisese ngemuva nasemalokishini. Lititjelo letintsha tidzinga imali lenkhulu, kodvwa hulumende wesifundza utsi ubeke eceleni imali lengu-R47 million yalomnyaka wemali. Abahlali basemaphandleni nabemadolobheni batsiwe nguNgwenyama webantfu kutsi bate embhalweni wabo wetintfo letifunwa yibona njengetiNdlu tangemphakathi, kuphiliswa kwetimbobo tendzawo, nekuphatseka kwetinhlelo takusebenta kwemakhaya. Lahulumende wephrovinsi ubalule njalo kutsi tinsita tekugelezwa kwamanzi nakatsi kusetjentiswa kwato kute ngekucondza, kuvimba tingcuphe tekugula netekusha kwetindzawo. Ngetindzaba tekutfutfukiswa kwendlela tetikhukhula, iMnyango yemisebenzi yemphakathi sewutsite imisebenti iyawuqala ngekushesha emuva kwekuklanywa kwetikhicito. Lesinyatelo sesivele sikhanyisela kutsi umphakathi udzingeka kube nabo emkhatsini wetihlelo tekutfutfukisa letitfolakale emakhaya. Ngesikhatsi semhlandla walomnyaka, iNdvuna yeNdlu yekubusa ikhiphe incwadzi yetekutfutfukisa lefundzisa bafundi kanye nalabanye basemphakathini ngalomtsamo wekuphucuka lowentiwayo. Emakhanselakhanselakhane alesinye nesinye sasemalokishini ase-Manzini naeMbabane nawaseSiteki asebentiwa ngabasebenti bemphakathi ngetinkinga tetintfo letifanele kwentiwa ngekushesha. Loluhlelo lwetihlelo tekutfutfukisa lwamukelwa ngemivo leyatiwe yabavoti base-Swaziland kulomnyaka wemhlangano lowentiwa ngeNcwati leyedlulile.

Uhulumende weFundze yeHhohho uvumile kutsi lenkinga iseyindala, futsi ubalele tindlela tekusita umphakathi ngekushesha. Umkhandlu webantfu weHhohho ukhiphe sitatimende lesibalula kutsi imali yekwakha imigwaqo yekugeleta kwamanzi sekelungiselelwe nguNgwenyama kanye neKhabhinethi, kutsi ingukhokha lenkhulu yekucala wemnyaka lowu. Emagciwane emigwaqo lemisha atakwakhiwa ngekushesha kwamaviki lamatfupha, ngalesinye sikhathi kutakwenteka kutsi abantu babone kuchibiyela kwesikhashana ngaphambi kwekwakhiwa lokuphelele. Bonkhe abahlali labatfola lindzaba leyo bagcizela kutsi babonga kulandzelwa kwemibango yabo ngemnyaka lowedlule. Ngetinsimu letiseceleni kwemigwaqo lesha, tindlela tekulima tiyawutfola nekuncedakala ekugeleta kwamanzi lokuphephile. Sikhuluma naletindzaba, uNdvunankulu weFundze, Mnumzane Sibusiso Dlamini, ukhulume ngekuvuma kutsi sikhathi sekwakhiwa siyawuphatswa ngendlela lengenasiphazamiso, futsi bonkhe labangeni ekusebenteni kwemklamo batabe banetimvume letilindzele. Kutsi umsebenzi wetekwakha uqalwe ngekushesha kuyintfo lehlonishwa nguwo wonkhe umphakathi, ngobe tinkhinga temfuyo nemindeni tikhulile ngetinkhulungwane letedlule. Sigaba seMphakatsi siyawuhlala sibheke ekuphumeleleleni kwemklamo, sibike emhlanganweni walo wonkhe umphakathi ngekuphelela kwenyanga letathu. Lokulingana nentfutfuko yalelive kuyintfo lehlonishwa nguHulumende, futsi tincumo tekulungisa imibango yemphakathi tihlala tiphambili ekusebenteni kweSifundza semaSwati kanye netikhungo tekuphatha. Kufuneka abahlali lababhalise emanani abo eHhovisi leLokali kuze bafakwe kuluhlu lwabatawusitwa ngulelicebo.

Hulumende weSouth Africa sewungenile ngekusebentisa tinhlelo letintsha tekwesekwa kwabalimi, lapho kuniketwa khona insita yemali, imbewu, kanye nemishini yekulima kumaphandla lahlukene. Loluhlelo luhlose kusita labahlala emaphandleni kutsi bakwate ukulima ngendlela lehlelekile futsi yinzuzo, ngalokuchubeka nemphilo lehle yemiphakathi. Ngetikhatsi takamuva, iSikhundla Sekulima kanye Nekuthuthukiswa Kwemaphandla sitfumele emagosa kuyo yonkhe indlela, lafika asetsenzisana nabalimi beli, asebenta nawo ngesikhathi sekuhlela futsi sekuvuna izitfumo. Loluhlanganyelo lwakhela balalisi base-emaphandleni setsembe futsi lulabela nolwati lolusha ngendlela lemintfweni ikhula ngayo kahle, kutsi imvula iphatswa kanjani, futsi kutsi umhlaba usetjentiswa kanjani ngendlela lefanele. Ngaphandle kwaleto tinhlelo, likhono lelibuka ekusetsenziseni umhlaba ngendlela lengebha futsi yahluka libuye litsintse indlela labantu baphila ngayo yonkhe imihla. Sekubonakalisiwe ngetinombolo tekucwaningwa kwemkhakha wekulima kutsi emaphandla lalandzela inhlelo yekusebentisa umhlaba ngendlela lengumsunguli athola umbuyiselo longconywane wesitupele uma uqhathaniswa nalamaphandla langenalo loluhlelo. Hulumende ukhutaza bonkhe balimi labancane, kuhlanganise nabalobafazane, kutsi bangene kuleto tinhlelo bese babhalisa emahhovisi ahulumende lasedvutane nabo, kuze bonkhe bahlomule kuloluhlelo lokubonakala kwente umehluko omkhulu emiphakathini.

Umnyango Wetindlu naNekwakhiwa Kwemitsetfo ukhiphe sitatimende lesishiwo nguNgwenya Sifundza, lapho atsandza khona kutsi umsebenzi wokwakhiwa kwaleti tindlu sewuphotfuliwe ngendlela lencomekako, ngaphandle kwemitfunti yetindlela ebeyivimbela kuchubekela embili. Labatsatfwa njengabadvuna balomsebenzi nakho nalatimphakathi lababelindze iminyaka leminengi bafika etikhwameni tegijima kulwa nenhlalo lengesilo ngekwekhono. Kukhanyiswa kwetindlela tasemalokishini nakho sekwenteke ngalesisikhundla sikaHulumende, kutsi iLokishi laseNyamane kanye nele-Matsapha selinemlilo lowonele emagcekeni nasetimphakathi tetindlu. Tigciwane tentiwe kutsi tidluliswa emphakathini ngendlela yemihlanganisi yetifundza lapho abahlali batfola khona tindlela tekucalisa izikhalazo kanye nalokukhulunywa. Labalandzeli belomsebenzi batawuhlala babheke kutsi lelive liniketwa etahlweni lencomekako futsi liphatfwe kahle nakuphela ikhontileka. Kahle kahle, umsebenzi waka-2026 weetindlu ucele yonkhe imiphakatsi itfumele emabito ebantfu lababhalisiwe kuloluhlu lweHulumende, ikakhulukati labo labasebhekene nentfutfuko nebuphuya. Umkhandlu weLahlulelwa Kwemicabango ukhomba kutsi ingcindvo yekusebenta kahle inhlinhlini kuyayekelela uma ngikhuluma ngeto tindlu letisalelwe emumva kuleminyaka leminengi. Hulumende uyacela kutsi tonkhe tigaba temphakathi tihlangane nabalandeli belomnyango ngeLesibibili nakaNhlaba ngekuhambisana nelombuso wekuphilisa bonkhe bantfu.

Loko kwenteke ngesonto lelidlulile, lapho babelingana khona bantfu labadzala balapha ntalala, batikhumbula emalanga lasabese ngaphambi kwemhlaba wesimanje. Lihhovisi lehulumende laselakalini belinelabambeli, kantsi neNdvuna yetive yafika ngematfuba lalinqobile kutsi ibabingelele emihlangano yabo. Lomcimbi bewukhombisa bukhulu bencabo yesive, njengoba sigodlo sabesilisa nasebasati besilungiselela kucina intsaba njengesinkhwa semphakathi wonkhe. Ngekwengezelela kwaloko, badzala bemphakathi bahlangana phansi kwemutfombu welikhulu, batjela tinchunu letinsha ngendlela lapho nekumtsemba kwenteka khona ngeluvalo nangenhlitiyo leyentiwe kahle. Abahlali balapha sebetfole lusito lwetikhungo tekufundzisa tadzana letinyenti, nalapho bantfu labadzala nabanemphilo lemihle kakhulu bekhombisa kwengamela ngentfulelo. Kutsiwa kukutsi phindze kutfola luhlu lwemacembu lahlangana njalo ngelisonto kuletindzawo, lapho tindaba temphakathi neletesiko tikhulunywana khona ngalokusemtsetfweni nangalokuvulekile. Kumele kukhunjulwe kutsi lelicembu lelisebenta ngaphansi kwesivumelwano saletindzawo letimbili likhombise indlela yekusebentisana leyisibonelo semphakathi lowakhiwe elikhoneni lelincane. Loko kwentiwe ngesandla sonkhe saleyo ndawo, kungakhona kumesuka umuntfu nakanjalo lonye ngekwentelwa kwalo mcimbi. Emaphelo ale mhlangano asho kutsi umphakathi ulungele kuhambisana netigaba tekuthuthukisa tenhlalakahle nakuchubeka kutimela ngetindlela letintsha, lokuphatselene nelokukhula kwetimphahla tabo kanye nekuphila kwawo wonkhe umuntfu lapha ekhaya.

Inhlangano yeMnyango Wetekutfola Kudla NaNgubho sekhiphe umbiko losho kutsi ngaphezulu kwabalimi labalelwa ku-60 pesenti emaphandleni asemakhaya abate lusito lolwanele lwekuvuselela imitsi kanye nekuthenga imishini lemisha yokulimagodvo. Lombiko uphindze ukhombise kutsi lulwimi lwembila nelesigodi lwehla kakhulu ngemuva kweminyaka lembalwa, lokwetfusa ngobukubi budlula loko bekuhlongozwa nguHulumende esilinganisweni sakhe seminyaka lesikhombisa. Ngenhloso yekuguqula lesimo, Hulumende wasekhiphe Isikhungo Sekulima Sasemakhaya — inhlelo lensha lehlele kusita abalimi ngekubaphatsa kunye nabo ngekwabelana ngolwati lwetemvelo yemhlaba kanye netemnotfo. Lelikhungo litawusebenta ngekubambisana nalewo maphiko ahlukenahlukeneko kuhulumende walelive, kufaka ekhatsi lamadolobha nemiphakathi yasemasigodzini. Abahlali base-Mkhondo nase-Pixley ka Seme sebacomeke ngekhono lekutsatsa inxenye kulesisikhungo, njengoba base bebheke isikhashana lesidze kukho konkhe lokufana naloku. Kufanele kutsiwe kutsi, inhlelo yekwabelana ngemhlaba nayo iyinxenye lenkhulu yalesi sikhungo, njengoba abanye abalimi behlushwa wukuba nemhlaba omncane longahambisani netinhlanganisela temkhakha wekulima lobekiwe. Labaphathi bemaphiko kahulumende bakhuthaza wonkhe umuntu losemaphandleni kutsi abe nendzaba yekutsatsa inxenye kulesikhungo, ngobe kuyindlela lebalulekile yekwakha sikhundla semnotfo lobhaliwe losimame.

Lihlelo leHulumende lelibhekene nekusekela abalimi, lelaziwa ngelibito lelitsi iComprehensive Agricultural Support Programme, selisebente kakhulu ekuhlinzekeni abalimi ngemishini yekusebentelana kanye nembewu lecondzile. Labalimi sebetfole lusito lolubalulekile ngekwemali nangekwemfundo, lokusita kakhulu ekukhiciteni kudla lokwanele emaphandleni. Sibalo sabalimi labatfole lusito lolu selenyuke ngemaphesenti lamakhashane ngalomnyaka losedlule, njengoba iHulumende yandza tinhlelo tekufinyelela tindawo letikhashane. Tingcweli tekulima titfunyelwe etindaweni lapho abalimi badzingeka khona kakhulu, tibaniketa imibono ngendlela tekugcina inhlabathi ikhona futsi ivundze. Kubalulekile kutsi imitapo lemisha yelimo isetjentiswe ngindlela lefanele, ikakhulukati etindaweni lapho inhlabathi idzina khona ngebangela lemisebenti yekutsemba emhlabatsini ngendlela lengemfanele. Lulwimi lolutsite selwamukelwa nguHulumende njengendlela yekulekelela abalimi batsi bafundze ngetindlela tesayensi telimo ngeligama labo. Emtsetfweni lomusha walimi lowashicilelwa nguHulumende kulelinyanga, kulindzeleke kutsi tandziso letisha tekusebentisa umhlaba tilekelele ekunqamuleni kusetjentiswa komhlaba ngendlela lengemfanele. Lomtsetfo uchaza ngekucacile kutsi imvelo kumele igcinwe futsi kukhicitwa kudla kunyuke ngesikhashane.
