Abalimi labatsi bayahlangana nemakhansela abo banikwe lithuba lekubika tindlela letinhlobonhlobo lapho inhlelo ingabasita khona kangcono, bese leyo mininingwane iphiwa tikhulu telimo. Likhwelo likhona kulabo bonkhe labatsi bangatfola kusita kutsi batingele emalokishini noma etikhumulweni tekukhokha kwetinhlelo, bafike babhalise minyaka yonkhe ngaphambi kwekuphela kwenyanga yeNdlovu.

Hulumende wetive uyasebenta ngekuzimisela kuhlinzeka ngaleyo nkece lefanele kubo bonkhe labo labancike kulimo njengendlela yekuphilisa. Ngemuva kweminyaka leyimbalwa yekuhlela imibuso yemhlaba longasetjentiswa ngendlela lefanele, sikhalo semphakathi sabuye sentikitika ngekushesha kulabochwepheshe babehlelwe nguhulumende. Laba balimi, labanyenti babo bakhona emifini lemincane, sebanikwa emtsetfo lomusha lowamukelwa nguPhalamende nje nje, lowuchaza ngemtsetfo elicacile wendlela yokutfola usekelo lwelilima. Lemitsetfo isha iyacindzetela bukhona bendlela yekutfola imfuyo kanye nembewu yalokufanele ngaphansi kwezinhlelo tekusekela temkhiqizo. Kusuka emalimini asenkhundleni yekuhlanganisa letimphahla, kuya kulabo labatfunga nemiphakathi emaphandleni, sekunakekelwa bukhona betigceke tekukhulisa lokudliwako. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni wemphakathi lo owawungeniswa nguSigungu Lesikhatselene Nekutfutfukiswa Kwemaphandle, ummeleli wemphakathi wachaza inhloso yaleso sivumelwano sekwabelwa kwemhlaba. Baholi bemiphakathi babeka elicala lenkhinga yekusweleka kwemanti ekufuyweni kanye nemikhiqizo yemave lasebentiswa ngaloluhle. Hulumende ushicilele luhlu lwetindlela tekusekelwa kwalabo balimi labatsatsa indzima enkulu ekutfutfukiseni umphakathi wabo wonkhe. Emukelwa ngekuthokota ngulabochwepheshe bemkhakha welilima, lenhlelo yeNational Agricultural Support Programme isekelwe kahle bese ihlose kusita imiphakathi lemincane. Tigaba tebantfu letisebentisana nalo hlelo titonikwa tibuyiselo letisimeme temali kanye nalwati lwekuphatha indzawo yetilimo ngendlela lehlumelelako.

Umkhandlu weSifundza usite kutsi imali lengu-R45 million isetsentiselwe loluhlelo lokuphila kwemphakathi, futsi imisebenti lebalulekile itawuqalwa ngelinyanga letandvulo. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni lowawubanjelwe eHholo leMphakathi, iMeya yeManzini ikhulumile ngemcebo lofanele kumphakathi wonkhe webantfu labaphila kulelidolobha kanye nasemaphandleni. Lutfo lolubalulekile lolungatsi aluchazwa kahle nguye, ngumsebenti wekufaka amanzi lahlobile kulamakhaya langu-800 lasangakayitfoli insita yaloluhlobo. Tikhungo tekuphilisa letintja titawubakhelwa emiphakathini lemibili emaphandleni, lokutakwenta kubemnyandzisi kutsi bantfu bahambe ibanga lelifutfumine kuyofuna insita yekugula. Imikhuba leyishite yekushayela tindzawo letimphusha kuyolahlwa imphuphu iyachazwa njengengcuphe enkulu yempilonkhulu emphakathini wonkhe wesifundza lesitsite. Uhulumende uyachukulusa bonkhe abahlali kutsi babambisane naletinhlelo tekuhlanta umphakathi, ngobe umsebenzi walokho awukwati kwenziwa nguye yedvwa ngaphandle kwekubambisana kwebahlali. Imibiko leyibuyele emahhovisi kahulumende ibonisa kutsi inani labantu labangenawo umgwaco lomuhle wekufinyelela emasokosini likhulile ngekushesha eminyakeni lemihlanu leyadlulako. Ngako-ke, tikhulu teSifundza tichitiwe iminye imicabango yekufanisa indzawo nalelinye likhwelo lekwesekana kwemiphakathi ngaphansi kwenhlelo yetinhlangano letifanele. Bonkhe labo labafuna lwati lolwengetiwe mayelana naloluhlelo batsintfwe kutsi bahambe emahhovisi akaMkhandlu weSifundza ngekuvula kwentsambama ngemalanga lasebentako.

Emagcoleni aseSwatini, bantfu labanyenti sebabone kutsi kufundza kwabanye bantfwana kusagcina kunebunzima lobukhulu ngesizatfu sekusweleka kwetimphahla tekufundza. Tifundvo teNdlovukati tikhombisa kutsi ngaphezulu kwabantwana labayi-40 000 basafika esikolweni ngaphandle kwetincwadzi kanye netimphahla letidzingekako letifana netindvwangu tekufundza nebhuku. Hulumende webuzwe sewukhuphule imali lebekwe eceleni ngesinhloso yekusekelela ezikhungweni tekufundza letisemaphandleni lasekude, lapho bantfwana bavame kubhekana nebunzima bokufinyelela imfundvo lenemehluko. Ticwaningo letentiwe nguMnistri wetemfundvo tikhombisa futsi kutsi titfoli temfundvo tesifundza setintsaba tigcina zingakatfoli tinsita letilingene naletinikwa tifundza letisedvute nemadolobha lamakhulu. Ngenhloso yokushintja lesimo, Hulumende sewumemetele inhlelo entsha yekusabalalisa titfoli tekufundza kuyo yonkhe indzawo yetive, kwentiwa kutsi kube lula kutsi bantfwana bakhone kufundza ngendlela leyicinile. Tingcibi tekufundza tacindzetela kutsi imfundvo lenemehluko ingeke iphiliseke ngaphandle kwekutsatfwa kwandzima kahle nguHulumende nangumphakathi wonkhe. Tinyuvesi naletinye tikhungo tekufundza lephezulu nato tashiwo ekulenteni umnikelo kulenhlelo, ngekunikela ngalwati kanye ngebuciko betemfundvo ekuphasiseni tintfo. Ticokelo letitsite tikhombisa kutsi tintfo titawuphucuka ngekuhamba kwesikhashana nanjengoba tinhlelo letisha titawugcina tinyakazile, kodvwa abazali labanyenti basagcina babutshelwa kutsi kube nemtfwalo wesisa wawo. Tigaba letikhona temphakathi naletinye tinhlanganiso tete ngekusekelela leliciniso, titsi kuyangatfwatfwa kutsi imali isetjentiswa kahle ngempela ekusimamiseni imfundvo yaletinye tifundza.

Hulumende usekumemezele lisu lelitsha lekuthuthukisa imfundvo yalenkhaba yelive, leligcileta kakhulu ekwakheni tindlu tetimfundvo letinsha kanye nekubuyeketa letindza. Lisu leli licondziswe nguNgwenyama, kute bantfwana bese baphelelwa yimfundvo lencono ngenxa yekusweleka kwetinsita letifanele. Tinhlangano tebantfwana tetifundze letabikele kahle kutsi ngaphezulu kwemashumi lamatfatfu emakolishi ezifundazweni akanaphasindza lelelanele, lokuba nemtselela lobi esikhumulweni sebantfwana. Hulumende usekhiphe inkhomba yekutsi ungumtsatsa lisisombululo lesigcwele sekuphela kwemnyaka wekufundza lomusha, ngaloko betfuse leti tindlela kute tikwati kufaka bantfwana labantfu labatigcugcutela. Tikhungo temfundvo letiphakeme naletinjengetikhungo temfundvo letihlangene nawo titsandze kungena kulolu hlobo lwelusito, titsatsa indzima yekulungisa asisombululo ekufundzeni. Emalunga ePhalamende asahlangana ngelicuba lesemthethweni lelichubekako, akhuluma ngendlela yekutfola imali lenkhulu kakhulu kuletimele. Bohulumende bamaifundvo babika kutsi bahlwile ekwakheni lihlandla lekufundza lelimcoka, lokulungele kubamba bantfwana labashiwo nguNgwenyama ngelicoco lemhlangano lomkhulu. Kufundza kwaletinsha tikhungo temfundvo kuyakhicitwa ngemgomo lomusha, kute kulekwe siko lelo lalikhona kwematfupha endlini, ngisho nalabo bantfwana labashaywa yindlala bangakwati kufundza. Tihambo tetincwadzi tetibuyekete ngetizinga letiphakeme tatsatfwa nguMnyango weMfundvo, nalamanje lesi sisombululo sikhomba imiphumela lemihle ngekungenelela kahle kwebantfwana etikolweni kanye nasesikhungweni seMfundvo lePhakeme, lokwenta kutsi likusasa lelizako libukeke ngekukhanga kakhulu.

Emuva kwemhlangano lomkhulu lowabanjwa evikini lelidlulile eHholofa leNdvuna yeSifundza, tiphatsimandla tembudzuko tivumile kutsi tihlelo tekuphambilisa imisebenti yemapayipi emanti emaphandleni aseFunkwini nataseNhlanganos titawuqalwa ngekushesha. Labamphakathi labahluphekile ngenxa yekuntfola emanti lahlanta bebevele sebalamule ngemihla leminyenti, kepha manje kunekutfemba lokusha ekuphileni kwabo kwemihla ngemihla. Yonkhe imisebenti lemikhulu letawentiwa isifundza itawubandakanya tigceme tekusebenta temisebenti yeNdvuna yeSifundza, iMasipala nayo futsi yatsetseleka ngekunikezela ngalabo basebenti labatiwa kahle emsebentini wato. Tindzaba tetemali letatsetelwe kulolu hlelo setekhangiswa etiphatsimandleni letifanele, kantsi nalabo labafuna kulandzela inkhulumo mayelana nekuphambilisa kwalolu hlelo bangaya eMahovisi eMasipala emihla yesebenta. Kucelwa kutsi nawo wonkhe umhlali lowatiwa lapha etikhumulweni takhe ngekubhalisa khona lapho atibhalise khona, bakhishiwe nekubhalisa ngalokwengetiwa, lese-ofisini lemasipala. Phezu kwaloko, sikhalo sekukhishwa kwemisebenti ya-Imfundo ye-Masipala kuyatfolakala phela ngekufika emkhatsini wamasonto lamabili. Tigceme tekusebenta temikhulu titatawubikwa emuva kwenhlangano ye-Khabhinethi yeSifundza lese-ofisini lelikhulu leSifundza emuva kwenyanga neyinye. Kulindzeleke kutsi lolu hlelo lutawufinyelela emakhaya latingaphezulu kwa-800 emphakathini lona, futsi kutawugunyatwa konkhe ekupheleni kwemnyaka wemali lowetama phambilisa ngemisebenti yemphakathi yonkhe ngekusebenta kahle.

Umphakathi wase-emalokishini nawo sewutsandza kufaka tifiso tawona ekhutisweni lolusha loluphutfumile lolwabiwa nguMnyango WeMabhizinisi eMhlabeni WeMalokishi. Ehlelo lelikhona manje, hulumende uhambe inyanga yonkhe ekhangela imifundvo yabantu leyehlukene, ayivumele kutsi ifike kulowo muntu lomdze kunakho konke. Tifundvo letitfolakalako tibalwa kulabo labahlala emaphandleni lasitfupha ngesikhatsi. Kumbe ngabe sinekusho? Hulumende weshiye licebo lelisha emasini lebekelwe kuhlanyelwa ngebusika, aphindze atsi emadubulwana ezikhungo temfundo atiwe ngebunyenti. Emunicipal-ini yaseNhlangano, umkhandlu ukhiphe sitatimende lesitoliwe ekhuluma ngalwati loluphelele ngokuguculwa kwamabhizinisi ayengela ngilondoleko. Ekhuluma emhlanganweni womphakathi ngehlandla leliminyana, sicini somkhandlu sakhuluma ngekushintjwa kwemitsetfo lehambisana nenhlalakahle yemphakathi lonkhe. Umkhandlu uphindze wanaba ngatintfo letifana nekusetjentiswa kwemililo lebuya emaphandleni lapho tikhunyuzwa khona. Abahlali sebanikwe lilanga leli-30 labavunyelwe ngalo kutsi batsintse ticubu temvelo letisemaphakelo kumbe kutsi bayi etinzimbeni temvelo kahulumende. Ingcindzetelo yemphakathi isenta kutsi hulumende abheke emikhubeni yetinkhundla takho tiyonkhe etifundazweni letihlukene, agcine atsi abantu abalali emakhaya lamabi nobe bangabinayo indzawo yekuphumula. Tiphatsimandla tikhethele bona tikhumbutsane yonkhe imindeni ngekutsi tincwadzi letiphatselene naletintfo letibalulekile tifike ngekushesha kwelilanga lelingatsi libi.

Loku kubangela kutsi imikhakha yetilimo ihlale ngemumva, kantsi nemidvwebo yekudla yehlele kakhulu ezindaweni lasemakhaya. Hulumende weNingizimu Afrika sewubonile lenkinga, wase wethula tinkinga letifanele tiphendulwe ngekushesha ngetichibelo letintsha letijutshelwe kulekelela balimi labancane. Ngekwesikhundla sekunciphisa inombolo yalabagibeli betilimo, hulumende ufuna kukhulisa inombolo yemindeni lephila ngetilimo, kuhlinzeka netintfo tekusebenta kanye netimbuto letimcoka. Imiphakathi leyemukelé tinhla letiletfwa nguMnyango weTilimo itiphumelelise yakhela bupilo lobusha ngetilimo letinsha, letifaka ekhatsi ummbila, tinyanga, nawo-ayikhosi. Lemisebenti iphindze isite netindlela tekulima leticinile, letihlonipha imvelo ngetulu kwekuphilisa umhlaba wetilimo. Kuko konkhe loku, kubalulekile kutsi bantfu bomphakathi babambe ticolo ekulungiseni tindlela letisetjentiswa emhlabeni, kute kuphephe timfuyo netilimo ekuhluphekeni kwemvelo. Tinhla letidlule tivela ngekutsi nalapho kukhona lusekelelo lwahulumende, imiphumela yetilimo iyaphakama ngendlela leyethembisako. Lomnyango uphindze ucindzetele kutsi imiphakathi kumele isebentisane kanye nema-ofisi ahulumende ekuhlanganiseni tindlela tekwengamela umhlaba, kute titsele tibe yinsengo lebalulekile emphakathini wonkhe. Emuva kweminyaka leminye lebukeka njengeminyaka yekuhalatela imvula, balimi sebanalo ithemba lesitja ngetinhla letentele kubhetisa imiphakathi yasemakhaya kuze kube yinto lephilako nalokwetsembeka ngekwetibandlululo tebupilo baletindzawo.

Lehlelo lekusita, lelabikwa nguNgqongqoshe weTindaba tasekhaya, selisebenta ngekushesha etigodzini letinyenti nalapho abantu bahlala khona ngekuhluphekezela. Emiphakathini leyo sekuphehla intsandvo lenkhulu, njengoba abahlali bakhombisa kutfokota ngesimemo lesite, futsi becelela kutsi lehlelo likhuliswe kuye nakuletigodzi letisasele. Kuhambisana naloku, iMkhandlu waseManzini ushicilele sitfatfwana sekubika lesetjengisako kutsi imigwaqo yasekhaya lengemuva emaphandleni izakwakhiwa busha ematsambo lamabili lasemuntfwini, kantsi nemitfombo yamanzi ilekelele kulungiswa kwaletinye tindawo. Lokunikelwa kwesevisi lekusebenta kahle kuvelele ngemuva kwekukhaliseka labekwentiwa yimiphakathi emhlangweni lowabe usendzaweni yetinhloko talapha ekhaya ngenyanga leyendlulile. Wabeka ngekucacile uMphathi weNdzawo, kutsi tikhandlela tendzawo yonkhe tiyanakekelwa ngetindlela letingenachepho, njengoba inhloso enkulu ikhona yekutsi abantu bonkhe batfole imisebenti yalapha ekhaya ngekulinganiseka. Ngetindzaba tembuso, sekwetfulwa futsi umkhankaso wesifundza wekufundzisa abantu ngendlela yekuphila kahle, kutsi bangabaleki kuletigodzi letisemaphandleni bayewufuna imisebenti emadolobheni lamakhulu. Umkhankaso lona, lowenikelwe ludzaba nguMnyango weKuhlaliswa kwabantu, ucubungula kukhuphula inhlalakahle yalamaphakathi atfutfumele ngekwekhona kwebantfu labaningi labangasebenti. Abasebenti betimboni nabahlali labebetsintfwa yizo bonkhe lezinhlelo, babukisisa ngekucophelela indlela lemazinga ekuphila abo atawuguquka ngayo kulandzelana netemnotfo yeNingizimu Afrika leyenabela etifundazweni ngetinhloso tekuthuthukisa bukhali bomiphakathi.

Emuva kwehlelo lokuhlangana lomphakathi lowabanjwa evikini leliphelile, kwalandza inkhulumomphendvulo lensha mayelana nemsebenti webhasi lowusemadolobheni. Tiphatsimandla talendawo tikhombise kutsi tisebentela kufaka emagagasi lamatfsha esikhundleni salawa laguga, futsi lotjelwa umphakathi ukuthi usebenti lona utawucinisekiswa ekupheleni kwenyanga lenkhulu leyetako. Bukhona betigaba tesimame kanye netinkhundla tebantfwana nako kufakiwe etigabeni letitawukhiwa emjovo laungakacali. Tindvuna temilamu tivumile tathi tiyasebenta ngekushesha kutsi tikhandle budzala betimphahla letedlulele hlandze, tivikele nako imphilo yemphakathi wonkhe ahlale kahle. Umphakathi wasemadolobheni ucele ngenhlitiyo yonkhe kutsi bantfu batsite labahola leli dolobha bacabange ngekushesha ngaleto tingcuphe letibonakele emagcemeni emgwaqo lowedlule eceleni kwesikolwa lesisemkhatsini wekuhlala. Ngaphezulu kwabahlali labayi-4 500 base-Mbabane sebetfumele tincwadzi kuMkhandlu weSifundza weSifundza saseHhohho, bacele inhlelo letsha yekusetjenzwa kwemati lahlantekile emaphandleni lamatjwa lase ndzawoeni. Njengoba emasonto lamabili edlulile kwatfolakala kutsi tidlalelo tenkhulu letintfo letinsha letifikile kumkhandlu, kubeka kusebenta kwalento kutawuphindzelela ngemkhandlu lona. Sontfo, ekhuluma kuHhovisi LeLikhulu laBalawuli, indvuna lephambili iviseleke kubonakalisa kutsi tinhlekelele telemali letikhomba emuva kwemihla lembalwa letedlulele tatinta ngempela emtsetfo wemali walabo babuka ngetemindeni lobaphumele ebudlelwaneni. Kuchukulutswa kwetisekelo temiphakathi lokuphelele kusaya phambili njengesinye setikhalo letiphambili telisu lelikhulu lelingemuva kwelitje ekulungiseni imphilo yemiphakathi yonkhe.

INhlangano yeMkhandlu yeNdvulo ibambe umhlangano omkhulu ngesonto lelidlule lapho itatamele khona tinhlelo letintsha tekuncita tinkhinga leto. Emhlanganweni lowawubitwa ngeNgci, iNdvulo ikhiphe sitatimende lesishito kutsi tilwimi tekusebentisa imali tekuphendvulela imikhakha yetindvulo titawusetjentiswa ngendlela lecondzile naphindze yalinganisiwe. Ikhomishana yekuhlela kutsi kunikezwa kanjani emasevisi emiphakathini itsatse sinqumo lesincomekile sekutsi ibhilidi lelinetingilazi elikhulu laseofisi liyakwakhiwa njengesivivane lesikhutazela umphakathi wonkhe. Kungakapheli tinyanga letintsatfu, umkhandlu wetsi utakwetama kucedza tikhukhula letibangela tonkhe tinkhinga kuto tonkhe tindlela letisetjentiswa ngumphakathi wetinze. Sigaba semitfombo yemvakati sinikete imali lengu-R2.3 wezigidi tekusita ekwakheni imikhakha lemisha yekugcina amanzi lahlobile ematjeni lamadzala eMkhandlwini. Talamele timvume tekwakha letitintfu tikhishiwe emhlangweni lo nakuba kubonakele kutsi kusachazwa kancono kubuka tinkhinga ngemuva kwekubuya kwemvula. Inhlelo yekukhweshisa tindlela tekusebenta kwetinhlaka temisebenti yakamuva inyatselwa ngekugcizelela kutsi yonkhe imikhakha ilandzela umtsetfo waleliviki. Nembala, iNdvulo itikhombise itinikele ngeliciniso ekufezekiseni tifiso temphakathi wakhetse ngekuphila kahle nekuphepha kwalowo umphakathi wonkhe ngaso sonkhe sikhashana.

Hulumende wesive ukhiphe inhlelo entsha yokusekela abalimi labancane, inhlelo leyo lengagcugcutela kutfutsela kwephamukalembu emifundvweni yonkhe lenye neleyo. Ngemuva kwehlelo lokuhlangana nemiphakathi yasemagcekeni, tinkhundla letiningana tibone kutsi kuyimfuneko kunikela abalimi imishini yekulima kanye netimbewu letihle, njengobe kutfutselwa kwemkhiqizo kusemcoka kakhulu. Umnyango Wetekuphila Kwelive ubonakalise kutsi wetsembeka ekulwisaneni netikhalo tabalimi labancane, hhayi letamalishwa kulendlela. Inhlelo yekusekela emave ekulima ibalela lusito lwemali, imfundvo yetekuphila, kanye nemishini lemisha lesize abalimi bakhuphule umkhiqizo wetintfo letitfunyelwa tiye kwemanye emave. Bafuyezintshwa labahlala emaphandleni akude baseSwatini manje sebabona themba ngembi kwekusimama kwetintfo letindala lebetatibaphitisha. Kufudziswa kwemhlaba lowusebentako sekukhulunywwa ngempumutsela, ngobe hulumende ubona kutsi lomhlaba awusebenti kahle ngebangela lekubulawa kwemihlaba. Inkhundla yechebeleti lemisha ifuna kukha inhlelo letikhona kulungiselela kulima ngekwetimiso temhlaba kanye netimiso temvelo, kute kutsiwa kubukwana kulanga lamadvolo kwekutsetfwa kwemhlaba longakhulunywa ngawo. Intfukuthelo yabalami lebevele ikhona isendleleni yekushabalala, njengobe inhlelo yekusekela manje ikhombisa bofakazi betimphilo letinhle letitawutfola bafuyi abasemsebentini labemitjhate emaveni labancane nasemalishweni futsi nakemaphandleni.

Hulumende webhange laseSintu ukhiphe umbiko lokhombisa kutsi ngaphezulu kwabalimi balelive labangema-60% basebenta emhlabeni longakaphakanyiswa ngemtsetfo wemnyaka lowedlulile. Lenhlangano yemveliso yinesikhungo lesisha lekuSithobeni, lapho abalimi bafundiswa khona ngetindlela tesimanjemanje tekuhlanyela kanye nekugcina umhlaba unesimilo. Sikhungo lesi sivule eminyango yaso evulekile kubantfu bonkhe labahlala kulelive, ikakhulukati labasemaphandleni labancamela kuphucula imiphumela yemklamo wabo wesimo sokuphila. Hulumende ubenesihlelo sekusita labalimi labancane ngemtsetfoshisekelo lomtsetfo wakamuva lohlanganisa nkece lengetele nguR200 yigidi, lekhetselwe kukhulisa imveliso yematsanga, yembatata, kanye neyemabhontjisi emifundazweni lemisha. Lesihlelo sifaka ekhatsi nelusito lwetintfo tekuphilisa tsimu kanye netinhlanyelo leticinile, letinikwa labalimi labatfola umhlaba ngemgomo webantfu labaswele. Indlela yemsebenti ikhombisa kutsi sikhundla sabalimi basemalanga base-Afrika singatfutfukiswa ngekubambisana kwemkhakha kahulumende, wetemnotfo, kanye nemiphakathi leyaziwako. Tingcindveti tekushintja kwetimo telizulu nato tiyachukulutswa ngekuhlela tindlela tekucondza emanti ngekucophelela, kuhloswe kutsi umhlaba ungalahlekelwa sikhono sayo yonkhe. Bonkhe labathintekako bacelwa kubamba tinhlangano letizako ngemuva kwetinyanga letimbili, lapho kungatsekelwa khona sigaba sesikhombisa sehlelo lemnyaka wesine.

Ekhuluma emhlanganweni lomphakathi lowawubanjelwe eNhlambelo, iNdvuna yeSifundza ibeke licace kutsi imali leyo izosetjentiswa ekwakheni tindlela, ekulungiseni tiphelo tamanzi, kanye nasekukhanyiseni tindlela temadolobha. Ihlelo leli selibhaliswe ngokusemtsetfweni njengengcenye yenhlelo yenkhani yeNational Development Plan, futsi uhulumeni wazisa kutsi ukusetjentiswa kwemali kuzoniketwa phansi emabhansini labekiwe ngoMarch unyaka losemkhatsini. Sifundza lesinelibanga leliphakeme lekusweleka kwemisebenti nalesinekushoda kwezinsiza tikakhokho-mholo, sikhombise kutsi emaphrojekthi lamasha atoba nemtselela lomkhulu ekukhuliseni inhlalo yabantu. Ikhomishana yemimango itfumele umyalezo lowacaca kutsi tonkhe tindvuna temamunisipali kumele tibeke imibiko yaletimali ebantfwini ngemalanga langema-30 emuva kwekutfola imali. Loku kusho kutsi abahlali batawube nelungelo lekubuka konkhe lokukhishwe nguloya munisipali, ngaphandle kwekuvimbwa. Emuva kwehlelo lekuhlola indlela emunisipali asebenta ngayo, kwacondziswa tindlela letintfwenti tekuphila kwabahlali, kufaka ekhatsi kushoda kwetindlu, kushoda kwetigodzi tekuphahla, kanye nanekungagelezi kahle kwamanzi lacocekile. Uhulumeni ukhombise kutsi unesifiso lesitikhumbulako sekubona wonkhe umuntu aphila kahle, futsi ulandzela inqobo yeMthsetfo Sisekelo welive mayelana nelungelo labantu ekuphileni ngesitfunti. Emiphakathi iyacetelwa kutsi ibambisane nalabo labagcokama ngemigwamanda yokulwa nengcindvo yabahlali, ukuze lelive lilitsele emuva liphila.

Iphrojekthi letikhulu letekugcwalisa imigodzi yemigwaco kanye nekufaka emanti lahlanta kuhle seyicelwa nguMasipala waseKwaDukuza, kani imali lehlongotwako yakhona ifinyelela ku-R42 miliyoni. Abasebenzi bephrojekthi batloliswe lapha ekhaya, kuhloswa ngalokho kuniketa emtsetfweni bahlali lababobonkhe letifundzweni kuze batfole imisebenti lecinile kanye naletinye tintfo letibalulekile. Emakomiti emiphakathi asebentise imasipala nguloyo wavuma kutsi tikhalo tabahlali tatikudzingeka kukuphangisa ngemva kweminyaka lemibili yekugcugcutela. Umhlangana webhodi wemphakathi lotele embili emasontweni lamabili agcile wabeka sikhatsi sekuphelela kwalelinye nyaka njengelilelo lekuqedza lonkhe lusiko lwekuya ematapwini ngetinyawo takakhulu. Sikhonkwane sesibili salenhlelo kufaka kusakazwa kwelwati ngekusebentisa lwimi lwesiSwati kuyo yonkhe imikhicito yemphakathi, kuhloswa ngaloko kubangela bahlali batsi batikhone batsi bawubone umtsetfo ngetindlela letifanele. Umkhandlu waseKwaDukuza uvumile futsi utsite ucubungulo lwesibili lwalehlelo luyacubungulwa, kuhlanganiswa lawo nalabo labebavamile bahlali lalabo la etindleleni tekufikelela tiphephiso. Tinombolo letimele kukhombisa kutsi sikhombisa isikhashana lesikhulu sekuguquka kwetinsuku tekusebenta taleti tindlela letitfutfumele, njengobe imiphumela yato ihlele ukukhombiswa kuleli khomishi ngenyanga yaMarch letsako.

Lomkhandlu usememetele kutsi umsebenzi lowo utawuqala ngekucindzeleka kwenyanga yeSikhombisa, futsi utawuphela ngekuphela kwemnyaka wali-2025. Abahlali labanyenti bafike bashayakalela ngekusweleka kwemanti lacolekile, ikakhulukati kulabo labahlala emakhaya lahlabeka libele ngesimangalo leso. Tinhloko tetindlu tasemakhaya tikhulume ngekushesha, tifinyelele eMkhandlwini ngetikhalo tekutsi izingxabo temapayipi lidzala tivimba kuhambiseka kwemanti kahle emalokishini lashiywe emuva. Ngemuva kwemichibiyelo leyentiwa tichwepheshe tetindzawo letehlukene, kuvele bucala kutsi imigwaqo leyehlukene leli-47 iyatfola lomsebenzi wekuhlela kabusha ngekuphutfuma. Lomkhandlu uphumele embili usekhuluma ngalomsebenzi, usho kutsi imali lesikhombisa wemiliyoni yemalangeni iseniketwe kulomsebenzi ngekufanele. Emnyango weMisebenti Yemphakathi uyicondzise lemali nguye matfupha, nguyo futsi lotahlola imisebenti ngetikhathi letehlukene. Abahlali banxusiwe kuhlangana nemacembu emphakathi, lapho batawukwati kunaba khona ngemiphumela yemisebenti ngezikhathi letitfobile ekhasimendeni linye. Lokwatiwa loku kuvusa liphembesi lelintsetfwa emiphakathini leyete emalokishini nasemakhaya, ikakhulukati kulabo labalindze imali yekusekela kwehulumende. Ukunxenwa kwemphakathi kulomcimbi kugcizelela inhloso yekuletsa kubambisana lokusimeme phakati kwahulumende nabahlali.

Umkhandlu webantfu wase-Mbabane sewukhiphe sitatimende lesitsi umsebenzi wekuphindvela tindlela temanzi utawuqala ngekushesha nje. Umkhandlu lowatiwa ngekusebenta kahle sewulungiselele imali yenkhulungwane yemaMalangeni langangetimphahla nabasebenzi labadzingekako kulomsebenyi. Emuva kwemhlangano lowentelwa ngenyanga leyadlulile, bantfu labamele imiphakathi yabo bavumisana nelisiko lokutsi kufanele kukhishwe imibiko yentfutfuko njalo emuva kwezinyanga letintsatfu. Tindvuna letiphatseke ekuphatiweni kwetindlela talo lonkhe lodvelo tikhombise kutitama kwato emsebentini lowembulwa nguLodvelo. Ngaphandle kwaleyo nkambiso, abalimi kanye nalabafuya tilwane etigodzini letisedvute kuba naletinhlupheko letikhulu ngesikhatsi sihlasela esomiso. Kusuka entfunjini yeNkomati kuya etindzaweni letisedvute naseBig Bend, tigciwane tetindlela temacondzane netulu kanye netikhungo temfundvo naletentisisa kusetjentiwa kwemisebenti jikelele. Umcwaningi webantfu losondzele kundlela yokusebenta kahle wakhombisa indzaba lephutfumele yekuqeda kwematanki lalagciwane lahlaselwa yinchilo nenhlabathi. Sifundza seLubombo kanye neseLundzi sehlinzeke ngemihlangano lemibili lesasivame ngekucosha imininingwane lebuyisela emuva kuLodvelo. Bantfu bakulawo masifundza sebetsela bugolide kulomcondvo ngekusho kwabo ngemibono lebonakalako nayelekelelako. Ngemva kwekucubungulwa kwaleyo mibono, kutekunikwa tikhomba letichazako ngekuseta etindleni temiphakathi ngendlela lefanele. Lomkhandlu uyalekela bonkhe bahlali kutsi bete emihlanganweni yabantfu leyatawusetjentiswa ngemuva kwetinsuku letingema-30.

Hulumende ubeke eceleni imali lenkhulu ngemgomo wekukhulisa ekulimeni, lekuhlose kusita abalimi labancane kutsi bakhulise imivuno yawo ngendlela lebonakala kahle. Lomgomo ubandakanya kusimamisa umhlaba wemapulazi kanye nekupha abalimi tinhlanyelo letingesabi tibetse letivamile, lokutawubasita kutsi bakhiqize kudla lokuningi emasimini abo. Ngaphandle kwaloko, kukhona nehlelo lekuqeqeshwa kwalabalimi, lapho bafundiswa khona tindlela tekulima letisha letisebentisa machimu lasemandzisi kanye nekugcina indzawo yomhlaba iphilile sikhashana lesidze. Emiphakathini leminyenti, bafati bangena ngekugcwele kuletihlelo, babonakalisa kutsi bakhona kulima ngemandla kanye nebuhlakani lobukhulu. Sikhuluma namalungu alesizwe, bonkhe bavumelana kutsi lusito lolufika ngesikhathi lcungcutwe luyinsita lenkhulu kakhulu kubatsi bantfu emaphandleni. Hulumende wetifundza nawemkhakha uqinisekisa kutsi emahhovisi ekulima asebenta ngesimangaliso ngesizatfo sekuniketela lusito ngekushesha kwetizidingo tabalimi. Kubalulekile kutsi imiphakathi yetimphilo kanye nekusimamisa kwemhlaba kube yinto lemiswe kuphambili ekulungisweni kwemtsetfo wemapulazi. Letinhlelo takuhulumende tikhombisa kutinikela lokukhulu ekukhuliseni imphilo yabantu basemaphandleni, njengoba kugcina elive likhiqiza kudla kwalo kumele kube yindlela yekuphila yonkhe imphakathi. Abalimi balandzela imiyalo leyehlisiwe ngekutfutfuka kwabo bonkhe labangena kuletihlelo temuso wasekulimeni.

Umkhosi lona bewuhanyelwa ngabantu labaphuma kutikhungo letahlukene tesifundza, kufaka ekhatsi labadvala, batjoli, kanye netingcondvo letisebentela tive letahlukene. Ekhuluma embikwemgomo wetigcoko, inkhosi yalendzawo yakhuluma ngentfo yelusito lwemasiko, yaphindze yagcizelela kutsi tikhatsi tekutiphatsela kahle tinyanga yetamasiko kufanele tihlonishwe ngulowo nalowo emphakathi. Tigcoko temasiko letahlukene tatentwa nguletihle letabuka, tafaka ekhatsi imigcemelo yemahewu kanye nemidlalo yetamasiko leyabita emehlo alabo bonkhe ababekhona emphakathini wonkhe. Sabelo sekulima, semphilo, kanye netekuchumana sona futsi sanikwa tigele letitsite tebantfu labehlangana laphaya, ngobe kwehluleka kwekumiswa kwetindlela temphilo lefanele kuyinselelo lenkhulu esifundazweni. Tigele letiniwa tatsindzisa bafana nebantfwanamunti labafundako, nekuvuma kwabo kwabonakala ngekutfokota nemibubuso yabo lapho batfola khefu lensita yokutifundzela nokutiphucula. Timphilo tabantu base-Ngwempisi tiyalungiswa ngesandla salowo nalowo ohlangabetana naletinselelo, kodvwa loluhlangotsi lolumcoka lwemasiko luyasicinisa sikhundla saso, sikhuna tibonelo tekutsemelana kanye nekuhlonipha lokulotjwa ngentfombi nebafana basesikolweni bese batsatsa indzima. Labo labebakhona batiphumelelise kabusha ngekubamba inxenye lenhle yesihle semkhosi lona, bese bayagqugquteleka kuze babheke ekusetshenjisweni kwato tonkhe tinzuzo letikhona ekusimamiseni emphakathi wabo lonkhulu.

Abahlali baleso sigodzi sebakhuluma ngalokucacile ngekuhlushwa kwabo yikulala emnyameni iminyaka leminingi, baphikelela kutsi tikhuleko tabo tigcine tibhekiwe nguHulumende. Ikhomishini letekhnolojiyelikhona liphakamise kutsi kufanele kusetjentiswe emandla elilanga njengendlela yekusita imiphakathi leseduze nemaphakelo emandla. Umnyango wama-R200 million lobekwe eceleni nguHulumende wase-Eswatini lowasabalalisiwa ngemaphephandaba liphakamise lo-mprojekhi emazingeni labitfwa ngelitjeni. Ngaloku, tigodzi letingema-17 letisadinga ugesi tilandzela luhlelo lokuhleleka lolusanda kuguculwa nguNgwenyama kanye neMphumeleli yeLizwe. Emaphakadze, iKhomiti Lenkhundla yaNagogo neyaHhansi lethetiwe kutsi kufanele kube khona kutikhuleka kwekubhekana nebonakaliso lokusetjentiwa kwetimphahla tegesi emalokishini. Bantfu labangaphezulu kwema-5 000 kuleso sigodzi sebanikwe imvumo yokufaka tigodzi tabo kuhlelo lokukhona kwalomlomo webantfu walowo mnyango wekuhlinzekwa kugesi, kugcizelelwa kutsi umsebenzi lofana nalomukela titfole inchubo yekugcinwa. Lomgomo wekuchubekisana kuhleleka kwemaphakelo egesi ungena esikhundleni salowo lowagculiswa ngoNhlaba wakulomnyaka, usho kutsi tikampani letinkhulu letisebenta ezindaweni temaphandla kufanele tihlanganyele ekuletfeni tigodzi letintsha. Ikhomishini lekubhekana nemibango yabantu iphinde yatsintsa ngemkhono wayo kunhlebunye yalesisigamu, ikhombisa kutsi kubalulekile kutsi kube khona nekubambisana phakathi kwemkhandlu wendlunkulu nalamaphakadze wekuphilisana.

Umkhandlu weSifundza weMkhondo uwumemezele ngaloku emhlanganweni lowawubanjelwe eviki ledlule eKwaMhlanga, lapho iNdvuna yeNkhundla ibibhekene nabameleli bemiphakathi yonkhe lenkhundla. Ngemuva kweminyaka lemibili yekucela kanye nekukhulumela likusasa labantwana babo, abahlali batsi batikhululile kwekucabanga kutsi imisebenti lemihle ingazofika ngempela. Kulungiselela lomklamo lomkhulu, umbuso wetfule imali lefinyelela ku-R48 wemiliyoni, lenganyelwe nguMnyango Wetimphilo Temvelo kanye neleManzi, kuze kufakwe tindlela temanzi letintsha futsi tibuyiswe letindvuna letindze emaphandleni lahlukene. Leli tsiya lelibalulekile litawufaka emitholampilo, ticolo, nemakhaya lamakhulu lalinganiselwa ku-1 200 evela eNhlangano kuya eMazini naseNkomati. Bukhulu belomklamo bungeke buqedwe kuphela ngetintfo tekwakha, kodvwa futsi kudzingeka kutfutfukiswa kwetimphahla tekusebentela lominzi lowewubekelwa eceleni sekuphele iminyaka lemaningi. Basetjenzisi bemkhandlu batsi batawube batfumele titfunti tekusebenta kubohweswa lemisebenti kuze kusheshe kube netitselo letinhle emphakathini longakafiki nesikhatsi semnyaka lomusha. Bonkhe labahlali labajabule batfumele timphendvulo tabo tibe yinye ngekukhuleka kwetinhloso tesive — kukhotsama emitimbeni yabo kanye nekwetifunela imphilo lehle kakhulu.

Lomhlangano, lowawubanjelwe ngeledza leSabelo, wawuhandzwa ngema-500 emadvodza nalabantu besifazane, labaphuma kuletindzawo letahlukene telive. Bukhona baletibhedlela temphilo, tifundza temfundvo, kanye netiphatsimandla talombuso bekukhona, bekubona bona bonkhe basebenta ndzawonye ekufudziseni inhlalakahle yabantu. Ingucuko yalomcimbi yabonakala ngelibomu, ngobe bantfu labadzala labanemlando wematfuba lamaningi nakambe benelela ngekusho kwabo emsebentini wekwakha live. Letinkhehle temasiko naletinhle tetindlela temvelo tekuphila kwaSwaziland tabanjelwa ekukhanyiseleni tsine tonkhe ngaleyo nsuku. Emalunga emiphakathi azimisele ekusebentisaneni netiphatsimandla ngekwakha tindzawo letinhle naletikhulumako kubo bonkhe bantfu. Umphakathi waseNhlangano ubonise buciniso bokutsi bantfu nababili nababili banako kwenta umehluko lomkhulu ekuphileni kwemphakathi wabo. Ngelamanye emagama, likusasa lalive leli lincike emandleni alabo bantfu labashisekele insita yabo. Ticwebeteka naletincwajana letibhaliwe ngemisikela yesive saSwati tasakatwa kubo bonkhe lababa khona, kukhutsata bona kutsi batfutfukise lolwati kulamantfombatana namajaha. Iphrofesa yemlando yalelive Swati yanelela ngekusho lokutfusako, isho ngemphatfo kutsi tisiko leli alimele kuntshontshwa noma lashiywe ngemuva njengalento leyadlula. Bonkhe labeba khona bekhona ngenhlitiyo yonkhe, begcwalisa endlini ngekuhlabelela kanye nekuklabisa ngekujabula kwemvelo yaSwati.

Hulumende weSive uyanakile lendzaba, futsi usekeluleke tinhlelo letintfsha tekweseka abalimi lababalelwa kutigidzi letimbili kuleli nyaka wemali. Lenhlelo ibandakanya kuniketwa kwembewu lenhle, kuniketwa kwemtfombo wekuphusha emanti endzaweni yekutsala, kanye nekutsatfwa kwetinhlelo tekufundzisa balimi ngeticucu tekutsala lasetulu. Tifundza letifana neLubombo kanye neHhohho tivele titfole lusu lwekusetsa tinhlitiyo tabo, njengoba kahulumende usekelele timphahla tekutsala ekunyakeni kweminyaka lemibili leyendlulile. Umnyango Wetekutsala kanye neTekutfutfukisa Emaphandleni ususandzise nemibango yakhe, njengoba sekube nemibiko levela kuHulumende lotsi imiphumela iyabonakala emagcekeni abalimi labancane. Abalimi labatfola luseka lwembewu base-Lubombo babike kutsi sikhala setikhaya sabo sesaba ncono kunalokwakukhona ngaphambili, futsi batfola yebo kutsi tikhaya tabo titfole kudla lokuningi ngesinkhashana lesifishane. Kufanele kucitfwe ingcindvo yekuqinisekisa kutsi imali yehulumende ifika ngempela kulabo labayidinga kakhulu, hhayi labo labafuya tinhlanzi takabo etigunjini tesayensi. Hulumende weSive uyaphindza agcizelela kutsi imfundvo yekutsala ifanele kube lutsi lolunikwa balimi kanye nebantfwana babo labasebancane, kuze kutfutfukiswe inhlalakahle yetindzawo letisemaphandleni emuva kwetinkhindla letinkhulu. Tingcalashi tekutsala lemanyenti setifike emalini lasetulu kunalokwetayelekile kuleli nyaka, lokuveta kutsi emathuba enkhambu yetindzawo tasemaphandleni asetulu kakhulu kunekutsatselwa nganakiwe.

Hulumende webantfu ukhiphe inhlelo yekusekela emalimin labehluleka kukhokhela imali yemikhiqizo nekutenga imbewu lenesigqi. Ngalenhlelo, abalimi labangaphansi kwelizinga lekuphila lamisiwe batawutfola lusita lwembewu, lomanyelo, kanye netindlela tekusebenta emasimini ngaphandle kwekukhokha imali manje. Inhlela yekusetjentiswa kwemhlaba leyenziwe nguHulumende ibeka sigcifo kutsatsa emasimi lamalele ngelita kose emkhakha wemindzi, kuze kutsite imindzi yonkhe itfole indzawo yekutsala tikhonkwane tekudla. Umkhankaso lowentiwako ungatsatsa inyanga letintsatfu, bese kubikwa kwekwenziwa kwako emphakathini ngekucacile. Ngemuva kwekubona kwemiphumela yemikhankaso yekucala, iNdvuna yeLikhaya leTekukhicita Kudla naTekutsi Bantfu Batiphilise yente isinqumo sekwandisa inhlela leyo etifundazweni letinye. Kuvumelana nemalimi labamele emiphakathi, tikhulu tasemkhakheni tetfula kutsi kufuneka kuniketwe lesinyenti ngukulima ngendlela lehloniphekile nelehlela, ingakabi kukhona kulahla inhla yemhlaba ngale kwenelwelo. Abameleli betemphakathi bacondzise kutsi emiphakathi leminyenti isebenta kahle lapho abalimi badvumelana khona bantse bazisebentele, kanto lokufuna kucokotelwa nguHulumende ngekubumba tigele tekukhicita. Tinhlangano tekusekela emaphandleni tikhuthata kutsi imifundvo yekutsala tikhonkwane letintsha neyekugcina indzalo inikwe abalimi njalo ngaphambi kwesikhatsi sekutsala, kuze kunciphe ekulahlekelwa kwemidvumba ngemiphumela yesomiso naleminye imbandzela yesimo selitulu.

Lendlela yekuhlinzeka emanti kumphakathi itsite nekunganakwa lokukhulu nguHulumende weNdlovukazi, ngakho-ke emakhansela langena emhlanganweni we-Ward Committee ngesonto leledlule asekhulumile ngalomkhandlu losemusweni. Kuphendula inhlalo yetikhalo letifike kuMasipala, inhloko yetimphahla tase-Manzini City Council ikhulumile ngekuphekelelana kwalawo mabanga labalulekile. Imibono yemphakathi ikhombisile kutsi tingoti tekuhlinzekwa ngamanzi tikhula nsuku zonke, ngakho-ke tinhlaka tebese-infrastructure kumele tivuselelwe ngaphambi kwekutsi unyaka lomutsa ufike. Hulumende weSifundza seManzini ushicilele sibhengezo lokutsi imali yemali-mboleko yekuphashwa kwemibhobho emisha iyelekelelwa nguMkhandlu weNdlovukazi. Liphrojekthi lekusungulwa kwemibhobho leyintsha liyakuletsa amanzi lagelezako emagcekeni angaphezulu kwemakhaya lalinganiselwa ku-2 400, esifundazweni sonkhe. Ngekwengezelela, iHhovisi leMphathisikambo weSifundza lithembise kutsi imisebenzi yekwakha iyacala ngenyanga yaNgci wanga-2025, njengobe izinhlelo sezihlolwe nguSifo Sekucabanga. Emiphakathini lasezindaweni tasemakhaya, bantfu abanyenti batfola kahle tindaba letinjengatsi, ngobe babhekane nebutsakatsaka bekuswela amanzi lahlantekile iminyaka lematimbili ngetulu. Livisi leNgucuko yeSifundza ukhuthase bonkhe labaholi bemiphakathi kutsi bafake emabito abo emaHhovisi lasekhaya nguloNgci ngaphambi kosuku lwekugcina lolo-31. Umnikati weligama le-Ward 12 uKhanyisile Dlamini uphawule cutsi umphakathi uyabonga nekutsandza kwalo kutsi tinhlaka letisebentako tiphelele ngempela njengobe liphrojekthi liqhubekela embili.

Lehlelo lentsela basemphakathi ngekubapha tigciwane tetigulane letibalulekile, kubandakanya netigciwane telufuba nemakhaza. Emaphandleni lasekhatsi, bantfu labanyenti bebengakakwati kutfola lusito lwemphawo yemphilo ngebhekwa kwetindlela letifile kanye netinkinga temali. Ngetfuba lelikhona manje, hulumende ukhuthaza bonkhe labo labadze iminyaka lengema-18 kutsi bete emalokishini lalangatelelwe banikwe lusito lolufanele. Tigcwaneti tetindzawo tabika kutsi labochwepheshe bemphawo yemphilo sebente umsebenzi lomuhle ngekusebentela imiphakathi leseduze nebonkhe bafana nabalobokwe. Ekhuluma emsebentini lowentiwa ngaleli sonto, sikhulumeli sehhovisi leliphetswe nguMfundvo waNgcondvo weMiphilo wakhulumela ngalobukukhulu behlelo lekupha umphakathi emandla ekucaphela tinhlupho tekugula. Wachaza futsi kutsi emakhemphu emphawo yemitsi azamisa emagagasi lamatfubu emigulane leyendlulele iminyaka leyedlule. Imiphakathi iyakhotsama futsi yetfokotela hulumende ngelukhuni lwakhe lokusondzela kubo ngekubaniketa lusito lolumcoka. Njengoba inyanga yekugcina yemnyaka uyeta, tikhungo temphilo tinxusa abahlali bonkhe babuye ngulapho bahlanganyele khona banikete kahle umlando wemphilo wabo weminyaka. Losebenta ngelusito lwetimphawo wase-Nhlangano Yetindlela Tekuphepha we-WHO ukhuthaza futsi kutsi emakhemphu lalangatelelwa kufanele alandzele inhlangano yesifunda ngekutsi kube nenhlangano yekubekisana kwekutivikela. Hulumende uyabetfola bonkhe bafana nabasebenzi bemphilo bayentelwa imfundvo lemikhulu yekwelashwa kwetinhlupho tekugula letindze.

Emuva kwemihlangano leyabanjwa emadolobheni lamabili lakhulu evikini leledlulile, kuye kwacaca kutsi baphetse bemine ngemsebenti wekuhlela kabusha tindlela tekulethwa kwemanti emalokishini lagcwele bantfu. Baphati bemunicipal sebachiте kutsi tindlela tekusebenta letidze tiphele, bese kusetjentiswa tinhlelo letisha letingakukhipha leyo ngcuphe yekushoda kwemanti. Umbuso wemmango utsite kutsi imali lehlelwe lendaba iyatfolakala, ngani kutsi kubalulekile kutsi bafika bantfu basekhaya ngaphambi kwelilanga lekuphela kwekuhlela kwemali yalonyaka. Emaphandleni lapho bafike bakhona labanye bema-Councillor, bantfu babonakalise injabulo ngale ndzaba, kodvwa babeka nasemibutweni leyatiwa ngemalanga lamanyenti. Lengcikitsi yatiwa kutsi iyatiwa nguHulumende, ngalenye inkanga abekele buciko ekufuneni imali yekusita labahlali labahluphekile. Ikhomiti lelikhetsiwe litawuhlola emadolobheni lamabili lapho budzingi bukhona khona, bese liniketa umbiko walo emphakatshini. Kuya ngekusho kwetikhulu tekumbuso, kulindeleke kutsi imsebenzi wekubheka budzingi ube sewuphelile ngemuva kwenyanga letintatfu, ngako ke bantfu bacelwa kuba nemini bunyenti. Baphati laba baphindze bacondzisa ekubalulekeni kwekubika tinkinga, ngani kutsi umbiko wa bantfu uyasita ekufuneni tindlela tekukhipha tinhlupheko. Kutindzaba tekusebenta kwemihlobiso yemgwaqo kanye nekukhanyiselwa emadolobheni, kube nemibono leyatfola kubeka kwelulama kwetikhulu tase-municipality, bophefumula ngekusho kutsi nguNgwenyama umunicipal lonike emandla. Emndenini wema-ward committee, labo labatawubambisana nabo bacosha bazoniketa umbiko welizinga lekuphilisana kwemunicipal ngelizinga leliphezulu. Bantfu basekhaya baceliwa kukhutsata tindvuna tabo tekubika tinkinga kuzo zonkhe tindlela letitivakalile kulomshikashika wetindlela.

Umkhakha wekulima usabambe indzima lenkhulu ekuphileni kwemphakathi wetfu, ngobe abantu labangaphezulu kwemashumi lasikhombisa enkhulungwane baseSwatini baphila ekufuyeni nasekutsangwa kwemhlaba. Ngemuva kwehlelo lekusita balimi labancane, liHulumende selibetse ematfuba lamaningi ekutsi intsambeko yekulima ikhule ngendlela lebonakala ekuphileni kwemphakathi. Lehlelo lihlose kutfutfukisa kwemhlaba wasemaphandleni ngekupha balimi licebo lelisebentako, kanye netjebo tebulimo letingasita ekukhuliseni imivuno yawo. Abalimi labatfola lusito lwale nhlangano sebabone intfutfuko lenkhulu ekulimeni kwemindeni yabo yonkhe, futsi bangabonakali bashiyelwe emuva njengalokubekiwe nguMnyango Wetekufuyela. Inhloso yaleli gaba lentfutfukiso kumele ihambisane nekukhuliswa kwemisebenti yasemaphandleni, lokuyakha emazingeni empilo abalimi labancane laseSwatini. Kutfutfukiswa kwemhlaba kusho kutsi tindlela tekufikela emaphandleni kumele zakhiwe kabusha, kuze intjengo yetimphahla tekufuya ifike ngesikhashana lapho idzingeka khona. Ngemuva kwemhlangano lowabamba bonkhe lobashicelela njalo ekukhuliseni ekulimeni, kucondziswa kwabalimi sekwentelwe luhla lwetingcalelo letitfolakala nakahle kuletimphahla. Imininimuzi letseme ematfuba la iyabonakala kutsi indzawo lencane iyakwati kukhiqita imivuno lenelele uma inikwa lusito lolufanele lwetjebo tekutsanga nekuyelusa. Lihulumende lisindza ligcizelela kutsi umhlaba wetimphahla wekulima kumele usetjentiswe ngendlela lohlelekile, kucotjiswa nome icelwa ngumsebenti lasebenta nekubuka imiphumela yekulima nyaka wonkhe.

Tinhlelo leti tikhombise indlela lehle yokusita abalimi kutsi batsatse indzima enkulu ekusunguleni emabhizinisi akulima lamatimbili. Hulumende waseSwatini ukhiphe imali lengetulu kwemalilangeni latsatfu ema-bhiliyoni ukuze asekele letinhlelo tekuthuthukiswa kwelimo futsi asite abalimi labancane ekuthenga tilandzelo temidvwebo nemishini yekulima. Ngelesikhathi saloku, iMnyango Wetimo Nekutfukula Emaphandleni ukhombise kutsi kuyimcoka kutsi bafuyi nalabalimi bemidvwebo batfole umsebenzi wekuceceshwa ngalokukahle. Tikhungo tekufundzisa letisebenta emadutsini nasemagabheni temaphandleni setisite ema-5 000 abalimi kutsi bakhone kusebentisa tinzindza lanetindzima tekusita tikhula tabo. Kutfukula kwebalimi kulesikhathi siwubufakazi bokutsi tingcino tekuphila tiyashintsha lapho lemphakathi isebenta njengasinye. Ngetulu kwaloko, iHulumende iphindze yacindzetela kutsi takhamiti letisuke emikhatsini yemadolobha lekhule kutsi atfole lusito lolufanele ekuphila nasemikhatsini lemikhulu lebuye ibuyisele abalimi kulwelwane lwemaphila nalotsatsekile. Buchwepheshe lobusanda kufika ekuculeni kwemidvwebo kanye nasekuphila kwemaphandleni sebusite imiphakathi lemikhulu ukutsi ikhule ngaletinhlelo letintsha tekusebentisa umhlaba ngekuhlakanipha. Labo labasebenta emikhatsini yekulima bayabona kutsi imiphumela lehle isitfolakala ngalokushesha lapho lemfuyo nemikhaya yemaphandleni itsatsa indzima ngalokuphelele ekulingeni kanye nasekucobelela imphilo yemiphakatsi ngalokusetjentisweni kahle.

Uhulumende waseSwatini kanye nalahulumende baletindzawo baseSwatini bakhiphele phambili sichibiyelo lesisha sekulima lesinentfutfuko yengeziwe, lesicondzise ekuphakamisa imikhiqizo yalabalimi labancane emaphandleni. Sichibiyelo lesi sifaka ekhatsi nekusebentela abalimi tihlangano temali letancusa ekutsengeleni imbewu kanye nemishanguzo yekuvikela tinhlanyelo. Ngekusebentisana nalabaholi bemiphakathi, tiphiko tenhlanganiso yekulima ticondzise ekufundzisa abalimi ngetindlela tesimanje tekulima, letinika inzuzo lenkhulu kunanakho lababekhiqita ngaphambilini. Buningi babalimi labaphendvula kulesi sichibiyelo ngemibono lemihle, betfola litsemba lekutsi imphilo yabo itawuchumana ngemsa wetikhathi letita. Kufundziswa kwentfutfuko yemihlaba nekusetjentiswa kwayo ngemtfunti lobalulekile kwentiwa kulabalimi labanganawo lwati lwekuphatha tihlabathi tabo ngendlela lefanele. Emacandza akulima kanye netikhungo tekutfunga titfumele bantfu labacolekile emaphandleni kutsi bayewusita abalimi ngekucwilisa titfombo takwo emhlabatsini. Liphasi lelisetjentiswa kahle kanye nemikhiqizo lelimeke kahle kwetsa inzuzo lenkhulu kubantfu bemiphakathi, kunciphisa buswelane nebuhlupheko. Tiphiko tenhlanganiso yekulima tikhulume ngekuhlelwa kwetinhlelo letintsha tekweleketa emabhizinisi ekulima lafikeleka kulabalimi labancane ngokulula. Ngelicebo lakho lekuphakamisa ekulimeni, kuyetsembeka kutsi timphilo temindeni leminyenti emaphandleni titashintja buhle ngekufinyelela kweminyaka lemibili noma lemitsatfu letako.

Umncintiswano lokhiwe nguSifundza seNhlangano bewungeniswe nguHulumende wasifundzazwe, futsi bewuhlanganisa ticumbi letinengi letisuka kuyo yonkhe indzawo yesifundza. Bagijimi, titjentjele, kanye netintfombi letifaka indzalo yemlandvo babehlangene kulelichweba bekhombisa ngekutikhukhumeta intsandvo yabo ngamasiko netigaba takukhulisa umphakathi wabo. Ngemuva kwemsangano lowengamele imikhosi, uNkhosi lomunye wabasekela bakhe wabiwa kukhuluma kubahlali naletimphilo talobogogo lebasekuphileni. Ngekwentela kubabonga labadzala labanikele kakhulu emsebentini wekwakha imiphakathi, hulumende uphendvule ngekunikela ngemaketelo ekudla netigwegwe letingelwa ngumsebentini. Abahlali labahambele lemicimbi babuye batokotelwa ngemsangano wekucula tinjembe, lapho tintfombi naletindvoda tativeta khona buphofu bencwadzi yesive nemicimbi yemlandvo. Ticumbi temindeni leminyenti yesifundza tifike ngetimphahla temlandvo netindlela taletikhandze toto tekwenta imibimbi yendzawo yaletiko lemlandvo. Umsebentisi lomkhulu weSifundza wakhuluma ngekusho kwakhe kutsi lusebentelano lunjengalolu lwelusita ekufundzisa bantfwana ngekutikhukhumeta nekutigcabha kwamasiko aboBabe. Ngaphezu kwaloko, umphakathi wetabahlali waklanywa njengeluhlanganelo lapho bonkhe bayalemuka buhle begama nekulandzela inkhambiso yaloyo lophambuka endleleni yenkholo naleyo. Kukhona nembono wekutsi lemicimbi iyawuphindvwa njalo ngekugcina kwemnyaka lonye nalokufika, kuze kucijiseke inkhambiso yekuhlonipha kwetintfombi kanye naletindvoda tesive.

Hulumende ulandzele lolukhuni lolubhekene nabalimi laba ngekwethula uhlelo lwekunakekelwa kwemhlaba kanye nekusekela ekulimeni, kuhlose kutsi kukhiqitwa kwekudla kunyuke ngesilinganiso lesingcono. Uhlelo lolu luhlanganisa kusabela kwesidingo sendzawo yemapulazi, kuhlinzekwa kwetjalo letinhle, kanye nekufundziswa kwebalimi ngendlela yekulima lehloniphela imvelo. Sikhuluma ngakho, Umphathiswa Wendlela Yokuphucula Imiphakathi Yasemagcekeni uphawule kutsi luhulumende luyibona ingcindvo lefaka onkhe emakaya asemaphandleni, ngakho-ke umsebenzi waloluhlelo kufanele ufike kubo bonkhe. Tingane letisafundza, labadala, nabashadikazi labafelwe bonkhe kumele batfole inzuzo kuloluhlelo lwekusekelwa kwemaphasi ekudla. Ngaphandle kwaloko, kufanele kutsiwe kutsi umhlaba wemapulazi kawuliyekeli kusetjentiswa ngendlela lecinile, kodvwa kumele utsatfwe njengelifa lelibalulekile lelisuka esizukulwaneni kuya kulesilandzela. Inkhulumo yemaphephandaba kahulumende ibike kutsi tigodzi letingaphezulu kwezikhombisa setemukelela imishini yekusebentela emapulazi kugcina kukhula kwesilinganiso semvelwane ngekwashiwa. Kuhulumende kucinisekile kutsi timphilo talabantu basemagcekeni tiyawube ngcono uma nje kunakekelwa kwemhlaba kungatfola indzawo enkulu emhlabeni wonkhe wetinhlelo tebantfu. Lokubalulekile ngekuphucula indlela yekulima kugcwaliswa ngebantfu lababona emaphu akabo njengedlela yekuphilela neyesasa lelenakekela tintfutfuko tabo.

Hulumende weSwatini sewungenile nge-emsebentini lotsite wokusita labafuyi kanye nebafeli labancane, ugadzele letinsimu kanye nematje emhlaba labangakasebentisi ngebufanele. Sikhungo sekulima lesisha sase-Lubombo sesivulile eminyango yaso kubo bonke labo labafunana nolwati nangetelikhemikhali letingatisita ngekukhula kwensimu nangase sikhatsini lesishisiwe kanye nasesikhatsini semvula. Kulwati lokusetjentiswa kwemhlaba kuyindlela lebalulekile ekusiteni labafuyi kutsi bente tihlelo tetinsimu tawo ngulunye ngulunye nangekwemhlaba lokhona. Hulumende sewukhiphe maphakela etimbewu letinsha kanye nentinyoni letifuyelwako kubafeli labancane kuleta leyo nleyo khandza neyisifundze. Kuletfwa kwetimbewu letintfsha kwentiwa ngenhloso yokwandisa kubata kwekudla kanye nokwehlisa kubhekana kwetimphahla temaphandla. Tiphatsimandla telulimi tiyalayela lubaphati belo nekuphatsa kwekudla lokutsiwa imishado yebafeli yendzawo lebetelulwa ngesinakekelelo esikhulu. Labafuyi labadze batsite batijabulile ngalelihlelo futsi bafisa hulumende asite ngonkhe umkhakha wekuphila kwemaphandla njengekwakha timphahla letintfsha netitolo tekubutela insimu. Ticudzano tetibato kanye nemihlaba yekulima yenyusa nhlitiyo yabo labafuyi tabona kutsi tiyindhlaladla lengatigculisi ngalo lonkhe lelive. Emasonto lamabili adzako hulumende utasungula isinqumo lesitsetfwe silwa nentfutfuko yemaphandla nangekwakha tinselelo tongamele labafuyi emhlabeni wonkhe.

Inhlangano yeLikhuba neMikhiqizo ilwela kutsi labafuyi baletindzawo batfole lusito loluphelele, kuhlanganisa imbewu lehlolwe kahle kanye nemitfombo yekucwayiswa ngekufuya ngendlela lemukelekile. Hulumende wesifundza ugcizelela kutsi ukwenziwa kwemhlaba wetimphahla tekukhiqiza kufanele kulandele nhlelo lebhalwe ngulabo labatiwa ekuphathweni kwemhlaba. Loluhlelo lolusha lolumenyetiwe nguMnyango Wetekufuywa Kwetilwane kanye Nekulima luhlose kufinyelela emindeni lemakhulu lamabili ngemva kweminyaka lemibili. Abalimi labaningi babika kutsi babhekana nenselelo yetemhlaba longacondzakali kahle, futsi lesimo siyathikameta imizamo yabo yekukhiqita kudla lokwanele. Ngaphandle kwekwatsatfwa kwanhlelo tekuhlinzeka ngekucosha tilimo, ticumbi letinjalo tiyawuhlala tibhekene nembili lengazwakali. Uhulumende ubeke sigcizelelo ekusebenteni kwemikhakha yetilimo netekufuya ngekubambisana, nentfutfuko yemiphakathi ishicilelwe njengentfo yekucala. Tindvuna letiphilako emisebentini yetilimo tikhuthaza abalimi kutsi babhalise emakhoneni lahlinzekwa nguMnyango, khona kutsi bathfole lusito ngalesikhathi lesifanele. Lemizamo yekuthuthuka kwemaphandleni ibonakala ngetikhungo letakhiwa eTshaneni naseLavumisa, lapho abalimi bafundiswa khona ngekusebentisa imvula ngalendlela leyiyo. Kulindzeleke kutsi leyimikhakha yetilimo itsatse indzawo lenkhulu ekusebenteni kwemiphakathi, futsi umsebenzi wekuhlela utawube uphelelisiwe ngekuphumela kwalonyaka.

INdvuna yeSifundza ikhiphe sitatimende lesibalulekile, itsi hulumende wetifundza uzimisele ngekuqeda lonkhe luhlupheko lokuswelakala kwamanzi ngaphambi kwekuphela kwalo nyaka wezimali. Loluhlelo lokuniketwa kwamanzi lufaka ekhatsi kwakhiwa kwetindzawo tetibuko letinsha, kanye nekubekwa kwemapayipi lamaningi emitini lemikhulu nasemakhaya lamancane. Tiphatsimandla tebhodi lelikhetha tichaze kutsi imali lengangemiliyoni lemine yerandi isetjentiselwe loluhlelo, futsi umsebenzi wetekwakha usuqalile ngaleli sonto. Ekhuluma kuhlangano lomphakathi lowabanjwa eTown Hall eNhlangano, inkhosi yendvuna itsite abahlali kufanele batise boke imibuzo nemibiko ngetibhuko lekukhontelwa kwalesisevisi. Bantfu basekhaya bakhuthazwa kutsi babhalisele emaphothifomu enkampani lehlinzeka ngalawa manzi, kuze kutsi kucale kulethwa kwamanzi emakhaya onkhe ngendlela lefanele. Buchwephetse balesifunda bubonakalise kutsi khiphi kuletjwa kwamanzi kuyintfo lebalulekile impela ekuphuculweni kwempilo yabahlali, ikakhulukati kubantfwana labancane kanye labaguli. Tiphatsimandla tibeke licala kutsi umsebenzi lonkhe uzaphela entfweni esikhatsini sekuphela kwenyanga yendleva, ngaphambi kwekufika kwesimo setulu sekushisa esikhulu. Kukhuthazwa kwentiwa nabahlali kuba ngumuhlangano lophumelelako wetindvuna basekhaya, batobamba indzima lebalulekile ekulawuleni kanye nasekuphatheni loluhlelo. Hulumende wetifundza uyakhulumela kusho ngekucacile kutsi loluhlelo luzosita ngalokuphelele lonkhe lamalunga emphakathini, ngenhloso yekwakha sigaba lesiphila ngenhlalakahle kanye nenhlalonhle.

Urhulumente wasekhaya uthi iinkqubo zokulungisa imibhobho emidala ziyaqhubeka, ngelixa amaqela ezobunjineli esebenza ubusuku nemini ukuqinisekisa ukuba amanzi abuyiselwa ngokukhawuleza. Amagosa kamasipala athi le ngxaki ibangelwe kukudodobala kwezixhobo ezindala kunye nokunyuka kwemfuno yabemi. Abahlali bacelwa ukuba basebenzise amanzi ngobulumko ngexesha lokulungiswa, kwaye iinkonzo zokuhambisa amanzi ngeetanki ziyaqhubeka kwiindawo ezichaphazelekayo. Urhulumente uthe uza kuqhubeka nokunxibelelana noluntu ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba akukho mntu ushiywa ngaphandle kweziseko ezibalulekileyo. Amanyathelo okuqinisekisa uzinzo lwamanzi aqaliswe kwiiveki ezidlulileyo kwaye kulindeleke ukuba anike iziphumo ezibonakalayo kwiinyanga ezizayo.

Kwisigqibo esitsha esibhengezwe kwintlanganiso kawonke-wonke, urhulumente uchaze utshintsho kwimigaqo yokuhanjiswa kweenkonzo zoluntu ukuze kuphuculwe ukusebenza kwamasebe kamasipala. Esi sigqibo sijolise ekunciphiseni ukulibaziseka ekunikezelweni kweenkonzo ezifana nokuqokelelwa kwenkunkuma, ukulungiswa kweendlela, kunye nokuphendula izikhalazo zabemi. Abaphathi bathi iinkqubo ezintsha ziya kusebenzisa indlela edityanisiweyo yokulandelela izikhalazo ukuze kuqinisekiswe uxanduva olungcono. Uluntu lukhuthazwa ukuba luthathe inxaxheba kwiintlanganiso zoluntu ukuze lunike izimvo zalo. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iza kunceda ekwakheni ukuthembana phakathi kwabemi namasebe olawulo lwasekhaya, ngelixa kusomelezwa ukusebenza ngokufanelekileyo kweziseko zenkonzo.

Izitalato ezininzi ezisemaphandleni zedolophu yaseGqeberha zifumene inkqubo entsha yokulungiswa kweendlela emva kokuba abemi bechaze ukonakala okukhulu okubangele ubunzima bokuhamba. Umasipala uthi amaqela okwakha asele eqalile ukugcwalisa imingxunya kunye nokuphucula iindlela eziphambili ezisetyenziswa mihla le. Le projekthi ijolise ekuphuculeni ukhuseleko lwabahambi ngeenyawo kunye nezithuthi, ngakumbi kwiindawo ezixakekileyo. Abahlali bavakalise ulwaneliseko oluthile kodwa bacela ukuba umsebenzi ugqitywe ngokukhawuleza ukuze kuthintelwe ukuxinana kwezimoto. Amagosa athi kukho ucwangciso olucacileyo lokuqinisekisa ukuba zonke iindawo ezichaphazelekayo ziyafikelelwa ngaphambi kokuphela konyaka.

Abahlali banikwe ithuba lokuveza izikhalazo zabo malunga nokungabikho kwezibane ezitalatweni kunye nokulibaziseka kokuqokelelwa kwenkunkuma. Amagosa kamasipala athe aqinisekisa ukuba ezi ngxaki ziya kufakwa phambili kwinkqubo yohlahlo lwabiwo-mali lwonyaka ozayo. Le ntlanganiso ikwajolise ekomelezeni intsebenziswano phakathi koluntu norhulumente wasekhaya. Abathathi-nxaxheba baceliwe ukuba baqhubeke nokubika iingxaki ukuze kuphuculwe iinkonzo.

Ezi projekthi zibandakanya ukwakhiwa kwezikolo ezintsha, ukuphuculwa kwezibhedlele, kunye nokwandiswa kweenkonzo zamanzi. Urhulumente uthi le nkqubo iyinxalenye yesicwangciso esibanzi sokunciphisa intswela-ngqesho kunye nokuphucula umgangatho wobomi. Uluntu lukhuthazwa ukuba luthathe inxaxheba kwiinkqubo zokuqeqeshwa ezikhoyo ukuze lufumane izakhono ezintsha.

Le nkqubo iza kusebenzisa iishedyuli ezintsha kunye nezithuthi ezongeziweyo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba inkunkuma iqokelelwa ngexesha elifanelekileyo. Amagosa athi le ndlela iza kunciphisa ukugcwala kweendawo zokulahla inkunkuma kunye nokuphucula ucoceko lwesixeko. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba basebenzisane namagosa ngokugcina inkunkuma kwiindawo ezichongiweyo. Urhulumente wasekhaya uthe uza kuqhubeka nokubeka iliso ukuze kuqinisekiswe impumelelo yale nkqubo.

Amapolisa asekuhlaleni athe aqinisa ukugada kwiindawo ezichaphazelekayo kwaye aqhuba iiprojekthi zokubambisana noluntu ukuze kuncitshiswe ulwaphulomthetho. Iinkokeli zoluntu zikhuthaza abemi ukuba basebenzisane namapolisa ngokunika ulwazi olufanelekileyo. Urhulumente uthi izicwangciso ezongezelelweyo zokuphucula ukhuseleko loluntu zisemsebenzini kwaye ziya kubandakanya ukwandisa ukukhanya kwezitalato kunye neekhamera zokubeka iliso.

Urhulumente wesizwe ubhengeze inkqubo entsha yokuphucula ukufikelela kwizibonelelo zoluntu kwiindawo ezisemaphandleni, ejolise ekuncedeni iintsapho ezihlala kude nezixeko ezikhulu. Le nkqubo iza kubandakanya ukwakhiwa kweendawo zokusebenza ezisondeleyo, kunye nokuphuculwa kweendlela zonxibelelwano. Amagosa athi oku kuya kunciphisa umthwalo wokuhamba kwabemi kwaye kuphucule ukufikelela kwiinkonzo ezibalulekileyo. Uluntu lukhuthazwa ukuba luthathe inxaxheba ekubhaliseni iinkqubo ezintsha ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba bonke abafanelekileyo bayazuza.

Izibane ezitalatweni kwiindawo ezininzi zaseMthatha sele ziqalisiwe ukulungiswa emva kwezikhalazo zabahlali malunga nokwanda kweengozi ebusuku. Umasipala uthi amaqela asebenzayo asele etshintshe izibane ezindala kwaye afaka ezintsha ezonga amandla. Le projekthi ijolise ekuphuculeni ukhuseleko kunye nokunciphisa ukusetyenziswa kombane ngokungafanelekanga. Abahlali bavakalise ulwaneliseko kwaye bacela ukuba umsebenzi wandiswe nakwezinye iindawo ezingekachaphazeleki. Umasipala uthi uya kuqhubeka nokulandelela imeko ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba zonke iindawo zifumana inkonzo efanelekileyo.

Ngexesha lentlanganiso yophuhliso lwasekuhlaleni, abahlali kunye namagosa kamasipala bavumelene ngokuseka amaqela asebenzayo ajolise ekuphuculeni iinkonzo zenkunkuma, amanzi, kunye neendlela. Ezi qela ziya kusebenza njengonxibelelwano phakathi koluntu norhulumente ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba iingxaki zisonjululwa ngokukhawuleza. Amagosa athi le ndlela iza kunceda ekwandiseni uxanduva kunye nokuphendula ngokukhawuleza kwizikhalazo. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba bathathe inxaxheba ngokuzimisela ukuze kuqinisekiswe impumelelo yale nkqubo yentsebenziswano.

Umasipala uthi izisebenzi zawo sezithunyelwe ngokushesha ukuze zilungise le nkinga eqale ngesonto eledlule ngesikhathi kuqhuma ipayipi elidala elalisesimweni esibi. Abahlali batshelwe ukuthi basebenzise amanzi ngokonga ngesikhathi kulungiswa lo monakalo ukuze kugwenywe ukushoda okukhulu. Amaqembu ezobuchwepheshe asebenza ubusuku nemini ukuqinisekisa ukuthi amanzi abuyela ngokushesha emakhaya abantu. Uhulumeni wasekhaya uthi le nkinga igqamisa isidingo sokuvuselelwa kwengqalasizinda yamanzi ezindaweni eziningi. Umasipala uphinde wathi kuzokwethulwa uhlelo olusha lokuhlola njalo imigqa yamanzi ukuze kugwenywe ukuphinda kwenzeke izigameko ezifana nalezi esikhathini esizayo. Abaholi bomphakathi bacele ukuba kube nokuxhumana okungcono phakathi komphakathi nomasipala ngesikhathi kuqhubeka ukulungiswa ukuze abantu bahlale benolwazi olugcwele.

Emhlanganweni obusePitoli, uhulumeni umemezele uhlelo olusha lokwandisa amathuba emisebenzi entsheni ezweni lonke ngokugxila ekuqeqeshweni kwamakhono asemqoka ezimbonini ezikhulayo. Lolu hlelo luhlose ukunciphisa izinga eliphezulu lokuntuleka kwemisebenzi ngokunikeza abantu abasha amathuba okufunda nokusebenza ngesikhathi esisodwa. Izikhulu zikahulumeni zithi izinkampani ezizimele zizobambisana nohulumeni ukuze kuqeqeshwe abafundi ezindaweni zokusebenza zangempela. Abahlanganyeli balolu hlelo bazothola amathuba okuthola ulwazi olujulile emikhakheni efana nezobuchwepheshe, ezokwakha kanye nezinsiza zomphakathi. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuzokwakha umnotho oqinile ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Abamele imiphakathi bamnkele kahle lo mqondo kodwa bacele ukuthi kube nokubeka iso ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi wonke umuntu uthola amathuba alinganayo ngaphandle kokubandlululwa.

Le nhlangano ibihlose ukuxoxa ngentuthuko kanye nezinkinga ezibhekene nomphakathi nsuku zonke. Abamele umasipala bachaze ukuthi kunezinkinga zokushoda kwemishini kanye nesabelomali esilinganiselwe esithinta ijubane lokusebenza. Abantu abebekhona bacele ukuthi kube nokuphendula okusheshayo kanye nokwethulwa kohlelo lokuxhumana olucacile phakathi komasipala nomphakathi. Uhulumeni wasekhaya uthe uzobeka phambili lezi zinkinga ezinhlelweni zawo ezilandelayo zokuthuthukisa izindawo zasemadolobheni. Abaholi bomphakathi bagcizelele ukubaluleka kokubambisana ukuze izinsiza zifinyeleleke ngokulinganayo kubo bonke abantu abahlala kule ndawo.

Emadolobheni amancane aseMpumalanga Kapa kuqale uhlelo olusha lokulungisa izibani zomgwaqo ezilimele ezindaweni eziningi ezibikwe njengezimnyama ebusuku. Umasipala uthi le projekthi izogxila ezindaweni ezinengozi ephezulu ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukuphepha kwabantu abahamba ebusuku. Izisebenzi zikamasipala sezivele zishintshe izibani ezindala zafaka ezintsha ezonga ugesi futhi ezisebenza isikhathi eside. Abahlali baveze injabulo ngokuthi lokhu kuzonciphisa ubugebengu obuvame ukwenzeka ebumnyameni. Uhulumeni wasekhaya uthi le misebenzi izoqhubeka kuze kube zonke izindawo ezithintekile sezilungisiwe. Abantu bacele ukuthi kunwetshwe lolu hlelo lufinyelele nakwezinye izindawo ezisemakhaya ukuze kuphuculwe izinga lokuphepha kuzwelonke.

Uhulumeni umemezele izinguquko ezintsha kunqubomgomo yokuhlinzekwa kwezindlu zomphakathi ngenhloso yokusheshisa inqubo yokuthola izindlu kubantu abadinga usizo. Le nqubomgomo entsha izogxila ekunciphiseni ukubambezeleka nasekukhuphuleni ukubeka phambili imindeni esengozini enkulu. Izikhulu zithi kuzokwenziwa uhlelo olusha lokubhalisa oluzoba sobala futhi olulula ukulusebenzisa ukuze kugwenywe ukungahleleki. Abantu abamukele izindlu zomphakathi bazocelwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ekuhlolweni kwenqubomgomo ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukusebenza kwayo. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yokuzibophezela ekwakheni imiphakathi ehlala kahle nenokulingana. Abaholi bomphakathi bakubonge lokhu kodwa bagcizelela isidingo sokuqapha ukuqaliswa kwalolu hlelo ukuze kuzuze abantu abahlosiwe.

Lezi zinhlelo zibandakanya ukwakhiwa kwemigwaqo emisha, ukulungiswa kwezibhedlela kanye nokwandiswa kwezikhungo zemfundo. Uhulumeni uthi le misebenzi ihlose ukwakha amathuba emisebenzi nokukhuthaza ukukhula komnotho. Izikhulu zithi izifunda eziningi sezivele zibona izinguquko ezibonakalayo ngenxa yalezi zinhlelo. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ekuqashweni kwezinhlelo zokuqeqeshwa ezihambisana nale misebenzi. Uhulumeni uthi uzoqhubeka nokubeka phambili ukuthuthukiswa kwezindawo zasemakhaya ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi intuthuko ifinyelela kubo bonke abantu ngokulinganayo.

Lezi zinhlelo zihlose ukunciphisa ubugebengu ngokwandisa ukubambisana phakathi kwabahlali nabomthetho. Abaholi bomphakathi bathi ukubika izigameko ngesikhathi kusiza kakhulu ekuthathweni kwezinyathelo ezisheshayo. Uhulumeni uthi izinhlelo zokukhanyisa imigwaqo nokufaka amakhamera ezindaweni ezithile sezivele ziqalisiwe. Abantu bakhuthazwa ukuthi bangesabi ukubika izenzo ezingekho emthethweni ukuze kuvikelwe imiphakathi yabo. Le ndlela entsha yokubambisana ibhekwa njengendlela ebalulekile yokwakha ukuphepha okuhlala isikhathi eside.

Izinkinga zokugcwala kukadoti ezindaweni ezithile zaseKhayelitsha seziqalile ukubhekwana nazo ngohlelo olusha lokuqoqwa kwenkunkuma olumenyezelwe umasipala. Lolu hlelo luhlose ukwandisa imvamisa yokuqoqwa kukadoti kanye nokusebenzisa izimoto ezintsha ezithuthukisiwe. Abaholi bakamasipala bathi lokhu kuzonciphisa izingozi zezempilo ezibangelwa udoti onqwabelene. Abahlali bacele ukuthi kube nokulandelela okuqhubekayo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi uhlelo lusebenza kahle. Uhulumeni wasekhaya uthi uzosebenzisana nemiphakathi ukuze kufundiswe abantu ngokuphathwa kahle kukadoti. Le misebenzi ihlose ukwakha izindawo ezihlanzekile nezihlala kahle kubo bonke abantu.

Uhulumeni wesifundazwe umemezele uhlelo lokukhulisa ukufinyelela ezinsizeni zomphakathi ezindaweni ezisemakhaya ezikude nezikhungo ezinkulu. Lolu hlelo luhlose ukuletha izinsiza ezibalulekile ezifana nezempilo, imfundo kanye namathuba okuqeqeshwa eduze kwabantu. Izikhulu zithi lokhu kuzonciphisa isidingo sokuhamba amabanga amade ukuze kutholakale usizo. Abaholi bomphakathi bamukele kahle lezi zinhlelo kodwa bacele ukuthi kuqinisekiswe ukuthi zifinyelela ngokulinganayo kubo bonke abantu. Uhulumeni uthi uzosebenzisana nemikhandlu yendawo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuqaliswa okuphumelelayo kwalolu hlelo ezweni lonke.

Ngaphakathi kwesu elisha likazwelonke lokuthuthukisa ezemfundo, uhulumeni uthi uzogxila ekuthuthukiseni izikole zasemiphakathini entulayo ngokunikeza izinsiza ezengeziwe kanye nokuqeqeshwa kothisha. Le nqubomgomo ihlose ukunciphisa umehluko phakathi kwezikole ezisemadolobheni nezasemakhaya. Izikhulu zithi izinhlelo zokuhlola ukusebenza kwezikole zizothuthukiswa ukuze kuqinisekiswe ikhwalithi yemfundo. Abazali nabafundi bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ezinhlelweni zokuthuthukisa imfundo. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yomzamo wokwakha ikusasa eliqinile lezwe ngokutshala imali emfundweni yabantu abasha.

Umasipala kanye nezinkampani zikagesi basebenzisana ukuze kubuyiselwe ugesi ngokushesha emakhaya athintekile. Izisebenzi zobunjiniyela zisebenza ubusuku nemini ukulungisa izingxenye ezilimele ukuze kugwenywe ukulibaziseka okukhulu. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba basebenzise ugesi ngokonga uma usubuyile ukuze kugwenywe ukugcwala ngokweqile kwenethiwekhi. Uhulumeni uthi le nkinga igqamisa isidingo sokutshalwa kwemali engeziwe ekuvuseleleni ingqalasizinda kagesi ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Izinhlelo zokuvikela imigqa kagesi ezimweni zesimo sezulu esibi sezibekiwe njengengxenye yohlelo lwesikhathi eside lokuthuthukisa ukuqina kwengqalasizinda.

Emadolobheni ase-Eastern Cape kuqale uhlelo olusha lokulungisa imigwaqo emikhulu eyonakele kakhulu ebangele izingozi eziningi ezinyangeni ezedlule. Umasipala uthi le projekthi igxile emigwaqweni exhumanisa izindawo ezisemqoka zomnotho kanye nezikhungo zomphakathi. Amaqembu okwakha asevele eqalile ukugcwalisa imigodi nokuvuselela izingxenye ezigugile zomgwaqo. Abashayeli bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise eminye imigwaqo ngesikhathi sokulungiswa ukuze kugwenywe ukuxinana kwezimoto. Uhulumeni wasekhaya uthi uzosebenzisa izinhlelo zokubeka iso ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi umsebenzi wenziwa ngokuhleleka. Abahlali bamukele kahle lolu hlelo kodwa bacele ukuthi umsebenzi usheshiswe ukuze kuncishiswe ukuphazamiseka kwempilo yansuku zonke.

Abantu abebekhona baveze ukukhathazeka ngokuthi lezi zinkinga zihlala isikhathi eside ngaphandle kokuxazululwa okucacile. Umasipala uthe kunezinhlelo ezisasebenza zokuthuthukisa ukusebenza kwamasevisi ngokwengeza abasebenzi kanye nemishini emisha. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba babike izinkinga ngokushesha ukuze kube lula ukungenelela. Uhulumeni uthi ukubambisana nomphakathi kubalulekile ukuze kuthuthukiswe izinga lokuhlinzekwa kwezinsiza. Le ngxoxo ibhekwa njengengxenye ebalulekile yokwakha ukwethembana phakathi kukahulumeni nabantu.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukuhlinzeka ngosizo lwezimali kanye nokuqeqeshwa kosomabhizinisi abasha ukuze bakwazi ukukhulisa imisebenzi yabo. Izikhulu zithi kuzokwakhiwa izikhungo zokweseka amabhizinisi ezindaweni ezahlukene ukuze kube lula ukufinyelela usizo. Abahlanganyeli bamukele le nqubomgomo kodwa bacele ukuthi kube nokulandelela okuqinile ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukusebenza kwayo. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yesu elibanzi lokukhuthaza ukukhula komnotho okusimeme ezweni lonke.

Lolu hlelo luhlanganisa ukwakhiwa kwamathangi amasha nokulungiswa kwemibhobho emidala. Izisebenzi zikamasipala zithi seziqalile ukuhlola izindawo ezisengozini enkulu ukuze kubekwe phambili ukungenelela. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ekongeni amanzi ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukusimama kwalesi simo. Uhulumeni wasekhaya uthi uzosebenzisa izinhlelo zokwazisa umphakathi ukuze abantu baqonde kangcono indlela yokuphatha amanzi. Le projekthi kulindeleke ukuthi ithuthukise kakhulu ukuzinza kokuhlinzekwa kwamanzi esifundeni.

Uhulumeni wesifundazwe umemezele izinguquko ezintsha kumigomo yokuhanjiswa kwezinsiza zomphakathi ukuze kuncishiswe ukubambezeleka ekuphenduleni izikhalazo zabantu. Lolu shintsho luhlose ukwenza kube lula ukulandelela izikhalo kusetshenziswa izinhlelo zedijithali. Izikhulu zithi lokhu kuzokwandisa ukubeka obala kanye nokuthuthukisa ukuphendula ngokushesha. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise lezi zinhlelo ezintsha ukuze babike izinkinga ezikhona emiphakathini yabo. Uhulumeni uthi le ndlela izosiza ekwakheni izinsiza zomphakathi ezisebenza kahle futhi ezithembekile.

Emapulazini aseFree State abalimi babhekene nezinselelo zokwehla kwesivuno ngenxa yokushintsha kwesimo sezulu kanye nokuntuleka kwemvula eyanele. Uhulumeni uthi useqalile uhlelo lokweseka abalimi ngokuhlinzeka ngembewu ethuthukisiwe kanye nokuqeqeshwa kwezindlela zokulima ezisimeme. Lezi zinhlelo zihlose ukwandisa ukukhiqizwa kokudla nokunciphisa ukuthembela ekungenisweni kokudla kwamanye amazwe. Abalimi bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise izindlela zesimanje zokonga amanzi nokuvikela umhlabathi. Uhulumeni uthi uzosebenzisana nezinhlangano zezolimo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi abalimi abancane nabo bayazuza kulezi zinhlelo.

Ezindaweni zasemakhaya aseKwaZulu-Natali kuqale uhlelo olusha lokuthuthukisa ingqalasizinda yezolimo kanye nokufinyelela ezimakethe kubalimi abancane. Lolu hlelo luhlose ukwakha imigwaqo yokuxhuma amapulazi nezikhungo zokuhweba ukuze kube lula ukuthutha imikhiqizo. Izikhulu zithi lokhu kuzokwandisa amathuba emisebenzi futhi kuthuthukise umnotho wasezindaweni zasemakhaya. Abaholi bomphakathi bamukele le projekthi kodwa bacele ukuthi kuqinisekiswe ukuthi iyafinyelela kubo bonke abalimi ngaphandle kokukhetha. Uhulumeni uthi uzosebenzisana nezinhlaka zendawo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuqaliswa okuphumelelayo kwalolu hlelo.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukukhulisa ukukhiqizwa kokudla okuyisisekelo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuphepha kokudla ezweni. Abalimi bazophinde bathole ukuqeqeshwa mayelana nokusebenzisa imbewu ethuthukisiwe kanye nokulawula izinambuzane ngendlela efanele. Izikhulu zithi lokhu kuyingxenye yesu elibanzi lokuqinisa umnotho wezolimo. Abahlanganyeli emkhakheni wezolimo bakubonge lokhu kodwa bacele ukuthi kube nokubeka iso okuqinile ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukusatshalaliswa okufanele kwezinsiza.

Emiphakathini yasemakhaya aseMpumalanga Kapa kuqalwe uhlelo lokuthuthukisa ukufinyelela emanzini okuhlanzekile kanye nezinsiza zokunisela emapulazini amancane. Lolu hlelo luhlose ukunciphisa ubunzima ababhekene nabo abalimi ngesikhathi sezomiso ezinde. Izisebenzi zikahulumeni zithi seziqalile ukufaka amapayipi amasha kanye nokulungisa imithombo yamanzi endala. Abalimi bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzise lezi zinsiza ngendlela esimeme ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukusimama kwesikhathi eside. Uhulumeni uthi le projekthi izodlala indima enkulu ekuthuthukiseni ukukhiqizwa kokudla ezindaweni zasemakhaya.

Abantu abangaphezu kwezigidi ezintathu ezweni lonke sebezuze ezinhlelweni ezintsha zokukhokhwa kwezibonelelo zikahulumeni ezibhekiswe emindenini esengozini enkulu. Uhulumeni uthi le nkqubo ihlose ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abantu abadala, izingane kanye nabakhubazekile bathola ukwesekwa okufanele ngesikhathi. Izikhulu zomnyango wezenhlalakahle zithi izinhlelo zokukhokha sezithuthukisiwe ukuze kuncishiswe ukubambezeleka nokwandisa ukufinyelela kwabahlomulayo. Abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise izindlela ezisemthethweni zokubhalisa ukuze bagweme ukukhwabanisa. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yomzamo wokunciphisa ubuphofu nokwakha imiphakathi ezinzile. Abaholi bomphakathi bamnkele kahle lo msebenzi kodwa bacele ukuthi kube nokubeka iso okuqinile ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi akekho oshiywa ngaphandle.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukubhekana nenkinga yokushoda kwezindlu eziphephile nezingabizi kubantu abahola kancane. Izikhulu zithi izindlu ezakhiwayo zihambisana nezindinganiso zokuphepha kanye nengqalasizinda eyisisekelo efana namanzi nogesi. Abahlali abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi babhalise ngokusemthethweni ukuze bakwazi ukufinyelela kulolu hlelo. Uhulumeni uthi uzosebenzisana nemikhandlu yendawo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ukwabiwa kwezindlu kwenziwa ngendlela efanele. Abaholi bomphakathi bacele ukuthi kube sobala ekukhethweni kwabahlomulayo ukuze kugwenywe ukungqubuzana.

Emiphakathini eminingi yasemadolobheni kuqale uhlelo olusha lokweseka imindeni ebhekene nobunzima bokungasebenzi kanye nokushoda kokudla. Lolu hlelo luhlanganisa ukuhlinzekwa ngamaphakethe okudla kanye nezinhlelo zokuqeqeshwa kwamakhono ukuze abantu bakwazi ukuzimela. Izisebenzi zenhlalakahle zithi ziyasebenzisana nezinhlangano ezizimele ukuze kwandiswe ukufinyelela kosizo. Abahlali abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ezinhlelweni zokuqeqeshwa ukuze bathuthukise amathuba abo emisebenzi. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yesu elibanzi lokulwa nobuphofu emiphakathini esengozini enkulu. Abaholi bomphakathi bamnkele lolu hlelo kodwa bagcizelela isidingo sokuqhubeka nokwesekwa isikhathi eside.

Lolu hlelo olusha lusebenzisa izinhlelo zedijithali ukuqinisekisa ukubhaliswa okunembile nokunciphisa ukukhwabanisa. Abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi bavuselele imininingwane yabo njalo ukuze bagweme ukuphazamiseka ekukhokhelweni. Uhulumeni uthi uzosebenzisana nezikhungo zomphakathi ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukufinyelela okulula kosizo. Abaholi bomphakathi bagcizelele ukubaluleka kokubeka iso ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi izinsiza zifinyelela kubantu abahlosiwe kuphela.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukuthutha imindeni iye ezindlini ezakhiwe ngokusemthethweni ezinezinsiza eziyisisekelo. Izisebenzi zikamasipala zithi seziqalile ukuhlonza izindawo ezibeka abantu engcupheni yezikhukhula kanye nokulimala. Abahlali baceliwe ukuthi basebenzisane nohulumeni ngesikhathi sokuthuthwa ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuphepha. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yomzamo wokwakha imiphakathi ehlala kahle nenokuphepha. Abaholi bomphakathi bacele ukuthi kube nokuxhumana okucacile ukuze kugwenywe ukudideka ngesikhathi sokuthuthwa.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukunciphisa umthelela wobuphofu ngokunikeza abantu amathuba okusebenza ezinhlelweni zomphakathi. Izikhulu zithi izinkampani ezizimele nazo zizobamba iqhaza ekwakheni amathuba emisebenzi. Abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise leli thuba ukuthuthukisa amakhono abo. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yesu elibanzi lokwakha umnotho onamathuba alinganayo kubo bonke.

Izinkulungwane zabantu abadala ezweni lonke zizothola ukwenyuswa kwezibonelelo zazo kulandela isimemezelo sikahulumeni esisha esihlose ukulwa nokukhuphuka kwezindleko zokuphila. Izikhulu zithi lokhu kukhuphuka kuhloswe ukusiza abantu abadala ukuba bakwazi ukuhlangabezana nezidingo zabo eziyisisekelo. Uhlelo lokukhokha luzoqhubeka ngendlela ejwayelekile kodwa luthuthukiswe ukuze kuncishiswe ukubambezeleka. Abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise iziteshi ezisemthethweni ukuze bathole ulwazi oluqondile. Uhulumeni uthi uzibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi izakhamuzi ezisengozini enkulu azishiywa ngaphandle kosizo.

Emiphakathini yasemakhaya kuqale uhlelo lokwakhiwa kwezindlu ezibhekele imindeni ehola kancane ukuze kuthuthukiswe izinga lokuphila. Lolu hlelo luhlanganisa ukwakhiwa kwezindlu ezinamandla ezingamelana nezimo zezulu ezinzima. Izikhulu zithi izindawo ezikhethiwe zisebenza ngokuhambisana nezinhlelo zentuthuko yesifunda. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ezinhlelweni zokubhalisa ukuze bakwazi ukufakwa ohlwini lwabahlomulayo. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yokuzibophezela ekwakheni imiphakathi ephephile nenokulingana. Abaholi bomphakathi bagcizelele ukubaluleka kokuba sobala ekukhethweni kwabahlomulayo.

Ngaphakathi kwezinhlelo ezintsha zokweseka imiphakathi esengozini, uhulumeni usungule izikhungo zosizo ezizohlinzeka ngokudla, izeluleko kanye nokwesekwa kwezempilo kubantu abaswele. Lezi zikhungo ziqale ukusebenza ezindaweni ezithile ezihlushwa izinga eliphezulu lobuphofu. Izisebenzi zithi inhloso enkulu ukunciphisa umthelela wokungalingani emphakathini. Abahlomulayo bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise lezi zinsiza ukuze bathuthukise izimpilo zabo. Uhulumeni uthi uzosebenzisana nezinhlangano zomphakathi ukuqinisekisa ukusimama kwalezi zinhlelo zesikhathi eside.

Uhulumeni uthi lolu hlelo luhlose ukunciphisa izinga eliphezulu lokwehluleka ezikoleni ngokunikeza othisha ukwesekwa okukhulu kanye nezinsiza ezengeziwe zokufundisa. Izikole eziningi sezithole izincwadi ezintsha, amathuluzi okufundisa kanye nezinhlelo zokuqeqesha othisha ukuze bathuthukise indlela yokufundisa. Abazali bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza ekufundeni kwezingane zabo ngokubambisana nothisha ukuze kuthuthukiswe imiphumela yezemfundo. Izikhulu zemfundo zithi lokhu kuyingxenye yesu elibanzi lokwakha isizukulwane esinamakhono aqinile okuzimela. Abafundi nabo bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise amathuba okuqeqeshwa angeziwe ukuze bathuthukise ikusasa labo futhi babe nempumelelo emkhakheni abawukhethayo.

Ezinhlanganweni zemfundo ephakeme ezweni lonke kuqale uhlelo olusha lokweseka abafundi abasuka emiphakathini esengozini ngokubanikeza izibonelelo zokufunda kanye nokusekelwa kwezindlu. Uhulumeni uthi le ndlela ihlose ukuqinisekisa ukuthi akukho mfundi oshiywa ngaphandle ngenxa yezimo zezimali. Izinhlangano zemfundo ephakeme zisebenzisana nohulumeni ukuhlinzeka ngezinhlelo zokuqeqesha ezihambisana nezidingo zomnotho wanamuhla. Abafundi bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise izinsiza zokwelulekwa ukuze bakwazi ukuphumelela ezifundweni zabo. Izikhulu zithi lokhu kuyingxenye yokwakha umnotho onolwazi oluqinile noluncintisanayo. Abaholi bezemfundo baphinde bagcizelela ukubaluleka kokuthuthukisa izinga lokuphumelela kwabafundi ukuze kuqinisekiswe ikusasa eliqhakazile.

Lolu hlelo luhlanganisa ukuqeqeshwa okusha kothisha kanye nokwethulwa kwezinsiza zesimanje zokufundisa. Izikole ezithile sezithole amalabhorethri amasha ukuze abafundi bakwazi ukwenza izivivinyo ezisebenzayo. Abazali nabafundi bakhuthazwa ukuba basebenzisane nothisha ukuze kuthuthukiswe imiphumela. Uhulumeni uthi le ndlela izosiza ekwakheni isizukulwane esinamakhono esingaqhuba umnotho wezwe. Abaholi bomphakathi bakubheke njengokutshalwa kwemali okubalulekile ekusaseni lezwe.

Lezi zinhlelo zibandakanya ukwakhiwa kwamagumbi okufundela amasha kanye nokulungiswa kwezakhiwo ezindala. Abafundi bazophinde bathole amathuba okuqeqeshwa okungeziwe emikhakheni ehlukahlukene ukuze bakwazi ukuthola amakhono asebenzayo. Abazali bakhuthazwa ukuba babambe iqhaza emisebenzini yesikole ukuze kuthuthukiswe imiphumela. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yomzamo wokunciphisa umehluko phakathi kwezikole ezisemadolobheni nezasemakhaya. Abaholi bezemfundo bakwamukele lokhu njengesinyathelo esibalulekile sokuthuthukisa izinga lemfundo ezweni.

Abafundi abaningi ezikoleni eziphakeme ezweni lonke bazuze ohlelweni olusha lokufundisa olusebenzisa ubuchwepheshe besimanje ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukuqonda kwezifundo ezinzima. Uhulumeni uthi le ndlela ihlose ukwenza ukufunda kube lula futhi kube nentshisekelo enkulu kubafundi. Othisha bathole ukuqeqeshwa okusha ukuze bakwazi ukusebenzisa la mathuluzi ngendlela efanele ekilasini. Abafundi bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise izinhlelo zokufunda ezengeziwe ukuze bathuthukise amakhono abo. Izikhulu zithi lokhu kuyingxenye yokulungiselela abafundi umnotho wesikhathi esizayo. Abazali bakubheke njengokuthuthukisa okuzokwenza izingane zabo zibe namathuba angcono emhlabeni wokusebenza.

Eminyuziyamu yezemfundo nasezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme kuqalwe uhlelo lokukhuthaza ucwaningo nokusungula izinto ezintsha phakathi kwabafundi nabacwaningi abasebasha. Uhulumeni uthi lolu hlelo luhlose ukukhulisa inani labantu abanamakhono ocwaningo ezweni. Abafundi bazothola ukwesekwa ngezimali kanye nokuqeqeshwa okujulile ukuze bakwazi ukwenza amaphrojekthi ocwaningo aphusile. Izikhungo zemfundo zithi lokhu kuzokhuthaza ukwakhiwa kwezixazululo zezinkinga zomphakathi. Abahlanganyeli bakhuthazwa ukuthi basebenzise leli thuba ukuze bathuthukise amakhono abo. Uhulumeni uthi lokhu kuyingxenye yokwakha isizwe esisekelwe olwazini nasekusunguleni.

Emiphakathini eminingi yasemadolobheni kuqale umkhankaso omusha wokugoma abantu ukuze kuncishiswe ukusabalala kwezifo ezithathelwanayo. Uhulumeni uthi le nkqubo ihlose ukuvikela abantu abasengozini enkulu njengabantu abadala nezingane ezincane. Izikhungo zezempilo zisebenzisana nomphakathi ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi abantu bathola ulwazi olufanele mayelana nokubaluleka kokugoma. Abahlali bakhuthazwa ukuthi babambe iqhaza kulo mkhankaso ukuze bavikele imindeni yabo. Izisebenzi zezempilo zithi lokhu kuyingxenye yomzamo wokuthuthukisa impilo yomphakathi. Uhulumeni uthi uzosebenzisa izindlela zokwazisa ezahlukene ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi wonke umuntu uyafinyelelwa.
