Loku kubukwa njengentfutfuko lebalulekile ekuphuculeni imphilo yansuku tonkhe.

Lolu hlelo luhlose ukusondeza izinsiza zezempilo ezisezingeni eliphezulu kubantu abahlala ezindaweni zasemakhaya ikakhulukazi labo abanobunzima bokufika emadolobheni amakhulu lapho kukhona khona izibhedlela. Izakhamuzi zakulezi zindawo bezilokhu zikhala isikhathi eside ngenxa yokushoda kwezithuthi zomphakathi eziziyisa ezikhungweni zezempilo eziseduze kakhulu nezindlu zabo ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Manje lolu hlelo olusha selulethe usizo olukhulu ngoba abantu sebethola imithi yabo yezifo ezahlukene ngaphandle kokukhokha izindleko ezisindayo zokuhamba amabanga amade. Izikhulu zikamasipala ziqinisekise ukuthi lolu hlelo luzoqhubeka unyaka wonke ukunakekela wonke amalungu omphakathi adinga lolu sizo olusemqoka kakhulu emimpilweni yawo yansuku zonke. Uhlelo luhlanganisa nokuhlolwa kwezifo ezifana nomfutho wegazi ophezulu nesifo sikashukela okuyizifo ezihlasela abantu abaningi kulezi zinsuku ezifundazweni ezahlukene zezwe lethu.

Lokhu kulungiswa kwemigwaqo kulandela izikhalazo eziningi ezivela kubashayeli bezimoto nabantu abahamba ngezinyawo abathi le migwaqo corresponds ayisaseleki ngenxa yemigodi emikhulu. Uhlelo lolu luhlinzeka ngamathuba emisebenzi eminingi entsha kubantu abasha abangasebenzi abahlala kuleyo miphakathi ethintekayo kulolu hlelo lwentuthuko. Ngaphandle kokwenza ngcono ingqalasizinda yezokuthutha lolu hlelo luletha ithemba elisha kwezoqoqosho lwasemakhaya ngokwenza ukuba kube lula ukuthuthwa kwempahla. Izinkampani ezincane zendawo nazo zithole amathuba okwenza imisebenzi engaphansi kwale phrojekthi enkulu yentuthuko kamasipala wasendaweni. Umphakathi ukhuthazwe ukuba ubambisane nabasebenzi bomgwaqo ukuze umsebenzi uhambe ngokushesha nangendlela efanele ngaphandle kokubambezeleka okungenasidingo phakathi nalesi sikhathi sokwakha esibaluleke kangaka kuwo wonke umuntu okhathazekile.

Kulandela le nkinga iziphathimandla zikamasipala zihlangene nomphakathi ukudingida amasu amasha azosetshenziswa ukulungisa amaphayipi amadala adala ukuvuza kwamanzi amaningi nsuku zonke. Inkinga yamanzi ibaphazamise kakhulu abantu bakule ndawo ikakhulukazi izikole nemitholampilo emincane edinga amanzi ngaso sonke isikhathi ukuze isebenze ngendlela efanele. Uhlelo oluphuthumayo lokuthutha amanzi ngamaloli seluqalile ngenkathi kuza isixazululo esihlala njalo sokwakhiwa kwechibi elisha lokugcina amanzi amaningi. Izakhamuzi zamukele lolu hlelo lwamaloli nakuba zicela ukuba umsebenzi wokulungisa amaphayipi ushisekiswe ngamandla amakhulu ukuze konke kubuyele kwayizolo. Kamasipala ubonge kakhulu ukubekezela komphakathi ngesikhathi kubhekana nalezi zinselelo ezinkulu zengqalasizinda edinga izimali eziningi ukuba ilungiswe ngokuphelele ezindaweni zonke zomphakathi.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angcolile kulezi zindawo zasemijondolo sekudale ukuba iziphathimandla zithathe izinyathelo ezinqala zokuhlanza indawo yonke ngenhloso yokuvikela impilo yomphakathi jikelele. Uhlelo lokuhlanza imvelo oluqalwe kuleli sonto luholwa ngamalungu omphakathi ngokwawo abambisene nezisebenzi zikamasipala ezengamele ezempilo nemvelo kulezo zindawo ezithintekile kakhulu. Kunqwabelana kukadoti ezitaladini kukhonjwe njengenye yezinto ezidala izifo eziningi kubantwana abancane abadlala kulezi zindawo ezisondeduze nemizi yabo. Ngo-opharetha bama-skhiphu bazoletha izitsha ezinkulu zokulahla udoti ukuze abantu bangabe besalahla izibi noma kuphi ezindaweni zomphakathi ezivulekile. Uhlelo lolu luzophinde lufundise abantu abahlala kulezi zindawo ngendlela efanele yokuhlunga udoti ozosetshenziswa kabusha ukwenza izinto ezahlukene zokusiza imindeni. Isikhulu esiphezulu sezempilo siqinisekise ukuthi lolu mkhankaso uzoba yinto eqhubekayo ukugcina imvelo ihlanzekile ungalokhu uvalwa ngezikhathi ezithile zomnyaka njengoba bekunjalo esikhathini esidlule.

Isikhungo lesi sizofaka ngaphansi kwaso amahhovisi oMnyango wezeKhaya, awezeMisebenzi kanye nendawo lapho intsha ingathola khona ulwazi ngezifundo namathuba emisebenzi ekhona ezweni. Umphakathi ukhombise ukuthokoza okukhulu ngalesi sinqumo ngoba sizobasiza kakhulu ekugcineni isikhathi nemali ebingachithwa ngokuya emadolobheni amakhulu amade. Intsha yakule ndawo izokwazi ukusebenzisa i-inthanethi yamahhala kulesi sikhungo ukufuna imisebenzi nokufaka izicelo zokufunda emanyuvesi ahlukene ezwe lonke. Kwakhiwa kwalesi sikhungo kuzoqala ngokushesha kule nyanga ezayo kulandela ukuphothulwa kwezinhlelo zokwabiwa kwezimali ezidingekayo kule phrojekthi yomphakathi. Lo mklamo uzobuye unikeze amathuba emisebenzi yesikhashana kubantu abaningi bendawo abazobamba iqhaza ekwakhiweni kwaso kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekupheleni kwemisebenzi yonke yezandla.

Leli su elisha lokwabiwa kwezimali zentuthuko lihlose ukwenza ukuba izidingo ezisondelene kakhulu nabantu kube zona ezibekwa phambili ngaso sonke isikhathi sokusebenza. Abahlali bacelwe ukuba baphakamise amaphrojekthi abona ukuthi aqakathekile kakhulu njengokwakhiwa kwezinkulisa, izikhungo zentsha kanye nokufakwa kwezibani ezitaladini zendawo ukulwa nobugebengu. Kamasipala uzobamba eminye imihlangano kulezi zigodi ezahlukene ukuze kutholakale imibono yabantu abaningi ngangokunokwenzeka ngaphambi kokuba ibhajethi iphasiswe ngokusemthethweni. Indlela endala yokuthatha izinqumo ngaphandle kokubonisana nabantu igxekiwe ngoba ivame ukuletha izinto abantu abangazidingi ngaleso sikhathi esithile sokuthuthuka. Umphakathi uzwakalise ukuyisekela le ndlela entsha futhi uthe uzibophezela ukuba khona kuyo yonke imihlangano ezobizwa ngezikhathi ezizayo ukuxoxa ngezindaba zentuthuko.

Lolu hlelo luphawula isinyathelo esikhulu esibhekiswe ekunikezeni intsha amathuba amahle okuziphilisa ngokwakha izinkampani ezincane noma ngokuthola imisebenzi ezimbonini zendawo ezinkulu. Abafundi abangenile kulolu hlelo bazoletha usizo olukhulu emiphakathini yabo ngoba bazoqeqeshelwa imisebenzi efana nokushisela, amapulangwe, ukulungisa amagesi kanye nokwakha ngezitini. Izikhungo zemfundo yezandla zendawo zibambisene nohulumeni ukuhlinzeka ngalolu qeqesho oluzothatha isikhathi esiyizinyanga eziyisithupha zomsebenzi onzima kodwa ovuzayo. Kulindeleke ukuba emva kwalesi sikhathi abafundi bathole izitifiketi ezivunyelwe ngokusemthethweni ezizobasiza ukuba bangene emakethe yezabasebenzi kalula. Abazali babafundi babonge kakhulu lo mklamo omuhle bethi uzobasiza kakhulu abantwana babo ukuba bangalibali yizinto ezingalungile ezitaladini ngenxa yokuhlala bengenzi lutho.

Emaphethelong amadolobha amakhulu kunezinselelo eziningi ezithinta ukutholakala kwezindlu zomphakathi ezisezingeni elamukelekile ngenxa yokwanda okusheshayo kwesibalo sabantu abafudukela kulezi zindawo ezintsha. Uhulumeni useqalise iphrojekthi enkulu yokwakhiwa kwezindlu zoxhaso ezizohlomulisa imindeni eminingi ebihlala ezindaweni ezingalungile nezisengozini ngezikhathi zezikhukhula nemililo emibi. Lolu hlelo lokwakha luzohlanganisa nokufakwa kwengqalasizinda eyisisekelo njengemigwaqo yetiyela, amaphayipi amanzi ahlanzekile kanye nezixhumi zikagesi ezisemthethweni emizini yonke emisha ezokwakhiwa. Abantu abazohlomula kulezi zindlu bakhethwe ngokulandela uhlu lwabantu abalinde izindlu isikhathi eside ukwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi kutholwa ubulungiswa nenkohlakalo iyaphela. Izikhulu zezindlu ziveze ukuthi zizosebenzisana nezinkampani ezakha ngesivinini nangekhwalithi ephezulu ukuze abantu bakwazi ukungena ezindlini zabo ngesikhathi esivunyelwene ngaso phakathi kwabo nabomklamo. Umphakathi ukhonjiswe izinhlelo zokwakha futhi wavunyelwa ukuba ubeke imibono yawo mayelana nokuhleleka kwezindawo zabo zokuhlala ezintsha.

Le paki eyakhiwe endaweni ebiye yaziwa ngokuba yindawo yokulahla udoti ngokungemthethetho isiguqule ukubukeka kwayo yonke le ndawo ebihlezi inukela abantu kabi. Masipala usebenzise izimali ezikhethekile ukuthenga izinsiza zokudlala ezifana nama-swing nezindawo zokuhlala zomphakathi ngenkathi kutshalwa nezihlahla ezinhle eziletha umthunzi. Umphakathi uzibophezele ukulinda nokuphatha le ndawo ngendlela efanelekile ukugwema ukuba icekelwe phansi ngabantu abangafuni ukubona intuthuko ezindaweni zethu. Amaphisa omdabu kanye namalungu ezokuphepha omphakathi bazohlala bepatrola kule ndawo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi izingane zidlala ngokukhululeka ngaphandle kokwesaba abaphuli bomthetho. Lolu hlelo lokwakha amapaki luzoqhubeka nasezindaweni eziseduze ngenhloso yokwenza amalokishi ethu abe nezindawo ezinhle ezifanayo nezisemadolobheni amakhulu ezwe.

Izindlela ezintsha zokuxhumana phakathi kukamasipala nezakhamuzi zethulwe kuleli sonto ngenhloso yokwenza ngcono isikhathi esithathwayo ukulungisa izinkinga ezifana nokunqamuka kwemisebenzi kagesi nokuvuza kwamanzi. Lolu hlelo olubandakanya uhlelo lokuthumela imiyalezo elula kumakhalekhukhwini luzosiza abantu ukuba babike izinkinga ngokushesha futhi bathole nezinombolo zolwazi zokulandelela umsebenzi lowo owenziwayo. Phambilini abantu bebekhala kakhulu ngokuthi izingcingo zabo aziphendulwa emahgovisini amakhulu ezikhalazo okubenza bazizwe benganakekile neze nguhulumeni wabo wasendaweni. Manje ngalolu hlelo olusha isikhalazo somuntu ngamunye sizoya ngqo ethimbeni eliseduze labasebenzi bezobuchwepheshe ukuze bayolungisa inkinga leyo ngokushesha okukhulu. Kamasipala uqinisekise ukuthi abantu asebabadala abangakwazi ukusebenzisa lobu buchwepheshe bazolethwa usizo ngamahhovisi amancane asemiphakathini yabo aseduze lapho kungena khona abasizi bomphakathi. Le ndlela entsha yethenjwa kakhulu ukuthi izoletha ukukhanya nokuqeda ukungaboni ngaso linye phakathi kwezakhamuzi nezisebenzi zikahulumeni ezibhekele ezokusizwa kwabantu.

Uhulumeni unqume ukwaba izimali ezikhethekile zokuvuselela la mahhovisi amadala amaningi awo asakhiwa eminyakeni eminingi edlule ebonakala ewohloka kakhulu kulezi zinsuku. Uhlelo lolu lokuvuselela luzofaka phakathi ukufakwa kwezinhlelo ezintsha zokuzivikela emililweni, ukulungiswa kophahla oluvuza amanzi kanye nokwenza izindawo zokungena zibe lula kubantu abaphila nokukhubazeka. Lokhu kwenziwa ngenhloso yokuqinisekisa ukuthi wonke umuntu uthola izinsiza ngendlela enesithunzi nasezindaweni ezihlanzekile nezivikelekile ngaso sonke isikhathi somsebenzi. Abasebenzi bezinyunyana bazwakalise ukusisekela lesi sinqumo sokuphuthumisa ukulungiswa kwezindawo zokusebenza ngoba bekuyinto isikhathi eside bezwakalisa ukukhathazeka ngayo emhlanganweni yabasebenzi. Umsebenzi lo kulindeleke ukuba ungaphazamisi ukunikezwa kwezinsiza kubantu njengoba kuzoba namahhovisi esikhashana azosetshenziswa phakathi nalesi sikhathi sokwakha.

Lolu hlelo luza njengesixazululo esibonakalayo sokuvikela izimpilo zabantwana besikole abavame ukuphuthelwa izifundo zabo ngezikhathi lapho imifula igcwala khona kakhulu kulezi zindawo zasemakhaya. Amabhuloho la azakhiwa ngokubambisana phakathi komnyango wezisebenzi zikahulumeni kanye nebutho lezobunjiniyela lazo zonke izinhlaka zokuthuthukiswa kwengqalasizinda ezweni lethu. Umphakathi uceliwe ukuba unikeze amagama ezindawo lapho kunesidingo esiphuthumayo khona ukuze izazi zezobuchwepheshe zikwazi ukwenza izinhlelo zokuhlola indawo ngaphambi kokuba umsebenzi uqale. Abazali bezingane bazwakalise ukukhululeka okukhulu emoyeni wabo kulandela lesi simiso ngoba bebehlezi besaba ukuthi izingane zabo zingasekelwa ngamanzi uma kuza izikhukhula ezizumayo. Lo msebenzi wokwakha kulindeleke ukuba uqedwe ngaphambi kokuba kuqale inkathi entsha yezimvula ezinkulu ezivame ukuletha umonakalo omkhulu.

Lolu hlelo luhloselwe ukusiza imindeni ehlwempu kakhulu naleyo ehlaselwe yizehlakalo ezingalindelekile ezifana nemililo ecekela phansi izindlu nempahla yabo yonke ngemizuzu embalwa nje. Amaphakethe la aqukethe ukudla okunempilo okungasiza umndeni isikhathi eside ngenkathi iziphathimandla zisenza izinhlelo ezihlala njalo zokubasiza ukuba bakhe kabusha izimpilo zabo zansuku zonke. Izisebenzi zomphakathi zizohlala zihlola izimo zemindeni kulezi zindawo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi ukudla kuya kubantu abakufanele ngempela hhayi labo abafuna ukusebenzisa amathuba ngendlela engekho emthethweni. Amalungu omphakathi anconywe kakhulu ngokubonisa umoya wobunye nokusizana ngokunikeza abahlaselwe yilezi zinhlekelele indawo yokuhlala yesikhashana ngezikhathi zobunzima obukhulu. Uhulumeni uthe lolu sizo luyingxenye yezibopho zakhe zokunakekela izakhamuzi zonke ezisengcupheni yokuhlupheka kakhulu ezweni.

Lolu hlelo lwamandla avuselelekayo luletha ushintsho olukhulu ezimpilweni zabantu bakule ndawo njengoba sebengakwazi ukukhanyisa izindlu zabo nokushaja amaselula ngaphandle kokusebenzisa amakhandlela neziphehla-gesi ezibizayo. Uhlelo lolu lwenziwa njengengxenye yesu likahulumeni lokuhlinzeka ngezixazululo zamandla ezisimeme nezingcolisi mvelo ezindaweni ezisemajengetheni lapho ukufakwa kwekagesi ojwayelekile kuthatha isikhathi. Izakhamuzi zifundisiwe nendlela efanele yokunakekela la maphaneli elanga ukuze akwazi ukubasiza isikhathi eside ngaphandle kokonakala kalula ngenxa yokungazi. Abantwana bezikole sebengakwazi manje ukufunda kahle nasebusuku ngenxa yokukhanya okuhle okulethwe yilezi zinsiza ezintsha ezifakwe emakhaya abo. Uhlelo lolu luzokwandiswa nakwezinye izigodi ezisemakhaya ezibhekane nenkinga efanayo yokungabikho kwengqalasizinda kagesi efanele emphakathini jikelele.

Kulandela lezi zikhalazo ezicacile umnyango wezengqalasizinda kamasipala usuthumele ithimba elikhethekile labazochophelana nale nkinga ngokuvula amapayipi amakhulu avalekile ngenxa kadoti. Izikhulu ziveze ukuthi inkinga idalwa nayi-insizakalo embi yokulahlwa kwezinto ezingafanele ezindlini zangasese okwenza ukuba uhlelo lonke lwamapayipi luvimbeke kalula. Kudonswe ngendlebe amalungu omphakathi ukuba aqaphele izinto ezilahlelwa phansi nasezindlini zangasese ukuze kugwenywe lezi zinkinga ezibuyela kubona futhi zibeke impilo yabo esengozini enkulu. Kuzobanjwa umkhankaso wokufundisa abantu ngale ndaba ezikoleni nasezindaweni zokuhlangana zomphakathi ukuze kube nokwazi okubanzi ngokuphathwa kwengqalasizinda yomphakathi yonke. Umphakathi ubonge ukusabela okusheshayo kuthimba likamasipala nakuba ulindele ukubona isixazululo esizohlala isikhathi eside singaphinde sidale lezi zinkinga ezifanayo ngezikhathi ezizayo.

Izindlela ezinqala zokuvikela abafundi nabakhileyo ezindaweni eziseduze nemizila yezitimela zethulwe ngokuhlanganyela phakathi kwenkampani yezitimela zengasizinda kanye namaphoyisa kamasipala endaweni yakuleli sonto. Uhlelo lolu luhlanganisa nokwakhiwa kwezocingo ezintsha ezizovimba abantu ukuba bawele imizila yezitimela ezindaweni ezingavumelekile lapho kuvame ukuba nezingozi ezibulala abantu abaningi ngonyaka. Kuzofakwa namabhodi amakhulu ezixwayiso azofundisa abantu ngezingozi zokuzula eduze kwemizila ngezikhathi lapho izitimela ezithwala impahla nabantu zidlula ngazo ngesivinini. Abazali nabalusi bezinkomo nabo bakhuthaziwe ukuba baqinisekise ukuthi imfuyo yabo nezingane zabo azisondeli kulezi zindawo eziyingozi kakhulu emphakathini wethu wasendaweni. Lokhu kuthathwa kwezinyathelo kuze emva kokuba kudaleke izingozi eziningi ezidlule nemiphefumulo yabantu abasha abebeya ezikoleni ngezinyawo ekuseni kakhulu. Uhlelo lokufundisa luzoqhutshwa nasezinkundleni zokuxhumana nasemisakazweni yendawo ukuze wonke umuntu ezwe lowo mlayezo obaluleke kangaka wokuphepha nokuvikela impilo yomuntu ngamunye emphakathini.

Lokhu kuholele ekutheni umnyango wezokuhlaliswa kwabantu ubuyekeze izinhlelo zawo zokwakha ukuze ukwazi ukufaka imindeni eminingi eyengeziwe kulolu hlelo lwamanje oluqhubekayo. Izikhulu zikahulumeni ziveze ukuthi zizosebenzisa ubuchwepheshe obusha bokwakha izindlu ngokushesha ukuze kuncitshiswe isikhathi abantu abasichitha belindile emigqeni emide yezindlu zoxhaso. Kuzobekwa phambili abantu asebabadala, abaphila nokukhubazeka kanye nabesifazane abaziqiniseki bona nabantwana babo bodwa ezindlini zabo zokuhlala ngenxa yobunzima bempilo. Kamasipala ukhiphe isixwayiso esiqinile kubantu abazama ukudayisa izindawo zoxhaso ngokungemthethetho bethi lokho kulicala elingase likuvalele ejele isikhathi eside uma ubanjwa. Umphakathi uceliwe ukuba ubike noma yiziphi izenzo zokukhwabanisa ezimayelana nezinombolo zokulinda izindlu emahgovisini omasipala wasendaweni ukuze kube nokukhanya jikelele.

Lolu hlelo lokuxhasa luhloselwe ukunika la mabhizinisi amancane amandla okuba akwazi ukuncintisana ezimakethe ezinkulu nokudala amathuba emisebenzi emisha kulezi zindawo zasemakhaya ezisalele emuva entuthukweni. Osomabhizinisi bacelwe ukuba babhalise amabhizinisi abo ngokusemthethweni futhi baqinisekise ukuthi banazo zonke izincwadi ezidingekayo ukuze bakwazi ukuthola lolu xhaso lwezimali kalula. Uhlelo lolu luzophinde luhlinzeke ngabaqeqeshi bezamabhizinisi abazohlala beqondisa laba somabhizinisi ngezindlela ezifanele zokuphatha izimali nokwenza imakethe yemikhiqizo yabo ngempumelelo enkulu. Lokhu kuzosiza ekutheni amabhizinisi amaningi angavalwa emva kwesikhathi esifushane nje ngenxa yokushoda kolwazi ngezindlela zebhizinisi ezifanele. Umphakathi wamabhizinisi ukwamkele ngonyenye lolu sizo futhi wathi seluzobakhulisa kakhulu ekwenzeni imisebenzi yabo yansuku zonke.

Lolu hlelo lokufunda lufundise abantu abasafufusa emabhizinisini ukuthi bangayisebenzisa kanjani i-inthanethi namapulatifomu okuxhumana ukukhangisa izinto zabo abazenzayo kubantu abaningi kakhulu ezweni lonke. Lokhu kubaluleke kakhulu kulezi zinsuku ngoba amabhizinisi amaningi asasebenzisa izindlela ezindala zokufuna amakhasimende okubenza basalele emuva kwabanye abasebenzisa izindlela zesimanje. Abahlanganyeli balolu hlelo bathole amathuba okuxhumana nezikhungo zezimali ezinkulu ezingabafeza ngezimali zokukhulisa amabhizinisi abo uma bebonisa izinhlelo zabo zebhizinisi ezicacile. Kamasipala uthe uzosebenzisana nezinkampani ezinkulu zezokuxhumana ukuhlinzeka nge-inthanethi eshibhile kulezi zindawo zosomabhizinisi ukuze bahlale bexhunywe nezwe ngaso sonke isikhathi. Lolu hlelo lokufundisa luzoqhubeka nasezinye izifunda ngenhloso yokufika kubantu abaningi abadinga lolu lwazi olubalulekile kwezoqoqosho.

Emaphethelong ezindawo zomphakathi eziningi sekuqalwe uhlelo lokutshala izitshalo zomdabu ngenhloso yokuvuselela umhlabathi nokuqinisekisa ukuthi izizukulwane ezizayo zithola imvelo ephilayo nenhle. Lo mkhankaso oholwa ngumnyango wezemvelo uhlose ukufundisa amalungu omphakathi ngokubaluleka kokugcina izihlahla zomdabu ezingasisebenzisi amanzi amaningi uma ziqhathaniswa nezinye izihlahla ezivela ngaphandle kwezwe lethu. Abahlali bacelwe ukuba babambe iqhaza ngokutshala lezi zihlahla emakhaya abo nasemizini yezikole ngenhloso yokwenza umthunzi nokuvikela inhlabathi ukuba ingakhukhuleki ngezikhathi zezimvula ezinkulu. Uhlelo lolu luhlanganisa nokunikezwa kwezithombo zamahhala kubantu bonke abazilethela amagama abo emahgovisini ekomiti lomphakathi asendaweni yakubo. Izikole nazo zizofakwa kulolu hlelo ngenhloso yokufundisa abantwana ezisencane ukuthi imvelo kumele ivikelwe futhi ihlonishwe ngoba iyona engumthombo wempilo yethu sonke. Lo mkhankaso uthole ukusekelwa okukhulu ezikhulwini zomdabu ezithe le ndlela izobuyisela isithunzi semvelo yakithi endala ebihlonishwa kakhulu.

Lolu hlelo olwathatha izinyanga eziyisishiyagalombili beluhloselwe ukunika intsha engasebenzi amakhono adingeka kakhulu embonini yezokuxhumana neyokucubungula imininingwane ehlukene yezinkampani ezinkulu zezwe. Abafundi abaningi bakuleli qembu bazwakalise ukuthi lolu lwazi selubavulele amehlo amaningi amasha futhi abanye babo baphumelele ukuthola imisebenzi ezinkampanini zendawo ngenxa yalolu qeqesho. Uhulumeni unqume ukukhulisa isabelomali salolu hlelo unyaka ozayo ukuze kufakwe intsha eningi eyengeziwe evela ezindaweni zasemakhaya lapho la makhono engavamile ukutholakala kalula ngenxa yokushoda kwezikhungo. Izikhungo zokufunda zendawo nazo zizothola izinsiza ezintsha zama-computer amasha azosiza abafundi ekwenzeni imisebenzi yabo ephathekayo phakathi nezikhathi zokufunda kwabo bansuku zonke. Uhlelo lolu luyingxenye yomzamo omkhulu wokulungiselela intsha izimo zomnotho ezintsha zalezi zinsuku.

Izakhamuzi zakule ndawo bezilokhu zihlala ebumnyameni iminyaka eminingi zisebenzisa uphalafini nezinkuni ezidala intuthu eningi engalungile neze emiphaphwini yabantu abancane nabadala emakhaya. Ukuvuleka kwekagesi kule ndawo kuzosiza kakhulu ekutheni kuvulwe namabhizinisi amancane afana nalawo edingisa iziqandisi ukugcina imikhiqizo yabo entsha ingonakali ngokushesha phakathi nezinsuku zokushisa. Izikhulu zikamasipala zihambele le ndawo ukuyobona umsebenzi owenziwe futhi zicela abantu ukuba babhadalele izinsiza abazitholayo ukuze uhlelo lukwazi ukuyofika nakwabanye abasalindile. Amalungu omphakathi afundisiwe ngezindlela zokusebenzisa ugesi ngendlela ephephile ukugwema izingozi zomlilo ezingadaleka uma kuxhunywa izinto eziningi kakhulu ngesikhathi esisodwa. Lolu hlelo lokukhanyisa lulethe injabulo enkulu nethemba lokuthi indawo yabo nayo isizobonakala njengezinye izindawo ezithuthukile.

Amakomiti omphakathi asendaweni ahlangane namaphoyisa omphakathi ukudingida izindlela zokuphepha zesikhashana ngenkathi kusalindwe abasebenzi baka-Eskom nabakamasipala ukuba bezolungisa la magesi onakele ezinsukwini ezidlule. ngenxa yokungakhanyi kwezitaladi abantu abaningi asebenza ebusuku ekugcineni kwesikhathi sebesaba ukuhamba ngezinyawo besuka eziteshini zamatekisi beya emakhaya abo ngenxa yokuhlaselwa ngabantu abangaziwa. Umphakathi ucele ukuba kube nemoto yamaphoyisa ezohlala izungeza kulezi zindawo ezisengozini enkulu ikakhulukazi ngezimpelasonto lapho izigameko zobugebengu zivame ukwanda kakhulu kunezinye izinsuku zeviki. Iphoyisa elikhulu lendawo liqinisekise ukuthi lizokwengeza isibalo samaphoyisa anyonyobayo ezindaweni ezinebumnyama ukubamba labo abasebenzisa isimo ukukhahlameza izakhamuzi eziziphilela kahle ngendlela efanele neyemvelo.

Izindlela ezintsha zokuvikela abafundi abancane ezindaweni eziseduze nemigwaqo emikhulu kule ndawo zethulwe ngomkhankaso omkhulu obuholwa ngumnyango wezokuthutha nokuphathwa kwemigwaqo ezweni lakithi. Lo mkhankaso uzohlanganisa nokwakhiwa kwezindawo zokuwela ezinezimpawu ezicacile nokufakwa kwezihibe zomgwaqo ezizofomula abashayeli bezimoto ukuba behlise isivinini sabo ngezikhathi zokuphuma kwezikole eziseduze. Ngo-scholar patrol bazonikezwa amabhantshi akhanyayo nezimpawu zokumisa izimoto ukuze bakwazi ukusiza abantwana ukuba bawele umgwaqo ngokuphepha ngaphandle kokubeka izimpilo zabo engozini enkulu yezimoto. Izikhulu zezokuthutha ziveze ukuthi zizohlala zihlola lezi zindawo ukwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi abashayeli bayayihlonipha le mithetho emisha ebekelwe ukuvikela izimpilo zabantu abancane. Abazali babantwana nabo bacelwe ukuba bafundise abantwana babo emakhaya ukuthi kumele bawugcine kanjani umthetho womgwaqo ukuze bangazidatshuli kalula ngezimoto ezihamba ngesivinini esiphezulu. Lo mkhankaso kulindeleke ukuba ulethe ushintsho oluhle ngezibalo zezingozi zomgwaqo.

Uhlelo lolu luholwa yizazi zezomthetho zikahulumeni ezizosebenza ngokuzithandela nangezikhathi ezithile ezikhethekile ukusiza imindeni ebhekene nezinselelo zezomthetho ezifana nezindaba zamafa nezomhlaba emakhaya. Abahlali abaningi basemakhaya bazithola besenkingeni enkulu ngenxa yokungakwazi ukukhokhela abameli abazimele ababiza izimali eziningi kakhulu ezingaphezu kwamandla abo ezomnotho. Manje ngalolu sizo olusha abantu bazokwazi ukuthola izeluleko zamahhala zendlela efanele yokuxazulula izingxabano ngendlela esemthethweni nangokuthula emphakathini wabo. Izikhulu zikamasipala zizohlela ukuba kube nezinsuku ezikhethekile lapho la makhomishana ezohambela imiphakathi eyahlukene ukunikeza lolu sizo olusemqoka kakhulu. Le ndlela entsha yamukelwe ngomfutho omkhulu ngamakhosi omdabu athe izoletha isisombululo esihle ezinkingeni eziningi zomhlaba nezomndeni.

Lolu hlelo luhloselwe ukusiza imindeni ezitshala ngokwayo emakhaya ukuba ikwazi ukuthola ukudla okwanele nokudayisa okunye okusele ezimakethe zendawo ukuze ithole imali yokuziphilisa emakhaya. Abalimi abaningi bakule ndawo bebelokhu bekhala ngenkingo yokubiza kwezinto zokulima njengemithi yezilwanyana nezichumisi zomhlaba okwenza ukuba bangakwazi ukulima umhlaba wabo omningi wonke owaziwayo. Manje ngalolu sizo olusha oluvela emnyangweni wezolimo abalimi bazothola nabaqeqeshi abazobafundisa ngezindlela zesimanje zokulima ezikwazi ukumelana nezimo zezulu ezishintshashintshayo kulezi zinsuku. Abahlali bakhuthaziwe ukuba bakhe imifelandawonye yabalimi ukuze kube lula ukuthola usizo olukhulu nezinto zokusebenza ezinkulu ezifana nogandaganda abasizayo ukulima umhlaba omkhulu ngesikhathi esifushane nje jikelele.

Lolu hlelo lokugoma luza ngesikhathi esifanele lapho kunezifo eziningi ezivame ukuhlasela imfuyo ngezikhathi zokushintsha kwemizwelo yezulu kusuka ebusika kuya ehlobo ezindaweni eziningi zasemakhaya ezweni lethu. Abalimi bafundisiwe nendlela efanele yokubona izimpawu zokugula ezilwaneni zabo nokuthi kumele bathathe ziphi izinyathelo zokuqala ngaphambi kokubiza abasizi bezolimo abaseduze nabo. Imfuyo ibaluleke kakhulu kwezoqoqosho lwasemakhaya ngoba iyifa elisiza imindeni eminingi ukuba ikwazi ukukhokha izindleko zezikole nokuthenga ukudla ngezikhathi zomndeni ezinzima kakhulu. Uhulumeni uthe lolu hlelo lokugoma lumahhala futhi luzofika kuzo zonke izigodi ezisemakhaya ukuze kuvikelwe imfuyo yezwe lonke ekufeni ngenxa yezifo ezivame ukugwemeka kalula uma imithi itholakala ngesikhathi esifanele.

Umnyango wezolimo usungule iphrojekthi entsha yokwakha izinhlelo zokugcina amanzi emvula kusetshenziswa amathangi amakhulu nezindlela zokunisela ezisebenzisa amanzi amancane kodwa anentshisekelo enkulu ezitshalweni zomhlaba. Lolu hlelo selusizile imindeni eminingi eyenza izingadini zasemakhaya ukuba iqhubeke nokutshala imifino emisha efana nesipinashi, amakhabe kanye nezaqathe ezisiza ukunika izingane ukudla okunempilo okulwa nezifo. Abalimi bafundiswe nendlela yokwenza umquba ngezinto zemvelo ezifana namacembe nezinsalela zokudla ukwenza inhlabathi ihlale inomswakama nesikhathi eside ngaphandle kokusebenzisa amanzi amaningi. Uhlelo lolu luzophinde lunikeze intsha amathuba omsebenzi wokwakha nokuphatha lezi zinhlelo zamanzi ezintsha emiphakathini yabo ukuze nabo bathole amakhono amasha azobasiza ezimpilweni zabo zangomuso.

Lo mhlaba obuvele uhlezi ungenzi lutho uzohlungelwa abantu abakhombisile ukuthi banothando nomdlandla wokulima kodwa beswele indawo eyanele yokwenza imisebenzi yabo ngenxa yokuminyana ezindaweni abahlala kuzo. Uhlelo lolu lokunikezwa komhlaba luhambisana nezinkontileka zesikhathi eside ezizovumela abalimi ukuba bakwazi ukuhlelela ikusasa labo nokuthenga izinto zokusebenza ezinkulu ngaphandle kokwesaba ukuthathwa komhlaba ngendlela engalindelekile. Izikhulu zikamasipala ziveze ukuthi zizobamba iqhaza ekutholeni izimakethe ezinkulu lapho laba balimi bezokwazi ukudayisa khona imikhiqizo yabo ngamanani amahle azobenza bakhule babe ngabalimi bezohwebo abakhulu ezweni. Amalungu omphakathi akwamkele ngesasasa elikhulu lokhu kuthuthuka bethi kuzosiza ukunciphisa indlala nobumpofu emizini yabo eminingi ebilokhu ibhekane nenkinga yezimali.

Lolu hlelo olusha lwenziwa ngenhloso yokunciphisa imigqa emide nabasebenzi abavamile ukugcwala emishinini yama-computer emahgovisini omnyango wezentshisekelo yomphakathi ezindaweni ezahlukene ezweni lonke. Izicelo ezifakwa ngale ndlela entsha zithatha isikhathi esifushane kakhulu ukuba zicwaningwe futhi abazali bathole izimpendulo zabo ngomyalezo wombhalo kumakhalekhukhwini wabo ngaphandle kokubambezeleka okukhulu njengasesikhathini esidlule. Uhulumeni unqume ukuthi kube nabasebenzi bomphakathi abazohlala behambela izindawo zasemakhaya ukusiza omama nabo gogo abangakwazi ukusebenzisa amaselula emisha ukwenza lezi zicelo kalula. Isibonelelo somntwana sibaluleke kakhulu ekuthengeni ubisi, ukudla nezingubo zezikole zabantwana abancane abasakhula emiphakathini yethu eminingi ehluphekayo ngenxa yokushoda kwemisebenzi ezweni.

Lolu hlelo lokuhambela abantu emakhaya luholwa yizisebenzi zomphakathi nabanyango wezenhlalakahle ngenhloso yokuqinisekisa ukuthi wonke umuntu unomthetho ofanele wokuthola usizo lwezimali uma egula kakhulu noma ekhubazekile ngokomzimba. Ochwepheshe bezempilo nabo bayingxenye yalolu hambo ukuze bahlole abantu khona lapho emakhaya abo baphinde bakhiphe izitifiketi zezempilo ezidingekayo ekufakeni izicelo zalezi zibonelelo zomphakathi. Lokhu kusiza kakhulu ekutheni abantu asebabadala nalabo abangasakwazi ukuhamba bangazitholi beshiywe ngaphandle kwezinhlelo zosizo lwezimali ezisiza ukubasiza ukuba baphile impilo enesithunzi. Umphakathi ubonge kakhulu lo mklamo omuhle okhombisa ukuthi uhulumeni uyazikhathalela izakhamuzi zakhe ezisemakhaya ungalokhu ubheka kuphela labo abahlala emadolobheni amakhulu lapho izinsiza ziseduze khona.

I-SASSA ikhiphe isitatimende esicacile esithi abantu abaningi balahlekelwa yizinkokhelo zabo ngenxa yokushintsha amabhange ngaphandle kokwazisa amahhovisi kahulumeni afanele ngalezo zinguquko ezenziwayo. Uhlelo lolu lokuvuselela imininingwane lungalandelelwa nasemahgovisini aseduze omphakathi lapho kukhona abasizi abaqeqeshelwe ukusiza izakhamuzi ngazo zonke izindlela ezilula nezisemthethweni. Abantu asebabadala bacelwe ukuba baphathise izihlobo zabo ezithembekile kuphela izinombolo zabo zomshini wokukhipha imali ukugwema inkohlakalo nokwebelwa izimali zabo ngabantu abangafuni ukusebenza abafuna ukuziphilela ngomhlalaphansi wabanye abantu. Amaphoyisa azobe ekhona ngezinsuku zezinkokhelo ezindaweni zokulanda izimali ukunikeza ezokuphepha kubo bonke abantu abazothola izimali zabo zanyanga zonke zokuziphilisa.

Izindlela ezinqala zokuqeda inkohlakalo ezinhlelweni zokwabiwa kwezibonelelo zomphakathi zethulwe kuleli sonto ngomunye wemishini emisha yezobuchwepheshe obusebenzisa izithonjana zeminwe ukukhipha izimali zabantu abafanele kuphela. Lolu hlelo olusha lokuphepha luhlose ukuvikela izimali zombuso ukuba zingayi kubantu asebashona noma kulabo abafaka izicelo besebenzisa amagama omgunyathi angekho emthethweni neze ezweni lethu. Uhulumeni uveze ukuthi kunezizumbulu zezimali ezilahlekayo njalo ngonyaka ngenxa yale nkohlakalo eyenziwa ngabantu abathile abebambisene nabasebenzi bokukhwabanisa emahgovisini ombuso. Manje ngalobu buchwepheshe obusha bomshini wezithonjana zeminwe wonke umuntu ozofika ukuzolanda imali kuzomele aqinisekise ukuthi nguye ngempela ngaphambi kokuba imali iphume ebhange noma emshinini. Umphakathi ukwamkele lokhu ngoba uthi kuzosiza ukuthi izimali zikahulumeni zikwazi ukufika kubantu abampofu ngempela abadinga usizo lokuphila nokuphakela imindeni yabo ukudla okwanele nsuku zonke.

Lolu hlelo lokudla kwamahhala luhlose ukulwa nenkinga yendlala nemikhuhlane ehlasela abantu ngenxa yokungatholi ukudla okunempilo okwakha umzimba nezinhlelo zokuzivikela ezifweni ezahlukene zomhlaba. Izikhungo lezi zizobe ziphethwe ngomame bendawo abazothola iholo elincane elivela kuhulumeni ngenhloso yokubasiza nabo ukuba baphile baphinde banakekele imiphakathi yabo ngendlela efanele neyemvelo. Umphakathi ukhuthaziwe ukuba ulethe abantwana abancane kulezi zikhungo emva kokuphuma kwesikole ukuze bathole ukudla okushisayo ngaphambi kokuba baye emakhaya abo ukuyokwenza imisebenzi yasesikoleni. Izikhulu zikamasipala ziveze ukuthi zizohlala zihlola ikhwalithi yokudla okwenzwayo kulezi zikhungo ukwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi kulandelwa yonke imithetho yezempilo nenhlanzeko efanelekile emphakathini jikelele.

Lolu hlelo lokusiza abaphila nokukhubazeka lumahhala futhi luhloselwe ukubasiza ukuba bakwazi ukuhamba ngokukhululeka nabo bathathe iqhaza emisebenzi ehlukene yomphakathi kanye neyentuthuko ezindaweni abahlala kuzo. Abazali abanezingane ezikhubazekile bakhuthaziwe ukuba bazibhalise kulesi sikhungo esisha ukuze zikwazi ukuthola odokotela abakhethekile abazozisiza ngezindlela zokuzivocavoca nentuthuko yengqondo yazo. Uhulumeni unqume ukwenza ngcono izakhiwo zomphakathi zonke ukuze kube lula ngabantu abasebenzisa izihlalo ezinegudlu ukungena baphinde baphume ngaphandle kokusizwa ngomunye umuntu ngaso sonke isikhathi. Amalungu omphakathi akwamkele ngesasasa elikhulu lolu sizo abathi luzobuyisela isithunzi nokuzethemba kubantu abaningi abebengakwazi ukushiya izindlu zabo ngenxa yokushoda kwalezi zinsiza ezibalulekile.

Lolu sizo oluphuthumayo luze emva kokuba izindlu zabo eziningi zokuhlala zicekelwe phansi yizimvula ezinkulu ezine ezinsukwini ezidlule ezishiye abantu abaningi bengenazo izindawo zokukhosela nempahla yabo yansuku zonke. Izisebenzi zomphakathi zizohlala zihlola izimo zemindeni kulezi zindawo ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi usizo luya kubantu abakufanele ngempela hhayi labo abafuna ukusebenzisa amathuba ngendlela engekho emthethweni. Amalungu omphakathi anconywe kakhulu ngokubonisa umoya wobunye nokusizana ngokunikeza abahlaselwe yilezi zinhlekelele indawo yokuhlala yesikhashana ngezikhathi zobunzima obukhulu. Uhulumeni uthe lolu sizo luyingxenye yezibopho zakhe zokunakekela izakhamuzi zonke ezisengcupheni yokuhlupheka kakhulu ezweni lonke ngaphambi kokuba kwakhiwe izindlu zoxhaso ezihlala njalo.

Emaphethelong ezindawo zasemakhaya eziningi sekuqalwe uhlelo olusha lokubhalisela isibonelelo sezimali sezinyanga ezithile esibhekiswe kubantu abasha abafuna imisebenzi kodwa bengenazo izindleko zokuhamba ukuya kuzo ngenxa yobumpofu emakhaya. Lolu xhaso oluncane luzosiza intsha ukuba ikwazi ukugibela amatekisi namabhasi lapho iya kuhlola imisebenzi noma lapho iya emhlanganweni yokuqeqeshwa ngezandla ezindaweni ezahlukene eziseduze. Abafakeli bezicelo kumele babe neminyaka ephakathi kweshumi nesishiyagalombili namashumi amathathu nanhlanu futhi baqinisekise ukuthi abasitholi esinye isibonelelo sikahulumeni ngaleso sikhathi abafaka ngaso isicelo. Uhlelo lolu luyingxenye yemizamo emikhulu kahulumeni yokubhekana nenkinga yokuntuleka kwemisebenzi kwentsha eyinkinga enkulu ebhekene nezwe lethu kulezi zinsuku zomhlaba. Amakomiti omphakathi azosiza ekuhlungeni amagama abantu abadinga lolu sizo ngempela ukuze kuqinisekiswe ubulungiswa nobuqotho kuyo yonke le nqubo yokwabiwa kwezimali zomphakathi wasendaweni yethu.

La makhadi amasha anezinhlelo zezobuchwepheshe ezenza ukuba umuntu angakwazi ukukhipha imali uma engenayo i-PIN code ekhethekile eyaziwa nguye yedwa nendodana noma indodakazi yakhe ethembekile ekhaya. Phambilini bekunemibiko eminingi yezigebengu ezijika abantu asebabadala emigqeni zibashintshele amakhadi abo okwenza ukuba balahlekelwe yizo zonke izimali zabo zokuziphilisa zanyanga zonke. Amaphoyisa omphakathi nawo azohlala eseduze nezitolo ezinkulu lapho kukhishwa khona lezi zimali ukuze kuvikelwe abantu abadala kunoma yiluphi uhlobo lokuhlukunyezwa ngabantu abangafuni ukusebenza. Kamasipala ubonge kakhulu izinhlangano zomphakathi ezisiza ukunika abadala ukudla okushisayo netiye ngezinsuku zokulanda izimpesheni zabo emahgovisini amancane asendaweni yakubo.

Uhlelo lolu oluholwa ngumnyango wezemfundo eyisisekelo luhlose ukunciphisa igebe elikhona phakathi kwezikole ezisemadolobheni nalaho ezisemakhaya ezihlale zingenazo izinsiza ezanele zokufunda isikhathi eside. Othisha bazo zonke lezi zikole ezithintekayo baqeqeshiwe kulezi zinyanga ezidlule ukuze bakwazi ukusebenzisa lobu buchwepheshe obusha ukufundisa izifundo ezifana nezibalo nezesayensi ngendlela elula nehehayo. Abafundi bakhombise umdlandla omkhulu ngenkathi kuwulwa la mahhovisi amasha bethi lokhu kuzobasiza kakhulu ukuba balungele izifundo zabo zasenyuvesi ngezikhathi ezizayo. Uhulumeni uthe lolu hlelo luzoqhubeka unyaka wonke kuze kube zonke izikole zasemakhaya ziba nezinsiza ezifanayo nezikhombisa isithunzi semfundo esiphakeme kubantwana bonke bezwe lethu.

Isikole lesi esakhiwe ngokubambisana phakathi kukahulumeni nezinkampani ezizimele sinezindawo zokugcina izilwane nezitshalo lapho abafundi bezofunda khona ngendlela ephathekayo nenzuzo yokulima ngezindlela zesimanje. Izikhulu zezemfundo ziveze ukuthi lolu hlelo luzosiza ekutheni intsha ingagcini nje ngokufuna imisebenzi yasemahgovisini kodwa ikwazi ukuzivulela amathuba amabhizinisi ezolimo azothuthukisa umnotho wasemakhaya. Abazali babafundi bazwakalise ukuthokoza okukhulu ngalesi sikole bethi abantwana babo manje sebethola imfundo ezobasiza ngokushesha empilweni yabo yansuku zonke ngaphandle kokulinda imisebenzi iminyaka eminingi emva kokuphothula izifundo zabo zasemasekhondari. Uhlelo lolu lwentuthuko luyingxenye yesu elisha lezemfundo lokuguqula ikharikhulamu yezikole ukuba ihlangabezane nezidingo ezikhona emphakathini jikelele kulezi zinsuku.

Lo mtapo wezincwadi obulokhu ulindelwe isikhathi eside unendawo ekhethekile eyenzelwe abantwana abancane lapho bezokwazi ukufunda khona amabhuku anezithombe ngezimpelasonto ngenhloso yokukhulisa uthando lokufunda kubo besebancane. Uhlelo lolu lokwakha imizila yemfundo lusekelwe ngezimali ngumasipala wesifunda obone ukuthi abafundi bakule ndawo baphuthelwa amathuba amaningi amahle ngenxa yokushoda kwezincwadi ezidingekayo ezifundweni zabo ezinkulu. Amakomiti ezikole acele amalungu omphakathi ukuba baphathise la mabhuku kahle futhi bangawacekele phansi ukuze akwazi ukusiza nezinye izizukulwane ezizayo ezisadinga ukufunda nokuthola ulwazi. Kuzoba nabasebenzi abaqeqeshiwe abazohlala bekhona ukusiza abafundi ngezindlela zokuthola ulwazi emikhakheni ehlukene yezifundo zabo zasendaweni.

Izindlela ezintsha zokusekelwa kwabafundi bematrikhi ezifundeni zasemakhaya zethulwe ngomkhankaso wamakilasi angeziwe ngezimpelasonto nangezikhathi zamaholide ezikole ngenhloso yokwenziwa ngcono kwemiphumela yabo ekupheleni konyaka wokufunda. Lolu hlelo olubandakanya othisha abaneminyaka eminingi yesipiliyoni sizosiza abafundi ukuba babuyekeze izihloko ezinzima kakhulu ezifana nezibalo, isayensi yezinto eziphilayo kanye nezolimo ezivame ukuba nezinkinga kubantu abaningi. Uhulumeni unqume ukuhlinzeka ngokudla kwamahhala nezithuthi kubafundi bonke abazoba khona kulezi zinhlelo zokufunda ukuze bangabi nengcindezi yezindleko ezisindayo emakhaya abo ampofu. Izikhulu zezemfundo zicela abazali ukuba babambisane notshisha ngokukhuthaza abantwana babo ukuba bangebese bephuthelwa yila makilasi abaluleke kangaka kuwo wonke umfundi ofuna ukuphasa kahle aye enyuvesi. Lo mkhankaso omuhle usekelwe kakhulu nayizinhlangano zentsha zendawo ezizibophezele ukusiza ukuhlela la makilasi nokuqinisekisa ukuthi kunokuthula nokuphatheka kahle kuyo yonke le nqubo yokufunda.

Lolu hlelo lokuxhasa ngezimali luzohlanganisa nezindleko zendawo yokuhlala, izincwadi zokufunda kanye nemali yokudla yanyanga zonke ukuze umfundi ngamunye akwazi ukugxila ezifundweni zakhe ngokugcwele ngaphandle kokukhathazeka ngokuxoshwa. Izikhulu ziveze ukuthi zizosebenza ngokuzikhandla ukuza kuqinisekiswe ukuthi izimali zikhishwa ngesikhathi esifanele ukugwema imibhikisho nokuphazamiseka kwezifundo emakhemphasini ahlukene ezwe lethu phakathi nonyaka wokufunda olandelayo. Abafundi bacelwe ukuba baphase izifundo zabo ngendlela efanele ukuze baqhubeke nokuthola lolu xhaso olubaluleke kakhulu oluvela emphakathini wasendaweni yethu nasebukhosini jikelele. Lolu sizo luyingxenye yezinhlelo zombuso zokuqinisekisa ukuthi imfundo ephakeme iba yinto etholakala kuwo wonke umuntu ezweni kungakhathalekile isimo sakhe sezimali ekhaya.

Lazi izikhungo ezaziwa ngama-TVET amakolishi azohlanganisa izifundo zabo nezidingo zezimboni zendawo ukuze abafundi bathole amathuba okwenza imisebenzi ephathekayo ngezikhathi zokufunda kwabo phakathi nonyaka wokufunda olandelayo. Intsha yakule ndawo izokwazi ukubhalisela izifundo ezifana nezobunjiniyela bezimoto, ukwakhiwa kwezindlu kanye nezinhlelo zekhompiyutha ngaphandle kokuhambela kude nemizi yabo yasemakhaya. Umphakathi uwamkele ngomdlandla omkhulu lo mklamo omuhle bethi uzobasiza kakhulu abantwana babo ukuba bazuze ulwazi oluzobafaka emisebenzini ekhokhayo masinyane emva kokuphothula izifundo zabo zokuqala. Kamasipala uzosebenzisana namakolishi la ukuhlinzeka ngezindawo zokuzilolonga kubafundi abafuna ukuphothula iziqu zabo zomsebenzi wezandla ngendlela efanelekile neyemvelo emphakathini jikelele.

Uhlelo lolu luhloselwe ukusiza ikakhulukazi abantu asebabadala, abantwana abancane kanye nalabo abaphila nezifo ezihlala njalo emizimbeni yabo abasengozini enkulu yokungenwa yimikhuhlane eyingozi kalula emphakathini. Umnyango usebenzise izinkundla zomphakathi ezahlukene nezikhungo zomphakathi eziseduze ukunikeza lolu sizo lomgomo wamahhala ukuze wonke umuntu akwazi ukufikelela kulo ngaphandle kokukhokha izindleko zezokuthutha eziya ezibhedlela ezinkulu. Odokotela nabahlengikazi bendawo bakhuthaze abantu ukuba balandele izindlela ezifanelekile zokuzigcina behlanzekile ngezikhathi zonke ukugwema ukubhebhetheka kwezifo phakathi kwemindeni yabo emakhaya. Uhlelo lolu luzoqhubeka nasezinyangeni ezizayo kuze kube kufikelelwa kuwo wonke umuntu ezindaweni zasemakhaya lapho imitholampilo ishaqeka khona kakhulu kulezi zinsuku zomnyaka.

Lolu hlelo oluholwa yizisebenzi zezempilo zomphakathi luhlose ukunciphisa isibalo sabantu abasha abangenelelwa yilezi zifo ngenxa yokushoda kolwazi ngezindlela zokuzivikela nemicabango engeyona ekhona phakathi kwabantu. Abahlali bathole namathuba okuhlolwa mahhala igazi labo ukwazi isimo sabo sezempilo khona lapho emhlanganweni baphinde bathole nezeluleko ezinhle zendlela yokuziphatha neyokudla ukudla okwakha umzimba okufanele kulezi zinsuku. Uhulumeni unqume ukuthi imithi yokwelapha izifo ezihlala njalo izohlala itholakala ngesikhathi esifanele kuzo zonke izikhungo zezempilo ukuze abantu bangahlupheki ngenxa yokushoda kwayo emahgovisini ezempilo. Umphakathi ukhuthaziwe ukuba ukhulume ngokukhululeka ngalezi zindaba ukugwema ukucwaswa kwabantu abaphila nazo lezi zifo ezindaweni zethu zokuhlala zansuku zonke.

Lolu hlelo oluqhubeke izinsuku ezinhlanu lusize abantu abaningi asebabadala abebengasakwazi ukubona kahle ngenxa yokungabi nazo izimali zokuya kodokotela abazimele ababiza izimali eziningi kakhulu ezingaphezu kwamandla abo ezomnotho. Izisebenzi zezempilo zomphakathi zizohlala zihlola izimo zabantu emakhaya emva kwalezi zinhlinzo ukwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi amehlo abo ayalulama ngendlela efanele nenhlanzi ngaphando kokungenwa yizifo ezintsha zendawo. Umphakathi uwamkele ngolukhulu uthando lolu sizo bethi seluzobuyisela ukukhanya nethemba ezimpilweni zabo zansuku zonke njengoba manje sebengakwazi ukuzenzela izinto eziningi emakhaya abo ngaphandle kokuncika njalo ezihlotsheni zabo. Uhulumeni uthe lolu hlelo luzohambela nezinye izifunda zasemakhaya ngenhloso yokufika kubantu abaningi abadinga lolu sizo olusemqoka kakhulu empilweni.

Lo mgwaqo obulokhu unodaka nemigodi emikhulu iminyaka eminingi ubuvame ukudala ukuthi amatekisi namabhasi angakwazi ukufika ezindaweni ezithile ngezikhathi zezimvula ezinkulu okwakubambezela abasebenzi nabantwana besikole abaningi. Uhlelo lolu lokwakha luzothatha izinyanga eziyisishiyagalombili futhi luzonikeza amathuba emisebenzi eminingi yesikhashana kubantu bendawo abangasebenzi abazothola amakhono ekwakhiweni kwemigwaqo nemisele yamanzi elungile emphakathini. Kamasipala ucele abashayeli bezimoto ukuba basebenzise eminye imigwaqo eseceleni ngesikhathi kusaqhubeka lo msebenzi omkhulu wokwakha ukugwema ingozi nokuminyana okungenasidingo phakathi nezinsuku zomsebenzi. Lo mklamo omkhulu uthenjwa kakhulu ukuthi uzoguqula ukubukeka kwendawo yonke futhi ulethe osomabhizinisi abasha abazovula amathuba emisebenzi eminingi eyengeziwe emphakathini wethu.

Lolu hlelo lwentuthuko luhlose ukubhekana nenkinga yokushoda kwamanzi ahlanzekile ebilokhu ihlupha abantu ngenxa yokwanda okusheshayo kwesibalo sezindlu ezakhiwayo kulezi zindawo ezintsha zokuhlala zomphakathi wethu. Izikhulu zikamasipala ziveze ukuthi zizosebenzisa izinto zokusebenza ezisezingeni eliphezulu kakhulu ukuze la maphayipi amasha akwazi ukuthwala amanzi amaningi isikhathi eside ngaphandle kokugqashuka noma okonakala kalula ngenxa yomfutho wamanzi. Abahlali bakhuthaziwe ukuba basebenzise amanzi ngendlela efanele futhi babike noma yikuphi ukuvuza okubonakala emigwaqweni ukuze kuthunyelwe abasebenzi bezobuchwepheshe ngokushesha ukuzolungisa inkinga leyo ngaphambi kokuba amanzi amaningi achitheke phansi kabi. Uhlelo lolu luyingxenye yomzamo omkhulu wokuletha izinsiza eziyisekelo kubantu bonke ngendlela elinganayo nenesithunzi emphakathini jikelele.

Leli phulo lamalungiselelo eentsuku ezimbili lijolise ekuncedeni abemi abangakwazi kufikelela lula kwiiofisi ezinkulu ezisezidolophini ngenxa yeendleko eziphezulu zokuhamba ngezinto zokuthutha zoluntu kule mihla. Abahlali bakwazile ukufaka izicelo zomazisi bentsana bafumana neengcebiso ezimalunga namathuba emisebenzi ematsha anikezelwa ngumasipala wengingqi kulo nyaka-mali uqalayo. Amagosa emveli kunye neenkokheli zoluntu bazwakalise ungcangcazelo olukhulu ngenxa yale ndlela entsha nekhawulezayo yokuzisa uncedo ebantwini abampofu abasemaphandleni. Urhulumente uzibophelele ukuba lolu hlelo luza kujikeleza nakweminye imizana ekude kakhulu ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuba akukho namnye ummi oshiywayo ngaphambili kwiinkonzo ezisisiseko zobomi bentsuku ngentsuku. Izakhamuzi zicetyiswe ukuba ziwagcine kakuhle amaxwebhu azo asemthethweni kwaye zisebenzisane namagosa aze kukhonza ngokunyaniseka okukhulu.

Le nqubo iqale ngemikhankaso yeendibano zoluntu apho wonke ummi enikwa ithuba lokubeka izimvo zakhe ezizakukunceda ekubumbeni umthetho wokugqibela ozakuthi uphasiswe yipalamente yelizwe lethu kungekudala. Iinkokheli zoluntu ziveze ukuba inkoliso yabantu ebihlelelekile ixesha elide phantsi kwemithetho emidala ngoku iza kufumana isidima samalungelo agcweleyo okuba nemihlaba yezolimo neyokuhlala. Amagosa omnyango wezemihlaba acacise ukuba le ndlela entsha iza kunciphisa neengxabano ezihlala zikhona phakathi kwemindeni malunga nokwabiwa kwemihlaba yezikhumbuzo emakhaya. Abahlali bakhuthaziwe ukuba bazimase le mi hlangano ngobuninzi babo kwaye bangabi naloyiko lokuthetha ngezinto ezibakhathazayo ukuze kuzuze isizwe sonke ngokulinganayo nangesithethe esihle kakhulu.

Kulandela le meko imbi ikomiti yoluntu ihlangene nabaphathi bephandle lamapolisa kunye nabameli bakamasipala wengingqi ukulungiselela amanyathelo okhuseleko akhawulezileyo azakuthathwa kule veki. Kuvele ukuba masipala usele uqalise inkqubo yokuthenga izixhobo ezitsha zombane kwaye amagcisa azakuthunyelwa kule ndawo ukulungisa zonke izibane ezonakeleyo kwakamsinya nje. Ngeli xesha kulindwe ezo zilungiso amapolisa azakwandisa ukujikeleza ngeemoto zawo ezindaweni ezaziwa ngokuba yingozi kakhulu kuluntu jikelele lwale ndawo. Izakhamuzi nazo ziceliwe ukuba ziseke amaqela okhuseleko aza kusebenzisana nomthetho ukukhusela abantwana kunye nabantu abadala abasesichengeni. Eli phulo lithembisa ukuzisa uxolo nokuphungula ulwaphulo-mthetho olujongene nabemi.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi angcolileyo kule lali yaseNgcobo kukhokelele ekubeni abantu basekuhlaleni baququzelele uqhankqalazo olunoluleko ngenjongo yokwazisa urhulumente ngobunzima abajongene nabo mihla le. Iphulo eli likhokelele ekubeni imeya kamasipala wasesifundeni ihambele le lali buqu ukuziphula izikhalo zabahlali nokuza nezisombululo ezizakukhawulezisa ukuziswa kweenkonzo zophuhliso lwangaphakathi. Kule ndibano kumenyezelwe ukuba ithenda yokulungiswa kwendlela eya kule lali sele inikiwe inkampani yokwakha kwaye izixhobo zizakufika kule ndawo phambi kokuphela kwale nyanga. Malunga nemiba yamanzi amapompo amatsha azakulungiswa kwaye kuthunyelwe neelori zamanzi ezizakubonelela uluntu ngexesha kusasetyenzwa kule ngqalasizinda indala yonakeleyo ngenxa yexesha elide isetyenziswa. Uluntu lukwamkele oku ngomoya omhle kakhulu kodwa lwathembisa ukuba luza kuhlala lubeke iliso kule misebenzi iqalwayo ukuqinisekisa ikhwalithi efanelekileyo.

Eli ziko lizakubonelela abantwana besikole kunye nolutsha olungasebenziyo ngethuba lokusebenzisa i-inthanethi yasimahla ukufunda imisebenzi emitsha nokuphuhlisa izakhono zabo zezandla nezekhompyutha. Ikhomiti yoluntu ivakalise uvuyo olukhulu ngale nkqubo kuba iza kunceda ukunciphisa isibalo solutsha oluhlala ezitratweni lungenzi nto nto leyo ebangela ukuba bazibandakanye nemikhuba emibi ebulala ikusasa labo. Ootitshala bezikole zengingqi nabo bathembe ukuba eli ziko liza kuphucula imfundo yabantwana kuba baza kukwazi ukwenza uphando lwezifundo zabo lula kunesikhathi esidlulileyo lapho begenazo ezi zixhobo zibalulekileyo. Umsebenzi wokwakha eli ziko ulindeleke ukuba uqalise kungekudala kwaye abasebenzi beza kukhathwa kulona lolu luntu lwasengingqi.

Kule ndibano abahlali bakhuthaziwe ukuba baqale inkqubo yokuhlula inkukuma emakhaya abo kwaye kukhuthazwe nabantu abasakhulayo ukuba baqale amabhizinisi amancinci okuhlaziya nokusebenzisa kwakhona izinto ezilahliweyo ukwenza ingeniso. Urhulumente wasekuhlaleni uzakubonelela ngeebhakethi ezinkulu ezitsha zomgqomo kwaye iilori zikamasipala zizakuzilanda ngamaxesha azinzileyo angenziwa tshintsho ngaphandle kokwazisa uluntu ngaphambili. Leli nyathelo lijolise ekunqandeni ukulahlwa kwenkukuma ezitratweni nakwimijelo yamanzi nto leyo edala izifo ezininzi kwaye yonakalise nendalo entle yommandla wethu esizingca ngayo jikelele. Abahlali bavumelene ngam voice anye ukuba baza kusebenzisana nomasipala ukugcina indawo ihlanzekile kwaye baphose isandla kule nkqubo intsha entle.

Olu bhekiso lwenziwe ngurhulumente njengenxalenye yesisombululo sokulwa nengxaki yokucinywa kombane ekhathaza kakhulu uqoqosho lwelizwe kule mihla siphila kuyo ngoku. Abahlali bakwazile ukufumana olu ncedo ngenxa yokuba kude kwabo kwizikhululo ezikhulu zombane ezisentshonalanga nto leyo eyenza ukuba ukufakelwa kweentambo zombane eziqhelekileyo kubize izimali ezininzi kakhulu nezingaphaya kwamandla kamasipala. Intsha yale ndawo iqeqeshiwe ekufakeni nasekulungiseni la mapaneli elanga ukuze ihlale ikhona ngezikhathi apho kufuneka khona ulungiso lwezixhobo ngaphandle kokulinda amagcisa avela kude ezidolophini ezinkulu. Eli phulo lilethe ithemba nomdlandla omtsha ebantwini abadala nasebantwaneni abasakwazi ukufunda ebusuku kunesikhathi apho bebesebenzisa amakhandlela ayingozi kakhulu emakhaya.

Emaphethelong edolophu yaseBhaufonti kuqalwe ulwakhiwo lwezindlu zoluntu ezitsha ezizakuhlala abantu abashenxiswayo kwiindawo zasemijondolo ezisesichengeni seentlekele ezifana nezikhukhula nemililo emibi yasebusika. Le phrojekthi enkulu iza kunika abantu iindawo zokuhlala ezikhuselekileyo ezinezindlu zangasese ezisetyenziswa ngamanzi kunye nemigwaqo efanelekileyo etiyelweyo evumela iimoto zongxami-moya namapolisa ukuba afike lula xa kukho isidingo somsebenzi. Amagosa ezindlu aphawule ukuba uluhlu lwabantu abaza kufumana ezi zindlu luhloliwe ngobuchule obukhulu ukunqanda ubuqhetseba kunye nenkohlakalo ethanda ukwenzeka kwiinkqubo ezinjazi zokunikezelwa kwezindlu zoluntu zoxhaso. Abemi bale ndawo bazwakalise ukubulela kwabo okuphuphumayo ngenxa yokuba amaphupha abo okuba nemizi enesidima ekugqibeleni ayazisekiswa emva kweminyaka emininzi belindile elubuthweni lwenkqubo yokulinda indlu zikahulumeni. Ulwakhiwo olu luza kudala namathuba emisebenzi yesikhakhana kubantu abaninzi abangasebenziyo kule ndawo.

Olu qeqesho lolwexesha eliliyeza iinyanga ezintandathu kwaye abafundi baza kufumana izitifiketi ezamkelweyo ngokusemthethweni ezizakubanceda ukuba bafumane imisebenzi ezinzileyo okanye baqale amashishini wabo amancinci. Urhulumente wesifundazwe unikezele ngezimali zokuthenga izixhobo zokusebenza kwaye wonke umfundi uza kufumana nenkxaso encinci yenyanga yokuhamba ukuya kwizikhululo zoqeqesho. Iinkokheli zasekuhlaleni zizwakalise ukuba olu luhlobo lwenguqu oludingekayo kummandla wethu ukulwa nendlala nentswela-mizala engaka ebonakala mihla le phakathi kwolutsha lwethu lwesizwe. Abazali bakhuthaze abantwana babo ukuba balubambe ngazo zombini eli thuba lihle kakhulu kwaye baziphathe ngendlela eyonelisayo nenebambiswano ngethuba lesifundo sezakhono.

Izindlela ezintsha zokunikezelwa kweenkonzo zoluntu zamkelwe ngomdla omkhulu kwingqungquthela yabaphathi bamabhodi eziphathamandla zasekuhlaleni apho kuxoxwe ngokusetyenziswa kwezixhobo zale mihla zekhompyutha ukukhawulezisa uncedo ebantwini. Ngaloo ndlela entsha abemi baza kukwazi ukubika iingxaki ezifana nokuvuza kwamanzi kunye nokunqamuka kombane besebenzisa amasuntsu emiyalezo kwiziselfoni zabo ngaphandle kokuba baye kuma ngemigca emide kwii-ofisi zikamasipala. Le nkqubo iza kunceda kakhulu ekwenzeni abasebenzi baka-masipala basabele ngokukhawuleza kwiingxaki zoluntu kwaye kuvalwe nethuba lokuba abahlali bazive bengakhathalelwanga ngabasizi babo bakarhulumente. Amagosa avela kwesebe lezobuchwepheshe aqinisekiswe ukuba iindawo zasemaphandleni nazo zizakufumana olu ncedo ngenxa yokufakelwa kweentambo zothungelwano zale mihla ezikhawulezayo kwizikhululo zoluntu zasengingqi zolwazi. Uluntu lonke luyalelwe ukuba luyisebenzise ngobuchule le nkqubo entsha ukulungisa nokwakha ikusasa elingcono.

Le nkqubo iququzelelwe ngumnyango wezokuhlaliswa kwabantu ngokubambisana nabenzi-mithetho basekuhlaleni ukulungisa iimpazamo zamandulo apho abantu babenemizi kodwa bengenazo iincwadi ezibonisa ubunini bomhlaba ngokusemthethweni. Ukuba netaytile yomhlaba kunceda umndeni ukuba ukwazi ukusebenzisa ikhaya lawo njengesikhuseleko xa ufuna ukufaka izicelo zemali mboleko emabhankini ukuba uqale amashishini okanye uphuhlise ikhaya lalo ukuba libe lihle kakhulu. Amagosa karhulumente acele uluntu ukuba luze lukhawulezise ukuzisa amaxwebhu adingekayo afana nezatifiketi zokuzalwa neempepha zomhlaba zakudala ukuze le nkqubo igqitywe ngexesha elifanelekileyo ngaphandle kokulibaziseka okukhulu kwezicelo zabo ezifakiweyo.

Olu phuhliso luncediswa ngemali evela kwingxowa-mali yesizwe yophuhliso kwaye lujolise ekwenzeni la maziko ukuba abe ziindawo apho abantu bafumana khona uncedo oluhle ngeendaba zasekuhlaleni nemicimbi yamasiko nezithethe zethu ezintle. Izakhamuzi zizwakalise ungcangcazelo kuba le misebenzi iza kudala imisebenzi elikhulu kubantu abahlala kule mimandla kwaye kuphuculwe nendlela yokuhambisa ulwazi phakathi kukamasipala nabasekuhlaleni jikelele. Iinkosi zomdabu zizwakalise umbulelo wazo zathi le nkqubo iza kubuyisela intlonipho nendlela efanelekileyo yokulawula nokuphatha imicimbi yoluntu njengoko kwakusenziwa mandulo kukhokelo lwesizwe sakithi. Umsebenzi lo ulindeleke ukuba uphele kwiinyanga ezizayo phambi kokuba kuqale ixesha lasebusika obubandayo kakhulu.

Kulandela ezi zikhalazo abaphathi bakamasipala bathumele ithimba lamagcisa ezobunjiniyela ukuba baphonononge indlela amashaneli amanzi akhiwe ngayo nokuza nesicwangciso esitsha sokwandisa imibhobho ehambisa amanzi emvula aye emilanjeni ekude. Oku kuza kunceda kakhulu ekukhuseleni imizi yoluntu ngakumbi amakhaya lawo akhwamele ezindaweni ezisezantsi nezingasentla apho amanzi aqukuqela ngamandla kakhulu xa kukho izaqhwithi ezinkulu zezulu. Ikomiti yoluntu icele abahlali ukuba bangalahli inkukuma kule misele yamanzi kuba oko kubangela ukuba ivaleke kwaye kudaleke le ngxaki yokuzala kwamanzi ezitratweni nasezindlini zomphakathi wasendaweni. Umsebenzi lo uza kuqala kule veki kwaye urhulumente uqinisekisile ukuba izimali zokhuseleko zikhona ezanele lo msebenzi.

Izindlela ezinqala zokulwa nokunqandwa kobuqhetseba kwiithenda zentuthuko zekhondishini entsha zethulwe ngumbusi wesifundazwe kule veki ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba iimali zoluntu zisetyenziswa ngendlela efanelekileyo nenyanisekileyo kuwo wonke amasebe karhulumente. Leli qhinga elitsha liza kufuna ukuba zonke iinkampani ezifaka izicelo zeethenda ziveze amagama abanini bazo ngokupheleleyo kwaye kuhlolwe neerekhodi zabo zerhafu ukunqanda ukuba abasebenzi baka-masipala banikeze imisebenzi kwizihlobo zabo. Urhulumente uzimisele ukugxotha naluphi na igosa elifunyaniswa linobudlelwane obungekho mthethweni neenkampani zokwakha kwaye iinkampani ezinjalo zizakubekwa kuluhlu olubomvu ukuze zingaphindi zifumane misebenzi karhulumente iminyaka emininzi ezayo. Uluntu lukwamkele oku njengenyathelo elihle elizakuzisa elubala indlela iimali zophuhliso ezichithwa ngayo kummandla wethu nokwenza ukuba imisebenzi yenziwe ngendlela echanekileyo nenesidima esikhulu esifanelekileyo emthethweni welizwe.

Lolu ncedo lujolise ekubaxhaseni ukuba bathenge izixhobo zokusebenza ezifana nemishini yokuthunga, izixhobo zokubhaka kunye nezinto zokwenza imisebenzi yezandla eziza kubenza bakwazi ukuzimela ngokwabo ngokwengqondo nangokwemali emakhaya. Amagosa ezenhlalakahle azakubamba iindibano zokufundisa abantu indlela yokubhala izicwangciso zamabhizinisi kunye nendlela yokulawula iimali ukuze la mabhizinisi angawi emva kwexesha elifutshane nje ngenxa yokushoda kolwazi ngezobhizinisi zale mihla. Uluntu luzwakalise uvuyo nombulelo omkhulu ngenxa yale nkqubo ekhombisa ukuba urhulumente akayilibali imiphakathi esemajengetheni kwaye uyabakhathalela abantu bonke kungakhathaliseki imeko zabo zomzimba nezoqoqosho ezikhona ebomini babo.

Imeko le ibeka ubomi babahlali esichengeni esikhulu ngakumbi ngezikhathi zobusuku lapho kungekho zithuthi zoluntu zokubasa ezibhedlela ezinkulu ezisezidolophini xa kukho izigulane ezingxamisekileyo emakhaya. Isebe lezempilo liphendule ngokuthi izicwangciso zolwakhiwo zikumgangatho ophezulu kwaye umhlaba sele ukhonjiwe apho lo mtholampilo uzakwakhiwa khona kulo nyaka uzayo emva kokuba iimali zentuthuko zikhutshwe ngokupheleleyo yibhanki yesizwe. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba babekezele kwaye basebenzisane namagosa ezempilo aza kuthumela iilori ezizizikhululo zonyango zethutyana ukunika uncedo lwamayeza rhoqo ngeveki kule ndawo kude kube kugqitywa ulwakhiwo lwesakhiwo esitsha esihlala njalo somtholampilo woluntu.

Olu qeqesho luza kunika la malungu amatsha omphakathi amathuba amahle okufumana imisebenzi njengabalindi bendlela, abalindi bokhuseleko ezitolo nakwiindawo zokungcebeleka zoluntu ezityelelwa ziindwendwe ezininzi ezivela kumazwe angaphandle ngezikhathi zeholide. Amagosa ezothutho liveze ukuthi le nkqubo yinxalenye yendlela yokulwa nokuntuleka kwemisebenzi kummandla kwaye kuphuculwe nendlela yoluleko nokugcinwa komthetho kwiindlela zethu zasekuhlaleni eziqhele ukuba nezingozi ezininzi kakhulu zendlela ngenxa yokungathotyelwa kwemithetho. Abazali babafundi bavakalise umbulelo wabo bethi oku kuza kunceda abantwana babo ukuba bangangeni kwimikhuba emibi yokusebenzisa iziyobisi ngenxa yokuhlala bengenzi nto emakhaya yonke imihla yaphambi kokuba bafumane olu qeqesho lubalulekileyo lwezandla.

Lolu hlelo lwamandla avuselelekayo luzise isisombululo esikhulu nesihlala njalo kuba la mapompo awakho madinga kagesi uqhelekileyo ukuba asebenze kwaye akwazi ukupompa amanzi amananingi asuka ngaphantsi komhlaba aye emakhoneni onke aloo mizi yasezilalini. Amagosa ezamanzi acacise ukuba uluntu lwalapha lufundisiwe nendlela efanelekileyo yokunakekela ezi zixhobo zexabiso eliphezulu ukunqanda ukuba zingonakaliswa ngabantu abangafuni kuphucuka loluntu lwethu. Izakhamuzi zivakalise uvuyo olukhulu zathi ngoku zizakukwazi ukwenza neengadi zasemakhaya zokutshala imifino emitsha ezakubasiza ukulwa nendlala nobumpofu obuhlala bukhona emakhaya ngenxa yokunqaba kwemisebenzi kule mihla siphila kuyo ngoku elizweni jikelele laseMzantsi Afrika.

Le nkqubo entsha ihamba phambili ngenjongo yokuqinisekisa ukuba ubuqhetseba buyaphela kwaye abantu abafanele ukufumana izindlu ze-RDP ngabo batholayo ngendlela echanekileyo nenesidima emthethweni wesizwe sakithi. Amagosa kamasipala athembise ukuba iimpazamo zexesha elidlulileyo apho izindlu zazifunyanwa ngabantu abaneemali mboleko zombane okanye izihlobo zamagosa zizakulungiswa ngale ndlela entsha yokuhlola iinkqubo zofako-zicelo zoluntu jikelele. Abahlali baceliwe ukuba baphose isandla ngokubika naluphi na ubuqhetseba ababubonayo kule nkqubo ukuze kuthathwe amanyathelo asemthethweni anqala kwizaphuli-mthetho ezifuna ukonakalisa umsebenzi omhle wentuthuko eza kukhulisa isidima nempilo yoluntu lonke lwale ndawo.

Olu qeqesho lwenziwe ngeendatshana ezilula apho osomabhizinisi bafundiswe indlela yokusebenzisa imfonomfono zabo ukukhangisa iimveliso zabo kwizinto zentlalontle ezifana ne-Facebook ne-WhatsApp ukufikelela kubathengi abaninzi abatsha kakhulu ezidolophini. Urhulumente wasekuhlaleni ukwazise ukuba lolu ncedo luza kunceda ekutheni la mabhizinisi amancinci akwazi ukukhula kwaye aqashe abantu abaninzi kule miphakathi yethu ehluphekayo ngenxa yokushoda kwemisebenzi ezinzileyo kulo nyaka. Osomabhizinisi abagqibe olu qeqesho baza kufumana izitifiketi ezizakubanceda naxa befaka izicelo zenkxaso-mali emabhankini amakhulu nasezikhungweni zophuhliso zikahulumeni ezisiza amahlwempu namashishini asafufusa elizweni jikelele.

Leli ziko elitsha lifaka phakathi iiofisi zeSebe lezaseKhaya, elezeZenhlalakahle kunye nendawo lapho ulutsha lungafumana khona uncedo ngeekhompyutha ne-inthanethi yasimahla yokufaka izicelo zemisebenzi nemfundo ephakamileyo emanyuvesi ahlukeneyo elizwe lakithi. Umphakathi uwamkele ngolukhulu uthando lo mklamo omtsha bethi uza kuzisa amathuba amatsha omsebenzi nengcombolo entle elitalenteni lolutsha lwethu lwasemaphandleni oluhlala lulindelwe lukhulu empilweni yabo.

Lolu hlelo lwenzeka ngenjongo yokukhusela ikakhulukazi abantu abadala, iintsana ezisakhulayo kunye nabo baphila nezifo ezifana nomfutho wegazi ophezulu nesishukela esihlala sikhathaza abantu abaninzi kakhulu ngezikhathi zasebusika obubandayo kule mimandla yethu emakhaya. Umnyango usebenzise imitholampilo ehambahambayo ebuye yazisa uncedo lwamayeza rhoqo emakhaya ukuze abantu bangahlupheki ngenxa yokungabi nazo iimali zokuhamba ukuya ezibhedlela ezinkulu ezidolophini ezikude. Odokotela nabahlengikazi bendawo bakhuthaze abahlali ukuba basebenzise la mathuba okuhlolwa mahhala kwaye balandele neengcebiso ezinhle zezempilo malunga nokudla ukudla okunempilo okulinywa ezingadini zasemakhaya ukwakha amajoni omzimba amele ukuba omelele.

Lolu phulo lokufundisa luholwa yizisebenzi zezempilo zomphakathi ezihambela imizi ngemizi zishiya iikhondomu zasimahla zikhombisa nabantu abatsha indlela efanelekileyo yokuziphatha nemfundo yokuzihlonipha ukunqanda ukwanda kwezi zifo ezibulala isizwe sethu. Abahlali bakwazile nokufumana uncedo lokuhlolwa igazi labo mahhala khona lapho emakhaya abo kwaye abafunyaniswa benale miba bafakelwe kwangoko kwiinkqubo zonyango lwamayeza e-ARV anikezelwa ngurhulumente mahhala kuzo zonke izikhungo zezempilo zelizwe. Isebe lezempilo liqinisekisile ukuba la mayeza ahlala ekhona kwaye akukho namnye ummi ekumele ukuba aswle amayeza akhe ngenxa yokungabikho kwawo emahgovisini ezempilo kamasipala wasendaweni yakubo kulo nyaka.

Lolu hlelo luququzelelwe ngodokotela abakhethekileyo abavela ezibhedlela ezinkulu zelizwe ngokubambisana nomnyango wezempilo wesifundazwe kwaye luzise uncedo olukhulu kubantu abangaphezu kwamakhulu amabini kule veki iqalileyo yomsebenzi omhle wentuthuko. Izikhulu zezempilo ziveze ukuba ezi zinhlinzo zenzeka simahla kwiilori ezinkulu ezinezixhobo zale mihla zonyango kwaye abaguli bafumana nezipho zezibuko ezizakubanceda ukuba babone kakuhle emva kokuba amehlo wabo elulame ngokupheleleyo emakhaya abo. Uluntu lonke lonwabile kakhulu ngale nkqubo entle bethi lolu hlobo loncedo lubuyisela ukukhanya nethemba elitsha ebomini babantu abadala abebengasakwazi na ukuzenzela izinto ezincinci zaseshini ekhaya.

Izindlela ezintsha zokwakhiwa kwengqalasizinda yemigwaqo zethulwe kummandla waseNgcobo kule veki ngenjongo yokuphucula indlela ezixhuma imizana emikhulu nezikhungo zezohwebo ezidolophini zale ndawo emva kokuba imigwaqo emidala yonakaliswe ziimvula ezinkulu ezine ezinsukwini ezidluleyo. Lolu hlelo lokwakha luza kufaka phakathi ukubekwa kwetiyela elitsha elithembekileyo, ukwakhiwa kwemisele emikhulu ehambisa amanzi emvula kunye nalawo amabhuloho amanyane ezandla anceda abantwana besikole ukuba bawele imilambo ezele ngexesha lokunetha okukhulu. Masipala wengingqi unikezele ngezimali ezivela kwingxowa-mali yeziphuthumayo kwaye kuqinisekisiwe ukuba lo msebenzi uza kudala amathuba emisebenzi yesikhakhana kubantu abasha abangaphezu kwekhulu abahlala kule miphakathi ethintekayo yentuthuko. Abashayeli beemoto bamkele oku ngolukhulu uvuyo bethi indlela entsha le eza kunciphisa neendleko zokulungisa iimoto zabo ezihlala zitsheka kule migodi emikhulu ebisoloko igcwele kule migwaqo emidala yakudala.

Lolu hlelo lujolise ekupheliseni ingxaki yokunqamuka kwamanzi ebilokhu ihlupha abahlali ixesha elide ngenxa yokuba iipompo ezindala bezivaleka ngenxa kadoti kadoti neentlenga ezisuka emilanjeni emikhulu yasekuqaleni. Izikhulu zikamasipala ziveze ukuthi zizosebenzisa ubuchwepheshe obusezingeni eliphezulu kakhulu ukuhlunga amanzi kwaye kufakwe neemitha ezizokusiza ukulawula ukusetyenziswa kwamanzi ukunqanda ukuba amanzi amaninzi angachitheki phansi ngendlela engekho mthethweni ekhaya. Abahlali bavakalise uvuyo lwabo omkhulu bethi le nkqubo entsha iza kukhulisa isidima semizi yabo kwaye ibasize ukuba baphile impilo enezempilo nehlanzekileyo ekhuselekileyo kunoma yiziphi izifo ezisuka emanzini angcolileyo.

Lo msitho mkhulu uququzelelwe ziinkokheli zoluntu kunye nolutsha lwasendaweni ngenjongo yokufundisa abantwana abasakhulayo ngokubaluleka kokugcina amasiko nezithethe zethu ezintle ezisenza sibe sisonke isizwe esinesidima nethemba elikhulu ebomini bethu bemihla le. Abahlali bakwazile nokonwabela ukudla kwemveli okufana nomngqusho, amasi kunye nenyama eyosiweyo ngendlela yesintu ngethuba kukhuthazwa nabantu abadala ukuba babhale phantsi iintsomi namabali amandulo ukuze angalahleki kwizizukulwane ezizayo zangomuso wethu. Urhulumente wasekuhlaleni uxhase lo mnyhadala ngezixhobo zomsindo kwaye uthembise ukuba lo msitho uza kuba yinto eyenzeka rhoqo ngonyaka kule ndawo ukukhuthaza ezokuvakasha nenkuthazo entle yamasiko.

Kulandela le meko entle kuye kwanconywa kakhulu nabasebenzi bezempilo kunye namakhankatha athathe inxaxheba ekunikezeni imfundo neengcebiso ezifanelekileyo zokhuseleko nenhlanzeko ezikoleni zolwaluka ukunqanda ukuba kubekho imiba yokulimala okanye ukufa kwabantwana njengoko kwakusenzeka kwezinye iindawo ngenxa yokushoda kolwazi. Abazali babantwana babonge kakhulu inkuthazo entle neyemvelo eboniswe ngamalungu onke omphakathi wasendaweni wasekuhlaleni bethi oku kubonisa umoya omhle kakhulu wobunye nebhambiswano elingasaze liphele phakathi kwethu isizwe sakithi jikelele saseMzantsi Afrika kule mihla yonke ezayo yobomi.

Loluhlelo luhloselwe kusondeza tifundvo netinsita tahulumende letisisekelo edvute nemimphakathi kute kuncitshiswe timfashini netindleko letisindako tekuhamba ngetitfuthi titaladi kuya emadolobheni lamakhulu lapho kutholakala khona letingongolo tetinsita. Takhamuzi takule tindzawo betiloku tikhala isikhatsi lesidze ngenxa yekushoda kwemahhovisi lamakhulu aloMnyango wetaseKhaya kanye newetetiMali kule tikhungo tasezilalini lapho lwati lungekho khona ngalokushelela. Manje ngalokusheshisa kwetisebenzi tahulumende letitfunyelwe emakhaya kulesigodzi, bantfwana labasandza kutalwa sebathola titifiketi tabo tekutalwa mahhala ngaphandle kwekuvaleka emigaceni lemidze yetitolo netakhiwo tamasipala. Tikhulu tatiqinisekisa kutsi loluhlelo lutawuchubeka tisebenta kuto tonhe tichonco tetindzawo tasezilalini kute kucinisekiswe kutsi kwekushiywa ngemuva kuyaphela nya kuleli live lakitsi laseNingizimu Afrika.

Loku kwenteka ngetingcoco letibanjelwa etindlunkhulu temakhosi lapho wonhe umhlali anikwa litfuba lekuveta takhe timvo letitawusetjentiswa kubumba umtsetfo wokugcina lotawendluliselwa ePhalamende kungekudala kakhulu kulomnyaka. Tikhulu talomnyango tetemhlaba tichatise kutsi lendlela lensha itawesula yonhe imibango nemisimeto lemidala lebeyivame kubangela kutsi bomake bangasitakali ngemihlaba yelifa ngetizatfu tekwesaba kukhishwa etindzaweni tabo tebukhosi. Umphakathi ukhuthatiwe kutsi uphume ngelubuningi bawo kulemihlangano letako kute kucinisekiswe kutsi emaphuzu labalulekile layatfintfwa ngaphambi kokutsi kuthathwe tincomo tekugcina letitawubeka lelive endzaweni lekahle. Lokusungulwa kwetinhlangano tetolimo kule tindzawo nako kutawesekelwa kakhulu ngetimali letivela esikhungweni sentfuthuko yesive jikelele.

Kulandela letikhalo leticacile letivela emalungwini omphakathi amakomiti etekuphepha ahlangane netikhulu tamasipala kanye nemaphoyisa lendawo kute kulungiswe loluhlelo lolungakatsatfwa kahle lwetinsita tesikhashana kulesigodzi. Kuvele kutsi masipala sewuvele ukhiphe isabelomali lesikhethekile sekutsenga letinye tintfo tekusebenta letifana nemagetsi amagesi kanye nemishini lensha letawesiza kukhanyisa titaladi tethu kule tinsuku letitako tebusika. Ngaloko ke maphoyisa nawo atawukwengeza isibalo semoto letijikelezako ngetinkathi tasebusuku kute kuvikelwe labo labahlala etindzaweni letisengotini kakhulu tebugebengu. Umphakathi uceliwe kutsi ubambisane nalabasebenti bamasipala batise namaphoyisa ngalabo labonisa letakhiwo nemigqa yamagesi ngendlela engekho emtsetfweni jikelele.

Izindlela ezifile kanye namanzi langcolile kule ndzawo yaseMkhondo kudale kutsi takhamuzi tikhombise kunganatseki kwato ngetinkundla tekukhulumisana namasipala ngenhloso yekutsi uhulumeni atfumele tisebenti letitawulungisa lolwoni lolukhulu lolukhona lapha kulemiphakathi yethu. Loku kuholele ekutheni imeya yalesigodzi ihambele kule tindzawo ngalokunentshisekelo yakhe bukhoma kute eve letikhalo kwaye atfule netincumo letisheshako letitawenta kutsi uncedo lufike ngaphandle kwekulibala okungenasidzingo nakancane. Kumenyezelwe kutsi ithenda yekwakhiwa kwetigodlo temanti netiyela nshshisekelo lensha iseyamukelwe kantsi netinkampani letakhako titawucala kusebenta kulesisonto lesitako ngelusito lwelwazi lwemajaha alapha endzaweni labangasebenti. Malunga netemanti emaphayipi lamasha atawufakwa etindzaweni letinyenti kantsi netinkomo nemihlambi yetilwane itawutfola ticu twayo tekunatsa letikhudlwana kude netindzawo lapho takhamuzi tikha khona emanti ekupheka nawekuhlamba imihla ngemihla.

Lesikhungo sitawesekelwa ngetimali letivela etinkampanini letimele kanye nasesikhungweni sentfuthuko yavelonkhe kute letifundvo letitawubekwa khona tibe semgangatfweni lophakeme kakhulu lowemukelekile emaveni amhlaba jikelele. Abafundi labatawubhalisa lapha batawutfola litfuba lekufundza ngetamakhompyutha, kushisela, kwakha ngetitini kanye nekulungisa timoto letonakele tasekhaya nasetinkampanini. Loku kutawuphungula kakhulu lizinga lebugebengu kule tindzawo ngoba lentsha itawube isebenta itfola netitifiketi letingabasiza kufuna imisebenzi lekhokhako ngetikhathi letitako tebomi babo. Abazali babonge kakhulu lesinyathelo batsi silubuyisela emuva litsemba lelabe selilahlekile ngenxa yekutsi bantfwana babo bebahlala etitaladini bangenti lutho lolunenzuzo.

Loku kulandela izikhalazo letinyenti letivela kubahlali labatsi lephunga lelibi lelivela kulodoti libeka timphilo tebantfwana babo esengotini lenkhulu yekutsi batfole tifo letosulelanako letifana neshukhulu nemikhuhlane leminye. Uhulumeni wasendzaweni sewutsite utawutsenga tilinganiso letikhulu tetikitshana tekulahla udoti letitawubekwa etindzaweni letinyenti tasezilokishini kantsi nemaloli latswala udoti atawufika kabili ngeliviki kuto tonhe letingcenye zomphakathi. Malunga nalabo labachubeka nekulahla tinhlavu tetingubo nebeketitolo etitaladini kumenyezelwe kutsi batawunika tinhlawulo letisindako letitawesatshwa ngabo bonhe abantu abangafuni kugcina indzawo ihlobile. Takhamuzi tivumelane ngelivi linye kutsi titawusebentisana nemasipala kuleli phulo lelihle kabi.

Labasebenti batawube bahlobisa imigwaqo, baphawula letinye tindzawo letibonakala tinesidzingo sekulungiswa, bafake netihlahla letinhle letitawenta le live libukeke lilihle kakhulu emehlweni etivakashi letinyenti letifika kule tindzawo ngezikhathi temaholide. Isabelomali saloluhlelo sikhulisiwe kakhulu kulomnyaka kute kufakwe nebamake labafuna kusita etindlini tabo tasekhaya njengoba banyenti babo labakhulisa bantfwana bodwa ngaphandle kwelusito lwetimali letivela kubayise babantfwana. Izikhulu titaladi tikhuthaze wonhe umphakathi kutsi ubasekele labasebenti ngetintfo letifana nemanti ekunatsa nawo gogo ngetinkathi lapho basebenta khona ngaphansi kwelilanga lelishisako kabi kule tinsuku letitako teluhlobo lomnyaka wasekhaya.

Emaphethelong edolobha laseErmelo kucalwe iphrojekthi lenkhulu yekwakha tindlu tolutsho letitawunika takhamuzi letinyenti letihlala etindzaweni tasemijondolo litfuba lekuba netindlu letinesidima letiphephile letinemigqa yamagesi kanye nemanti ahlanzekile langaphakathi etindlini tabo. Lomklamo longakatsatfwa ngetimali letinyenti uhlose kuphelisa lomonakalo lomkhulu lowenteka ngezikhathi temililo nemikhukhulwane letitswalwa timvula letinkulu letivame kudla timphilo tebantfu kule tindawo letisemajengetheni emadolobha asentshonalanga. Tikhulu tetindlu tiqinisekisile kutsi luhlu lwabantu labatawutfola letindlu luhloliwe ngendlela lekahle kakhulu kute kuvikelwe inkohlakalo nalabo labafuna kutsenga letindlu ngendlela engekho emtsetfweni basishiye ngemuva sivese lesine sidzingo sangempela. Abahlali bakwamkele loku ngelutsandvo lolukhulu batsi amaphupho abo sekashekiswe kakhulu kutsi afezeke kulomnyaka emva kwesikhatsi lesidze kabi balindele lolu sizo lolusemqoka etimphilweni tabo.

Lendlela lensha isetjentiswa kute wonhe umnikazi wendzawo atfole itaytile yomhlaba lebonisa kutsi lelo khaya lakhe ngalokusemtsetfweni kwaye kute lotawumkhipha lapho ngaphandle kwetincumo letivela enkantolo lenkhulu yelive lakitsi lakwasidzingo. Ukuba netaytile yomhlaba kusita ngetindlela letinyenti ngoba umndeni sewungakwazi kufaka ticelo tetimali letibambisako emabhankini amakhulu kute ucale amabhizinisi amancinci latasita ekutseni kukhuliswe umnotho wasemakhaya uphungule nendlala emakhaya. Tikhulu tikhuthaze bonhe labanenshisekelo kutsi batswale omazisi babo netincumo letidala letasayinwa ngamakhosi kute lolu hlelo luhambe ngokushesha lokukhulu ngaphandle kwekulibala lokungadingeki.

Izindlela letinsha tekunika tinsita kubantfu labaphila nekukhubazeka tethulwe ngomnyango wetenhlalakahle kuleli sonto ngenhloso yekuphakamisa isidima salabo labasengotini yekulahlwa ngemiphakathi ngetizatfu temitfombo yetimphilo tabo emakhaya. Uhulumeni sewutsite utawunika titulo tetitulo temahhala letitawufaka phakathi kwetihlalo temasondo, iinduku letisizako tekuhamba kanye nemishini yekulalela kubantfu labanetinselelo tekutwa etindlebeni tabo tasekhaya nasetikoleni jikelele. Tisebenti tetenhlalakahle titawuchubeka tihlola letimo etindlini kute kucinisekiswe kutsi labo labancono ngempela bayasitakala kwaye nekucwaswa kwabo kuyaphela kule tikhungo tetolimo netemfundvo telive lakitsi. Amalungu omphakathi akwamkele loku njengenyathelo lelihle lelikhombisa kutsi uhulumeni wasendzaweni uyabatsandza kabi abantu bakhe futsi uyafisa kutsi wonhe ummi ative anesidima nelilungelo lelinganako kuwo wonke amathuba emisebenzi latsatfwako kulesikhatsi lesiphila kuso.

Loluhlelo loluxhaswe ngetimali letivela esikhungweni sentfuthuko yesive, lufundzisa labomake kutsi bangawakha kanjani amabhizinisi ekutfunga tikhwama netimphahla tasesikoleni kanye nekubhaka sinkwa nemakhekhe leti dayiswa kulemiphakathi tabo yasekhaya. Loku kubaluleke kakhulu kulomnyaka ngoba umnotho welive useseveni lelinzima kabi kantsi netikhwama tekutsenga lokuphathelene nekudla tiyandza mihla le ngetindlela letisindako kabi emindenini emnyenti lehluphekile. Labomake labacedze letifundvo batasitwa futsi ngetinalithi netitfombe letitawesiza kukhulisa lomkhiqizo wabo kude nezinga lebelikhona ngaphambili emsebenzini wabo wetandla.

Lolu hlelo lwamandla avuselelekayo lunikeza isisombululo lesihlala njalo ngoba lawamaphompo awakho madinga kagesi ojwayelekile lotisandza kubitfwa ngetimali letinyenti tase-Eskom kulesikhatsi lesiphila kuso ngoku elizweni lakitsi. Tikhulu tetemanti ticacise kutsi lentsha yalapha endzaweni ifundziswe nendlela lekahle yekunakekela letixhobo kute tivikelwe kulabo labafuna kutona tikhungo temphakathi ngetizatfu tetimfuno tabo tobugwebengu. Takhamuzi titise kutsi tiyakujabulela kakhulu loku ngoba tiyasondelana kakhulu nemanti futsi titawukwazi nekuvula tingadi tasetindlini tekutshala imifino letsatfwako kute kulwwe nendlala nobumpofu lobukhona etindlini.

Kulandela letikhalo ikomiti yamasipala ihlangene nemnyango wetemisebenzi yemphakathi kute kukhishwe sikhwama lesiphuthumako lesitawesiza kutsi tinkampani letakhako ticale kusebenta ngalokushesha kulomgwaqo ngaphambi kokutsi tibe tinyenti tingozi tetimoto. Kuvele kutsi lo mklamo utawunika lentsha yalapha endzaweni ematfuba emisebenzi yesikhashana futsi batawuhamba ngetitifiketi letitawubasiza ngetinkathi letitako tebomi babo lapho bafuna imisebenzi lekhudlwana ezweni. Bashayeli beemoto bamkele loku ngelutsandvo lolukhulu batsi besekulikhuni kabi kuhamba kulemigwaqo lemibi lebeyikhinyabeza kakhulu netikhwama tabo n ngenxa yekulimala kwetimoto tabo njalo.

Izindlela letinsha tekulawula kukhishwa kwetibonelelo tetimali tahulumeni letatiwa nge-SASSA tethulwe kuleli sonto ngenhloso yekuphungula inkohlakalo etindzaweni lapho gogo namkhulu balanda khona letimali tabo tanyanga zonke tasekhaya. Umnyango sewutsite wonhe umndeni kumele ucinisekise kutsi loyo lolandako nguye ngempela lowemukelekile kulesisikhungo sentsisekelo ngelusito lwemishini lensha lesebentisa tithonjana teminwe netitfombe tebuso bemutfu lowenta lesicelo. Loku kulandela imibiko leminyenti yekutsi kukhona bantfu labasaphila ngetimali tebantu labasandza kushona noma labo labatswala omazisi bemgunyathi labangasiwo emtsetfweni wakwasidzingo welive lakitsi laseNingizimu Afrika. Uhulumeni ucinisekise kutsi emaphoyisa atawube nawo ekhona kule tikhungo tekuhambisa letimali kute kuvikelwe labo labadzala kulabo labafuna kubaphuthuma tikhwama tabo etitaladini emva kokuba baphumile etitolo.

Lolu hlelo lwentuthuko luhloselwe kuphungula lelo gebe lelisele isikhatsi lesidze kukhona phakathi kwetikhungo tetemfundvo tasedolobheni kanye nalesemakhaya letingavamile kutsi tibe netintfo letenele tekusebenta temalungiselelo eemviwo tetakhamuzi tethu letisakhula. Othisha bazo tonhe letikole baqeqeshiwe kule tinyanga letidlekile ngetindlela letinsha tekufundzisa kule tikhungo letinsha tabo kute lwati lwabo lube semgangatfweni lophakeme kakhulu. Abafundi bakhombise umdlandla lomalungiselelo laphakeme kakhulu batsi bafisa kakhulu kutsi le live liyasondelana nabo ngetingcenye tetemfundvo letinesidima lesiphelele lesemukelekile emhlabeni wonhe.

Letimoto tetamayeza titawube tihamba nabo dokotela nabahlengikazi labalungele kuhlola tifo letifana nemfutho weligazi lophakeme, sifo sikashukela kanye netifo letinyenti letosulelanako letivame kukhathaza kakhulu kulesisikhungo sasekhaya setfu. Abahlali baceliwe kutsi baphume ngelubuningi babo kule tikhungo ngezinsuku lapho letimoto tifika ngakhona kulesigodzi kute batfole lolu sizo lwamahhala lolubuyisela emuva isidima nelitsemba leliphakeme kakhulu emphakathini jikelele wethu. Uhulumeni utsite emayeza ahlala ekhona kwaye kute lotawushiywa ngaphandle ngetizatfu tekutsi umndeni wakhe uhluphekile kuleli live lakitsi elisentshonalanga lesigodzi sethu.

Lemisebenzi leyentiwa ngaphansi kokukhokela kwetetemisebenzi yemphakathi, inikela ngemisebenzi yesikhashana kubantu labasha labangaphezu kwamashumi lasikhombisa alapha kulesigodzi kule tinsuku letidlekile tebomi babo njengoba batfola netimali letisita emakhaya. Masipala sewutsite utawuchubeka utfumela tisebenti letitawubuka letakhiwo njalo ngenyanga kute kucinisekiswe kutsi letimvula letitako tebusika neteluhlobo tishiya imiphakathi yetfu isendzaweni lekahle kakhulu lephephile kunoma yikuphi lomonakalo. Abahlali baceliwe kutsi bangalahli udoti kulemisele yetimvula ngoba loku kubangela kutsi letiyela tivaleke kwaye letimvula ticekele phansi tintfo tabo tasekhaya.

Kulandela letinhlupheko letisindako emakomiti abahlali ahlangane netikhulu ta-Eskom kanye nabameli bamasipala kute kulungiswe luhlelo lolusha lolutawesiza kutsi labasebenti babeke letinsita ngokushesha lokukhulu kulomnyaka we-2026 lowasungulwa njengemnyaka wetentfuthuko yesive. Kumenyezelwe kutsi letintambo tetamagesi titawufakwa kuto tonhe letingcenye letisele ngaphandle kwaye netinkampani letakhako titawutsenga lwati lwalentsha yalapha endzaweni kulemisebenzi yesikhashana. Umphakathi uceliwe kutsi ubekezele kulesisikhungo sentfuthuko kwaye usebentisane kahle kakhulu nalabo abatsunyelwe kusita kuleli phulo lelihle kabi emphakathini.
